search_text: Near-Optimal Search Time in $δ$-Optimal Space, and Vice Versa $δ$-最优空间中的近乎最优搜索时间，反之亦然 Two recent lower bounds on the compressibility of repetitive sequences, $δ\le γ$, have received much attention. It has been shown that a length-$n$ string $S$ over an alphabet of size $σ$ can be represented within the optimal $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ space, and further, that within that space one can find all the $occ$ occurrences in $S$ of any length-$m$ pattern in time $O(m\log n + occ \log^εn)$ for any constant $ε>0$. Instead, the near-optimal search time $O(m+({occ+1})\log^εn)$ has been achieved only within $O(γ\log\frac{n}γ)$ space. Both results are based on considerably different locally consistent parsing techniques. The question of whether the better search time could be supported within the $δ$-optimal space remained open. In this paper, we prove that both techniques can indeed be combined to obtain the best of both worlds: $O(m+({occ+1})\log^εn)$ search time within $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ space. Moreover, the number of occurrences can be computed in $O(m+\log^{2+ε}n)$ time within $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ space. We also show that an extra sublogarithmic factor on top of this space enables optimal $O(m+occ)$ search time, whereas an extra logarithmic factor enables optimal $O(m)$ counting time. 最近重复序列可压缩性的两个下界 $δ\le γ$ 受到了广泛关注。已经证明，大小为 $σ$ 的字母表上的长度为 $n$ 的字符串 $S$ 可以在最佳 $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ 空间内表示，而且，在该空间内，对于任何常数 $ε>0$，可以在 $O(m\log n + occ \log^εn)$ 时间内找到任何长度 $m$ 模式的 $S$ 中出现的所有 $occ$ 。相反，接近最优的搜索时间 $O(m+({occ+1})\log^εn)$ 仅在 $O(γ\log\frac{n}γ)$ 空间内实现。这两个结果都基于相当不同的局部一致解析技术。是否可以在 $δ$ 最优空间内支持更好的搜索时间的问题仍然悬而未决。在本文中，我们证明这两种技术确实可以结合起来以获得两全其美的效果：在 $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ 空间内的 $O(m+({occ+1})\log^εn)$ 搜索时间。此外，可以在 $O(δ\log\tfrac{n\log σ}{δ\log n})$ 空间内以 $O(m+\log^{2+ε}n)$ 时间计算出现次数。我们还表明，在此空间之上的额外次对数因子可实现最佳的 $O(m+occ)$ 搜索时间，而额外的对数因子可实现最佳的 $O(m)$ 计数时间。 本文研究如何在δ-最优空间内实现近似最优的搜索时间，并探讨空间与时间复杂度的权衡问题。 Tomasz Kociumaka,Gonzalo Navarro,Francisco Olivares cs.DS

authors_text: Luca Carlone,Kasra Khosoussi,Vasileios Tzoumas,Golnaz Habibi,Markus Ryll,Rajat Talak,Jingnan Shi,Pasquale Antonante
title: Visual Navigation for Autonomous Vehicles: An Open-source Hands-on Robotics Course at MIT
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的视觉导航：麻省理工学院的开源实践机器人课程
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Integrated STEM Education Conference
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Integrated STEM Education Conference
abstract: This paper reports on the development, execution, and open-sourcing of a new robotics course at MIT. The course is a modern take on "Visual Navigation for Autonomous Vehicles" (VNAV) and targets first-year graduate students and senior undergraduates with prior exposure to robotics. VNAV has the goal of preparing the students to perform research in robotics and vision-based navigation, with emphasis on drones and self-driving cars. The course spans the entire autonomous navigation pipeline; as such, it covers a broad set of topics, including geometric control and trajectory optimization, 2D and 3D computer vision, visual and visual-inertial odometry, place recognition, simultaneous localization and mapping, and geometric deep learning for perception. VNAV has three key features. First, it bridges traditional computer vision and robotics courses by exposing the challenges that are specific to embodied intelligence, e.g., limited computation and need for just-in-time and robust perception to close the loop over control and decision making. Second, it strikes a balance between depth and breadth by combining rigorous technical notes (including topics that are less explored in typical robotics courses, e.g., on-manifold optimization) with slides and videos showcasing the latest research results. Third, it provides a compelling approach to hands-on robotics education by leveraging a physical drone platform (mostly suitable for small residential courses) and a photo-realistic Unity-based simulator (open-source and scalable to large online courses). VNAV has been offered at MIT in the Falls of 2018-2021 and is now publicly available on MIT OpenCourseWare (OCW).

The course is a modern take on "Visual Navigation for Autonomous Vehicles" (VNAV) and targets first-year graduate students and senior undergraduates with prior exposure to robotics. VNAV has the goal of preparing the students to perform research in robotics and vision-based navigation, with emphasis on drones and self-driving cars. The course spans the entire autonomous navigation pipeline; as such, it covers a broad set of topics, including geometric control and trajectory optimization, 2D and 3D computer vision, visual and visual-inertial odometry, place recognition, simultaneous localization and mapping, and geometric deep learning for perception. VNAV has three key features. First, it bridges traditional computer vision and robotics courses by exposing the challenges that are specific to embodied intelligence, e.g., limited computation and need for just-in-time and robust perception to close the loop over control and decision making. Second, it strikes a balance between depth and breadth by combining rigorous technical notes (including topics that are less explored in typical robotics courses, e.g., on-manifold optimization) with slides and videos showcasing the latest research results. Third, it provides a compelling approach to hands-on robotics education by leveraging a physical drone platform (mostly suitable for small residential courses) and a photo-realistic Unity-based simulator (open-source and scalable to large online courses). VNAV has been offered at MIT in the Falls of 2018-2021 and is now publicly available on MIT OpenCourseWare (OCW).
abstract_zh: 本文报告了麻省理工学院新机器人课程的开发、执行和开源。该课程是对“自动驾驶车辆视觉导航”(VNAV) 的现代诠释，面向之前接触过机器人技术的一年级研究生和高年级本科生。 VNAV 的目标是帮助学生做好机器人和基于视觉的导航研究的准备，重点是无人机和自动驾驶汽车。该课程涵盖整个自主导航流程；因此，它涵盖了广泛的主题，包括几何控制和轨迹优化、2D 和 3D 计算机视觉、视觉和视觉惯性里程计、地点识别、同步定位和地图绘制以及用于感知的几何深度学习。 VNAV 具有三个关键特征。首先，它通过暴露具体化智能所特有的挑战，例如有限的计算以及需要及时和强大的感知来闭合控制和决策的循环，从而将传统的计算机视觉和机器人技术课程联系起来。其次，它通过将严格的技术说明（包括典型机器人课程中较少探讨的主题，例如流形优化）与展示最新研究成果的幻灯片和视频相结合，在深度和广度之间取得平衡。第三，它通过利用物理无人机平台（主要适合小型住宅课程）和基于 Unity 的逼真模拟器（开源且可扩展至大型在线课程），为机器人实践教育提供了一种引人注目的方法。 VNAV 已于 2018-2021 年秋季在麻省理工学院提供，现已在麻省理工学院开放课程 (OCW) 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了麻省理工学院开发并开源的《自主车辆视觉导航》研究生课程，涵盖从理论到实践的完整自主导航技术体系。
AI.motivation: 旨在弥合传统计算机视觉与机器人课程间的鸿沟，通过具身智能挑战（如计算限制与实时感知）培养机器人导航研究能力，并提供兼顾深度与广度的教学方案。
AI.method: 结合严谨的技术讲义（含流形优化等前沿主题）、最新研究成果视频演示，以及基于物理无人机和Unity高仿真器的实践平台，支持小班教学与大规模在线课程。
AI.result: 课程于2018-2021年秋季在MIT开设，现已通过MIT OCW公开，为机器人导航领域提供系统化教学资源与开源实践框架。
AI.conclusion: 该课程模式有效整合了理论深度与工程实践，为自主车辆与无人机领域的教育和研究提供了可复用的范式。

title: Robots in healthcare as envisioned by care professionals
title_zh: 护理专业人员设想的医疗保健机器人
abstract: As AI-enabled robots enter the realm of healthcare and caregiving, it is important to consider how they will address the dimensions of care and how they will interact not just with the direct receivers of assistance, but also with those who provide it (e.g., caregivers, healthcare providers etc.). Caregiving in its best form addresses challenges in a multitude of dimensions of a person's life: from physical, to social-emotional and sometimes even existential dimensions (such as issues surrounding life and death). In this study we use semi-structured qualitative interviews administered to healthcare professions with multidisciplinary backgrounds (physicians, public health professionals, social workers, and chaplains) to understand their expectations regarding the possible roles robots may play in the healthcare ecosystem in the future. We found that participants drew inspiration in their mental models of robots from both works of science fiction but also from existing commercial robots. Participants envisioned roles for robots in the full spectrum of care, from physical to social-emotional and even existential-spiritual dimensions, but also pointed out numerous limitations that robots have in being able to provide comprehensive humanistic care. While no dimension of care was deemed as exclusively the realm of humans, participants stressed the importance of caregiving humans as the primary providers of comprehensive care, with robots assisting with more narrowly focused tasks. Throughout the paper we point out the encouraging confluence of ideas between the expectations of healthcare providers and research trends in the human-robot interaction (HRI) literature.
summary: As AI-enabled robots enter the realm of healthcare and caregiving, it is important to consider how they will address the dimensions of care and how they will interact not just with the direct receivers of assistance, but also with those who provide it (e.g., caregivers, healthcare providers etc.). Caregiving in its best form addresses challenges in a multitude of dimensions of a person's life: from physical, to social-emotional and sometimes even existential dimensions (such as issues surrounding life and death). In this study we use semi-structured qualitative interviews administered to healthcare professions with multidisciplinary backgrounds (physicians, public health professionals, social workers, and chaplains) to understand their expectations regarding the possible roles robots may play in the healthcare ecosystem in the future. We found that participants drew inspiration in their mental models of robots from both works of science fiction but also from existing commercial robots. Participants envisioned roles for robots in the full spectrum of care, from physical to social-emotional and even existential-spiritual dimensions, but also pointed out numerous limitations that robots have in being able to provide comprehensive humanistic care. While no dimension of care was deemed as exclusively the realm of humans, participants stressed the importance of caregiving humans as the primary providers of comprehensive care, with robots assisting with more narrowly focused tasks. Throughout the paper we point out the encouraging confluence of ideas between the expectations of healthcare providers and research trends in the human-robot interaction (HRI) literature.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能机器人进入医疗保健和护理领域，重要的是要考虑它们将如何解决护理方面的问题，以及它们如何不仅与援助的直接接受者互动，而且还与援助提供者（例如护理人员、医疗保健提供者等）互动。最佳形式的护理可以解决一个人生活的多个层面的挑战：从身体到社会情感，有时甚至是存在层面（例如围绕生死的问题）。在这项研究中，我们对具有多学科背景的医疗保健专业人员（医生、公共卫生专业人员、社会工作者和牧师）进行半结构化定性访谈，以了解他们对机器人未来在医疗保健生态系统中可能扮演的角色的期望。我们发现，参与者从科幻小说和现有的商业机器人中汲取了机器人心理模型的灵感。参与者设想了机器人在从身体到社会情感甚至存在精神层面的全方位护理中的作用，但也指出了机器人在提供全面的人文护理方面存在的许多局限性。虽然没有任何一个方面的护理被认为是人类独有的领域，但参与者强调了护理人类作为全面护理的主要提供者的重要性，而机器人则协助完成更集中的任务。在整篇论文中，我们指出医疗保健提供者的期望与人机交互（HRI）文献中的研究趋势之间令人鼓舞的思想融合。

AI.tldr: 探讨医疗护理专业人员对未来医疗机器人角色的设想及其在护理生态系统中的潜在作用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI机器人进入医疗领域，需明确其如何满足护理的多维需求（身体、社会情感及存在层面）并协调与医护人员及患者的互动。
AI.method: 通过半结构化定性访谈，收集多学科医疗从业者（医生、社工、牧师等）对机器人未来角色的期望与看法。
AI.result: 受访者认为机器人可在护理全领域发挥作用，但无法替代人类提供全面人文关怀，强调人类护理人员应主导综合护理，机器人辅助特定任务。
AI.conclusion: 医疗从业者的期望与人机交互研究趋势一致，未来机器人应作为辅助工具，与人类护理人员协同提升医疗服务质量。

title: Adaptive Local Neighborhood-based Neural Networks for MR Image Reconstruction from Undersampled Data
title_zh: 用于欠采样数据重建 MR 图像的自适应局部邻域神经网络
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
abstract: Recent medical image reconstruction techniques focus on generating high-quality medical images suitable for clinical use at the lowest possible cost and with the fewest possible adverse effects on patients. Recent works have shown significant promise for reconstructing MR images from sparsely sampled k-space data using deep learning. In this work, we propose a technique that rapidly estimates deep neural networks directly at reconstruction time by fitting them on small adaptively estimated neighborhoods of a training set. In brief, our algorithm alternates between searching for neighbors in a data set that are similar to the test reconstruction, and training a local network on these neighbors followed by updating the test reconstruction. Because our reconstruction model is learned on a dataset that is in some sense similar to the image being reconstructed rather than being fit on a large, diverse training set, it is more adaptive to new scans. It can also handle changes in training sets and flexible scan settings, while being relatively fast. Our approach, dubbed LONDN-MRI, was validated on multiple data sets using deep unrolled reconstruction networks. Reconstructions were performed at four fold and eight fold undersampling of k-space with 1D variable-density random phase-encode undersampling masks. Our results demonstrate that our proposed locally-trained method produces higher-quality reconstructions compared to models trained globally on larger datasets as well as other scan-adaptive methods.
summary: Recent medical image reconstruction techniques focus on generating high-quality medical images suitable for clinical use at the lowest possible cost and with the fewest possible adverse effects on patients. Recent works have shown significant promise for reconstructing MR images from sparsely sampled k-space data using deep learning. In this work, we propose a technique that rapidly estimates deep neural networks directly at reconstruction time by fitting them on small adaptively estimated neighborhoods of a training set. In brief, our algorithm alternates between searching for neighbors in a data set that are similar to the test reconstruction, and training a local network on these neighbors followed by updating the test reconstruction. Because our reconstruction model is learned on a dataset that is in some sense similar to the image being reconstructed rather than being fit on a large, diverse training set, it is more adaptive to new scans. It can also handle changes in training sets and flexible scan settings, while being relatively fast. Our approach, dubbed LONDN-MRI, was validated on multiple data sets using deep unrolled reconstruction networks. Reconstructions were performed at four fold and eight fold undersampling of k-space with 1D variable-density random phase-encode undersampling masks. Our results demonstrate that our proposed locally-trained method produces higher-quality reconstructions compared to models trained globally on larger datasets as well as other scan-adaptive methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的医学图像重建技术专注于以尽可能低的成本生成适合临床使用的高质量医学图像，并对患者产生尽可能少的不良影响。最近的工作显示出使用深度学习从稀疏采样的 k 空间数据重建 MR 图像的巨大前景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种技术，通过将深度神经网络拟合到训练集的小型自适应估计邻域上，在重建时直接快速估计深度神经网络。简而言之，我们的算法交替搜索数据集中与测试重建相似的邻居，并在这些邻居上训练本地网络，然后更新测试重建。因为我们的重建模型是在某种意义上类似于正在重建的图像的数据集上学习的，而不是适合大型、多样化的训练集，所以它更适合新的扫描。它还可以处理训练集和灵活扫描设置的变化，同时相对较快。我们的方法被称为 LONDN-MRI，使用深度展开重建网络在多个数据集上进行了验证。使用一维可变密度随机相位编码欠采样掩模对 k 空间进行四倍和八倍欠采样进行重建。我们的结果表明，与在较大数据集上全局训练的模型以及其他扫描自适应方法相比，我们提出的本地训练方法可以产生更高质量的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应局部邻域的深度神经网络方法LONDN-MRI，用于从欠采样的MRI数据中快速重建高质量医学图像。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI重建方法在处理新扫描或变化的训练数据时适应性不足，且计算成本较高，需开发更灵活高效的重建技术。
AI.method: 通过在重建时动态搜索训练集中与当前测试样本相似的局部邻域，在小规模邻域数据上快速训练局部网络，并迭代更新重建结果。
AI.result: 在四倍和八倍k空间欠采样数据集上，LONDN-MRI的重建质量优于全局训练模型及其他扫描自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部邻域训练方法在适应性、计算效率和重建质量上具有优势，适用于临床MRI快速重建场景。

authors_text: Chau Yi Li,Ricardo Sánchez-Matilla,Ali Shahin Shamsabadi,Riccardo Mazzon,Andrea Cavallaro
title: On the reversibility of adversarial attacks
title_zh: 论对抗性攻击的可逆性
abstract: Adversarial attacks modify images with perturbations that change the prediction of classifiers. These modified images, known as adversarial examples, expose the vulnerabilities of deep neural network classifiers. In this paper, we investigate the predictability of the mapping between the classes predicted for original images and for their corresponding adversarial examples. This predictability relates to the possibility of retrieving the original predictions and hence reversing the induced misclassification. We refer to this property as the reversibility of an adversarial attack, and quantify reversibility as the accuracy in retrieving the original class or the true class of an adversarial example. We present an approach that reverses the effect of an adversarial attack on a classifier using a prior set of classification results. We analyse the reversibility of state-of-the-art adversarial attacks on benchmark classifiers and discuss the factors that affect the reversibility.
summary: Adversarial attacks modify images with perturbations that change the prediction of classifiers. These modified images, known as adversarial examples, expose the vulnerabilities of deep neural network classifiers. In this paper, we investigate the predictability of the mapping between the classes predicted for original images and for their corresponding adversarial examples. This predictability relates to the possibility of retrieving the original predictions and hence reversing the induced misclassification. We refer to this property as the reversibility of an adversarial attack, and quantify reversibility as the accuracy in retrieving the original class or the true class of an adversarial example. We present an approach that reverses the effect of an adversarial attack on a classifier using a prior set of classification results. We analyse the reversibility of state-of-the-art adversarial attacks on benchmark classifiers and discuss the factors that affect the reversibility.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击通过扰动修改图像，从而改变分类器的预测。这些修改后的图像（称为对抗性示例）暴露了深度神经网络分类器的漏洞。在本文中，我们研究了原始图像预测的类别与其相应的对抗性示例之间的映射的可预测性。这种可预测性涉及检索原始预测并因此逆转引起的错误分类的可能性。我们将此属性称为对抗性攻击的可逆性，并将可逆性量化为检索对抗性示例的原始类或真实类的准确性。我们提出了一种方法，使用先前的一组分类结果来逆转对抗性攻击对分类器的影响。我们分析了对基准分类器最先进的对抗性攻击的可逆性，并讨论了影响可逆性的因素。

AI.tldr: 研究对抗攻击的可逆性，即通过分析对抗样本与原始图像预测类别的映射关系，探讨是否能逆转对抗攻击导致的误分类。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击揭示了深度神经网络的脆弱性，而现有研究多关注攻击生成，较少探讨如何逆转其影响，因此研究对抗攻击的可逆性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出一种基于先验分类结果的方法，通过分析对抗样本与原始图像预测之间的映射关系，逆转对抗攻击对分类器的影响。
AI.result: 实验分析了多种先进对抗攻击在基准分类器上的可逆性，发现不同攻击方法的可逆性存在差异，并识别出影响可逆性的关键因素，如攻击强度和模型结构。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击的可逆性取决于攻击方法和模型特性，恢复原始预测在一定程度上可行，为防御对抗攻击提供了新思路。

search_text: On the reversibility of adversarial attacks 论对抗性攻击的可逆性 Adversarial attacks modify images with perturbations that change the prediction of classifiers. These modified images, known as adversarial examples, expose the vulnerabilities of deep neural network classifiers. In this paper, we investigate the predictability of the mapping between the classes predicted for original images and for their corresponding adversarial examples. This predictability relates to the possibility of retrieving the original predictions and hence reversing the induced misclassification. We refer to this property as the reversibility of an adversarial attack, and quantify reversibility as the accuracy in retrieving the original class or the true class of an adversarial example. We present an approach that reverses the effect of an adversarial attack on a classifier using a prior set of classification results. We analyse the reversibility of state-of-the-art adversarial attacks on benchmark classifiers and discuss the factors that affect the reversibility. 对抗性攻击通过扰动修改图像，从而改变分类器的预测。这些修改后的图像（称为对抗性示例）暴露了深度神经网络分类器的漏洞。在本文中，我们研究了原始图像预测的类别与其相应的对抗性示例之间的映射的可预测性。这种可预测性涉及检索原始预测并因此逆转引起的错误分类的可能性。我们将此属性称为对抗性攻击的可逆性，并将可逆性量化为检索对抗性示例的原始类或真实类的准确性。我们提出了一种方法，使用先前的一组分类结果来逆转对抗性攻击对分类器的影响。我们分析了对基准分类器最先进的对抗性攻击的可逆性，并讨论了影响可逆性的因素。 研究对抗攻击的可逆性，即通过分析对抗样本与原始图像预测类别的映射关系，探讨是否能逆转对抗攻击导致的误分类。 Chau Yi Li,Ricardo Sánchez-Matilla,Ali Shahin Shamsabadi,Riccardo Mazzon,Andrea Cavallaro cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Dynamic Linear Transformer for 3D Biomedical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 生物医学图像分割的动态线性变压器
abstract: Transformer-based neural networks have surpassed promising performance on many biomedical image segmentation tasks due to a better global information modeling from the self-attention mechanism. However, most methods are still designed for 2D medical images while ignoring the essential 3D volume information. The main challenge for 3D transformer-based segmentation methods is the quadratic complexity introduced by the self-attention mechanism \cite{vaswani2017attention}. In this paper, we propose a novel transformer architecture for 3D medical image segmentation using an encoder-decoder style architecture with linear complexity. Furthermore, we newly introduce a dynamic token concept to further reduce the token numbers for self-attention calculation. Taking advantage of the global information modeling, we provide uncertainty maps from different hierarchy stages. We evaluate this method on multiple challenging CT pancreas segmentation datasets. Our promising results show that our novel 3D Transformer-based segmentor could provide promising highly feasible segmentation performance and accurate uncertainty quantification using single annotation. Code is available https://github.com/freshman97/LinTransUNet.
summary: Transformer-based neural networks have surpassed promising performance on many biomedical image segmentation tasks due to a better global information modeling from the self-attention mechanism. However, most methods are still designed for 2D medical images while ignoring the essential 3D volume information. The main challenge for 3D transformer-based segmentation methods is the quadratic complexity introduced by the self-attention mechanism \cite{vaswani2017attention}. In this paper, we propose a novel transformer architecture for 3D medical image segmentation using an encoder-decoder style architecture with linear complexity. Furthermore, we newly introduce a dynamic token concept to further reduce the token numbers for self-attention calculation. Taking advantage of the global information modeling, we provide uncertainty maps from different hierarchy stages. We evaluate this method on multiple challenging CT pancreas segmentation datasets. Our promising results show that our novel 3D Transformer-based segmentor could provide promising highly feasible segmentation performance and accurate uncertainty quantification using single annotation. Code is available https://github.com/freshman97/LinTransUNet.
abstract_zh: 由于自注意力机制提供了更好的全局信息建模，基于 Transformer 的神经网络在许多生物医学图像分割任务上已经超越了有希望的性能。然而，大多数方法仍然是针对 2D 医学图像而设计的，而忽略了必要的 3D 体积信息。基于 3D Transformer 的分割方法的主要挑战是自注意力机制 \cite{vaswani2017attention} 引入的二次复杂度。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 医学图像分割的新型 Transformer 架构，使用具有线性复杂度的编码器-解码器风格架构。此外，我们新引入了动态令牌概念，以进一步减少自注意力计算的令牌数量。利用全局信息模型，我们提供了不同层次阶段的不确定性图。我们在多个具有挑战性的 CT 胰腺分割数据集上评估了该方法。我们令人鼓舞的结果表明，我们新颖的基于 3D Transformer 的分割器可以使用单一注释提供有前途的高度可行的分割性能和准确的不确定性量化。代码可在 https://github.com/freshman97/LinTransUNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态线性Transformer的3D医学图像分割方法，解决传统方法在3D体积信息建模和计算复杂度方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法多针对2D医学图像，忽视3D体积信息，且自注意力机制导致二次复杂度，限制了其在3D分割中的应用。
AI.method: 设计具有线性复杂度的编码器-解码器架构，引入动态token机制减少计算量，并通过多层级全局信息建模生成不确定性图。
AI.result: 在多个CT胰腺分割数据集上验证，方法在单标注情况下实现了高精度分割和准确的不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的3D线性Transformer分割器有效解决了3D医学图像分割中的计算复杂度和体积信息建模问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zirui Zang,Renukanandan Tumu,Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Rahul Mangharam
title: Winning the 3rd Japan Automotive AI Challenge -- Autonomous Racing with the Autoware.Auto Open Source Software Stack
title_zh: 凭借 Autoware.Auto 开源软件堆栈赢得第三届日本汽车人工智能挑战赛——自动驾驶赛车
comment: Accepted at Autoware Workshop at IV 2022
comments: Accepted at Autoware Workshop at IV 2022
abstract: The 3rd Japan Automotive AI Challenge was an international online autonomous racing challenge where 164 teams competed in December 2021. This paper outlines the winning strategy to this competition, and the advantages and challenges of using the Autoware.Auto open source autonomous driving platform for multi-agent racing. Our winning approach includes a lane-switching opponent overtaking strategy, a global raceline optimization, and the integration of various tools from Autoware.Auto including a Model-Predictive Controller. We describe the use of perception, planning and control modules for high-speed racing applications and provide experience-based insights on working with Autoware.Auto. While our approach is a rule-based strategy that is suitable for non-interactive opponents, it provides a good reference and benchmark for learning-enabled approaches.
summary: The 3rd Japan Automotive AI Challenge was an international online autonomous racing challenge where 164 teams competed in December 2021. This paper outlines the winning strategy to this competition, and the advantages and challenges of using the Autoware.Auto open source autonomous driving platform for multi-agent racing. Our winning approach includes a lane-switching opponent overtaking strategy, a global raceline optimization, and the integration of various tools from Autoware.Auto including a Model-Predictive Controller. We describe the use of perception, planning and control modules for high-speed racing applications and provide experience-based insights on working with Autoware.Auto. While our approach is a rule-based strategy that is suitable for non-interactive opponents, it provides a good reference and benchmark for learning-enabled approaches.
abstract_zh: 第三届日本汽车人工智能挑战赛是一项国际在线自动驾驶赛车挑战赛，于 2021 年 12 月有 164 支队伍参加。本文概述了本次比赛的获胜策略，以及使用 Autoware.Auto 开源自动驾驶平台进行多智能体赛车的优势和挑战。我们的致胜方法包括换道对手超车策略、全局赛道优化以及 Autoware.Auto 的各种工具（包括模型预测控制器）的集成。我们描述了高速赛车应用中感知、规划和控制模块的使用，并提供了使用 Autoware.Auto 时基于经验的见解。虽然我们的方法是基于规则的策略，适合非交互式对手，但它为支持学习的方法提供了很好的参考和基准。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了使用Autoware.Auto开源平台在第三届日本汽车AI挑战赛中获胜的自动驾驶赛车策略
AI.motivation: 验证Autoware.Auto开源平台在多智能体赛车中的有效性，并探讨其在高速赛车场景下的应用优势与挑战
AI.method: 结合车道切换超车策略、全局赛道线优化及模型预测控制器，集成Autoware.Auto的感知、规划与控制模块，实现高速赛车的自主控制
AI.result: 成功赢得第三届日本汽车AI挑战赛，验证了Autoware.Auto在自动驾驶赛车中的可行性与高效性
AI.conclusion: 基于规则的策略在非交互式对手中表现优异，为后续学习驱动的自动驾驶赛车研究提供了参考基准

search_text: Winning the 3rd Japan Automotive AI Challenge -- Autonomous Racing with the Autoware.Auto Open Source Software Stack 凭借 Autoware.Auto 开源软件堆栈赢得第三届日本汽车人工智能挑战赛——自动驾驶赛车 The 3rd Japan Automotive AI Challenge was an international online autonomous racing challenge where 164 teams competed in December 2021. This paper outlines the winning strategy to this competition, and the advantages and challenges of using the Autoware.Auto open source autonomous driving platform for multi-agent racing. Our winning approach includes a lane-switching opponent overtaking strategy, a global raceline optimization, and the integration of various tools from Autoware.Auto including a Model-Predictive Controller. We describe the use of perception, planning and control modules for high-speed racing applications and provide experience-based insights on working with Autoware.Auto. While our approach is a rule-based strategy that is suitable for non-interactive opponents, it provides a good reference and benchmark for learning-enabled approaches. 第三届日本汽车人工智能挑战赛是一项国际在线自动驾驶赛车挑战赛，于 2021 年 12 月有 164 支队伍参加。本文概述了本次比赛的获胜策略，以及使用 Autoware.Auto 开源自动驾驶平台进行多智能体赛车的优势和挑战。我们的致胜方法包括换道对手超车策略、全局赛道优化以及 Autoware.Auto 的各种工具（包括模型预测控制器）的集成。我们描述了高速赛车应用中感知、规划和控制模块的使用，并提供了使用 Autoware.Auto 时基于经验的见解。虽然我们的方法是基于规则的策略，适合非交互式对手，但它为支持学习的方法提供了很好的参考和基准。 本文介绍了使用Autoware.Auto开源平台在第三届日本汽车AI挑战赛中获胜的自动驾驶赛车策略 Zirui Zang,Renukanandan Tumu,Johannes Betz,Hongrui Zheng,Rahul Mangharam cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Stephan Wäldchen,Kartikey Sharma,Berkant Turan,Max Zimmer,Sebastian Pokutta
title: Interpretability Guarantees with Merlin-Arthur Classifiers
title_zh: Merlin-Arthur 分类器的可解释性保证
comment: AISTATS24 Camera-Ready Version, 34 pages total (9 pages main part, 3 pages references, 22 pages appendix), 17 figures, 3 tables
comments: AISTATS24 Camera-Ready Version, 34 pages total (9 pages main part, 3 pages references, 22 pages appendix), 17 figures, 3 tables
abstract: We propose an interactive multi-agent classifier that provides provable interpretability guarantees even for complex agents such as neural networks. These guarantees consist of lower bounds on the mutual information between selected features and the classification decision. Our results are inspired by the Merlin-Arthur protocol from Interactive Proof Systems and express these bounds in terms of measurable metrics such as soundness and completeness. Compared to existing interactive setups, we rely neither on optimal agents nor on the assumption that features are distributed independently. Instead, we use the relative strength of the agents as well as the new concept of Asymmetric Feature Correlation which captures the precise kind of correlations that make interpretability guarantees difficult. We evaluate our results on two small-scale datasets where high mutual information can be verified explicitly.
summary: We propose an interactive multi-agent classifier that provides provable interpretability guarantees even for complex agents such as neural networks. These guarantees consist of lower bounds on the mutual information between selected features and the classification decision. Our results are inspired by the Merlin-Arthur protocol from Interactive Proof Systems and express these bounds in terms of measurable metrics such as soundness and completeness. Compared to existing interactive setups, we rely neither on optimal agents nor on the assumption that features are distributed independently. Instead, we use the relative strength of the agents as well as the new concept of Asymmetric Feature Correlation which captures the precise kind of correlations that make interpretability guarantees difficult. We evaluate our results on two small-scale datasets where high mutual information can be verified explicitly.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种交互式多智能体分类器，即使对于神经网络等复杂智能体也能提供可证明的可解释性保证。这些保证包括所选特征和分类决策之间的互信息的下限。我们的结果受到 Interactive Proof Systems 的 Merlin-Arthur 协议的启发，并以可测量的指标（例如健全性和完整性）来表达这些界限。与现有的交互式设置相比，我们既不依赖于最优代理，也不依赖于特征独立分布的假设。相反，我们使用代理的相对强度以及非对称特征相关性的新概念，它捕获了使可解释性保证变得困难的精确类型的相关性。我们在两个小规模数据集上评估我们的结果，其中可以明确验证高互信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Merlin-Arthur协议的交互式多智能体分类器，为复杂模型（如神经网络）提供可证明的可解释性保证。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法依赖独立特征假设或最优智能体，难以适用于现实场景中存在复杂特征关联的模型。
AI.method: 借鉴交互证明系统中的Merlin-Arthur协议，通过定义声名（soundness）和完备性（completeness）等可度量指标，结合异步特征相关性（Asymmetric Feature Correlation）概念建立可解释性下界。
AI.result: 在两个小规模数据集上验证了方法的有效性，成功显式验证了高互信息条件下的可解释性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需独立特征假设，通过智能体相对强度与异步特征相关性分析，为复杂模型提供了新的可解释性理论保障。

title: Algorithmic Applications of Tree-Cut Width
title_zh: 树木切割宽度的算法应用
comment: Full version to appear in the Siam Journal on Discrete Mathematics
comments: Full version to appear in the Siam Journal on Discrete Mathematics
abstract: The recently introduced graph parameter tree-cut width plays a similar role with respect to immersions as the graph parameter treewidth plays with respect to minors. In this paper, we provide the first algorithmic applications of tree-cut width to hard combinatorial problems. Tree-cut width is known to be lower-bounded by a function of treewidth, but it can be much larger and hence has the potential to facilitate the efficient solution of problems that are not known to be fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) when parameterized by treewidth. We introduce the notion of nice tree-cut decompositions and provide FPT algorithms for the showcase problems Capacitated Vertex Cover, Capacitated Dominating Set, and Imbalance parameterized by the tree-cut width of an input graph. On the other hand, we show that List Coloring, Precoloring Extension, and Boolean CSP (the latter parameterized by the tree-cut width of the incidence graph) are W[1]-hard and hence unlikely to be fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by tree-cut width.
summary: The recently introduced graph parameter tree-cut width plays a similar role with respect to immersions as the graph parameter treewidth plays with respect to minors. In this paper, we provide the first algorithmic applications of tree-cut width to hard combinatorial problems. Tree-cut width is known to be lower-bounded by a function of treewidth, but it can be much larger and hence has the potential to facilitate the efficient solution of problems that are not known to be fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) when parameterized by treewidth. We introduce the notion of nice tree-cut decompositions and provide FPT algorithms for the showcase problems Capacitated Vertex Cover, Capacitated Dominating Set, and Imbalance parameterized by the tree-cut width of an input graph. On the other hand, we show that List Coloring, Precoloring Extension, and Boolean CSP (the latter parameterized by the tree-cut width of the incidence graph) are W[1]-hard and hence unlikely to be fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by tree-cut width.
abstract_zh: 最近引入的图形参数树切割宽度对于沉浸感的作用与图形参数树宽度对于未成年人的作用类似。在本文中，我们首次提供了树切割宽度在困难组合问题上的算法应用。众所周知，树切割宽度的下限是树宽度函数的下界，但它可以大得多，因此有可能促进有效解决当树宽度参数化时未知的固定参数可处理（FPT）问题。我们引入了良好的树切割分解的概念，并为展示问题 Capacitated Vertex Cover、Capacitated Domination Set 和由输入图的树切割宽度参数化的不平衡问题提供了 FPT 算法。另一方面，我们表明列表着色、预着色扩展和布尔 CSP（后者由关联图的树切割宽度参数化）是 W[1]-hard，因此当由树切割宽度参数化时不太可能是固定参数可处理的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了树割宽度在算法中的应用，针对多个组合优化问题提出了固定参数可解算法，并分析了其局限性。
AI.motivation: 树割宽度作为图论中与浸入相关的重要参数，可能比树宽度更大，有望解决树宽度参数下无法高效处理的组合问题。
AI.method: 引入『良好树割分解』概念，设计基于树割宽度的固定参数算法，并通过参数化复杂性理论分析问题难度。
AI.result: 为容量顶点覆盖、容量支配集和失衡问题提供了树割宽度参数下的FPT算法，同时证明列表着色、预着色扩展和布尔CSP问题在该参数下属于W[1]-难。
AI.conclusion: 树割宽度可有效解决部分组合问题，但存在固有计算复杂性限制，需针对性分析问题特性。

authors_text: Shayan Shekarforoush,David B. Lindell,David J. Fleet,Marcus A. Brubaker
title: Residual Multiplicative Filter Networks for Multiscale Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于多尺度重建的残差乘法滤波器网络
abstract: Coordinate networks like Multiplicative Filter Networks (MFNs) and BACON offer some control over the frequency spectrum used to represent continuous signals such as images or 3D volumes. Yet, they are not readily applicable to problems for which coarse-to-fine estimation is required, including various inverse problems in which coarse-to-fine optimization plays a key role in avoiding poor local minima. We introduce a new coordinate network architecture and training scheme that enables coarse-to-fine optimization with fine-grained control over the frequency support of learned reconstructions. This is achieved with two key innovations. First, we incorporate skip connections so that structure at one scale is preserved when fitting finer-scale structure. Second, we propose a novel initialization scheme to provide control over the model frequency spectrum at each stage of optimization. We demonstrate how these modifications enable multiscale optimization for coarse-to-fine fitting to natural images. We then evaluate our model on synthetically generated datasets for the the problem of single-particle cryo-EM reconstruction. We learn high resolution multiscale structures, on par with the state-of-the art.
summary: Coordinate networks like Multiplicative Filter Networks (MFNs) and BACON offer some control over the frequency spectrum used to represent continuous signals such as images or 3D volumes. Yet, they are not readily applicable to problems for which coarse-to-fine estimation is required, including various inverse problems in which coarse-to-fine optimization plays a key role in avoiding poor local minima. We introduce a new coordinate network architecture and training scheme that enables coarse-to-fine optimization with fine-grained control over the frequency support of learned reconstructions. This is achieved with two key innovations. First, we incorporate skip connections so that structure at one scale is preserved when fitting finer-scale structure. Second, we propose a novel initialization scheme to provide control over the model frequency spectrum at each stage of optimization. We demonstrate how these modifications enable multiscale optimization for coarse-to-fine fitting to natural images. We then evaluate our model on synthetically generated datasets for the the problem of single-particle cryo-EM reconstruction. We learn high resolution multiscale structures, on par with the state-of-the art.
abstract_zh: 乘法滤波器网络 (MFN) 和 BACON 等坐标网络可以对用于表示连续信号（例如图像或 3D 体积）的频谱进行一些控制。然而，它们并不容易适用于需要从粗到精估计的问题，包括各种逆问题，其中从粗到精优化在避免不良局部极小值方面发挥着关键作用。我们引入了一种新的坐标网络架构和训练方案，可以通过对学习重建的频率支持进行细粒度控制来实现从粗到细的优化。这是通过两项关键创新实现的。首先，我们合并了跳跃连接，以便在拟合更精细尺度的结构时保留一个尺度的结构。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的初始化方案，以在优化的每个阶段提供对模型频谱的控制。我们演示了这些修改如何实现多尺度优化，以从粗到细地拟合自然图像。然后，我们在综合生成的数据集上评估我们的模型，以解决单粒子冷冻电镜重建问题。我们学习高分辨率的多尺度结构，与最先进的技术相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的坐标网络架构和训练方案，用于实现多尺度重建中的粗到细优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的坐标网络（如MFNs和BACON）难以处理需要粗到细估计的问题，例如逆问题中的局部最小值规避，缺乏对重建频率谱的精细控制。
AI.method: 引入残差乘法滤波网络架构，通过跳过连接保留多尺度结构，并提出新的初始化方案以控制优化过程中各阶段的频率谱。
AI.result: 在合成数据集的单颗粒冷冻电镜重建任务中，模型实现了与最先进方法相当的高分辨率多尺度结构学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度优化有效提升了自然图像和冷冻电镜重建任务的性能，为复杂逆问题提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Residual Multiplicative Filter Networks for Multiscale Reconstruction 用于多尺度重建的残差乘法滤波器网络 Coordinate networks like Multiplicative Filter Networks (MFNs) and BACON offer some control over the frequency spectrum used to represent continuous signals such as images or 3D volumes. Yet, they are not readily applicable to problems for which coarse-to-fine estimation is required, including various inverse problems in which coarse-to-fine optimization plays a key role in avoiding poor local minima. We introduce a new coordinate network architecture and training scheme that enables coarse-to-fine optimization with fine-grained control over the frequency support of learned reconstructions. This is achieved with two key innovations. First, we incorporate skip connections so that structure at one scale is preserved when fitting finer-scale structure. Second, we propose a novel initialization scheme to provide control over the model frequency spectrum at each stage of optimization. We demonstrate how these modifications enable multiscale optimization for coarse-to-fine fitting to natural images. We then evaluate our model on synthetically generated datasets for the the problem of single-particle cryo-EM reconstruction. We learn high resolution multiscale structures, on par with the state-of-the art. 乘法滤波器网络 (MFN) 和 BACON 等坐标网络可以对用于表示连续信号（例如图像或 3D 体积）的频谱进行一些控制。然而，它们并不容易适用于需要从粗到精估计的问题，包括各种逆问题，其中从粗到精优化在避免不良局部极小值方面发挥着关键作用。我们引入了一种新的坐标网络架构和训练方案，可以通过对学习重建的频率支持进行细粒度控制来实现从粗到细的优化。这是通过两项关键创新实现的。首先，我们合并了跳跃连接，以便在拟合更精细尺度的结构时保留一个尺度的结构。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的初始化方案，以在优化的每个阶段提供对模型频谱的控制。我们演示了这些修改如何实现多尺度优化，以从粗到细地拟合自然图像。然后，我们在综合生成的数据集上评估我们的模型，以解决单粒子冷冻电镜重建问题。我们学习高分辨率的多尺度结构，与最先进的技术相当。 本文提出了一种新的坐标网络架构和训练方案，用于实现多尺度重建中的粗到细优化。 Shayan Shekarforoush,David B. Lindell,David J. Fleet,Marcus A. Brubaker cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Composition of Relational Features with an Application to Explaining Black-Box Predictors
title_zh: 关系特征的组合及其解释黑盒预测器的应用
comment: 47 pages; Revision1 for Machine Learning Journal (MLJ)
comments: 47 pages; Revision1 for Machine Learning Journal (MLJ)
abstract: Relational machine learning programs like those developed in Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) offer several advantages: (1) The ability to model complex relationships amongst data instances; (2) The use of domain-specific relations during model construction; and (3) The models constructed are human-readable, which is often one step closer to being human-understandable. However, these ILP-like methods have not been able to capitalise fully on the rapid hardware, software and algorithmic developments fuelling current developments in deep neural networks. In this paper, we treat relational features as functions and use the notion of generalised composition of functions to derive complex functions from simpler ones. We formulate the notion of a set of $\text{M}$-simple features in a mode language $\text{M}$ and identify two composition operators ($ρ_1$ and $ρ_2$) from which all possible complex features can be derived. We use these results to implement a form of "explainable neural network" called Compositional Relational Machines, or CRMs, which are labelled directed-acyclic graphs. The vertex-label for any vertex $j$ in the CRM contains a feature-function $f_j$ and a continuous activation function $g_j$. If $j$ is a "non-input" vertex, then $f_j$ is the composition of features associated with vertices in the direct predecessors of $j$. Our focus is on CRMs in which input vertices (those without any direct predecessors) all have $\text{M}$-simple features in their vertex-labels. We provide a randomised procedure for constructing and learning such CRMs. Using a notion of explanations based on the compositional structure of features in a CRM, we provide empirical evidence on synthetic data of the ability to identify appropriate explanations; and demonstrate the use of CRMs as 'explanation machines' for black-box models that do not provide explanations for their predictions.

However, these ILP-like methods have not been able to capitalise fully on the rapid hardware, software and algorithmic developments fuelling current developments in deep neural networks. In this paper, we treat relational features as functions and use the notion of generalised composition of functions to derive complex functions from simpler ones. We formulate the notion of a set of $\text{M}$-simple features in a mode language $\text{M}$ and identify two composition operators ($ρ_1$ and $ρ_2$) from which all possible complex features can be derived. We use these results to implement a form of "explainable neural network" called Compositional Relational Machines, or CRMs, which are labelled directed-acyclic graphs. The vertex-label for any vertex $j$ in the CRM contains a feature-function $f_j$ and a continuous activation function $g_j$. If $j$ is a "non-input" vertex, then $f_j$ is the composition of features associated with vertices in the direct predecessors of $j$. Our focus is on CRMs in which input vertices (those without any direct predecessors) all have $\text{M}$-simple features in their vertex-labels. We provide a randomised procedure for constructing and learning such CRMs. Using a notion of explanations based on the compositional structure of features in a CRM, we provide empirical evidence on synthetic data of the ability to identify appropriate explanations; and demonstrate the use of CRMs as 'explanation machines' for black-box models that do not provide explanations for their predictions.
abstract_zh: 像归纳逻辑编程（ILP）中开发的关系机器学习程序具有以下几个优点：（1）能够对数据实例之间的复杂关系进行建模； (2) 模型构建过程中特定领域关系的使用； （3）构建的模型是人类可读的，这通常更接近人类可理解的一步。然而，这些类似 ILP 的方法尚未能够充分利用硬件、软件和算法的快速发展，推动当前深度神经网络的发展。在本文中，我们将关系特征视为函数，并使用函数的广义组合的概念从更简单的函数导出复杂的函数。我们用模式语言 $\text{M}$ 表述了一组 $\text{M}$ 简单特征的概念，并确定了两个组合算子（$ρ_1$ 和 $ρ_2$），从中可以导出所有可能的复杂特征。我们使用这些结果来实现一种称为组合关系机（CRM）的“可解释神经网络”，它被标记为有向无环图。 CRM 中任何顶点 $j$ 的顶点标签包含特征函数 $f_j$ 和连续激活函数 $g_j$。如果 $j$ 是“非输入”顶点，则 $f_j$ 是与 $j$ 的直接前辈中的顶点关联的特征的组合。我们的重点是 CRM，其中输入顶点（没有任何直接前驱的顶点）在其顶点标签中都具有 $\text{M}$-simple 特征。我们提供了用于构建和学习此类 CRM 的随机程序。使用基于 CRM 中特征的组成结构的解释概念，我们提供了关于识别适当解释能力的合成数据的经验证据；并演示如何使用 CRM 作为黑盒模型的“解释机器”，而黑盒模型并不为其预测提供解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'组合关系机器'(CRMs)的可解释神经网络模型，通过组合关系特征来解释黑箱预测器。
AI.motivation: 归纳逻辑编程(ILP)方法虽能建模复杂关系且具有可读性，但未能充分利用深度学习的硬件和算法进步，需结合两者优势实现可解释性。
AI.method: 将关系特征定义为函数，通过模式语言M中的M-简单特征及两种组合算子ρ₁和ρ₂构建复杂特征，并设计随机化过程生成CRMs（有向无环图结构）。
AI.result: 在合成数据上验证了CRMs能有效识别解释，并作为黑箱模型的'解释机器'，展示其解释能力。
AI.conclusion: CRMs通过组合关系特征实现了深度学习与ILP的结合，为黑箱模型提供了可解释性框架。

title: Cascaded Video Generation for Videos In-the-Wild
title_zh: 野外视频的级联视频生成
comment: Accepted to the 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02719
comments: Accepted to the 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02719
abstract: Videos can be created by first outlining a global view of the scene and then adding local details. Inspired by this idea we propose a cascaded model for video generation which follows a coarse to fine approach. First our model generates a low resolution video, establishing the global scene structure, which is then refined by subsequent cascade levels operating at larger resolutions. We train each cascade level sequentially on partial views of the videos, which reduces the computational complexity of our model and makes it scalable to high-resolution videos with many frames. We empirically validate our approach on UCF101 and Kinetics-600, for which our model is competitive with the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate the scaling capabilities of our model and train a three-level model on the BDD100K dataset which generates 256x256 pixels videos with 48 frames.
summary: Videos can be created by first outlining a global view of the scene and then adding local details. Inspired by this idea we propose a cascaded model for video generation which follows a coarse to fine approach. First our model generates a low resolution video, establishing the global scene structure, which is then refined by subsequent cascade levels operating at larger resolutions. We train each cascade level sequentially on partial views of the videos, which reduces the computational complexity of our model and makes it scalable to high-resolution videos with many frames. We empirically validate our approach on UCF101 and Kinetics-600, for which our model is competitive with the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate the scaling capabilities of our model and train a three-level model on the BDD100K dataset which generates 256x256 pixels videos with 48 frames.
abstract_zh: 可以通过首先勾勒出场景的全局视图，然后添加局部细节来创建视频。受这个想法的启发，我们提出了一种用于视频生成的级联模型，该模型遵循从粗到细的方法。首先，我们的模型生成低分辨率视频，建立全局场景结构，然后通过以更高分辨率运行的后续级联级别进行细化。我们在视频的部分视图上按顺序训练每个级联级别，这降低了模型的计算复杂性，并使其可扩展到具有许多帧的高分辨率视频。我们在 UCF101 和 Kinetics-600 上实证验证了我们的方法，我们的模型与最先进的模型具有竞争力。我们进一步展示了模型的缩放能力，并在 BDD100K 数据集上训练了一个三级模型，该模型生成 48 帧的 256x256 像素视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种级联视频生成模型，通过从粗到细的多阶段生成方式，实现对野外视频的高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在处理高分辨率和长序列视频时面临计算复杂度高、扩展性差的问题，需探索更高效的生成策略。
AI.method: 设计级联架构分阶段生成视频：先生成低分辨率全局结构，再逐级细化至高分辨率；各阶段依次训练，降低计算负担并提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在UCF101和Kinetics-600数据集上达到SOTA水平，并成功训练三阶段模型生成256x256像素、48帧的BDD100K视频。
AI.conclusion: 级联方法有效平衡了生成质量与计算效率，为高分辨率视频生成提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Cascaded Video Generation for Videos In-the-Wild 野外视频的级联视频生成 Videos can be created by first outlining a global view of the scene and then adding local details. Inspired by this idea we propose a cascaded model for video generation which follows a coarse to fine approach. First our model generates a low resolution video, establishing the global scene structure, which is then refined by subsequent cascade levels operating at larger resolutions. We train each cascade level sequentially on partial views of the videos, which reduces the computational complexity of our model and makes it scalable to high-resolution videos with many frames. We empirically validate our approach on UCF101 and Kinetics-600, for which our model is competitive with the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate the scaling capabilities of our model and train a three-level model on the BDD100K dataset which generates 256x256 pixels videos with 48 frames. 可以通过首先勾勒出场景的全局视图，然后添加局部细节来创建视频。受这个想法的启发，我们提出了一种用于视频生成的级联模型，该模型遵循从粗到细的方法。首先，我们的模型生成低分辨率视频，建立全局场景结构，然后通过以更高分辨率运行的后续级联级别进行细化。我们在视频的部分视图上按顺序训练每个级联级别，这降低了模型的计算复杂性，并使其可扩展到具有许多帧的高分辨率视频。我们在 UCF101 和 Kinetics-600 上实证验证了我们的方法，我们的模型与最先进的模型具有竞争力。我们进一步展示了模型的缩放能力，并在 BDD100K 数据集上训练了一个三级模型，该模型生成 48 帧的 256x256 像素视频。 本文提出一种级联视频生成模型，通过从粗到细的多阶段生成方式，实现对野外视频的高质量生成。 Lluis Castrejon,Nicolas Ballas,Aaron Courville cs.CV,cs.LG

title: The Phenomenon of Policy Churn
title_zh: 政策搅动现象
abstract: We identify and study the phenomenon of policy churn, that is, the rapid change of the greedy policy in value-based reinforcement learning. Policy churn operates at a surprisingly rapid pace, changing the greedy action in a large fraction of states within a handful of learning updates (in a typical deep RL set-up such as DQN on Atari). We characterise the phenomenon empirically, verifying that it is not limited to specific algorithm or environment properties. A number of ablations help whittle down the plausible explanations on why churn occurs to just a handful, all related to deep learning. Finally, we hypothesise that policy churn is a beneficial but overlooked form of implicit exploration that casts $ε$-greedy exploration in a fresh light, namely that $ε$-noise plays a much smaller role than expected.
summary: We identify and study the phenomenon of policy churn, that is, the rapid change of the greedy policy in value-based reinforcement learning. Policy churn operates at a surprisingly rapid pace, changing the greedy action in a large fraction of states within a handful of learning updates (in a typical deep RL set-up such as DQN on Atari). We characterise the phenomenon empirically, verifying that it is not limited to specific algorithm or environment properties. A number of ablations help whittle down the plausible explanations on why churn occurs to just a handful, all related to deep learning. Finally, we hypothesise that policy churn is a beneficial but overlooked form of implicit exploration that casts $ε$-greedy exploration in a fresh light, namely that $ε$-noise plays a much smaller role than expected.
abstract_zh: 我们识别并研究了政策搅动现象，即基于价值的强化学习中贪婪政策的快速变化。政策变动的速度惊人地快，在几次学习更新中改变了大部分状态的贪婪行为（在典型的深度 RL 设置中，例如 Atari 上的 DQN）。我们凭经验描述了这种现象，验证它不限于特定的算法或环境属性。许多消融有助于减少对为什么流失发生在少数人身上的合理解释，所有这些都与深度学习有关。最后，我们假设政策搅动是一种有益但被忽视的隐性探索形式，它以新的眼光看待 $ε$ 贪婪探索，即 $ε$ 噪声所起的作用比预期小得多。

AI.tldr: 本文识别并研究了基于价值的强化学习中的策略翻转现象，分析其成因及对探索机制的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统探索机制如ε-贪婪的效率可能被低估，而策略翻转作为隐式探索机制的作用未被充分认识。
AI.method: 通过实证分析和消融实验，验证策略翻转的普遍性，并探讨其与深度学习相关的潜在原因。
AI.result: 策略翻转在多种算法和环境中普遍存在，其成因与深度学习特性相关，并提出策略翻转可能是一种有效的隐式探索方式。
AI.conclusion: 策略翻转是深度强化学习中一种有益但被忽视的隐式探索机制，可能减少对传统ε-贪婪探索的依赖。

title: Cooperative Multi-Agent Trajectory Generation with Modular Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 采用模块化贝叶斯优化的协作多智能体轨迹生成
comment: Accepted to appear at Robotics: Science and Systems 2022. Video at https://youtu.be/rxQiNeXvLTc
comments: Accepted to appear at Robotics: Science and Systems 2022. Video at https://youtu.be/rxQiNeXvLTc
abstract: We present a modular Bayesian optimization framework that efficiently generates time-optimal trajectories for a cooperative multi-agent system, such as a team of UAVs. Existing methods for multi-agent trajectory generation often rely on overly conservative constraints to reduce the complexity of this high-dimensional planning problem, leading to suboptimal solutions. We propose a novel modular structure for the Bayesian optimization model that consists of multiple Gaussian process surrogate models that represent the dynamic feasibility and collision avoidance constraints. This modular structure alleviates the stark increase in computational cost with problem dimensionality and enables the use of minimal constraints in the joint optimization of the multi-agent trajectories. The efficiency of the algorithm is further improved by introducing a scheme for simultaneous evaluation of the Bayesian optimization acquisition function and random sampling. The modular BayesOpt algorithm was applied to optimize multi-agent trajectories through six unique environments using multi-fidelity evaluations from various data sources. It was found that the resulting trajectories are faster than those obtained from two baseline methods. The optimized trajectories were validated in real-world experiments using four quadcopters that fly within centimeters of each other at speeds up to 7.4 m/s.
summary: We present a modular Bayesian optimization framework that efficiently generates time-optimal trajectories for a cooperative multi-agent system, such as a team of UAVs. Existing methods for multi-agent trajectory generation often rely on overly conservative constraints to reduce the complexity of this high-dimensional planning problem, leading to suboptimal solutions. We propose a novel modular structure for the Bayesian optimization model that consists of multiple Gaussian process surrogate models that represent the dynamic feasibility and collision avoidance constraints. This modular structure alleviates the stark increase in computational cost with problem dimensionality and enables the use of minimal constraints in the joint optimization of the multi-agent trajectories. The efficiency of the algorithm is further improved by introducing a scheme for simultaneous evaluation of the Bayesian optimization acquisition function and random sampling. The modular BayesOpt algorithm was applied to optimize multi-agent trajectories through six unique environments using multi-fidelity evaluations from various data sources. It was found that the resulting trajectories are faster than those obtained from two baseline methods. The optimized trajectories were validated in real-world experiments using four quadcopters that fly within centimeters of each other at speeds up to 7.4 m/s.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个模块化贝叶斯优化框架，可以有效地为协作多智能体系统（例如无人机团队）生成时间最优轨迹。现有的多智能体轨迹生成方法通常依赖于过于保守的约束来降低这种高维规划问题的复杂性，从而导致解决方案不理想。我们为贝叶斯优化模型提出了一种新颖的模块化结构，该结构由多个代表动态可行性和避免碰撞约束的高斯过程代理模型组成。这种模块化结构减轻了计算成本随问题维度的明显增加，并能够在多智能体轨迹的联合优化中使用最小的约束。通过引入贝叶斯优化采集函数和随机采样同时评估的方案，进一步提高了算法的效率。应用模块化 BayesOpt 算法，通过使用来自各种数据源的多保真度评估，通过六个独特的环境来优化多智能体轨迹。结果发现，所得轨迹比通过两种基线方法获得的轨迹更快。优化的轨迹在现实世界的实验中得到了验证，使用四架四轴飞行器，它们以高达 7.4 m/s 的速度飞行在厘米范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化贝叶斯优化框架，用于为协作多智能体系统（如无人机团队）高效生成时间最优轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖保守约束导致计算复杂度高且解次优，需更高效的轨迹生成方法。
AI.method: 采用模块化贝叶斯优化模型，包含多个高斯过程代理模型处理动态可行性与避障约束，并引入同时评估获取函数与随机抽样的方案。
AI.result: 优化轨迹在六个环境中比基线方法更快，现实实验中四旋翼飞行器以7.4m/s速度飞行，间距仅数厘米。
AI.conclusion: 模块化贝叶斯优化有效提升多智能体轨迹优化的效率与性能。

title: Dataset Distillation using Neural Feature Regression
title_zh: 使用神经特征回归进行数据集蒸馏
abstract: Dataset distillation aims to learn a small synthetic dataset that preserves most of the information from the original dataset. Dataset distillation can be formulated as a bi-level meta-learning problem where the outer loop optimizes the meta-dataset and the inner loop trains a model on the distilled data. Meta-gradient computation is one of the key challenges in this formulation, as differentiating through the inner loop learning procedure introduces significant computation and memory costs. In this paper, we address these challenges using neural Feature Regression with Pooling (FRePo), achieving the state-of-the-art performance with an order of magnitude less memory requirement and two orders of magnitude faster training than previous methods. The proposed algorithm is analogous to truncated backpropagation through time with a pool of models to alleviate various types of overfitting in dataset distillation. FRePo significantly outperforms the previous methods on CIFAR100, Tiny ImageNet, and ImageNet-1K. Furthermore, we show that high-quality distilled data can greatly improve various downstream applications, such as continual learning and membership inference defense. Please check out our webpage at https://sites.google.com/view/frepo.
summary: Dataset distillation aims to learn a small synthetic dataset that preserves most of the information from the original dataset. Dataset distillation can be formulated as a bi-level meta-learning problem where the outer loop optimizes the meta-dataset and the inner loop trains a model on the distilled data. In this paper, we address these challenges using neural Feature Regression with Pooling (FRePo), achieving the state-of-the-art performance with an order of magnitude less memory requirement and two orders of magnitude faster training than previous methods. The proposed algorithm is analogous to truncated backpropagation through time with a pool of models to alleviate various types of overfitting in dataset distillation. FRePo significantly outperforms the previous methods on CIFAR100, Tiny ImageNet, and ImageNet-1K. Furthermore, we show that high-quality distilled data can greatly improve various downstream applications, such as continual learning and membership inference defense. Please check out our webpage at https://sites.google.com/view/frepo.
abstract_zh: 数据集蒸馏的目的是学习一个小型的合成数据集，保留原始数据集中的大部分信息。数据集蒸馏可以表述为双层元学习问题，其中外循环优化元数据集，内循环根据蒸馏数据训练模型。元梯度计算是该公式中的关键挑战之一，因为通过内循环学习过程进行微分会引入大量的计算和内存成本。在本文中，我们使用池化神经特征回归（FRePo）来解决这些挑战，与以前的方法相比，内存需求减少了一个数量级，训练速度提高了两个数量级，从而实现了最先进的性能。所提出的算法类似于使用模型池随时间进行截断反向传播，以减轻数据集蒸馏中各种类型的过度拟合。 FRePo 在 CIFAR100、Tiny ImageNet 和 ImageNet-1K 上显着优于之前的方法。此外，我们表明高质量的蒸馏数据可以极大地改善各种下游应用，例如持续学习和成员推理防御。请查看我们的网页：https://sites.google.com/view/frepo。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FRePo的神经特征回归方法，用于高效完成数据集蒸馏任务，生成保留原始数据集信息的小型合成数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统数据集蒸馏方法在计算梯度时面临显著的计算和内存开销，且难以有效防止过拟合，亟需更高效且性能更优的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入神经特征回归与池化机制（FRePo），将数据集蒸馏建模为类似截断时间反向传播的双层元学习问题，利用模型池缓解过拟合，并优化元梯度计算流程。
AI.result: FRePo在CIFAR100、Tiny ImageNet和ImageNet-1K数据集上均取得最先进性能，内存需求降低一个数量级，训练速度提升两个数量级，且蒸馏数据显著提升持续学习和成员推理防御等下游任务效果。
AI.conclusion: FRePo通过创新的特征回归与池化策略，有效解决了数据集蒸馏中的计算瓶颈与过拟合问题，为生成高质量压缩数据集提供了高效可行的新范式。

search_text: Dataset Distillation using Neural Feature Regression 使用神经特征回归进行数据集蒸馏 Dataset distillation aims to learn a small synthetic dataset that preserves most of the information from the original dataset. Dataset distillation can be formulated as a bi-level meta-learning problem where the outer loop optimizes the meta-dataset and the inner loop trains a model on the distilled data. Meta-gradient computation is one of the key challenges in this formulation, as differentiating through the inner loop learning procedure introduces significant computation and memory costs. In this paper, we address these challenges using neural Feature Regression with Pooling (FRePo), achieving the state-of-the-art performance with an order of magnitude less memory requirement and two orders of magnitude faster training than previous methods. The proposed algorithm is analogous to truncated backpropagation through time with a pool of models to alleviate various types of overfitting in dataset distillation. FRePo significantly outperforms the previous methods on CIFAR100, Tiny ImageNet, and ImageNet-1K. Furthermore, we show that high-quality distilled data can greatly improve various downstream applications, such as continual learning and membership inference defense. Please check out our webpage at https://sites.google.com/view/frepo. 数据集蒸馏的目的是学习一个小型的合成数据集，保留原始数据集中的大部分信息。数据集蒸馏可以表述为双层元学习问题，其中外循环优化元数据集，内循环根据蒸馏数据训练模型。元梯度计算是该公式中的关键挑战之一，因为通过内循环学习过程进行微分会引入大量的计算和内存成本。在本文中，我们使用池化神经特征回归（FRePo）来解决这些挑战，与以前的方法相比，内存需求减少了一个数量级，训练速度提高了两个数量级，从而实现了最先进的性能。所提出的算法类似于使用模型池随时间进行截断反向传播，以减轻数据集蒸馏中各种类型的过度拟合。 FRePo 在 CIFAR100、Tiny ImageNet 和 ImageNet-1K 上显着优于之前的方法。此外，我们表明高质量的蒸馏数据可以极大地改善各种下游应用，例如持续学习和成员推理防御。请查看我们的网页：https://sites.google.com/view/frepo。 本文提出了一种名为FRePo的神经特征回归方法，用于高效完成数据集蒸馏任务，生成保留原始数据集信息的小型合成数据集。 Yongchao Zhou,Ehsan Nezhadarya,Jimmy Ba cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: R. Austin McEver,Bowen Zhang,Connor Levenson,A S M Iftekhar,B. S. Manjunath
title: Context-Driven Detection of Invertebrate Species in Deep-Sea Video
title_zh: 深海视频中无脊椎动物物种的上下文驱动检测
abstract: Each year, underwater remotely operated vehicles (ROVs) collect thousands of hours of video of unexplored ocean habitats revealing a plethora of information regarding biodiversity on Earth. However, fully utilizing this information remains a challenge as proper annotations and analysis require trained scientists time, which is both limited and costly. To this end, we present a Dataset for Underwater Substrate and Invertebrate Analysis (DUSIA), a benchmark suite and growing large-scale dataset to train, validate, and test methods for temporally localizing four underwater substrates as well as temporally and spatially localizing 59 underwater invertebrate species. DUSIA currently includes over ten hours of footage across 25 videos captured in 1080p at 30 fps by an ROV following pre planned transects across the ocean floor near the Channel Islands of California. Each video includes annotations indicating the start and end times of substrates across the video in addition to counts of species of interest. Some frames are annotated with precise bounding box locations for invertebrate species of interest, as seen in Figure 1. To our knowledge, DUSIA is the first dataset of its kind for deep sea exploration, with video from a moving camera, that includes substrate annotations and invertebrate species that are present at significant depths where sunlight does not penetrate. Additionally, we present the novel context-driven object detector (CDD) where we use explicit substrate classification to influence an object detection network to simultaneously predict a substrate and species class influenced by that substrate. We also present a method for improving training on partially annotated bounding box frames. Finally, we offer a baseline method for automating the counting of invertebrate species of interest.
summary: Each year, underwater remotely operated vehicles (ROVs) collect thousands of hours of video of unexplored ocean habitats revealing a plethora of information regarding biodiversity on Earth. However, fully utilizing this information remains a challenge as proper annotations and analysis require trained scientists time, which is both limited and costly. To this end, we present a Dataset for Underwater Substrate and Invertebrate Analysis (DUSIA), a benchmark suite and growing large-scale dataset to train, validate, and test methods for temporally localizing four underwater substrates as well as temporally and spatially localizing 59 underwater invertebrate species. DUSIA currently includes over ten hours of footage across 25 videos captured in 1080p at 30 fps by an ROV following pre planned transects across the ocean floor near the Channel Islands of California. Each video includes annotations indicating the start and end times of substrates across the video in addition to counts of species of interest. Some frames are annotated with precise bounding box locations for invertebrate species of interest, as seen in Figure 1. To our knowledge, DUSIA is the first dataset of its kind for deep sea exploration, with video from a moving camera, that includes substrate annotations and invertebrate species that are present at significant depths where sunlight does not penetrate. Additionally, we present the novel context-driven object detector (CDD) where we use explicit substrate classification to influence an object detection network to simultaneously predict a substrate and species class influenced by that substrate. We also present a method for improving training on partially annotated bounding box frames. Finally, we offer a baseline method for automating the counting of invertebrate species of interest.
abstract_zh: 每年，水下遥控潜水器 (ROV) 都会收集数千小时的未探索海洋栖息地的视频，揭示有关地球生物多样性的大量信息。然而，充分利用这些信息仍然是一个挑战，因为正确的注释和分析需要训练有素的科学家时间，这既有限又昂贵。为此，我们提出了水下基质和无脊椎动物分析数据集 (DUSIA)，这是一个基准套件和不断增长的大型数据集，用于训练、验证和测试对四种水下基质进行时间定位以及对 59 种水下无脊椎动物物种进行时间和空间定位的方法。 DUSIA 目前包含由 ROV 在加利福尼亚海峡群岛附近预先计划的海底横断面以 1080p、30 fps 拍摄的 25 个视频，共 10 多个小时的镜头。每个视频都包含注释，指示视频中底物的开始和结束时间以及感兴趣的物种计数。一些帧标注有感兴趣的无脊椎动物物种的精确边界框位置，如图 1 所示。据我们所知，DUSIA 是第一个用于深海探索的数据集，具有来自移动摄像机的视频，其中包括基质注释和存在于阳光无法穿透的重要深度的无脊椎动物物种。此外，我们提出了新颖的上下文驱动对象检测器（CDD），其中我们使用显式底物分类来影响对象检测网络，以同时预测底物和受该底物影响的物种类别。我们还提出了一种改进对部分注释的边界框框架的训练的方法。最后，我们提供了一种用于自动计数感兴趣的无脊椎动物物种的基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文的深海视频无脊椎动物检测方法，并构建了DUSIA数据集以支持相关研究。
AI.motivation: 深海ROV视频分析依赖人工标注，耗时耗力且成本高昂，亟需自动化方法提升效率。
AI.method: 构建DUSIA数据集并开发上下文驱动检测器（CDD），通过底质分类辅助物种检测，同时优化部分标注框的训练方法。
AI.result: DUSIA成为首个包含深海移动摄像机视频的基准数据集，CDD方法在物种检测与计数任务中取得基线性能。
AI.conclusion: DUSIA为深海生物研究提供新工具，CDD通过利用底质上下文信息提升了检测效果，为自动化分析奠定基础。

title: Dense Crowd Flow-Informed Path Planning
title_zh: 基于密集人流的路径规划
abstract: Both pedestrian and robot comfort are of the highest priority whenever a robot is placed in an environment containing human beings. In the case of pedestrian-unaware mobile robots this desire for safety leads to the freezing robot problem, where a robot confronted with a large dynamic group of obstacles (such as a crowd of pedestrians) would determine all forward navigation unsafe causing the robot to stop in place. In order to navigate in a socially compliant manner while avoiding the freezing robot problem we are interested in understanding the flow of pedestrians in crowded scenarios. By treating the pedestrians in the crowd as particles moved along by the crowd itself we can model the system as a time dependent flow field. From this flow field we can extract different flow segments that reflect the motion patterns emerging from the crowd. These motion patterns can then be accounted for during the control and navigation of a mobile robot allowing it to move safely within the flow of the crowd to reach a desired location within or beyond the flow. We combine flow-field extraction with a discrete heuristic search to create Flow-Informed path planning (FIPP). We provide empirical results showing that when compared against a trajectory-rollout local path planner, a robot using FIPP was able not only to reach its goal more quickly but also was shown to be more socially compliant than a robot using traditional techniques both in simulation and on real robots.

In the case of pedestrian-unaware mobile robots this desire for safety leads to the freezing robot problem, where a robot confronted with a large dynamic group of obstacles (such as a crowd of pedestrians) would determine all forward navigation unsafe causing the robot to stop in place. In order to navigate in a socially compliant manner while avoiding the freezing robot problem we are interested in understanding the flow of pedestrians in crowded scenarios. By treating the pedestrians in the crowd as particles moved along by the crowd itself we can model the system as a time dependent flow field. From this flow field we can extract different flow segments that reflect the motion patterns emerging from the crowd. These motion patterns can then be accounted for during the control and navigation of a mobile robot allowing it to move safely within the flow of the crowd to reach a desired location within or beyond the flow. We combine flow-field extraction with a discrete heuristic search to create Flow-Informed path planning (FIPP). We provide empirical results showing that when compared against a trajectory-rollout local path planner, a robot using FIPP was able not only to reach its goal more quickly but also was shown to be more socially compliant than a robot using traditional techniques both in simulation and on real robots.
abstract_zh: 当机器人被放置在有人类的环境中时，行人和机器人的舒适度都是最重要的。对于行人无意识的移动机器人来说，这种对安全的渴望会导致机器人冻结问题，即机器人遇到一大群动态障碍物（例如一群行人）时，会确定所有前向导航都是不安全的，导致机器人停在原地。为了以符合社会规范的方式进行导航，同时避免机器人冻结问题，我们有兴趣了解拥挤场景中的行人流量。通过将人群中的行人视为由人群本身移动的粒子，我们可以将系统建模为时间相关的流场。从这个流场中，我们可以提取反映人群中出现的运动模式的不同流段。然后，可以在移动机器人的控制和导航过程中考虑这些运动模式，使其能够在人群中安全移动，以到达人群内或人群外的所需位置。我们将流场提取与离散启发式搜索相结合来创建流通知路径规划（FIPP）。我们提供的实证结果表明，与轨迹推出本地路径规划器相比，使用 FIPP 的机器人不仅能够更快地达到目标，而且在模拟和真实机器人上都比使用传统技术的机器人更具有社会顺从性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人群流动信息的路径规划方法（FIPP），以解决机器人在密集人群中导航时的安全性和社会合规性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人在人群环境中易出现'冻结问题'（因过度避障而停止），且难以兼顾行人舒适度与导航效率，亟需结合人群流动规律优化路径规划。
AI.method: 将行人视为被群体流动驱动的粒子，构建时变流场模型并提取流动片段，结合离散启发式搜索算法生成符合人群流动趋势的路径规划方案（FIPP）。
AI.result: 实验表明，FIPP相比轨迹展开局部规划器，在仿真和真实机器人测试中均能更快到达目标且表现出更高的社会合规性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合人群流动信息，FIPP有效解决了密集环境下的机器人导航难题，在保证安全的同时提升了运动效率与社会适应性。

search_text: Dense Crowd Flow-Informed Path Planning 基于密集人流的路径规划 Both pedestrian and robot comfort are of the highest priority whenever a robot is placed in an environment containing human beings. In the case of pedestrian-unaware mobile robots this desire for safety leads to the freezing robot problem, where a robot confronted with a large dynamic group of obstacles (such as a crowd of pedestrians) would determine all forward navigation unsafe causing the robot to stop in place. In order to navigate in a socially compliant manner while avoiding the freezing robot problem we are interested in understanding the flow of pedestrians in crowded scenarios. By treating the pedestrians in the crowd as particles moved along by the crowd itself we can model the system as a time dependent flow field. From this flow field we can extract different flow segments that reflect the motion patterns emerging from the crowd. These motion patterns can then be accounted for during the control and navigation of a mobile robot allowing it to move safely within the flow of the crowd to reach a desired location within or beyond the flow. We combine flow-field extraction with a discrete heuristic search to create Flow-Informed path planning (FIPP). We provide empirical results showing that when compared against a trajectory-rollout local path planner, a robot using FIPP was able not only to reach its goal more quickly but also was shown to be more socially compliant than a robot using traditional techniques both in simulation and on real robots. 当机器人被放置在有人类的环境中时，行人和机器人的舒适度都是最重要的。对于行人无意识的移动机器人来说，这种对安全的渴望会导致机器人冻结问题，即机器人遇到一大群动态障碍物（例如一群行人）时，会确定所有前向导航都是不安全的，导致机器人停在原地。为了以符合社会规范的方式进行导航，同时避免机器人冻结问题，我们有兴趣了解拥挤场景中的行人流量。通过将人群中的行人视为由人群本身移动的粒子，我们可以将系统建模为时间相关的流场。从这个流场中，我们可以提取反映人群中出现的运动模式的不同流段。然后，可以在移动机器人的控制和导航过程中考虑这些运动模式，使其能够在人群中安全移动，以到达人群内或人群外的所需位置。我们将流场提取与离散启发式搜索相结合来创建流通知路径规划（FIPP）。我们提供的实证结果表明，与轨迹推出本地路径规划器相比，使用 FIPP 的机器人不仅能够更快地达到目标，而且在模拟和真实机器人上都比使用传统技术的机器人更具有社会顺从性。 本文提出了一种基于人群流动信息的路径规划方法（FIPP），以解决机器人在密集人群中导航时的安全性和社会合规性问题。 Emily Pruc,Shlomo Zilberstein,Joydeep Biswas cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Michał Zawalski,Michał Tyrolski,Konrad Czechowski,Tomasz Odrzygóźdź,Damian Stachura,Piotr Piękos,Yuhuai Wu,Łukasz Kuciński,Piotr Miłoś
title: Fast and Precise: Adjusting Planning Horizon with Adaptive Subgoal Search
title_zh: 快速而精确：通过自适应子目标搜索调整规划范围
abstract: Complex reasoning problems contain states that vary in the computational cost required to determine a good action plan. Taking advantage of this property, we propose Adaptive Subgoal Search (AdaSubS), a search method that adaptively adjusts the planning horizon. To this end, AdaSubS generates diverse sets of subgoals at different distances. A verification mechanism is employed to filter out unreachable subgoals swiftly, allowing to focus on feasible further subgoals. In this way, AdaSubS benefits from the efficiency of planning with longer subgoals and the fine control with the shorter ones, and thus scales well to difficult planning problems. We show that AdaSubS significantly surpasses hierarchical planning algorithms on three complex reasoning tasks: Sokoban, the Rubik's Cube, and inequality proving benchmark INT.
summary: Complex reasoning problems contain states that vary in the computational cost required to determine a good action plan. Taking advantage of this property, we propose Adaptive Subgoal Search (AdaSubS), a search method that adaptively adjusts the planning horizon. To this end, AdaSubS generates diverse sets of subgoals at different distances. A verification mechanism is employed to filter out unreachable subgoals swiftly, allowing to focus on feasible further subgoals. In this way, AdaSubS benefits from the efficiency of planning with longer subgoals and the fine control with the shorter ones, and thus scales well to difficult planning problems. We show that AdaSubS significantly surpasses hierarchical planning algorithms on three complex reasoning tasks: Sokoban, the Rubik's Cube, and inequality proving benchmark INT.
abstract_zh: 复杂的推理问题包含确定良好行动计划所需的计算成本各不相同的状态。利用这一特性，我们提出了自适应子目标搜索（AdaSubS），这是一种自适应调整规划范围的搜索方法。为此，AdaSubS 在不同距离生成不同的子目标集。采用验证机制来快速过滤掉无法达到的子目标，从而可以专注于进一步可行的子目标。通过这种方式，AdaSubS 受益于较长子目标的规划效率和较短子目标的精细控制，从而可以很好地解决困难的规划问题。我们表明，AdaSubS 在三个复杂推理任务上显着超越了分层规划算法：推箱子、魔方和不等式证明基准 INT。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种自适应调整规划时间范围的搜索方法，用于解决复杂推理问题中的高效精确规划难题。
AI.motivation: 复杂推理问题中不同状态的计算成本差异大，传统规划方法难以平衡效率与精度，需自适应调整规划时间范围以兼顾长短期目标。
AI.method: 提出自适应子目标搜索（AdaSubS）算法，生成多距离子目标集并结合验证机制过滤不可达目标，融合长距离子目标的效率与短距离子目标的精细控制优势。
AI.result: 在Sokoban、魔方和不等式证明基准INT三个任务中，AdaSubS显著优于分层规划算法，展现出更强的复杂问题解决能力。
AI.conclusion: AdaSubS通过动态调整规划时间范围和子目标筛选机制，有效提升了复杂推理任务的规划效率与精度，为困难规划问题提供新思路。

title: What Changed? Investigating Debiasing Methods using Causal Mediation Analysis
title_zh: 发生了什么变化？使用因果中介分析研究去偏方法
abstract: Previous work has examined how debiasing language models affect downstream tasks, specifically, how debiasing techniques influence task performance and whether debiased models also make impartial predictions in downstream tasks or not. However, what we don't understand well yet is why debiasing methods have varying impacts on downstream tasks and how debiasing techniques affect internal components of language models, i.e., neurons, layers, and attentions. In this paper, we decompose the internal mechanisms of debiasing language models with respect to gender by applying causal mediation analysis to understand the influence of debiasing methods on toxicity detection as a downstream task. Our findings suggest a need to test the effectiveness of debiasing methods with different bias metrics, and to focus on changes in the behavior of certain components of the models, e.g.,first two layers of language models, and attention heads.
summary: Previous work has examined how debiasing language models affect downstream tasks, specifically, how debiasing techniques influence task performance and whether debiased models also make impartial predictions in downstream tasks or not. However, what we don't understand well yet is why debiasing methods have varying impacts on downstream tasks and how debiasing techniques affect internal components of language models, i.e., neurons, layers, and attentions. In this paper, we decompose the internal mechanisms of debiasing language models with respect to gender by applying causal mediation analysis to understand the influence of debiasing methods on toxicity detection as a downstream task. Our findings suggest a need to test the effectiveness of debiasing methods with different bias metrics, and to focus on changes in the behavior of certain components of the models, e.g.,first two layers of language models, and attention heads.
abstract_zh: 之前的工作已经研究了去偏差语言模型如何影响下游任务，特别是去偏差技术如何影响任务性能以及去偏差模型是否也在下游任务中做出公正的预测。然而，我们还不太了解的是为什么去偏差方法对下游任务有不同的影响，以及去偏差技术如何影响语言模型的内部组件，即神经元、层和注意力。在本文中，我们通过应用因果中介分析来分解性别语言模型去偏的内部机制，以了解去偏方法对下游任务毒性检测的影响。我们的研究结果表明需要使用不同的偏差指标来测试去偏差方法的有效性，并关注模型某些组件的行为变化，例如语言模型的前两层和注意力头。

AI.tldr: 本文通过因果中介分析研究去偏语言模型对下游任务（如毒性检测）的影响机制，重点分析去偏方法如何改变模型内部组件（如层、注意力头）的行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确去偏方法对下游任务效果差异的原因，也缺乏对模型内部组件（如神经元、层、注意力）变化的系统分析。
AI.method: 应用因果中介分析，分解性别相关去偏语言模型的内部机制，以毒性检测任务为下游目标，探究去偏方法对模型组件的影响路径。
AI.result: 发现需用不同偏见指标测试去偏方法有效性，并关注模型前两层及注意力头等组件的行为变化。
AI.conclusion: 去偏方法的效果评估需结合多维度偏见指标，并重点关注模型浅层结构和注意力机制的变化。

search_text: What Changed? Investigating Debiasing Methods using Causal Mediation Analysis 发生了什么变化？使用因果中介分析研究去偏方法 Previous work has examined how debiasing language models affect downstream tasks, specifically, how debiasing techniques influence task performance and whether debiased models also make impartial predictions in downstream tasks or not. However, what we don't understand well yet is why debiasing methods have varying impacts on downstream tasks and how debiasing techniques affect internal components of language models, i.e., neurons, layers, and attentions. In this paper, we decompose the internal mechanisms of debiasing language models with respect to gender by applying causal mediation analysis to understand the influence of debiasing methods on toxicity detection as a downstream task. Our findings suggest a need to test the effectiveness of debiasing methods with different bias metrics, and to focus on changes in the behavior of certain components of the models, e.g.,first two layers of language models, and attention heads. 之前的工作已经研究了去偏差语言模型如何影响下游任务，特别是去偏差技术如何影响任务性能以及去偏差模型是否也在下游任务中做出公正的预测。然而，我们还不太了解的是为什么去偏差方法对下游任务有不同的影响，以及去偏差技术如何影响语言模型的内部组件，即神经元、层和注意力。在本文中，我们通过应用因果中介分析来分解性别语言模型去偏的内部机制，以了解去偏方法对下游任务毒性检测的影响。我们的研究结果表明需要使用不同的偏差指标来测试去偏差方法的有效性，并关注模型某些组件的行为变化，例如语言模型的前两层和注意力头。 本文通过因果中介分析研究去偏语言模型对下游任务（如毒性检测）的影响机制，重点分析去偏方法如何改变模型内部组件（如层、注意力头）的行为。 Sullam Jeoung,Jana Diesner cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Moses Openja,Forough Majidi,Foutse Khomh,Bhagya Chembakottu,Heng Li
title: Studying the Practices of Deploying Machine Learning Projects on Docker
title_zh: 研究在Docker上部署机器学习项目的实践
comment: ef:The International Conference on Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering 2022 (EASE 2022), June 13--15, 2022, Gothenburg, Sweden
comments: ef:The International Conference on Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering 2022 (EASE 2022), June 13--15, 2022, Gothenburg, Sweden
abstract: Docker is a containerization service that allows for convenient deployment of websites, databases, applications' APIs, and machine learning (ML) models with a few lines of code. Studies have recently explored the use of Docker for deploying general software projects with no specific focus on how Docker is used to deploy ML-based projects. In this study, we conducted an exploratory study to understand how Docker is being used to deploy ML-based projects. As the initial step, we examined the categories of ML-based projects that use Docker. We then examined why and how these projects use Docker, and the characteristics of the resulting Docker images. Our results indicate that six categories of ML-based projects use Docker for deployment, including ML Applications, MLOps/ AIOps, Toolkits, DL Frameworks, Models, and Documentation. We derived the taxonomy of 21 major categories representing the purposes of using Docker, including those specific to models such as model management tasks (e.g., testing, training). We then showed that ML engineers use Docker images mostly to help with the platform portability, such as transferring the software across the operating systems, runtimes such as GPU, and language constraints. However, we also found that more resources may be required to run the Docker images for building ML-based software projects due to the large number of files contained in the image layers with deeply nested directories. We hope to shed light on the emerging practices of deploying ML software projects using containers and highlight aspects that should be improved.

Studies have recently explored the use of Docker for deploying general software projects with no specific focus on how Docker is used to deploy ML-based projects. In this study, we conducted an exploratory study to understand how Docker is being used to deploy ML-based projects. As the initial step, we examined the categories of ML-based projects that use Docker. We then examined why and how these projects use Docker, and the characteristics of the resulting Docker images. Our results indicate that six categories of ML-based projects use Docker for deployment, including ML Applications, MLOps/ AIOps, Toolkits, DL Frameworks, Models, and Documentation. We derived the taxonomy of 21 major categories representing the purposes of using Docker, including those specific to models such as model management tasks (e.g., testing, training). We then showed that ML engineers use Docker images mostly to help with the platform portability, such as transferring the software across the operating systems, runtimes such as GPU, and language constraints. However, we also found that more resources may be required to run the Docker images for building ML-based software projects due to the large number of files contained in the image layers with deeply nested directories. We hope to shed light on the emerging practices of deploying ML software projects using containers and highlight aspects that should be improved.
abstract_zh: Docker 是一种容器化服务，只需几行代码即可方便地部署网站、数据库、应用程序 API 和机器学习 (ML) 模型。最近的研究探索了使用 Docker 来部署通用软件项目，但没有具体关注如何使用 Docker 来部署基于 ML 的项目。在本研究中，我们进行了一项探索性研究，以了解如何使用 Docker 来部署基于 ML 的项目。作为第一步，我们检查了使用 Docker 的基于 ML 的项目的类别。然后我们研究了这些项目使用 Docker 的原因和方式，以及生成的 Docker 镜像的特征。我们的结果表明，六类基于 ML 的项目使用 Docker 进行部署，包括 ML 应用程序、MLOps/AIOps、工具包、DL 框架、模型和文档。我们得出了代表使用 Docker 目的的 21 个主要类别的分类法，包括特定于模型的分类法，例如模型管理任务（例如测试、训练）。然后，我们展示了 ML 工程师使用 Docker 镜像主要是为了帮助实现平台可移植性，例如跨操作系统、GPU 等运行时以及语言限制传输软件。然而，我们还发现，由于镜像层中包含大量文件且目录深度嵌套，因此运行 Docker 镜像来构建基于 ML 的软件项目可能需要更多资源。我们希望阐明使用容器部署机器学习软件项目的新兴实践，并强调应该改进的方面。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用Docker部署机器学习项目的实践，分析其分类、使用动机及镜像特性。
AI.motivation: 尽管Docker被广泛用于软件部署，但针对机器学习项目（ML）的Docker使用情况缺乏系统研究，需探索其具体实践与挑战。
AI.method: 通过探索性研究，分类ML项目并分析其Docker使用场景，统计镜像特征及资源消耗情况。
AI.result: 发现六类ML项目使用Docker（如ML应用、模型管理工具等），提炼21项使用目的，并指出镜像层级复杂导致资源消耗增加。
AI.conclusion: Docker提升了ML项目的跨平台兼容性，但需优化镜像结构以降低资源占用，未来需进一步改进容器化部署策略。
