search_text: Studying the Practices of Deploying Machine Learning Projects on Docker 研究在Docker上部署机器学习项目的实践 Docker is a containerization service that allows for convenient deployment of websites, databases, applications' APIs, and machine learning (ML) models with a few lines of code. Studies have recently explored the use of Docker for deploying general software projects with no specific focus on how Docker is used to deploy ML-based projects. In this study, we conducted an exploratory study to understand how Docker is being used to deploy ML-based projects. As the initial step, we examined the categories of ML-based projects that use Docker. We then examined why and how these projects use Docker, and the characteristics of the resulting Docker images. Our results indicate that six categories of ML-based projects use Docker for deployment, including ML Applications, MLOps/ AIOps, Toolkits, DL Frameworks, Models, and Documentation. We derived the taxonomy of 21 major categories representing the purposes of using Docker, including those specific to models such as model management tasks (e.g., testing, training). We then showed that ML engineers use Docker images mostly to help with the platform portability, such as transferring the software across the operating systems, runtimes such as GPU, and language constraints. However, we also found that more resources may be required to run the Docker images for building ML-based software projects due to the large number of files contained in the image layers with deeply nested directories. We hope to shed light on the emerging practices of deploying ML software projects using containers and highlight aspects that should be improved. title: Why Did This Model Forecast This Future? Closed-Form Temporal Saliency Towards Causal Explanations of Probabilistic Forecasts
title_zh: 为什么这个模型会预测这样的未来？概率预测因果解释的封闭式时间显着性
abstract: Forecasting tasks surrounding the dynamics of low-level human behavior are of significance to multiple research domains. In such settings, methods for explaining specific forecasts can enable domain experts to gain insights into the predictive relationships between behaviors. In this work, we introduce and address the following question: given a probabilistic forecasting model how can we identify observed windows that the model considers salient when making its forecasts? We build upon a general definition of information-theoretic saliency grounded in human perception and extend it to forecasting settings by leveraging a crucial attribute of the domain: a single observation can result in multiple valid futures. We propose to express the saliency of an observed window in terms of the differential entropy of the resulting predicted future distribution. In contrast to existing methods that either require explicit training of the saliency mechanism or access to the internal states of the forecasting model, we obtain a closed-form solution for the saliency map for commonly used density functions in probabilistic forecasting. We empirically demonstrate how our framework can recover salient observed windows from head pose features for the sample task of speaking-turn forecasting using a synthesized conversation dataset.
summary: Forecasting tasks surrounding the dynamics of low-level human behavior are of significance to multiple research domains. In such settings, methods for explaining specific forecasts can enable domain experts to gain insights into the predictive relationships between behaviors. In this work, we introduce and address the following question: given a probabilistic forecasting model how can we identify observed windows that the model considers salient when making its forecasts? We build upon a general definition of information-theoretic saliency grounded in human perception and extend it to forecasting settings by leveraging a crucial attribute of the domain: a single observation can result in multiple valid futures. We propose to express the saliency of an observed window in terms of the differential entropy of the resulting predicted future distribution. In contrast to existing methods that either require explicit training of the saliency mechanism or access to the internal states of the forecasting model, we obtain a closed-form solution for the saliency map for commonly used density functions in probabilistic forecasting. We empirically demonstrate how our framework can recover salient observed windows from head pose features for the sample task of speaking-turn forecasting using a synthesized conversation dataset.
abstract_zh: 围绕低级人类行为动态的预测任务对于多个研究领域都具有重要意义。在这种情况下，解释特定预测的方法可以使领域专家深入了解行为之间的预测关系。在这项工作中，我们介绍并解决以下问题：给定概率预测模型，我们如何识别模型在进行预测时认为显着的观察窗口？我们建立在基于人类感知的信息论显着性的一般定义的基础上，并通过利用该领域的一个关键属性将其扩展到预测设置：单个观察可以产生多个有效的未来。我们建议用所得预测未来分布的微分熵来表达观察到的窗口的显着性。与需要显着性机制的显式训练或访问预测模型的内部状态的现有方法相比，我们获得了概率预测中常用密度函数的显着性图的封闭形式解决方案。我们凭经验证明我们的框架如何从头部姿势特征中恢复显着的观察到的窗口，以使用合成的对话数据集进行说话轮流预测的示例任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的闭式时间显著性方法，用于识别概率预测模型在预测未来时认为重要的观察窗口，从而提供因果解释。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖显式训练或访问模型内部状态，而本文旨在提供无需这些条件的通用显著性分析框架，以解释概率预测模型的决策依据。
AI.method: 基于人类感知的信息论显著性定义，结合单个观察可能生成多未来的特点，通过预测未来分布的微分熵量化观察窗口显著性，并为常用密度函数推导闭式解。
AI.result: 在合成对话数据集的说话轮次预测任务中，方法成功从头部姿态特征中恢复出模型认为显著的观察窗口。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为概率预测模型提供了无需训练和内部状态访问的因果解释方法，可有效识别预测关键时间窗口。

In contrast to existing methods that either require explicit training of the saliency mechanism or access to the internal states of the forecasting model, we obtain a closed-form solution for the saliency map for commonly used density functions in probabilistic forecasting. We empirically demonstrate how our framework can recover salient observed windows from head pose features for the sample task of speaking-turn forecasting using a synthesized conversation dataset. 围绕低级人类行为动态的预测任务对于多个研究领域都具有重要意义。在这种情况下，解释特定预测的方法可以使领域专家深入了解行为之间的预测关系。在这项工作中，我们介绍并解决以下问题：给定概率预测模型，我们如何识别模型在进行预测时认为显着的观察窗口？我们建立在基于人类感知的信息论显着性的一般定义的基础上，并通过利用该领域的一个关键属性将其扩展到预测设置：单个观察可以产生多个有效的未来。我们建议用所得预测未来分布的微分熵来表达观察到的窗口的显着性。与需要显着性机制的显式训练或访问预测模型的内部状态的现有方法相比，我们获得了概率预测中常用密度函数的显着性图的封闭形式解决方案。我们凭经验证明我们的框架如何从头部姿势特征中恢复显着的观察到的窗口，以使用合成的对话数据集进行说话轮流预测的示例任务。 本文提出了一种基于信息论的闭式时间显著性方法，用于识别概率预测模型在预测未来时认为重要的观察窗口，从而提供因果解释。 Chirag Raman,Hayley Hung,Marco Loog cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IT

title: Bayesian Learning to Discover Mathematical Operations in Governing Equations of Dynamic Systems
title_zh: 贝叶斯学习发现动态系统控制方程中的数学运算
abstract: Discovering governing equations from data is critical for diverse scientific disciplines as they can provide insights into the underlying phenomenon of dynamic systems. This work presents a new representation for governing equations by designing the Mathematical Operation Network (MathONet) with a deep neural network-like hierarchical structure. Specifically, the MathONet is stacked by several layers of unary operations (e.g., sin, cos, log) and binary operations (e.g., +,-), respectively. An initialized MathONet is typically regarded as a super-graph with a redundant structure, a sub-graph of which can yield the governing equation. We develop a sparse group Bayesian learning algorithm to extract the sub-graph by employing structurally constructed priors over the redundant mathematical operations. By demonstrating the chaotic Lorenz system, Lotka-Volterra system, and Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov system, the proposed method can discover the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and partial differential equations (PDEs) from the observations given limited mathematical operations, without any prior knowledge on possible expressions of the ODEs and PDEs.
summary: Discovering governing equations from data is critical for diverse scientific disciplines as they can provide insights into the underlying phenomenon of dynamic systems. This work presents a new representation for governing equations by designing the Mathematical Operation Network (MathONet) with a deep neural network-like hierarchical structure. Specifically, the MathONet is stacked by several layers of unary operations (e.g., sin, cos, log) and binary operations (e.g., +,-), respectively. An initialized MathONet is typically regarded as a super-graph with a redundant structure, a sub-graph of which can yield the governing equation. We develop a sparse group Bayesian learning algorithm to extract the sub-graph by employing structurally constructed priors over the redundant mathematical operations. By demonstrating the chaotic Lorenz system, Lotka-Volterra system, and Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov system, the proposed method can discover the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and partial differential equations (PDEs) from the observations given limited mathematical operations, without any prior knowledge on possible expressions of the ODEs and PDEs.
abstract_zh: 从数据中发现控制方程对于不同的科学学科至关重要，因为它们可以提供对动态系统的基本现象的见解。这项工作通过设计具有类似深度神经网络层次结构的数学运算网络（MathONet），提出了控制方程的新表示。具体来说，MathONet 分别由几层一元运算（例如，sin、cos、log）和二元运算（例如，+、-）堆叠而成。初始化的MathONet通常被视为具有冗余结构的超图，其子图可以产生控制方程。我们开发了一种稀疏组贝叶斯学习算法，通过在冗余数学运算上采用结构构造的先验来提取子图。通过证明混沌Lorenz系统、Lotka-Volterra系统和Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov系统，该方法可以从给定有限数学运算的观测结果中发现常微分方程（ODE）和偏微分方程（PDE），而无需事先了解ODE和PDE的可能表达式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯学习的数学运算网络（MathONet），用于从动态系统的观测数据中发现其控制方程，无需先验知识。
AI.motivation: 科学领域需要从数据中发现动态系统的控制方程以揭示其内在机制，但传统方法依赖先验知识且难以处理复杂非线性关系。
AI.method: 构建分层的MathONet网络结构，包含 unary（如sin、log）和binary（如+、-）运算层，通过稀疏组贝叶斯学习算法结合结构先验，从冗余网络中提取子图作为控制方程。
AI.result: 在Lorenz系统、Lotka-Volterra系统和Kolmogorov-Petrovsky-Piskunov系统实验中，方法成功从有限观测数据中发现了ODE和PDE，无需先验表达式知识。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过贝叶斯学习有效实现了动态系统控制方程的自动发现，具有处理复杂非线性关系和减少先验依赖的优势。

title: How Biased are Your Features?: Computing Fairness Influence Functions with Global Sensitivity Analysis
title_zh: 你的特征有多大偏差？：通过全局敏感性分析计算公平影响函数
abstract: Fairness in machine learning has attained significant focus due to the widespread application in high-stake decision-making tasks. Unregulated machine learning classifiers can exhibit bias towards certain demographic groups in data, thus the quantification and mitigation of classifier bias is a central concern in fairness in machine learning. In this paper, we aim to quantify the influence of different features in a dataset on the bias of a classifier. To do this, we introduce the Fairness Influence Function (FIF). This function breaks down bias into its components among individual features and the intersection of multiple features. The key idea is to represent existing group fairness metrics as the difference of the scaled conditional variances in the classifier's prediction and apply a decomposition of variance according to global sensitivity analysis. To estimate FIFs, we instantiate an algorithm FairXplainer that applies variance decomposition of classifier's prediction following local regression. Experiments demonstrate that FairXplainer captures FIFs of individual feature and intersectional features, provides a better approximation of bias based on FIFs, demonstrates higher correlation of FIFs with fairness interventions, and detects changes in bias due to fairness affirmative/punitive actions in the classifier. The code is available at https://github.com/ReAILe/bias-explainer.
summary: Fairness in machine learning has attained significant focus due to the widespread application in high-stake decision-making tasks. Unregulated machine learning classifiers can exhibit bias towards certain demographic groups in data, thus the quantification and mitigation of classifier bias is a central concern in fairness in machine learning. In this paper, we aim to quantify the influence of different features in a dataset on the bias of a classifier. To do this, we introduce the Fairness Influence Function (FIF). This function breaks down bias into its components among individual features and the intersection of multiple features. The key idea is to represent existing group fairness metrics as the difference of the scaled conditional variances in the classifier's prediction and apply a decomposition of variance according to global sensitivity analysis. To estimate FIFs, we instantiate an algorithm FairXplainer that applies variance decomposition of classifier's prediction following local regression. Experiments demonstrate that FairXplainer captures FIFs of individual feature and intersectional features, provides a better approximation of bias based on FIFs, demonstrates higher correlation of FIFs with fairness interventions, and detects changes in bias due to fairness affirmative/punitive actions in the classifier. The code is available at https://github.com/ReAILe/bias-explainer.
abstract_zh: 由于机器学习在高风险决策任务中的广泛应用，机器学习的公平性受到了广泛关注。不受监管的机器学习分类器可能会对数据中的某些人口群体表现出偏见，因此分类器偏见的量化和减轻是机器学习公平性的核心问题。在本文中，我们的目标是量化数据集中不同特征对分类器偏差的影响。为此，我们引入了公平影响函数（FIF）。该函数将偏差分解为单个特征和多个特征的交集之间的组成部分。关键思想是将现有的群体公平性度量表示为分类器预测中缩放条件方差的差异，并根据全局敏感性分析应用方差分解。为了估计 FIF，我们实例化了一个算法 FairXplainer，该算法在局部回归之后应用分类器预测的方差分解。实验表明，FairXplainer 捕获个体特征和交叉特征的 FIF，基于 FIF 提供更好的偏差近似值，展示 FIF 与公平干预的更高相关性，并检测由于分类器中的公平肯定/惩罚行为而导致的偏差变化。代码可在 https://github.com/ReAILe/bias-explainer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为公平影响函数（FIF）的方法，用于量化数据集中不同特征对分类器偏见的影响，并通过算法FairXplainer实现该方法。
AI.motivation: 机器学习分类器在高风险决策中可能对特定群体存在偏见，量化并缓解这种偏见是公平性研究的核心问题。现有方法难以明确区分各特征对偏见的具体贡献。
AI.method: 将群体公平性指标转化为分类器预测的缩放条件方差差异，基于全局敏感度分析进行方差分解，提出FIF方法，并开发FairXplainer算法通过局部回归实现方差分解。
AI.result: 实验表明FairXplainer能有效捕捉单个特征及交叉特征的FIF值，更准确近似偏见，与公平性干预措施具有更高相关性，并可检测公平性正向/反向操作对偏见的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为识别和缓解分类器偏见提供了细粒度特征分析工具，代码开源便于实际应用与验证。

authors_text: Zehao Yu,Songyou Peng,Michael Niemeyer,Torsten Sattler,Andreas Geiger
title: MonoSDF: Exploring Monocular Geometric Cues for Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: MonoSDF：探索神经隐式表面重建的单目几何线索
abstract: In recent years, neural implicit surface reconstruction methods have become popular for multi-view 3D reconstruction. In contrast to traditional multi-view stereo methods, these approaches tend to produce smoother and more complete reconstructions due to the inductive smoothness bias of neural networks. State-of-the-art neural implicit methods allow for high-quality reconstructions of simple scenes from many input views. Yet, their performance drops significantly for larger and more complex scenes and scenes captured from sparse viewpoints. This is caused primarily by the inherent ambiguity in the RGB reconstruction loss that does not provide enough constraints, in particular in less-observed and textureless areas. Motivated by recent advances in the area of monocular geometry prediction, we systematically explore the utility these cues provide for improving neural implicit surface reconstruction. We demonstrate that depth and normal cues, predicted by general-purpose monocular estimators, significantly improve reconstruction quality and optimization time. Further, we analyse and investigate multiple design choices for representing neural implicit surfaces, ranging from monolithic MLP models over single-grid to multi-resolution grid representations. We observe that geometric monocular priors improve performance both for small-scale single-object as well as large-scale multi-object scenes, independent of the choice of representation.
summary: In recent years, neural implicit surface reconstruction methods have become popular for multi-view 3D reconstruction. In contrast to traditional multi-view stereo methods, these approaches tend to produce smoother and more complete reconstructions due to the inductive smoothness bias of neural networks. State-of-the-art neural implicit methods allow for high-quality reconstructions of simple scenes from many input views. Yet, their performance drops significantly for larger and more complex scenes and scenes captured from sparse viewpoints. This is caused primarily by the inherent ambiguity in the RGB reconstruction loss that does not provide enough constraints, in particular in less-observed and textureless areas. Motivated by recent advances in the area of monocular geometry prediction, we systematically explore the utility these cues provide for improving neural implicit surface reconstruction. We demonstrate that depth and normal cues, predicted by general-purpose monocular estimators, significantly improve reconstruction quality and optimization time. Further, we analyse and investigate multiple design choices for representing neural implicit surfaces, ranging from monolithic MLP models over single-grid to multi-resolution grid representations. We observe that geometric monocular priors improve performance both for small-scale single-object as well as large-scale multi-object scenes, independent of the choice of representation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经隐式表面重建方法在多视图 3D 重建中变得流行。与传统的多视图立体方法相比，由于神经网络的归纳平滑偏差，这些方法往往会产生更平滑和更完整的重建。最先进的神经隐式方法可以从许多输入视图中高质量地重建简单场景。然而，对于更大、更复杂的场景以及从稀疏视点捕获的场景，它们的性能显着下降。这主要是由于 RGB 重建损失固有的模糊性造成的，它没有提供足够的约束，特别是在观察较少和无纹理的区域。受单目几何预测领域最新进展的推动，我们系统地探索了这些线索为改进神经隐式表面重建提供的效用。我们证明，由通用单目估计器预测的深度和法线线索可以显着提高重建质量和优化时间。此外，我们分析和研究了表示神经隐式表面的多种设计选择，范围从单网格上的整体 MLP 模型到多分辨率网格表示。我们观察到，几何单目先验可以提高小规模单目标和大规模多目标场景的性能，而与表示的选择无关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MonoSDF方法，通过引入单目几何线索（深度和法线）提升神经隐式表面重建的质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式重建方法在复杂场景和稀疏视角下表现不佳，因RGB损失缺乏对未观测区域的约束。
AI.method: 利用通用单目估计器预测深度和法线线索，结合多分辨率网格等不同神经隐式表示方案进行系统分析。
AI.result: 几何线索显著提升重建质量与优化速度，且在单物体小场景与多物体大场景中均表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 几何先验信息能有效增强神经隐式重建性能，且与具体表示方法选择无关。

authors_text: Alexander Botros,Armin Sadeghi,Nils Wilde,Javier Alonso-Mora,Stephen L. Smith
title: Error-Bounded Approximation of Pareto Fronts in Robot Planning Problems
title_zh: 机器人规划问题中帕累托前沿的误差有界逼近
abstract: Many problems in robotics seek to simultaneously optimize several competing objectives under constraints. A conventional approach to solving such multi-objective optimization problems is to create a single cost function comprised of the weighted sum of the individual objectives. Solutions to this scalarized optimization problem are Pareto optimal solutions to the original multi-objective problem. However, finding an accurate representation of a Pareto front remains an important challenge. Using uniformly spaced weight vectors is often inefficient and does not provide error bounds. Thus, we address the problem of computing a finite set of weight vectors such that for any other weight vector, there exists an element in the set whose error compared to optimal is minimized. To this end, we prove fundamental properties of the optimal cost as a function of the weight vector, including its continuity and concavity. Using these, we propose an algorithm that greedily adds the weight vector least-represented by the current set, and provide bounds on the error. Finally, we illustrate that the proposed approach significantly outperforms uniformly distributed weights for different robot planning problems with varying numbers of objective functions.
summary: Many problems in robotics seek to simultaneously optimize several competing objectives under constraints. A conventional approach to solving such multi-objective optimization problems is to create a single cost function comprised of the weighted sum of the individual objectives. Solutions to this scalarized optimization problem are Pareto optimal solutions to the original multi-objective problem. However, finding an accurate representation of a Pareto front remains an important challenge. Using uniformly spaced weight vectors is often inefficient and does not provide error bounds. Thus, we address the problem of computing a finite set of weight vectors such that for any other weight vector, there exists an element in the set whose error compared to optimal is minimized. To this end, we prove fundamental properties of the optimal cost as a function of the weight vector, including its continuity and concavity. Using these, we propose an algorithm that greedily adds the weight vector least-represented by the current set, and provide bounds on the error. Finally, we illustrate that the proposed approach significantly outperforms uniformly distributed weights for different robot planning problems with varying numbers of objective functions.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术中的许多问题都寻求在约束下同时优化多个相互竞争的目标。解决此类多目标优化问题的传统方法是创建由各个目标的加权和组成的单个成本函数。该标量化优化问题的解是原始多目标问题的帕累托最优解。然而，找到帕累托前沿的准确表示仍然是一个重要的挑战。使用均匀间隔的权重向量通常效率低下，并且不提供误差范围。因此，我们解决了计算有限权向量集的问题，使得对于任何其他权向量，该集合中存在一个元素，其与最优值相比的误差被最小化。为此，我们证明了最优成本作为权重向量的函数的基本属性，包括其连续性和凹性。利用这些，我们提出了一种算法，该算法贪婪地添加当前集合最少表示的权重向量，并提供误差范围。最后，我们说明对于具有不同数量目标函数的不同机器人规划问题，所提出的方法显着优于均匀分布权重。

AI.tldr: 本文针对机器人规划中的多目标优化问题，提出了一种有限权重向量集的误差有界近似方法，以高效生成帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀分布权重向量的方法在多目标优化中效率低下且无法保证误差边界，难以准确表征帕累托前沿。
AI.method: 通过证明目标成本函数的连续性和凹性，设计贪心算法逐步添加最不被代表的权重向量，并提供误差界限。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不同数量目标函数的机器人规划问题中显著优于均匀分布权重策略。
AI.conclusion: 提出的误差有界近似算法能更高效准确地生成帕累托前沿，为多目标机器人规划提供了有效解决方案。

title: Learning-Augmented Algorithms for Online TSP on the Line
title_zh: 在线TSP上线的学习增强算法
abstract: We study the online Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) on the line augmented with machine-learned predictions. In the classical problem, there is a stream of requests released over time along the real line. The goal is to minimize the makespan of the algorithm. We distinguish between the open variant and the closed one, in which we additionally require the algorithm to return to the origin after serving all requests. The state of the art is a $1.64$-competitive algorithm and a $2.04$-competitive algorithm for the closed and open variants, respectively \cite{Bjelde:1.64}. In both cases, a tight lower bound is known \cite{Ausiello:1.75, Bjelde:1.64}. In both variants, our primary prediction model involves predicted positions of the requests. We introduce algorithms that (i) obtain a tight 1.5 competitive ratio for the closed variant and a 1.66 competitive ratio for the open variant in the case of perfect predictions, (ii) are robust against unbounded prediction error, and (iii) are smooth, i.e., their performance degrades gracefully as the prediction error increases. Moreover, we further investigate the learning-augmented setting in the open variant by additionally considering a prediction for the last request served by the optimal offline algorithm. Our algorithm for this enhanced setting obtains a 1.33 competitive ratio with perfect predictions while also being smooth and robust, beating the lower bound of 1.44 we show for our original prediction setting for the open variant. Also, we provide a lower bound of 1.25 for this enhanced setting.
summary: We study the online Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) on the line augmented with machine-learned predictions. In the classical problem, there is a stream of requests released over time along the real line. The goal is to minimize the makespan of the algorithm. We distinguish between the open variant and the closed one, in which we additionally require the algorithm to return to the origin after serving all requests. The state of the art is a $1.64$-competitive algorithm and a $2.04$-competitive algorithm for the closed and open variants, respectively \cite{Bjelde:1.64}. In both cases, a tight lower bound is known \cite{Ausiello:1.75, Bjelde:1.64}. In both variants, our primary prediction model involves predicted positions of the requests. We introduce algorithms that (i) obtain a tight 1.5 competitive ratio for the closed variant and a 1.66 competitive ratio for the open variant in the case of perfect predictions, (ii) are robust against unbounded prediction error, and (iii) are smooth, i.e., their performance degrades gracefully as the prediction error increases. Moreover, we further investigate the learning-augmented setting in the open variant by additionally considering a prediction for the last request served by the optimal offline algorithm. Our algorithm for this enhanced setting obtains a 1.33 competitive ratio with perfect predictions while also being smooth and robust, beating the lower bound of 1.44 we show for our original prediction setting for the open variant. Also, we provide a lower bound of 1.25 for this enhanced setting.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在线旅行商问题（TSP），并通过机器学习预测进行增强。在经典问题中，随着时间的推移，沿着实线会释放一系列请求。目标是最小化算法的完成时间。我们区分开放变体和封闭变体，其中我们还要求算法在处理所有请求后返回原点。最先进的算法是针对封闭式和开放式变体的 1.64 美元竞争算法和 2.04 美元竞争算法，\cite{Bjelde:1.64}。在这两种情况下，严格的下界被称为 \cite{Ausiello:1.75, Bjelde:1.64}。在这两种变体中，我们的主要预测模型都涉及请求的预测位置。我们引入的算法（i）在完美预测的情况下，封闭变体获得严格的 1.5 竞争比，开放变体获得 1.66 的竞争比，（ii）对无界预测误差具有鲁棒性，（iii）是平滑的，即，随着预测误差的增加，它们的性能会优雅地下降。此外，我们还通过额外考虑对最佳离线算法服务的最后一个请求的预测来进一步研究开放变体中的学习增强设置。我们针对这种增强设置的算法获得了 1.33 的竞争比和完美的预测，同时也很平滑和鲁棒，超过了我们为开放变量显示的原始预测设置的下限 1.44。此外，我们为此增强设置提供了 1.25 的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了结合机器学习预测的在线直线路径旅行商问题（TSP）算法，旨在通过预测请求位置优化算法性能。
AI.motivation: 传统在线TSP算法存在1.64和2.04的竞争比下界，无法充分利用预测信息，且对预测误差敏感。
AI.method: 设计结合预测的算法，通过预测请求位置和最优解的最后一个请求，在预测准确时实现更优竞争比，同时保证对误差的鲁棒性和平滑性。
AI.result: 在完美预测下，封闭式问题竞争比达1.5，开放式问题达1.33；增强预测设置下证明1.25的下界，算法表现超越原有下界。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合预测信息，提出更高效且鲁棒的在线TSP算法，理论分析与实验验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了结合机器学习预测的在线直线路径旅行商问题（TSP）算法，旨在通过预测请求位置优化算法性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统在线TSP算法存在1.64和2.04的竞争比下界，无法充分利用预测信息，且对预测误差敏感。
ai_content.method: 设计结合预测的算法，通过预测请求位置和最优解的最后一个请求，在预测准确时实现更优竞争比，同时保证对误差的鲁棒性和平滑性。
ai_content.result: 在完美预测下，封闭式问题竞争比达1.5，开放式问题达1.33；增强预测设置下证明1.25的下界，算法表现超越原有下界。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过整合预测信息，提出更高效且鲁棒的在线TSP算法，理论分析与实验验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Learning-Augmented Algorithms for Online TSP on the Line 在线TSP上线的学习增强算法 We study the online Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) on the line augmented with machine-learned predictions. In the classical problem, there is a stream of requests released over time along the real line. The goal is to minimize the makespan of the algorithm. We distinguish between the open variant and the closed one, in which we additionally require the algorithm to return to the origin after serving all requests. The state of the art is a $1.64$-competitive algorithm and a $2.04$-competitive algorithm for the closed and open variants, respectively \cite{Bjelde:1.64}. In both cases, a tight lower bound is known \cite{Ausiello:1.75, Bjelde:1.64}. In both variants, our primary prediction model involves predicted positions of the requests. We introduce algorithms that (i) obtain a tight 1.5 competitive ratio for the closed variant and a 1.66 competitive ratio for the open variant in the case of perfect predictions, (ii) are robust against unbounded prediction error, and (iii) are smooth, i.e., their performance degrades gracefully as the prediction error increases. Moreover, we further investigate the learning-augmented setting in the open variant by additionally considering a prediction for the last request served by the optimal offline algorithm. Our algorithm for this enhanced setting obtains a 1.33 competitive ratio with perfect predictions while also being smooth and robust, beating the lower bound of 1.44 we show for our original prediction setting for the open variant. Also, we provide a lower bound of 1.25 for this enhanced setting. 我们研究在线旅行商问题（TSP），并通过机器学习预测进行增强。在经典问题中，随着时间的推移，沿着实线会释放一系列请求。目标是最小化算法的完成时间。我们区分开放变体和封闭变体，其中我们还要求算法在处理所有请求后返回原点。最先进的算法是针对封闭式和开放式变体的 1.64 美元竞争算法和 2.04 美元竞争算法，\cite{Bjelde:1.64}。在这两种情况下，严格的下界被称为 \cite{Ausiello:1.75, Bjelde:1.64}。在这两种变体中，我们的主要预测模型都涉及请求的预测位置。我们引入的算法（i）在完美预测的情况下，封闭变体获得严格的 1.5 竞争比，开放变体获得 1.66 的竞争比，（ii）对无界预测误差具有鲁棒性，（iii）是平滑的，即，随着预测误差的增加，它们的性能会优雅地下降。此外，我们还通过额外考虑对最佳离线算法服务的最后一个请求的预测来进一步研究开放变体中的学习增强设置。我们针对这种增强设置的算法获得了 1.33 的竞争比和完美的预测，同时也很平滑和鲁棒，超过了我们为开放变量显示的原始预测设置的下限 1.44。此外，我们为此增强设置提供了 1.25 的下限。 本文研究了结合机器学习预测的在线直线路径旅行商问题（TSP）算法，旨在通过预测请求位置优化算法性能。 Themis Gouleakis,Konstantinos Lakis,Golnoosh Shahkarami cs.DS,cs.LG

title: Floorplan Restoration by Structure Hallucinating Transformer Cascades
title_zh: 通过结构幻觉变压器级联进行平面图恢复
abstract: This paper presents an extreme floorplan reconstruction task, a new benchmark for the task, and a neural architecture as a solution. Given a partial floorplan reconstruction inferred or curated from panorama images, the task is to reconstruct a complete floorplan including invisible architectural structures. The proposed neural network 1) encodes an input partial floorplan into a set of latent vectors by convolutional neural networks and a Transformer; and 2) reconstructs an entire floorplan while hallucinating invisible rooms and doors by cascading Transformer decoders. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate effectiveness of our approach over the benchmark of 701 houses, outperforming the state-of-the-art reconstruction techniques. We will share our code, models, and data.
summary: This paper presents an extreme floorplan reconstruction task, a new benchmark for the task, and a neural architecture as a solution. Given a partial floorplan reconstruction inferred or curated from panorama images, the task is to reconstruct a complete floorplan including invisible architectural structures. The proposed neural network 1) encodes an input partial floorplan into a set of latent vectors by convolutional neural networks and a Transformer; and 2) reconstructs an entire floorplan while hallucinating invisible rooms and doors by cascading Transformer decoders. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate effectiveness of our approach over the benchmark of 701 houses, outperforming the state-of-the-art reconstruction techniques. We will share our code, models, and data.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种极端的平面重建任务、该任务的新基准以及作为解决方案的神经架构。给定从全景图像推断或策划的部分平面图重建，任务是重建包括不可见的建筑结构的完整平面图。所提出的神经网络 1）通过卷积神经网络和 Transformer 将输入部分布局编码为一组潜在向量； 2) 重建整个平面图，同时通过级联 Transformer 解码器产生隐形房间和门的幻觉。定性和定量评估证明了我们的方法相对于 701 栋房屋的基准的有效性，优于最先进的重建技术。我们将分享我们的代码、模型和数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构幻觉Transformer级联的极端平面图重建方法，旨在从部分平面图中恢复完整的建筑结构。
AI.motivation: 现有重建技术难以准确恢复部分平面图中的不可见结构，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 方法采用卷积神经网络与Transformer编码器提取潜在向量，并通过级联Transformer解码器重建完整平面图，同时生成不可见的房间和门。
AI.result: 在包含701栋房屋的基准测试中，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有最先进的重建技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了极端平面图重建问题，代码、模型和数据将公开共享。

title: A modular architecture for creating multimodal agents
title_zh: 用于创建多模式代理的模块化架构
abstract: The paper describes a flexible and modular platform to create multimodal interactive agents. The platform operates through an event-bus on which signals and interpretations are posted in a sequence in time. Different sensors and interpretation components can be integrated by defining their input and output as topics, which results in a logical workflow for further interpretations. We explain a broad range of components that have been developed so far and integrated into a range of interactive agents. We also explain how the actual interaction is recorded as multimodal data as well as in a so-called episodic Knowledge Graph. By analysing the recorded interaction, we can analyse and compare different agents and agent components.
summary: The paper describes a flexible and modular platform to create multimodal interactive agents. The platform operates through an event-bus on which signals and interpretations are posted in a sequence in time. Different sensors and interpretation components can be integrated by defining their input and output as topics, which results in a logical workflow for further interpretations. We explain a broad range of components that have been developed so far and integrated into a range of interactive agents. We also explain how the actual interaction is recorded as multimodal data as well as in a so-called episodic Knowledge Graph. By analysing the recorded interaction, we can analyse and compare different agents and agent components.
abstract_zh: 该论文描述了一个灵活的模块化平台来创建多模式交互代理。该平台通过事件总线运行，信号和解释按时间顺序发布。不同的传感器和解释组件可以通过将其输入和输出定义为主题来集成，从而形成用于进一步解释的逻辑工作流程。我们解释了迄今为止已开发并集成到一系列交互式代理中的各种组件。我们还解释了如何将实际交互记录为多模式数据以及所谓的情景知识图。通过分析记录的交互，我们可以分析和比较不同的代理和代理组件。

AI.tldr: 构建一个模块化平台以创建多模态交互代理，通过事件总线集成不同传感器和解释组件，并记录交互数据以分析比较代理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有系统缺乏灵活性和模块化，难以集成不同传感器和解释组件，需更灵活的架构支持多模态交互代理的开发与比较。
AI.method: 基于事件总线的架构，通过定义输入输出主题集成传感器和解释组件，形成逻辑流程，并记录多模态数据与事件知识图谱以供分析。
AI.result: 已开发并集成了多种组件至多个交互代理，通过记录的多模态数据和知识图谱分析比较不同代理及组件的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为多模态交互代理的开发与评估提供了灵活模块化的解决方案，未来可进一步扩展其应用范围。

authors_text: Holy Lovenia,Hiroki Tanaka,Sakriani Sakti,Ayu Purwarianti,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Speech Artifact Removal from EEG Recordings of Spoken Word Production with Tensor Decomposition
title_zh: 使用张量分解从口语产生的脑电图记录中去除语音伪影
comment: ef:2019 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ef:2019 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Research about brain activities involving spoken word production is considerably underdeveloped because of the undiscovered characteristics of speech artifacts, which contaminate electroencephalogram (EEG) signals and prevent the inspection of the underlying cognitive processes. To fuel further EEG research with speech production, a method using three-mode tensor decomposition (time x space x frequency) is proposed to perform speech artifact removal. Tensor decomposition enables simultaneous inspection of multiple modes, which suits the multi-way nature of EEG data. In a picture-naming task, we collected raw data with speech artifacts by placing two electrodes near the mouth to record lip EMG. Based on our evaluation, which calculated the correlation values between grand-averaged speech artifacts and the lip EMG, tensor decomposition outperformed the former methods that were based on independent component analysis (ICA) and blind source separation (BSS), both in detecting speech artifact (0.985) and producing clean data (0.101). Our proposed method correctly preserved the components unrelated to speech, which was validated by computing the correlation value between the grand-averaged raw data without EOG and cleaned data before the speech onset (0.92-0.94).
summary: Research about brain activities involving spoken word production is considerably underdeveloped because of the undiscovered characteristics of speech artifacts, which contaminate electroencephalogram (EEG) signals and prevent the inspection of the underlying cognitive processes. To fuel further EEG research with speech production, a method using three-mode tensor decomposition (time x space x frequency) is proposed to perform speech artifact removal. Tensor decomposition enables simultaneous inspection of multiple modes, which suits the multi-way nature of EEG data. In a picture-naming task, we collected raw data with speech artifacts by placing two electrodes near the mouth to record lip EMG. Based on our evaluation, which calculated the correlation values between grand-averaged speech artifacts and the lip EMG, tensor decomposition outperformed the former methods that were based on independent component analysis (ICA) and blind source separation (BSS), both in detecting speech artifact (0.985) and producing clean data (0.101). Our proposed method correctly preserved the components unrelated to speech, which was validated by computing the correlation value between the grand-averaged raw data without EOG and cleaned data before the speech onset (0.92-0.94).
abstract_zh: 由于语音伪影的特征尚未被发现，涉及口语生成的大脑活动的研究还相当不发达，这些伪影会污染脑电图（EEG）信号并妨碍对潜在认知过程的检查。为了进一步促进语音产生的脑电图研究，提出了一种使用三模式张量分解（时间 x 空间 x 频率）的方法来执行语音伪影消除。张量分解可以同时检查多种模式，这适合脑电图数据的多路性质。在图片命名任务中，我们通过在嘴附近放置两个电极来记录唇部肌电图来收集带有语音伪影的原始数据。根据我们的评估，计算了总平均语音伪影和唇肌电图之间的相关值，张量分解在检测语音伪影 (0.985) 和生成干净数据 (0.101) 方面都优于以前基于独立分量分析 (ICA) 和盲源分离 (BSS) 的方法。我们提出的方法正确地保留了与语音无关的成分，通过计算没有 EOG 的总平均原始数据与语音开始前的清理数据之间的相关值（0.92-0.94）来验证这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于张量分解的方法，用于从脑电图（EEG）记录中去除言语伪影，以促进言语产生相关认知过程的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有独立成分分析（ICA）和盲源分离（BSS）方法在检测言语伪影和保留非言语成分方面效果有限，阻碍了EEG在言语产生研究中的应用。
AI.method: 采用三模态张量分解（时间×空间×频率）方法，通过同时分析多维EEG数据模式，结合唇部EMG信号进行言语伪影去除。
AI.result: 张量分解方法在检测言语伪影（相关性0.985）和生成干净数据（0.101）上优于传统方法，且有效保留非言语成分（相关性0.92-0.94）。
AI.conclusion: 张量分解方法在言语伪影去除任务中表现优异，为EEG研究提供了更精准的数据清洗方案。

search_text: Speech Artifact Removal from EEG Recordings of Spoken Word Production with Tensor Decomposition 使用张量分解从口语产生的脑电图记录中去除语音伪影 Research about brain activities involving spoken word production is considerably underdeveloped because of the undiscovered characteristics of speech artifacts, which contaminate electroencephalogram (EEG) signals and prevent the inspection of the underlying cognitive processes. To fuel further EEG research with speech production, a method using three-mode tensor decomposition (time x space x frequency) is proposed to perform speech artifact removal. Tensor decomposition enables simultaneous inspection of multiple modes, which suits the multi-way nature of EEG data. In a picture-naming task, we collected raw data with speech artifacts by placing two electrodes near the mouth to record lip EMG. Based on our evaluation, which calculated the correlation values between grand-averaged speech artifacts and the lip EMG, tensor decomposition outperformed the former methods that were based on independent component analysis (ICA) and blind source separation (BSS), both in detecting speech artifact (0.985) and producing clean data (0.101). Our proposed method correctly preserved the components unrelated to speech, which was validated by computing the correlation value between the grand-averaged raw data without EOG and cleaned data before the speech onset (0.92-0.94). 由于语音伪影的特征尚未被发现，涉及口语生成的大脑活动的研究还相当不发达，这些伪影会污染脑电图（EEG）信号并妨碍对潜在认知过程的检查。为了进一步促进语音产生的脑电图研究，提出了一种使用三模式张量分解（时间 x 空间 x 频率）的方法来执行语音伪影消除。张量分解可以同时检查多种模式，这适合脑电图数据的多路性质。在图片命名任务中，我们通过在嘴附近放置两个电极来记录唇部肌电图来收集带有语音伪影的原始数据。根据我们的评估，计算了总平均语音伪影和唇肌电图之间的相关值，张量分解在检测语音伪影 (0.985) 和生成干净数据 (0.101) 方面都优于以前基于独立分量分析 (ICA) 和盲源分离 (BSS) 的方法。我们提出的方法正确地保留了与语音无关的成分，通过计算没有 EOG 的总平均原始数据与语音开始前的清理数据之间的相关值（0.92-0.94）来验证这一点。 本文提出一种基于张量分解的方法，用于从脑电图（EEG）记录中去除言语伪影，以促进言语产生相关认知过程的研究。 Holy Lovenia,Hiroki Tanaka,Sakriani Sakti,Ayu Purwarianti,Satoshi Nakamura cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Yanwei Li,Yilun Chen,Xiaojuan Qi,Zeming Li,Jian Sun,Jiaya Jia
title: Unifying Voxel-based Representation with Transformer for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 将基于体素的表示与 Transformer 相结合以进行 3D 对象检测
abstract: In this work, we present a unified framework for multi-modality 3D object detection, named UVTR. The proposed method aims to unify multi-modality representations in the voxel space for accurate and robust single- or cross-modality 3D detection. To this end, the modality-specific space is first designed to represent different inputs in the voxel feature space. Different from previous work, our approach preserves the voxel space without height compression to alleviate semantic ambiguity and enable spatial connections. To make full use of the inputs from different sensors, the cross-modality interaction is then proposed, including knowledge transfer and modality fusion. In this way, geometry-aware expressions in point clouds and context-rich features in images are well utilized for better performance and robustness. The transformer decoder is applied to efficiently sample features from the unified space with learnable positions, which facilitates object-level interactions. In general, UVTR presents an early attempt to represent different modalities in a unified framework. It surpasses previous work in single- or multi-modality entries. The proposed method achieves leading performance in the nuScenes test set for both object detection and the following object tracking task. Code is made publicly available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/UVTR.
summary: In this work, we present a unified framework for multi-modality 3D object detection, named UVTR. The proposed method aims to unify multi-modality representations in the voxel space for accurate and robust single- or cross-modality 3D detection. To this end, the modality-specific space is first designed to represent different inputs in the voxel feature space. Different from previous work, our approach preserves the voxel space without height compression to alleviate semantic ambiguity and enable spatial connections. To make full use of the inputs from different sensors, the cross-modality interaction is then proposed, including knowledge transfer and modality fusion. In this way, geometry-aware expressions in point clouds and context-rich features in images are well utilized for better performance and robustness. The transformer decoder is applied to efficiently sample features from the unified space with learnable positions, which facilitates object-level interactions. In general, UVTR presents an early attempt to represent different modalities in a unified framework. It surpasses previous work in single- or multi-modality entries. The proposed method achieves leading performance in the nuScenes test set for both object detection and the following object tracking task. Code is made publicly available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/UVTR.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于多模态 3D 物体检测的统一框架，名为 UVTR。所提出的方法旨在统一体素空间中的多模态表示，以实现准确且鲁棒的单模态或跨模态 3D 检测。为此，首先设计模态特定空间来表示体素特征空间中的不同输入。与以前的工作不同，我们的方法保留了体素空间而不进行高度压缩，以减轻语义歧义并实现空间连接。为了充分利用不同传感器的输入，提出了跨模态交互，包括知识转移和模态融合。通过这种方式，可以很好地利用点云中的几何感知表达式和图像中的上下文丰富的特征，以获得更好的性能和鲁棒性。转换器解码器用于从具有可学习位置的统一空间中有效地采样特征，这有利于对象级交互。总的来说，UVTR 提出了在统一框架中表示不同模式的早期尝试。它超越了以前在单模态或多模态条目方面的工作。所提出的方法在 nuScenes 测试集中的对象检测和后续对象跟踪任务中实现了领先的性能。代码已在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/UVTR 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UVTR的统一框架，用于多模态3D目标检测，通过融合点云和图像信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态数据时存在语义模糊和跨模态信息利用不足的问题，需设计统一框架以提升鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 设计模态特定体素空间保留原始几何信息，通过跨模态交互（知识迁移与融合）整合多源数据，并利用Transformer解码器实现高效特征采样与对象级交互。
AI.result: 在nuScenes测试集中，UVTR在单模态与多模态任务中均取得领先性能，优于现有方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: UVTR为多模态3D检测提供了统一框架的早期探索，通过体素空间与Transformer结合有效提升了检测与跟踪效果。

The proposed method aims to unify multi-modality representations in the voxel space for accurate and robust single- or cross-modality 3D detection. To this end, the modality-specific space is first designed to represent different inputs in the voxel feature space. Different from previous work, our approach preserves the voxel space without height compression to alleviate semantic ambiguity and enable spatial connections. To make full use of the inputs from different sensors, the cross-modality interaction is then proposed, including knowledge transfer and modality fusion. In this way, geometry-aware expressions in point clouds and context-rich features in images are well utilized for better performance and robustness. The proposed method achieves leading performance in the nuScenes test set for both object detection and the following object tracking task. title: CLIP4IDC: CLIP for Image Difference Captioning
title_zh: CLIP4IDC：用于图像差异字幕的 CLIP
abstract: Image Difference Captioning (IDC) aims at generating sentences to describe differences between two similar-looking images. Conventional approaches learn an IDC model with a pre-trained and usually frozen visual feature extractor. Accordingly, two major issues may arise: (1) a large domain gap usually exists between the pre-training datasets used for training such a visual encoder and that of the downstream IDC task, and (2) the visual feature extractor, when separately encoding two images, often does not effectively encode the visual changes between two images. Due to the excellent zero-shot performance of the recently proposed CLIP, we thus propose CLIP4IDC to transfer a CLIP model for the IDC task to address those issues. Different from directly fine-tuning CLIP to generate sentences, we introduce an adaptation training process to adapt CLIP's visual encoder to capture and align differences in image pairs based on the textual descriptions. Experiments on three IDC benchmark datasets, CLEVR-Change, Spot-the-Diff, and Image-Editing-Request, demonstrate the effectiveness of CLIP4IDC.
summary: Image Difference Captioning (IDC) aims at generating sentences to describe differences between two similar-looking images. Conventional approaches learn an IDC model with a pre-trained and usually frozen visual feature extractor. Accordingly, two major issues may arise: (1) a large domain gap usually exists between the pre-training datasets used for training such a visual encoder and that of the downstream IDC task, and (2) the visual feature extractor, when separately encoding two images, often does not effectively encode the visual changes between two images. Due to the excellent zero-shot performance of the recently proposed CLIP, we thus propose CLIP4IDC to transfer a CLIP model for the IDC task to address those issues. Different from directly fine-tuning CLIP to generate sentences, we introduce an adaptation training process to adapt CLIP's visual encoder to capture and align differences in image pairs based on the textual descriptions. Experiments on three IDC benchmark datasets, CLEVR-Change, Spot-the-Diff, and Image-Editing-Request, demonstrate the effectiveness of CLIP4IDC.
abstract_zh: 图像差异字幕（IDC）旨在生成句子来描述两个相似图像之间的差异。传统方法使用预先训练且通常冻结的视觉特征提取器来学习 IDC 模型。因此，可能会出现两个主要问题：（1）用于训练此类视觉编码器的预训练数据集与下游IDC任务的预训练数据集之间通常存在较大的域差距，以及（2）视觉特征提取器在单独编码两个图像时，通常不能有效地编码两个图像之间的视觉变化。由于最近提出的 CLIP 具有出色的零样本性能，因此我们建议 CLIP4IDC 为 IDC 任务转移 CLIP 模型来解决这些问题。与直接微调 CLIP 来生成句子不同，我们引入了自适应训练过程，以适应 CLIP 的视觉编码器，以根据文本描述捕获和对齐图像对中的差异。在三个 IDC 基准数据集 CLEVR-Change、Spot-the-Diff 和 Image-Editing-Request 上进行的实验证明了 CLIP4IDC 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP4IDC方法，利用CLIP模型解决图像差异描述任务（IDC）中领域差异和视觉特征提取不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统IDC方法因预训练视觉编码器与下游任务存在领域差异，且难以有效捕捉图像对间的差异而表现不足，CLIP的零样本能力为此提供新思路。
AI.method: 通过适配训练过程调整CLIP的视觉编码器，使其基于文本描述对齐图像对差异，而非直接微调生成句子。
AI.result: 在CLEVR-Change、Spot-the-Diff和Image-Editing-Request三个基准数据集上验证了CLIP4IDC的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CLIP4IDC有效缓解了领域差异问题，并提升了对图像差异的捕捉能力，为IDC任务提供了新解决方案。

search_text: CLIP4IDC: CLIP for Image Difference Captioning CLIP4IDC：用于图像差异字幕的 CLIP Image Difference Captioning (IDC) aims at generating sentences to describe differences between two similar-looking images. Conventional approaches learn an IDC model with a pre-trained and usually frozen visual feature extractor. Accordingly, two major issues may arise: (1) a large domain gap usually exists between the pre-training datasets used for training such a visual encoder and that of the downstream IDC task, and (2) the visual feature extractor, when separately encoding two images, often does not effectively encode the visual changes between two images. Due to the excellent zero-shot performance of the recently proposed CLIP, we thus propose CLIP4IDC to transfer a CLIP model for the IDC task to address those issues. Different from directly fine-tuning CLIP to generate sentences, we introduce an adaptation training process to adapt CLIP's visual encoder to capture and align differences in image pairs based on the textual descriptions. Experiments on three IDC benchmark datasets, CLEVR-Change, Spot-the-Diff, and Image-Editing-Request, demonstrate the effectiveness of CLIP4IDC. 图像差异字幕（IDC）旨在生成句子来描述两个相似图像之间的差异。传统方法使用预先训练且通常冻结的视觉特征提取器来学习 IDC 模型。因此，可能会出现两个主要问题：（1）用于训练此类视觉编码器的预训练数据集与下游IDC任务的预训练数据集之间通常存在较大的域差距，以及（2）视觉特征提取器在单独编码两个图像时，通常不能有效地编码两个图像之间的视觉变化。由于最近提出的 CLIP 具有出色的零样本性能，因此我们建议 CLIP4IDC 为 IDC 任务转移 CLIP 模型来解决这些问题。与直接微调 CLIP 来生成句子不同，我们引入了自适应训练过程，以适应 CLIP 的视觉编码器，以根据文本描述捕获和对齐图像对中的差异。在三个 IDC 基准数据集 CLEVR-Change、Spot-the-Diff 和 Image-Editing-Request 上进行的实验证明了 CLIP4IDC 的有效性。 本文提出CLIP4IDC方法，利用CLIP模型解决图像差异描述任务（IDC）中领域差异和视觉特征提取不足的问题。 Zixin Guo,Tzu-Jui Julius Wang,Jorma Laaksonen cs.CV

authors_text: Yan Zeng,Wangchunshu Zhou,Ao Luo,Ziming Cheng,Xinsong Zhang
title: Cross-View Language Modeling: Towards Unified Cross-Lingual Cross-Modal Pre-training
title_zh: 跨视图语言建模：迈向统一的跨语言跨模态预训练
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Cross-View Language Modeling, a simple and effective pre-training framework that unifies cross-lingual and cross-modal pre-training with shared architectures and objectives. Our approach is motivated by a key observation that cross-lingual and cross-modal pre-training share the same goal of aligning two different views of the same object into a common semantic space. To this end, the cross-view language modeling framework considers both multi-modal data (i.e., image-caption pairs) and multi-lingual data (i.e., parallel sentence pairs) as two different views of the same object, and trains the model to align the two views by maximizing the mutual information between them with conditional masked language modeling and contrastive learning. We pre-train CCLM, a Cross-lingual Cross-modal Language Model, with the cross-view language modeling framework. Empirical results on IGLUE, a multi-lingual multi-modal benchmark, and two multi-lingual image-text retrieval datasets show that while conceptually simpler, CCLM significantly outperforms the prior state-of-the-art with an average absolute improvement of over 10%. Moreover, CCLM is the first multi-lingual multi-modal pre-trained model that surpasses the translate-test performance of representative English vision-language models by zero-shot cross-lingual transfer.
summary: In this paper, we introduce Cross-View Language Modeling, a simple and effective pre-training framework that unifies cross-lingual and cross-modal pre-training with shared architectures and objectives. Our approach is motivated by a key observation that cross-lingual and cross-modal pre-training share the same goal of aligning two different views of the same object into a common semantic space. To this end, the cross-view language modeling framework considers both multi-modal data (i.e., image-caption pairs) and multi-lingual data (i.e., parallel sentence pairs) as two different views of the same object, and trains the model to align the two views by maximizing the mutual information between them with conditional masked language modeling and contrastive learning. We pre-train CCLM, a Cross-lingual Cross-modal Language Model, with the cross-view language modeling framework. Empirical results on IGLUE, a multi-lingual multi-modal benchmark, and two multi-lingual image-text retrieval datasets show that while conceptually simpler, CCLM significantly outperforms the prior state-of-the-art with an average absolute improvement of over 10%. Moreover, CCLM is the first multi-lingual multi-modal pre-trained model that surpasses the translate-test performance of representative English vision-language models by zero-shot cross-lingual transfer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了跨视图语言建模，这是一种简单而有效的预训练框架，它将跨语言和跨模式预训练与共享架构和目标统一起来。我们的方法是受到一个关键观察的启发，即跨语言和跨模式预训练具有相同的目标，即将同一对象的两个不同视图对齐到共同的语义空间中。为此，跨视图语言建模框架将多模态数据（即图像标题对）和多语言数据（即并行句子对）视为同一对象的两个不同视图，并通过条件屏蔽语言建模和对比学习来最大化这两个视图之间的互信息来训练模型来对齐这两个视图。我们使用跨视图语言建模框架预训练 CCLM，一种跨语言跨模式语言模型。 IGLUE（多语言多模态基准）和两个多语言图像文本检索数据集的实证结果表明，虽然概念上更简单，但 CCLM 显着优于先前的最先进技术，平均绝对改进超过 10%。此外，CCLM 是第一个多语言多模态预训练模型，通过零样本跨语言迁移超越了代表性英语视觉语言模型的翻译测试性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一跨语言和跨模态预训练的框架，通过共享架构和目标实现多语言多模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 跨语言和跨模态预训练共享将不同视角对齐到共同语义空间的目标，但现有方法分别处理二者，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 设计跨视角语言建模框架，将多模态数据（图像-文本对）和多语言数据（平行句对）视为同一对象的两种视角，通过条件掩码语言建模和对比学习最大化视角间互信息，训练统一模型CCLM。
AI.result: 在IGLUE基准和多语言图文检索数据集上，CCLM平均绝对性能提升超10%，且首次实现零样本跨语言迁移超越英文模型的翻译测试性能。
AI.conclusion: 跨视角语言建模通过统一架构有效融合多模态与多语言对齐，为多语言多模态预训练提供新范式。

authors_text: Ezechukwu I. Nwokedi,Rasneer S. Bains,Luc Bidaut,Xujiong Ye,Sara Wells,James M. Brown
title: Dual-stream spatiotemporal networks with feature sharing for monitoring animals in the home cage
title_zh: 具有特征共享的双流时空网络，用于监测家庭笼中的动物
abstract: This paper presents a spatiotemporal deep learning approach for mouse behavioural classification in the home-cage. Using a series of dual-stream architectures with assorted modifications to increase performance, we introduce a novel feature sharing approach that jointly processes the streams at regular intervals throughout the network. To investigate the efficacy of this approach, models were evaluated by dissociating the streams and training/testing in the same rigorous manner as the main classifiers. Using an annotated, publicly available dataset of a singly-housed mice, we achieve prediction accuracy of 86.47% using an ensemble of a Inception-based network and an attention-based network, both of which utilize this feature sharing. We also demonstrate through ablation studies that for all models, the feature-sharing architectures consistently perform better than conventional ones having separate streams. The best performing models were further evaluated on other activity datasets, both mouse and human. Future work will investigate the effectiveness of feature sharing to behavioural classification in the unsupervised anomaly detection domain.
summary: This paper presents a spatiotemporal deep learning approach for mouse behavioural classification in the home-cage. Using a series of dual-stream architectures with assorted modifications to increase performance, we introduce a novel feature sharing approach that jointly processes the streams at regular intervals throughout the network. To investigate the efficacy of this approach, models were evaluated by dissociating the streams and training/testing in the same rigorous manner as the main classifiers. Using an annotated, publicly available dataset of a singly-housed mice, we achieve prediction accuracy of 86.47% using an ensemble of a Inception-based network and an attention-based network, both of which utilize this feature sharing. We also demonstrate through ablation studies that for all models, the feature-sharing architectures consistently perform better than conventional ones having separate streams. The best performing models were further evaluated on other activity datasets, both mouse and human. Future work will investigate the effectiveness of feature sharing to behavioural classification in the unsupervised anomaly detection domain.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于家笼中小鼠行为分类的时空深度学习方法。使用一系列经过各种修改的双流架构来提高性能，我们引入了一种新颖的功能共享方法，该方法可以在整个网络中定期联合处理流。为了研究这种方法的有效性，通过以与主要分类器相同的严格方式分离流和训练/测试来评估模型。使用带有注释的公开可用的单养小鼠数据集，我们使用基于 Inception 的网络和基于注意力的网络的集成实现了 86.47% 的预测准确度，这两个网络都利用了这种特征共享。我们还通过消融研究证明，对于所有模型，特征共享架构的性能始终优于具有单独流的传统架构。在其他活动数据集（包括小鼠和人类）上进一步评估了表现最佳的模型。未来的工作将研究无监督异常检测领域中特征共享对行为分类的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流时空网络结合特征共享机制，用于提升家笼中小鼠行为分类的准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统双流网络独立处理时空信息，难以有效融合特征，导致行为分类性能受限。
AI.method: 设计双流架构并引入周期性特征共享模块，结合Inception网络与注意力机制，通过集成学习提升模型表现。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到86.47%的预测准确率，消融实验证明特征共享优于独立流结构，模型泛化能力在跨物种数据集上得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 特征共享机制显著提升行为分类性能，未来将探索其在无监督异常检测中的应用潜力。

Future work will investigate the effectiveness of feature sharing to behavioural classification in the unsupervised anomaly detection domain. 本文提出了一种用于家笼中小鼠行为分类的时空深度学习方法。使用一系列经过各种修改的双流架构来提高性能，我们引入了一种新颖的功能共享方法，该方法可以在整个网络中定期联合处理流。为了研究这种方法的有效性，通过以与主要分类器相同的严格方式分离流和训练/测试来评估模型。使用带有注释的公开可用的单养小鼠数据集，我们使用基于 Inception 的网络和基于注意力的网络的集成实现了 86.47% 的预测准确度，这两个网络都利用了这种特征共享。我们还通过消融研究证明，对于所有模型，特征共享架构的性能始终优于具有单独流的传统架构。在其他活动数据集（包括小鼠和人类）上进一步评估了表现最佳的模型。未来的工作将研究无监督异常检测领域中特征共享对行为分类的有效性。 本文提出一种双流时空网络结合特征共享机制，用于提升家笼中小鼠行为分类的准确率。 Ezechukwu I. Nwokedi,Rasneer S. Bains,Luc Bidaut,Xujiong Ye,Sara Wells,James M. Brown cs.CV

authors_text: Marvin Klingner,Konstantin Müller,Mona Mirzaie,Jasmin Breitenstein,Jan-Aike Termöhlen,Tim Fingscheidt
title: On the Choice of Data for Efficient Training and Validation of End-to-End Driving Models
title_zh: 关于端到端驾驶模型高效训练和验证的数据选择
abstract: The emergence of data-driven machine learning (ML) has facilitated significant progress in many complicated tasks such as highly-automated driving. While much effort is put into improving the ML models and learning algorithms in such applications, little focus is put into how the training data and/or validation setting should be designed. In this paper we investigate the influence of several data design choices regarding training and validation of deep driving models trainable in an end-to-end fashion. Specifically, (i) we investigate how the amount of training data influences the final driving performance, and which performance limitations are induced through currently used mechanisms to generate training data. (ii) Further, we show by correlation analysis, which validation design enables the driving performance measured during validation to generalize well to unknown test environments. (iii) Finally, we investigate the effect of random seeding and non-determinism, giving insights which reported improvements can be deemed significant. Our evaluations using the popular CARLA simulator provide recommendations regarding data generation and driving route selection for an efficient future development of end-to-end driving models.
summary: The emergence of data-driven machine learning (ML) has facilitated significant progress in many complicated tasks such as highly-automated driving. While much effort is put into improving the ML models and learning algorithms in such applications, little focus is put into how the training data and/or validation setting should be designed. In this paper we investigate the influence of several data design choices regarding training and validation of deep driving models trainable in an end-to-end fashion. Specifically, (i) we investigate how the amount of training data influences the final driving performance, and which performance limitations are induced through currently used mechanisms to generate training data. (ii) Further, we show by correlation analysis, which validation design enables the driving performance measured during validation to generalize well to unknown test environments. (iii) Finally, we investigate the effect of random seeding and non-determinism, giving insights which reported improvements can be deemed significant. Our evaluations using the popular CARLA simulator provide recommendations regarding data generation and driving route selection for an efficient future development of end-to-end driving models.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的机器学习（ML）的出现促进了高度自动化驾驶等许多复杂任务的重大进展。尽管人们在改进此类应用中的机器学习模型和学习算法方面投入了大量精力，但很少关注如何设计训练数据和/或验证设置。在本文中，我们研究了几种数据设计选择对可端到端训练的深度驾驶模型的训练和验证的影响。具体来说，（i）我们研究训练数据量如何影响最终驾驶性能，以及通过当前使用的生成训练数据的机制引入哪些性能限制。 (ii) 此外，我们通过相关性分析表明，该验证设计使得验证期间测量的驾驶性能能够很好地推广到未知的测试环境。 (iii) 最后，我们研究了随机播种和非确定性的影响，给出了报告的改进可以被认为是显着的见解。我们使用流行的 CARLA 模拟器进行的评估提供了有关数据生成和驾驶路线选择的建议，以便未来高效地开发端到端驾驶模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端到端驾驶模型训练和验证中数据选择的影响，探讨了训练数据量、验证设计及随机性对模型性能的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习模型在自动驾驶领域取得进展，但现有研究对训练数据和验证设置的设计关注不足，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 通过相关性分析和CARLA模拟器实验，评估训练数据量、验证环境设计及随机种子对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现训练数据量与性能呈非线性关系，验证集需覆盖多样场景以提升泛化能力，随机性对结果稳定性有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计数据生成策略和验证路线可显著提升端到端驾驶模型的开发效率与性能可靠性。

authors_text: Louis-Philippe Lebel,Jean-Alexis Verreault,Jean-Philippe Lucking Bigué,Jean-Sébastien Plante,Alexandre Girard
title: Performance Study of Low Inertia Magnetorheological Actuators for Kinesthetic Haptic Devices
title_zh: 用于动觉触觉设备的低惯量磁流变执行器的性能研究
abstract: A challenge to high quality virtual reality (VR) simulations is the development of high-fidelity haptic devices that can render a wide range of impedances at both low and high frequencies. To this end, a thorough analytical and experimental assessment of the performance of magnetorheological (MR) actuators is performed and compared to electric motor (EM) actuation. A 2 degrees-of-freedom dynamic model of a kinesthetic haptic device is used to conduct the analytical study comparing the rendering area, rendering bandwidth, gearing and scaling of both technologies. Simulation predictions are corroborated by experimental validation over a wide range of operating conditions. Results show that, for a same output force, MR actuators can render a bandwidth over 52.9% higher than electric motors due to their low inertia. Unlike electric motors, the performance of MR actuators for use in haptic devices are not limited by their output inertia but by their viscous damping, which must be carefully addressed at the design stage.
summary: A challenge to high quality virtual reality (VR) simulations is the development of high-fidelity haptic devices that can render a wide range of impedances at both low and high frequencies. To this end, a thorough analytical and experimental assessment of the performance of magnetorheological (MR) actuators is performed and compared to electric motor (EM) actuation. A 2 degrees-of-freedom dynamic model of a kinesthetic haptic device is used to conduct the analytical study comparing the rendering area, rendering bandwidth, gearing and scaling of both technologies. Simulation predictions are corroborated by experimental validation over a wide range of operating conditions. Results show that, for a same output force, MR actuators can render a bandwidth over 52.9% higher than electric motors due to their low inertia. Unlike electric motors, the performance of MR actuators for use in haptic devices are not limited by their output inertia but by their viscous damping, which must be carefully addressed at the design stage.
abstract_zh: 高质量虚拟现实 (VR) 模拟面临的挑战是开发高保真触觉设备，该设备可以在低频和高频下呈现各种阻抗。为此，对磁流变 (MR) 致动器的性能进行了彻底的分析和实验评估，并将其与电动机 (EM) 致动进行了比较。使用动觉触觉设备的 2 自由度动态模型来进行分析研究，比较两种技术的渲染区域、渲染带宽、传动装置和缩放比例。模拟预测通过各种操作条件下的实验验证得到证实。结果表明，对于相同的输出力，磁流变执行器由于其低惯量，其带宽比电动机高 52.9% 以上。与电动机不同，用于触觉设备的磁流变执行器的性能不受输出惯性的限制，而是受粘性阻尼的限制，在设计阶段必须仔细解决这一问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了低惯性磁流变（MR）执行器在触觉反馈设备中的性能，与电动机（EM）执行器进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 高保真虚拟现实（VR）模拟需要能够渲染宽频范围阻抗的触觉设备，而传统电动机执行器存在惯性限制，需探索更优方案。
AI.method: 建立二自由度动态模型，通过仿真与实验验证MR和EM执行器在渲染带宽、齿轮比及缩放性能上的差异，并对比不同工况下的表现。
AI.result: 相同输出力下，MR执行器带宽比电动机高52.9%，其性能瓶颈为粘性阻尼而非惯性，需在设计阶段重点优化。
AI.conclusion: 低惯性MR执行器在触觉设备中具有更高带宽优势，但需通过设计解决粘性阻尼问题以充分发挥其潜力。

authors_text: Mustafa Hajij,Ghada Zamzmi,Theodore Papamarkou,Nina Miolane,Aldo Guzmán-Sáenz,Karthikeyan Natesan Ramamurthy,Tolga Birdal,Tamal K. Dey,Soham Mukherjee,Shreyas N. Samaga,Neal Livesay,Robin Walters,Paul Rosen,Michael T. Schaub
title: Topological Deep Learning: Going Beyond Graph Data
title_zh: 拓扑深度学习：超越图数据
abstract: Topological deep learning is a rapidly growing field that pertains to the development of deep learning models for data supported on topological domains such as simplicial complexes, cell complexes, and hypergraphs, which generalize many domains encountered in scientific computations. In this paper, we present a unifying deep learning framework built upon a richer data structure that includes widely adopted topological domains. Specifically, we first introduce combinatorial complexes, a novel type of topological domain. Combinatorial complexes can be seen as generalizations of graphs that maintain certain desirable properties. Similar to hypergraphs, combinatorial complexes impose no constraints on the set of relations. In addition, combinatorial complexes permit the construction of hierarchical higher-order relations, analogous to those found in simplicial and cell complexes. Thus, combinatorial complexes generalize and combine useful traits of both hypergraphs and cell complexes, which have emerged as two promising abstractions that facilitate the generalization of graph neural networks to topological spaces. Second, building upon combinatorial complexes and their rich combinatorial and algebraic structure, we develop a general class of message-passing combinatorial complex neural networks (CCNNs), focusing primarily on attention-based CCNNs. We characterize permutation and orientation equivariances of CCNNs, and discuss pooling and unpooling operations within CCNNs in detail. Third, we evaluate the performance of CCNNs on tasks related to mesh shape analysis and graph learning. Our experiments demonstrate that CCNNs have competitive performance as compared to state-of-the-art deep learning models specifically tailored to the same tasks. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of incorporating higher-order relations into deep learning models in different applications.
summary: Topological deep learning is a rapidly growing field that pertains to the development of deep learning models for data supported on topological domains such as simplicial complexes, cell complexes, and hypergraphs, which generalize many domains encountered in scientific computations. In this paper, we present a unifying deep learning framework built upon a richer data structure that includes widely adopted topological domains. Specifically, we first introduce combinatorial complexes, a novel type of topological domain. Combinatorial complexes can be seen as generalizations of graphs that maintain certain desirable properties. Similar to hypergraphs, combinatorial complexes impose no constraints on the set of relations. In addition, combinatorial complexes permit the construction of hierarchical higher-order relations, analogous to those found in simplicial and cell complexes. Thus, combinatorial complexes generalize and combine useful traits of both hypergraphs and cell complexes, which have emerged as two promising abstractions that facilitate the generalization of graph neural networks to topological spaces. Second, building upon combinatorial complexes and their rich combinatorial and algebraic structure, we develop a general class of message-passing combinatorial complex neural networks (CCNNs), focusing primarily on attention-based CCNNs. We characterize permutation and orientation equivariances of CCNNs, and discuss pooling and unpooling operations within CCNNs in detail. Third, we evaluate the performance of CCNNs on tasks related to mesh shape analysis and graph learning. Our experiments demonstrate that CCNNs have competitive performance as compared to state-of-the-art deep learning models specifically tailored to the same tasks. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of incorporating higher-order relations into deep learning models in different applications.
abstract_zh: 拓扑深度学习是一个快速发展的领域，涉及为拓扑领域（例如单纯复形、元胞复形和超图）支持的数据开发深度学习模型，这些拓扑泛化了科学计算中遇到的许多领域。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的深度学习框架，该框架建立在更丰富的数据结构上，其中包括广泛采用的拓扑域。具体来说，我们首先介绍组合复合体，一种新型的拓扑域。组合复合体可以被视为保持某些所需属性的图的概括。与超图类似，组合复合体对关系集没有任何限制。此外，组合复合体允许构建层次结构的高阶关系，类似于单纯形和元胞复合体中的关系。因此，组合复合体概括并结合了超图和细胞复合体的有用特征，它们已成为两种有前途的抽象，有助于将图神经网络推广到拓扑空间。其次，基于组合复合体及其丰富的组合和代数结构，我们开发了一类通用的消息传递组合复合神经网络（CCNN），主要关注基于注意力的 CCNN。我们描述了 CCNN 的排列和方向等方差，并详细讨论了 CCNN 中的池化和反池化操作。第三，我们评估 CCNN 在网格形状分析和图学习相关任务上的性能。我们的实验表明，与专门针对相同任务定制的最先进的深度学习模型相比，CCNN 具有具有竞争力的性能。我们的研究结果证明了将高阶关系纳入不同应用中的深度学习模型的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于组合复形的统一深度学习框架，用于处理拓扑域数据，如单纯复形、胞腔复形和超图，并开发了消息传递组合复形神经网络（CCNN）。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络难以有效捕捉高阶关系，而单纯复形和超图等拓扑结构能更好地建模复杂数据。需一种更通用的框架来整合这些结构并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 引入组合复形作为新型拓扑域，结合其代数结构设计消息传递CCNN，重点研究基于注意力机制的CCNN，并分析其置换不变性与池化操作。
AI.result: 在网格形状分析和图学习任务中，CCNN表现与现有最先进模型相当，验证了高阶关系建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组合复形为深度学习提供了更丰富的拓扑抽象，通过高阶关系建模可提升多领域应用的性能。

search_text: Topological Deep Learning: Going Beyond Graph Data 拓扑深度学习：超越图数据 Topological deep learning is a rapidly growing field that pertains to the development of deep learning models for data supported on topological domains such as simplicial complexes, cell complexes, and hypergraphs, which generalize many domains encountered in scientific computations. In this paper, we present a unifying deep learning framework built upon a richer data structure that includes widely adopted topological domains. Specifically, we first introduce combinatorial complexes, a novel type of topological domain. Combinatorial complexes can be seen as generalizations of graphs that maintain certain desirable properties. Similar to hypergraphs, combinatorial complexes impose no constraints on the set of relations. In addition, combinatorial complexes permit the construction of hierarchical higher-order relations, analogous to those found in simplicial and cell complexes. Thus, combinatorial complexes generalize and combine useful traits of both hypergraphs and cell complexes, which have emerged as two promising abstractions that facilitate the generalization of graph neural networks to topological spaces. Second, building upon combinatorial complexes and their rich combinatorial and algebraic structure, we develop a general class of message-passing combinatorial complex neural networks (CCNNs), focusing primarily on attention-based CCNNs. We characterize permutation and orientation equivariances of CCNNs, and discuss pooling and unpooling operations within CCNNs in detail. Third, we evaluate the performance of CCNNs on tasks related to mesh shape analysis and graph learning. Our experiments demonstrate that CCNNs have competitive performance as compared to state-of-the-art deep learning models specifically tailored to the same tasks. Our findings demonstrate the advantages of incorporating higher-order relations into deep learning models in different applications. 拓扑深度学习是一个快速发展的领域，涉及为拓扑领域（例如单纯复形、元胞复形和超图）支持的数据开发深度学习模型，这些拓扑泛化了科学计算中遇到的许多领域。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的深度学习框架，该框架建立在更丰富的数据结构上，其中包括广泛采用的拓扑域。具体来说，我们首先介绍组合复合体，一种新型的拓扑域。组合复合体可以被视为保持某些所需属性的图的概括。与超图类似，组合复合体对关系集没有任何限制。此外，组合复合体允许构建层次结构的高阶关系，类似于单纯形和元胞复合体中的关系。因此，组合复合体概括并结合了超图和细胞复合体的有用特征，它们已成为两种有前途的抽象，有助于将图神经网络推广到拓扑空间。其次，基于组合复合体及其丰富的组合和代数结构，我们开发了一类通用的消息传递组合复合神经网络（CCNN），主要关注基于注意力的 CCNN。我们描述了 CCNN 的排列和方向等方差，并详细讨论了 CCNN 中的池化和反池化操作。第三，我们评估 CCNN 在网格形状分析和图学习相关任务上的性能。我们的实验表明，与专门针对相同任务定制的最先进的深度学习模型相比，CCNN 具有具有竞争力的性能。我们的研究结果证明了将高阶关系纳入不同应用中的深度学习模型的优势。 本文提出了一种基于组合复形的统一深度学习框架，用于处理拓扑域数据，如单纯复形、胞腔复形和超图，并开发了消息传递组合复形神经网络（CCNN）。 Mustafa Hajij,Ghada Zamzmi,Theodore Papamarkou,Nina Miolane,Aldo Guzmán-Sáenz,Karthikeyan Natesan Ramamurthy,Tolga Birdal,Tamal K. Dey,Soham Mukherjee,Shreyas N. Samaga,Neal Livesay,Robin Walters,Paul Rosen,Michael T. Schaub cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.SI,math.AT,stat.ML

title: Logic-Based Ethical Planning
title_zh: 基于逻辑的道德规划
abstract: In this paper we propose a framework for ethical decision making in the context of planning, with intended application to robotics. We put forward a compact but highly expressive language for ethical planning that combines linear temporal logic with lexicographic preference modelling. This original combination allows us to assess plans both with respect to an agent's values and their desires, introducing the novel concept of the morality level of an agent and moving towards multigoal, multivalue planning. We initiate the study of computational complexity of planning tasks in our setting, and we discuss potential applications to robotics.
summary: In this paper we propose a framework for ethical decision making in the context of planning, with intended application to robotics. We put forward a compact but highly expressive language for ethical planning that combines linear temporal logic with lexicographic preference modelling. This original combination allows us to assess plans both with respect to an agent's values and their desires, introducing the novel concept of the morality level of an agent and moving towards multigoal, multivalue planning. We initiate the study of computational complexity of planning tasks in our setting, and we discuss potential applications to robotics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个在规划背景下进行道德决策的框架，旨在应用于机器人技术。我们提出了一种紧凑但极具表现力的伦理规划语言，它将线性时序逻辑与词典偏好建模相结合。这种原始的组合使我们能够根据代理人的价值观和愿望来评估计划，引入代理人道德水平的新概念，并朝着多目标、多价值的规划迈进。我们启动了对我们环境中规划任务的计算复杂性的研究，并讨论了机器人技术的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合线性时序逻辑与优先级建模的伦理规划框架，用于机器人领域的道德决策制定。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法难以处理多目标、多价值观的伦理决策问题，尤其在机器人应用中需要更精细的道德评估机制。
AI.method: 融合线性时序逻辑与词典式偏好建模，引入‘道德水平’概念，构建多目标多值规划模型并分析其计算复杂性。
AI.result: 建立新型伦理规划语言，初步分析任务复杂性，验证框架在机器人伦理决策中的可行性与应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人伦理规划提供理论基础，推动多目标多值决策研究，但计算复杂性问题仍需进一步优化。

authors_text: Marthe Bonamy,Édouard Bonnet,Hugues Déprés,Louis Esperet,Colin Geniet,Claire Hilaire,Stéphan Thomassé,Alexandra Wesolek
title: Sparse graphs with bounded induced cycle packing number have logarithmic treewidth
title_zh: 具有有界诱导循环堆积数的稀疏图具有对数树宽
abstract: A graph is $\mathcal{O}_k$-free if it does not contain $k$ pairwise vertex-disjoint and non-adjacent cycles. We prove that "sparse" (here, not containing large complete bipartite graphs as subgraphs) $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs have treewidth (even, feedback vertex set number) at most logarithmic in the number of vertices. This is optimal, as there is an infinite family of $\mathcal{O}_2$-free graphs without $K_{2,3}$ as a subgraph and whose treewidth is (at least) logarithmic. Using our result, we show that Maximum Independent Set and 3-Coloring in $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs can be solved in quasi-polynomial time. Other consequences include that most of the central NP-complete problems (such as Maximum Independent Set, Minimum Vertex Cover, Minimum Dominating Set, Minimum Coloring) can be solved in polynomial time in sparse $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs, and that deciding the $\mathcal{O}_k$-freeness of sparse graphs is polynomial time solvable.
summary: A graph is $\mathcal{O}_k$-free if it does not contain $k$ pairwise vertex-disjoint and non-adjacent cycles. We prove that "sparse" (here, not containing large complete bipartite graphs as subgraphs) $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs have treewidth (even, feedback vertex set number) at most logarithmic in the number of vertices. This is optimal, as there is an infinite family of $\mathcal{O}_2$-free graphs without $K_{2,3}$ as a subgraph and whose treewidth is (at least) logarithmic. Using our result, we show that Maximum Independent Set and 3-Coloring in $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs can be solved in quasi-polynomial time. Other consequences include that most of the central NP-complete problems (such as Maximum Independent Set, Minimum Vertex Cover, Minimum Dominating Set, Minimum Coloring) can be solved in polynomial time in sparse $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs, and that deciding the $\mathcal{O}_k$-freeness of sparse graphs is polynomial time solvable.
abstract_zh: 如果图不包含 $k$ 成对顶点不相交和不相邻的循环，则该图是 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无的。我们证明“稀疏”（这里不包含大型完整二分图作为子图）$\mathcal{O}_k$自由图的树宽（偶数，反馈顶点集数）最多为顶点数的对数。这是最优的，因为存在无限个无 $\mathcal{O}_2$ 的图，没有 $K_{2,3}$ 作为子图，并且其树宽（至少）是对数的。使用我们的结果，我们表明，$\mathcal{O}_k$ 无图中的最大独立集和 3 着色可以在拟多项式时间内求解。其他后果包括大多数核心 NP 完全问题（例如最大独立集、最小顶点覆盖、最小支配集、最小着色）可以在稀疏 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无图中以多项式时间求解，并且确定稀疏图的 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无性是多项式时间可解的。

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了稀疏的O_k-自由图具有顶点数对数级的树宽，并探讨了其在算法复杂性中的应用。
AI.motivation: 研究图的树宽与结构特性之间的关系，以改进NP难问题在特定图类中的求解效率。
AI.method: 通过图论分析和结构定理，结合稀疏性条件与O_k-自由限制，推导树宽上界并验证其最优性。
AI.result: 稀疏O_k-自由图的树宽至多为顶点数的对数级，且该结果可应用于多项式时间求解多个NP完全问题。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为稀疏图的算法设计提供了理论基础，同时深化了对树宽与循环结构关系的理解。

conclusion: 该成果为稀疏图的算法设计提供了理论基础，同时深化了对树宽与循环结构关系的理解。
search_text: Sparse graphs with bounded induced cycle packing number have logarithmic treewidth 具有有界诱导循环堆积数的稀疏图具有对数树宽 A graph is $\mathcal{O}_k$-free if it does not contain $k$ pairwise vertex-disjoint and non-adjacent cycles. We prove that "sparse" (here, not containing large complete bipartite graphs as subgraphs) $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs have treewidth (even, feedback vertex set number) at most logarithmic in the number of vertices. This is optimal, as there is an infinite family of $\mathcal{O}_2$-free graphs without $K_{2,3}$ as a subgraph and whose treewidth is (at least) logarithmic. Using our result, we show that Maximum Independent Set and 3-Coloring in $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs can be solved in quasi-polynomial time. Other consequences include that most of the central NP-complete problems (such as Maximum Independent Set, Minimum Vertex Cover, Minimum Dominating Set, Minimum Coloring) can be solved in polynomial time in sparse $\mathcal{O}_k$-free graphs, and that deciding the $\mathcal{O}_k$-freeness of sparse graphs is polynomial time solvable. 如果图不包含 $k$ 成对顶点不相交和不相邻的循环，则该图是 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无的。我们证明“稀疏”（这里不包含大型完整二分图作为子图）$\mathcal{O}_k$自由图的树宽（偶数，反馈顶点集数）最多为顶点数的对数。这是最优的，因为存在无限个无 $\mathcal{O}_2$ 的图，没有 $K_{2,3}$ 作为子图，并且其树宽（至少）是对数的。使用我们的结果，我们表明，$\mathcal{O}_k$ 无图中的最大独立集和 3 着色可以在拟多项式时间内求解。其他后果包括大多数核心 NP 完全问题（例如最大独立集、最小顶点覆盖、最小支配集、最小着色）可以在稀疏 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无图中以多项式时间求解，并且确定稀疏图的 $\mathcal{O}_k$ 无性是多项式时间可解的。 该论文证明了稀疏的O_k-自由图具有顶点数对数级的树宽，并探讨了其在算法复杂性中的应用。 Marthe Bonamy,Édouard Bonnet,Hugues Déprés,Louis Esperet,Colin Geniet,Claire Hilaire,Stéphan Thomassé,Alexandra Wesolek math.CO,cs.DS

title: VTOL Failure Detection and Recovery by Utilizing Redundancy
title_zh: 利用冗余进行 VTOL 故障检测和恢复
comment: ef:2022 IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Offering vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) capabilities and the ability to travel great distances are crucial for Urban Air Mobility (UAM) vehicles. These capabilities make hybrid VTOLs the clear front-runners among UAM platforms. On the other hand, concerns regarding the safety and reliability of autonomous aircraft have grown in response to the recent growth in aerial vehicle usage. As a result, monitoring the aircraft status to report any failures and recovering to prevent the loss of control when a failure happens are becoming increasingly important. Hybrid VTOLs can withstand some degree of actuator failure due to their intrinsic redundancy. Their aerodynamic performance, design, modeling, and control have all been addressed in the previous studies. However, research on their potential fault tolerance is still a less investigated field. In this workshop, we will present a summary of our work on aircraft fault detection and the recovery of our hybrid VTOL. First, we will go over our real-time aircraft-independent system for detecting actuator failures and abnormal behaviors. Then, in the context of our custom tiltrotor VTOL aircraft design, we talk about our optimization-based control allocation system, which utilizes the vehicle's configuration redundancy to recover from different actuation failures. Finally, we explore the ideas of how these parts can work together to provide a fail-safe system. We present our simulation and real-life experiments.

abstract_zh: 提供垂直起飞和着陆 (VTOL) 能力以及长距离行驶的能力对于城市空中交通 (UAM) 车辆至关重要。这些功能使混合 VTOL 成为 UAM 平台中明显的领先者。另一方面，随着近期飞行器使用量的增长，人们对自动驾驶飞机的安全性和可靠性的担忧也随之增加。因此，监控飞机状态以报告任何故障并在故障发生时进行恢复以防止失控变得越来越重要。由于其固有的冗余性，混合 VTOL 可以承受一定程度的执行器故障。它们的空气动力学性能、设计、建模和控制都在之前的研究中得到了解决。然而，对其潜在容错性的研究仍然是一个较少研究的领域。在本次研讨会上，我们将总结我们在飞机故障检测和混合 VTOL 恢复方面的工作。首先，我们将回顾我们的实时独立于飞机的系统，用于检测执行器故障和异常行为。然后，在我们定制的倾转旋翼垂直起降飞机设计的背景下，我们讨论基于优化的控制分配系统，该系统利用飞行器的配置冗余来从不同的驱动故障中恢复。最后，我们探讨了这些部件如何协同工作以提供故障安全系统的想法。我们展示我们的模拟和现实实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于冗余设计的混合垂直起降飞行器（VTOL）故障检测与恢复方法，旨在提升城市空中交通（UAM）平台的安全性。
AI.motivation: 随着城市空中交通的发展，VTOL飞行器的安全性和可靠性面临挑战，而现有研究对故障容忍机制的探索不足，亟需有效故障检测与恢复方案。
AI.method: 设计了实时、飞行器无关的执行器故障检测系统，并结合自定义倾转旋翼VTOL的优化控制分配算法，利用配置冗余实现故障恢复。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验证明，该方法能有效检测异常行为并应对多种执行器故障，验证了冗余系统在故障恢复中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 整合故障检测与冗余控制分配的协同机制，可为VTOL提供安全可靠的故障恢复方案，推动其在城市空中交通中的应用。
