authors_text: Giulia Romano,Andrea Agostini,Francesco Trovò,Nicola Gatti,Marcello Restelli
title: Multi-Armed Bandit Problem with Temporally-Partitioned Rewards: When Partial Feedback Counts
title_zh: 具有暂时分配奖励的多臂老虎机问题：当部分反馈很重要时
abstract: There is a rising interest in industrial online applications where data becomes available sequentially. Inspired by the recommendation of playlists to users where their preferences can be collected during the listening of the entire playlist, we study a novel bandit setting, namely Multi-Armed Bandit with Temporally-Partitioned Rewards (TP-MAB), in which the stochastic reward associated with the pull of an arm is partitioned over a finite number of consecutive rounds following the pull. This setting, unexplored so far to the best of our knowledge, is a natural extension of delayed-feedback bandits to the case in which rewards may be dilated over a finite-time span after the pull instead of being fully disclosed in a single, potentially delayed round. We provide two algorithms to address TP-MAB problems, namely, TP-UCB-FR and TP-UCB-EW, which exploit the partial information disclosed by the reward collected over time. We show that our algorithms provide better asymptotical regret upper bounds than delayed-feedback bandit algorithms when a property characterizing a broad set of reward structures of practical interest, namely alpha-smoothness, holds. We also empirically evaluate their performance across a wide range of settings, both synthetically generated and from a real-world media recommendation problem.
summary: There is a rising interest in industrial online applications where data becomes available sequentially. Inspired by the recommendation of playlists to users where their preferences can be collected during the listening of the entire playlist, we study a novel bandit setting, namely Multi-Armed Bandit with Temporally-Partitioned Rewards (TP-MAB), in which the stochastic reward associated with the pull of an arm is partitioned over a finite number of consecutive rounds following the pull. This setting, unexplored so far to the best of our knowledge, is a natural extension of delayed-feedback bandits to the case in which rewards may be dilated over a finite-time span after the pull instead of being fully disclosed in a single, potentially delayed round. We provide two algorithms to address TP-MAB problems, namely, TP-UCB-FR and TP-UCB-EW, which exploit the partial information disclosed by the reward collected over time. We show that our algorithms provide better asymptotical regret upper bounds than delayed-feedback bandit algorithms when a property characterizing a broad set of reward structures of practical interest, namely alpha-smoothness, holds. We also empirically evaluate their performance across a wide range of settings, both synthetically generated and from a real-world media recommendation problem.
abstract_zh: 人们对连续提供数据的工业在线应用程序越来越感兴趣。受到向用户推荐播放列表的启发，可以在收听整个播放列表的过程中收集他们的偏好，我们研究了一种新颖的老虎机设置，即具有临时分区奖励的多臂老虎机（TP-MAB），其中与拉动手臂相关的随机奖励被分配在拉动后的有限数量的连续轮次中。据我们所知，迄今为止尚未探索过的这种设置是延迟反馈老虎机的自然延伸，其中奖励可能会在拉动后的有限时间范围内扩大，而不是在单个可能延迟的回合中完全披露。我们提供了两种算法来解决 TP-MAB 问题，即 TP-UCB-FR 和 TP-UCB-EW，它们利用随时间收集的奖励所披露的部分信息。我们证明，当描述一系列具有实际意义的奖励结构的属性（即阿尔法平滑度）成立时，我们的算法比延迟反馈老虎机算法提供更好的渐近后悔上限。我们还根据经验评估了它们在各种环境下的表现，包括综合生成的和现实世界的媒体推荐问题。

AI.tldr: 研究具有时间分块奖励的多臂老虎机问题（TP-MAB），提出两种算法并分析其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统延迟反馈老虎机无法处理奖励分散在多个回合的情况，而实际应用如媒体推荐需要处理部分反馈，因此需要新的模型和算法。
AI.method: 提出两种算法TP-UCB-FR和TP-UCB-EW，通过利用随时间收集的部分奖励信息进行决策。
AI.result: 在满足alpha-smoothness条件时，算法渐近regret上界优于延迟反馈方法，并在合成数据和真实媒体推荐场景中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: TP-MAB模型扩展了延迟反馈场景，提出的算法能有效处理分块奖励，未来可探索更广的奖励结构应用。

We also empirically evaluate their performance across a wide range of settings, both synthetically generated and from a real-world media recommendation problem. 人们对连续提供数据的工业在线应用程序越来越感兴趣。受到向用户推荐播放列表的启发，可以在收听整个播放列表的过程中收集他们的偏好，我们研究了一种新颖的老虎机设置，即具有临时分区奖励的多臂老虎机（TP-MAB），其中与拉动手臂相关的随机奖励被分配在拉动后的有限数量的连续轮次中。据我们所知，迄今为止尚未探索过的这种设置是延迟反馈老虎机的自然延伸，其中奖励可能会在拉动后的有限时间范围内扩大，而不是在单个可能延迟的回合中完全披露。我们提供了两种算法来解决 TP-MAB 问题，即 TP-UCB-FR 和 TP-UCB-EW，它们利用随时间收集的奖励所披露的部分信息。我们证明，当描述一系列具有实际意义的奖励结构的属性（即阿尔法平滑度）成立时，我们的算法比延迟反馈老虎机算法提供更好的渐近后悔上限。我们还根据经验评估了它们在各种环境下的表现，包括综合生成的和现实世界的媒体推荐问题。 研究具有时间分块奖励的多臂老虎机问题（TP-MAB），提出两种算法并分析其性能。 Giulia Romano,Andrea Agostini,Francesco Trovò,Nicola Gatti,Marcello Restelli cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Bin Li,Zhongan Wang,Nan Wu,Shuai Shi,Qijun Ma
title: Dog nose print matching with dual global descriptor based on Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 基于对比学习的双全局描述符狗鼻纹匹配
abstract: Recent studies in biometric-based identification tasks have shown that deep learning methods can achieve better performance. These methods generally extract the global features as descriptor to represent the original image. Nonetheless, it does not perform well for biometric identification under fine-grained tasks. The main reason is that the single image descriptor contains insufficient information to represent image. In this paper, we present a dual global descriptor model, which combines multiple global descriptors to exploit multi level image features. Moreover, we utilize a contrastive loss to enlarge the distance between image representations of confusing classes. The proposed framework achieves the top2 on the CVPR2022 Biometrics Workshop Pet Biometric Challenge. The source code and trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/flyingsheepbin/pet-biometrics
summary: Recent studies in biometric-based identification tasks have shown that deep learning methods can achieve better performance. These methods generally extract the global features as descriptor to represent the original image. Nonetheless, it does not perform well for biometric identification under fine-grained tasks. The main reason is that the single image descriptor contains insufficient information to represent image. In this paper, we present a dual global descriptor model, which combines multiple global descriptors to exploit multi level image features. Moreover, we utilize a contrastive loss to enlarge the distance between image representations of confusing classes. The proposed framework achieves the top2 on the CVPR2022 Biometrics Workshop Pet Biometric Challenge. The source code and trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/flyingsheepbin/pet-biometrics
abstract_zh: 最近基于生物识别的识别任务的研究表明，深度学习方法可以取得更好的性能。这些方法通常提取全局特征作为描述符来表示原始图像。尽管如此，它在细粒度任务下的生物特征识别方面表现不佳。主要原因是单个图像描述符包含的信息不足以表示图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种双全局描述符模型，该模型结合了多个全局描述符来利用多级图像特征。此外，我们利用对比损失来扩大混淆类别的图像表示之间的距离。所提出的框架在 CVPR2022 生物识别研讨会宠物生物识别挑战赛中名列前茅。源代码和训练模型可公开获取：https://github.com/flyingsheepbin/pet-biometrics

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的双全局描述符模型，用于提升犬鼻纹匹配的生物特征识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单描述符方法在细粒度生物特征识别任务中信息不足，导致识别效果不佳，需通过多层级特征融合提升表现。
AI.method: 设计双全局描述符模型融合多级图像特征，并引入对比损失函数扩大混淆类别间的特征距离。
AI.result: 该框架在CVPR2022生物特征挑战赛中取得第二名，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双描述符与对比学习的结合有效提升了细粒度生物特征识别的准确性，为相关领域提供了新方法。

title: Subexponential mixing for partition chains on grid-like graphs
title_zh: 网格图上分区链的次指数混合
abstract: We consider the problem of generating uniformly random partitions of the vertex set of a graph such that every piece induces a connected subgraph. For the case where we want to have partitions with linearly many pieces of bounded size, we obtain approximate sampling algorithms based on Glauber dynamics which are fixed-parameter tractable with respect to the bandwidth of $G$, with simple-exponential dependence on the bandwidth. For example, for rectangles of constant or logarithmic width this gives polynomial-time sampling algorithms. More generally, this gives sub-exponential algorithms for bounded-degree graphs without large expander subgraphs (for example, we obtain $O(2^{\sqrt n})$ time algorithms for square grids). In the case where we instead want partitions with a small number of pieces of linear size, we show that Glauber dynamics can have exponential mixing time, even just for the case of 2 pieces, and even for 2-connected subgraphs of the grid with bounded bandwidth.
summary: We consider the problem of generating uniformly random partitions of the vertex set of a graph such that every piece induces a connected subgraph. For the case where we want to have partitions with linearly many pieces of bounded size, we obtain approximate sampling algorithms based on Glauber dynamics which are fixed-parameter tractable with respect to the bandwidth of $G$, with simple-exponential dependence on the bandwidth. For example, for rectangles of constant or logarithmic width this gives polynomial-time sampling algorithms. More generally, this gives sub-exponential algorithms for bounded-degree graphs without large expander subgraphs (for example, we obtain $O(2^{\sqrt n})$ time algorithms for square grids). In the case where we instead want partitions with a small number of pieces of linear size, we show that Glauber dynamics can have exponential mixing time, even just for the case of 2 pieces, and even for 2-connected subgraphs of the grid with bounded bandwidth.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑生成图的顶点集的均匀随机分区的问题，使得每个部分都产生一个连通的子图。对于我们想要具有线性许多有界大小的分区的情况，我们获得基于格劳伯动力学的近似采样算法，该算法相对于 $G$ 的带宽是固定参数可处理的，并且对带宽具有简单的指数依赖性。例如，对于恒定或对数宽度的矩形，这给出了多项式时间采样算法。更一般地说，这给出了没有大扩展子图的有界度图的次指数算法（例如，我们获得了方形网格的 $O(2^{\sqrt n})$ 时间算法）。在我们想要具有少量线性大小的分区的情况下，我们表明格劳伯动力学可以具有指数混合时间，即使对于 2 块的情况，甚至对于具有有限带宽的网格的 2 个连通子图也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在网格状图上生成顶点集的均匀随机划分问题，要求每个划分块诱导连通子图，并分析了Glauber动力学的混合时间。
AI.motivation: 均匀随机划分在图划分、网络分析等领域有重要应用，而网格状图的结构特性使其成为研究划分算法效率的理想对象。
AI.method: 基于Glauber动力学设计采样算法，结合图的带宽参数实现固定参数可解性，并通过分析混合时间证明算法效率。
AI.result: 对常数或对数宽度矩形等图类获得多项式时间算法，对无大扩展子图的有界度图获得亚指数时间算法（如网格图需O(2^√n)时间），同时证明少量划分块场景下混合时间可能指数级增长。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为网格状图的划分采样提供了高效算法，同时揭示了划分块数量与混合时间复杂度之间的关键关联。

title: The Fully Convolutional Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的全卷积变压器
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023, pp. 3660-3669
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV), 2023, pp. 3660-3669
abstract: We propose a novel transformer model, capable of segmenting medical images of varying modalities. Challenges posed by the fine grained nature of medical image analysis mean that the adaptation of the transformer for their analysis is still at nascent stages. The overwhelming success of the UNet lay in its ability to appreciate the fine-grained nature of the segmentation task, an ability which existing transformer based models do not currently posses. To address this shortcoming, we propose The Fully Convolutional Transformer (FCT), which builds on the proven ability of Convolutional Neural Networks to learn effective image representations, and combines them with the ability of Transformers to effectively capture long-term dependencies in its inputs. The FCT is the first fully convolutional Transformer model in medical imaging literature. It processes its input in two stages, where first, it learns to extract long range semantic dependencies from the input image, and then learns to capture hierarchical global attributes from the features. FCT is compact, accurate and robust. Our results show that it outperforms all existing transformer architectures by large margins across multiple medical image segmentation datasets of varying data modalities without the need for any pre-training. FCT outperforms its immediate competitor on the ACDC dataset by 1.3%, on the Synapse dataset by 4.4%, on the Spleen dataset by 1.2% and on ISIC 2017 dataset by 1.1% on the dice metric, with up to five times fewer parameters. Our code, environments and models will be available via GitHub.
summary: We propose a novel transformer model, capable of segmenting medical images of varying modalities. Challenges posed by the fine grained nature of medical image analysis mean that the adaptation of the transformer for their analysis is still at nascent stages. The overwhelming success of the UNet lay in its ability to appreciate the fine-grained nature of the segmentation task, an ability which existing transformer based models do not currently posses. To address this shortcoming, we propose The Fully Convolutional Transformer (FCT), which builds on the proven ability of Convolutional Neural Networks to learn effective image representations, and combines them with the ability of Transformers to effectively capture long-term dependencies in its inputs. The FCT is the first fully convolutional Transformer model in medical imaging literature. It processes its input in two stages, where first, it learns to extract long range semantic dependencies from the input image, and then learns to capture hierarchical global attributes from the features. FCT is compact, accurate and robust. Our results show that it outperforms all existing transformer architectures by large margins across multiple medical image segmentation datasets of varying data modalities without the need for any pre-training. FCT outperforms its immediate competitor on the ACDC dataset by 1.3%, on the Synapse dataset by 4.4%, on the Spleen dataset by 1.2% and on ISIC 2017 dataset by 1.1% on the dice metric, with up to five times fewer parameters. Our code, environments and models will be available via GitHub.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的变压器模型，能够分割不同模态的医学图像。医学图像分析的细粒度性质带来的挑战意味着变压器对其分析的适应仍处于初级阶段。 UNet 的巨大成功在于它能够理解分割任务的细粒度性质，这是现有基于 Transformer 的模型目前不具备的能力。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了全卷积变压器（FCT），它建立在卷积神经网络经过验证的学习有效图像表示的能力之上，并将其与变压器的能力相结合，以有效捕获其输入中的长期依赖性。 FCT 是医学成像文献中第一个全卷积 Transformer 模型。它分两个阶段处理输入，首先，它学习从输入图像中提取长范围语义依赖关系，然后学习从特征中捕获分层全局属性。 FCT 结构紧凑、准确且坚固耐用。我们的结果表明，它在不同数据模式的多个医学图像分割数据集中大幅优于所有现有的 Transformer 架构，而无需任何预训练。在 Dice 指标上，FCT 在 ACDC 数据集上比其直接竞争对手高出 1.3%，在 Synapse 数据集上高出 4.4%，在 Spleen 数据集上高出 1.2%，在 ISIC 2017 数据集上高出 1.1%，参数数量最多减少五倍。我们的代码、环境和模型将通过 GitHub 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为全卷积变换器（FCT）的新模型，用于处理多种模态的医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于变换器的模型在医学图像分析中难以捕捉细粒度特征，而UNet等卷积神经网络（CNN）在这一任务上表现优异，因此需结合CNN与变换器的优势以提升性能。
AI.method: FCT通过两阶段处理输入：首先提取长距离语义依赖，随后捕获特征的层次化全局属性，结合CNN的局部特征学习能力和变换器的长程依赖建模能力。
AI.result: FCT在多个医学图像分割数据集（如ACDC、Synapse等）上均优于现有变换器架构，Dice指标提升1.1%-4.4%，且参数量减少至五分之一。
AI.conclusion: FCT是首个全卷积变换器模型，有效结合CNN与变换器优势，在医学图像分割任务中实现了高精度与高效率的平衡。

search_text: The Fully Convolutional Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation 用于医学图像分割的全卷积变压器 We propose a novel transformer model, capable of segmenting medical images of varying modalities. Challenges posed by the fine grained nature of medical image analysis mean that the adaptation of the transformer for their analysis is still at nascent stages. The overwhelming success of the UNet lay in its ability to appreciate the fine-grained nature of the segmentation task, an ability which existing transformer based models do not currently posses. To address this shortcoming, we propose The Fully Convolutional Transformer (FCT), which builds on the proven ability of Convolutional Neural Networks to learn effective image representations, and combines them with the ability of Transformers to effectively capture long-term dependencies in its inputs. The FCT is the first fully convolutional Transformer model in medical imaging literature. It processes its input in two stages, where first, it learns to extract long range semantic dependencies from the input image, and then learns to capture hierarchical global attributes from the features. FCT is compact, accurate and robust. Our results show that it outperforms all existing transformer architectures by large margins across multiple medical image segmentation datasets of varying data modalities without the need for any pre-training. FCT outperforms its immediate competitor on the ACDC dataset by 1.3%, on the Synapse dataset by 4.4%, on the Spleen dataset by 1.2% and on ISIC 2017 dataset by 1.1% on the dice metric, with up to five times fewer parameters. Our code, environments and models will be available via GitHub. 我们提出了一种新颖的变压器模型，能够分割不同模态的医学图像。医学图像分析的细粒度性质带来的挑战意味着变压器对其分析的适应仍处于初级阶段。 UNet 的巨大成功在于它能够理解分割任务的细粒度性质，这是现有基于 Transformer 的模型目前不具备的能力。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了全卷积变压器（FCT），它建立在卷积神经网络经过验证的学习有效图像表示的能力之上，并将其与变压器的能力相结合，以有效捕获其输入中的长期依赖性。 FCT 是医学成像文献中第一个全卷积 Transformer 模型。它分两个阶段处理输入，首先，它学习从输入图像中提取长范围语义依赖关系，然后学习从特征中捕获分层全局属性。 FCT 结构紧凑、准确且坚固耐用。我们的结果表明，它在不同数据模式的多个医学图像分割数据集中大幅优于所有现有的 Transformer 架构，而无需任何预训练。在 Dice 指标上，FCT 在 ACDC 数据集上比其直接竞争对手高出 1.3%，在 Synapse 数据集上高出 4.4%，在 Spleen 数据集上高出 1.2%，在 ISIC 2017 数据集上高出 1.1%，参数数量最多减少五倍。我们的代码、环境和模型将通过 GitHub 提供。 本文提出了一种名为全卷积变换器（FCT）的新模型，用于处理多种模态的医学图像分割任务。 Athanasios Tragakis,Chaitanya Kaul,Roderick Murray-Smith,Dirk Husmeier eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Learning to Sequence and Blend Robot Skills via Differentiable Optimization
title_zh: 通过可微分优化学习排序和混合机器人技能
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Video: https://youtu.be/00NXvTpL-YU, code: https://github.com/NoemieJaquier/sequencing-blending/
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Video: https://youtu.be/00NXvTpL-YU, code: https://github.com/NoemieJaquier/sequencing-blending/
abstract: In contrast to humans and animals who naturally execute seamless motions, learning and smoothly executing sequences of actions remains a challenge in robotics. This paper introduces a novel skill-agnostic framework that learns to sequence and blend skills based on differentiable optimization. Our approach encodes sequences of previously-defined skills as quadratic programs (QP), whose parameters determine the relative importance of skills along the task. Seamless skill sequences are then learned from demonstrations by exploiting differentiable optimization layers and a tailored loss formulated from the QP optimality conditions. Via the use of differentiable optimization, our work offers novel perspectives on multitask control. We validate our approach in a pick-and-place scenario with planar robots, a pouring experiment with a real humanoid robot, and a bimanual sweeping task with a human model.
summary: In contrast to humans and animals who naturally execute seamless motions, learning and smoothly executing sequences of actions remains a challenge in robotics. This paper introduces a novel skill-agnostic framework that learns to sequence and blend skills based on differentiable optimization. Our approach encodes sequences of previously-defined skills as quadratic programs (QP), whose parameters determine the relative importance of skills along the task. Seamless skill sequences are then learned from demonstrations by exploiting differentiable optimization layers and a tailored loss formulated from the QP optimality conditions. Via the use of differentiable optimization, our work offers novel perspectives on multitask control. We validate our approach in a pick-and-place scenario with planar robots, a pouring experiment with a real humanoid robot, and a bimanual sweeping task with a human model.
abstract_zh: 与自然执行无缝运动的人类和动物相比，学习和顺利执行一系列动作仍然是机器人技术的挑战。本文介绍了一种新颖的与技能无关的框架，该框架学习基于可微优化的技能排序和混合。我们的方法将先前定义的技能序列编码为二次程序（QP），其参数决定了任务中技能的相对重要性。然后，通过利用可微的优化层和根据 QP 最优条件制定的定制损失，从演示中学习无缝技能序列。通过使用可微优化，我们的工作为多任务控制提供了新颖的视角。我们在平面机器人的拾放场景、真实人形机器人的浇注实验以及人体模型的双手清扫任务中验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分优化的通用框架，用于学习机器人技能的序列化与平滑融合。
AI.motivation: 机器人难以像人类一样自然执行无缝动作序列，现有方法常依赖特定技能或无法实现流畅过渡。
AI.method: 将预定义技能序列编码为二次规划问题（QP），通过可微分优化层和基于QP最优条件的定制损失函数，从演示数据中学习技能权重与过渡参数。
AI.result: 在平面机器人抓取、真实人形机器人倾倒及双臂扫地任务中验证了方法的有效性，实现了跨任务的无缝技能组合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多任务控制提供了新视角，展示了通过可微分优化实现通用技能序列学习的可行性与灵活性。

title: Multi-Contact Motion Retargeting using Whole-body Optimization of Full Kinematics and Sequential Force Equilibrium
title_zh: 使用全运动学和顺序力平衡的全身优化的多接触运动重定向
abstract: This paper presents a multi-contact motion adaptation framework that enables teleoperation of high degree-of-freedom (DoF) robots, such as quadrupeds and humanoids, for loco-manipulation tasks in multi-contact settings. Our proposed algorithms optimize whole-body configurations and formulate the retargeting of multi-contact motions as sequential quadratic programming, which is robust and stable near the edges of feasibility constraints. Our framework allows real-time operation of the robot and reduces cognitive load for the operator because infeasible commands are automatically adapted into physically stable and viable motions on the robot. The results in simulations with full dynamics demonstrated the effectiveness of teleoperating different legged robots interactively and generating rich multi-contact movements. We evaluated the computational efficiency of the proposed algorithms, and further validated and analyzed multi-contact loco-manipulation tasks on humanoid and quadruped robots by reaching, active pushing and various traversal on uneven terrains.
summary: This paper presents a multi-contact motion adaptation framework that enables teleoperation of high degree-of-freedom (DoF) robots, such as quadrupeds and humanoids, for loco-manipulation tasks in multi-contact settings. Our proposed algorithms optimize whole-body configurations and formulate the retargeting of multi-contact motions as sequential quadratic programming, which is robust and stable near the edges of feasibility constraints. Our framework allows real-time operation of the robot and reduces cognitive load for the operator because infeasible commands are automatically adapted into physically stable and viable motions on the robot. The results in simulations with full dynamics demonstrated the effectiveness of teleoperating different legged robots interactively and generating rich multi-contact movements. We evaluated the computational efficiency of the proposed algorithms, and further validated and analyzed multi-contact loco-manipulation tasks on humanoid and quadruped robots by reaching, active pushing and various traversal on uneven terrains.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种多接触运动适应框架，该框架能够对高自由度（DoF）机器人（例如四足动物和类人机器人）进行远程操作，以在多接触设置中执行局部操纵任务。我们提出的算法优化了全身配置，并将多接触运动的重定向制定为顺序二次规划，该算法在可行性约束的边缘附近是鲁棒且稳定的。我们的框架允许机器人实时操作，并减少操作员的认知负担，因为不可行的命令会自动适应机器人上物理稳定且可行的运动。全动态仿真结果证明了交互式远程操作不同腿机器人并产生丰富的多接触运动的有效性。我们评估了所提出算法的计算效率，并通过在不平坦地形上的到达、主动推动和各种遍历，进一步验证和分析了人形和四足机器人上的多接触局部操纵任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多接触运动重定向框架，通过全身优化和序列二次规划实现高自由度机器人的实时遥操作，适用于复杂地形下的移动操作任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多接触场景下难以保证机器人运动的物理可行性与实时性，导致操作者需承担较高认知负荷，亟需自动化的运动适应机制。
AI.method: 基于全身运动学优化与顺序力平衡约束，将多接触运动重定向建模为序列二次规划问题，结合动态仿真实现实时可行解求解。
AI.result: 仿真验证了框架在四足机器人和人形机器人上的有效性，支持复杂地形穿越、主动推挤等任务，计算效率满足实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动适配不可行指令，显著降低操作难度，为多接触场景下的机器人遥操作提供了稳定高效的解决方案。

Our framework allows real-time operation of the robot and reduces cognitive load for the operator because infeasible commands are automatically adapted into physically stable and viable motions on the robot. The results in simulations with full dynamics demonstrated the effectiveness of teleoperating different legged robots interactively and generating rich multi-contact movements. We evaluated the computational efficiency of the proposed algorithms, and further validated and analyzed multi-contact loco-manipulation tasks on humanoid and quadruped robots by reaching, active pushing and various traversal on uneven terrains. 本文提出了一种多接触运动适应框架，该框架能够对高自由度（DoF）机器人（例如四足动物和类人机器人）进行远程操作，以在多接触设置中执行局部操纵任务。我们提出的算法优化了全身配置，并将多接触运动的重定向制定为顺序二次规划，该算法在可行性约束的边缘附近是鲁棒且稳定的。我们的框架允许机器人实时操作，并减少操作员的认知负担，因为不可行的命令会自动适应机器人上物理稳定且可行的运动。全动态仿真结果证明了交互式远程操作不同腿机器人并产生丰富的多接触运动的有效性。我们评估了所提出算法的计算效率，并通过在不平坦地形上的到达、主动推动和各种遍历，进一步验证和分析了人形和四足机器人上的多接触局部操纵任务。 本文提出一种多接触运动重定向框架，通过全身优化和序列二次规划实现高自由度机器人的实时遥操作，适用于复杂地形下的移动操作任务。 Quentin Rouxel,Kai Yuan,Ruoshi Wen,Zhibin Li cs.RO

title: Impact of loss function in Deep Learning methods for accurate retinal vessel segmentation
title_zh: 深度学习方法中损失函数对准确视网膜血管分割的影响
abstract: The retinal vessel network studied through fundus images contributes to the diagnosis of multiple diseases not only found in the eye. The segmentation of this system may help the specialized task of analyzing these images by assisting in the quantification of morphological characteristics. Due to its relevance, several Deep Learning-based architectures have been tested for tackling this problem automatically. However, the impact of loss function selection on the segmentation of the intricate retinal blood vessel system hasn't been systematically evaluated. In this work, we present the comparison of the loss functions Binary Cross Entropy, Dice, Tversky, and Combo loss using the deep learning architectures (i.e. U-Net, Attention U-Net, and Nested UNet) with the DRIVE dataset. Their performance is assessed using four metrics: the AUC, the mean squared error, the dice score, and the Hausdorff distance. The models were trained with the same number of parameters and epochs. Using dice score and AUC, the best combination was SA-UNet with Combo loss, which had an average of 0.9442 and 0.809 respectively. The best average of Hausdorff distance and mean square error were obtained using the Nested U-Net with the Dice loss function, which had an average of 6.32 and 0.0241 respectively. The results showed that there is a significant difference in the selection of loss function
summary: The retinal vessel network studied through fundus images contributes to the diagnosis of multiple diseases not only found in the eye. The segmentation of this system may help the specialized task of analyzing these images by assisting in the quantification of morphological characteristics. Due to its relevance, several Deep Learning-based architectures have been tested for tackling this problem automatically. However, the impact of loss function selection on the segmentation of the intricate retinal blood vessel system hasn't been systematically evaluated. In this work, we present the comparison of the loss functions Binary Cross Entropy, Dice, Tversky, and Combo loss using the deep learning architectures (i.e. U-Net, Attention U-Net, and Nested UNet) with the DRIVE dataset. Their performance is assessed using four metrics: the AUC, the mean squared error, the dice score, and the Hausdorff distance. The models were trained with the same number of parameters and epochs. Using dice score and AUC, the best combination was SA-UNet with Combo loss, which had an average of 0.9442 and 0.809 respectively. The best average of Hausdorff distance and mean square error were obtained using the Nested U-Net with the Dice loss function, which had an average of 6.32 and 0.0241 respectively. The results showed that there is a significant difference in the selection of loss function
abstract_zh: 通过眼底图像研究的视网膜血管网络有助于诊断多种眼部疾病。该系统的分割可以通过协助形态特征的量化来帮助分析这些图像的专门任务。由于其相关性，几种基于深度学习的架构已经过测试，可以自动解决这个问题。然而，损失函数选择对复杂视网膜血管系统分割的影响尚未得到系统评估。在这项工作中，我们将使用深度学习架构（即 U-Net、Attention U-Net 和 Nested UNet）的损失函数 Binary Cross Entropy、Dice、Tversky 和 ​​Combo 损失与 DRIVE 数据集进行比较。他们的表现使用四个指标进行评估：AUC、均方误差、骰子得分和豪斯多夫距离。这些模型使用相同数量的参数和时期进行训练。使用骰子得分和 AUC，最佳组合是带有 Combo 损失的 SA-UNet，其平均值分别为 0.9442 和 0.809。使用带有 Dice 损失函数的 Nested U-Net 获得了 Hausdorff 距离和均方误差的最佳平均值，平均值分别为 6.32 和 0.0241。结果表明，损失函数的选择存在显着差异

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同损失函数对深度学习方法在视网膜血管分割任务中的影响。
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管分割对于多种眼病的诊断非常重要，但目前尚未系统评估损失函数选择对分割效果的影响。
AI.method: 本文比较了二元交叉熵、Dice、Tversky和Combo损失函数在U-Net、Attention U-Net和Nested U-Net等深度学习架构中的表现，使用DRIVE数据集进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 使用Dice分数和AUC指标，SA-UNet结合Combo损失函数表现最佳，分别为0.9442和0.809；使用Dice损失函数的Nested U-Net在Hausdorff距离和均方误差指标上表现最佳，分别为6.32和0.0241。
AI.conclusion: 损失函数的选择对视网膜血管分割任务有显著影响，不同损失函数在不同评估指标上表现各异。

title: Deepfake Caricatures: Amplifying attention to artifacts increases deepfake detection by humans and machines
title_zh: Deepfake 漫画：加强对文物的关注会增加人类和机器对 Deepfake 的检测
abstract: Deepfakes can fuel online misinformation. As deepfakes get harder to recognize with the naked eye, human users become more reliant on deepfake detection models to help them decide whether a video is real or fake. Currently, models yield a prediction for a video's authenticity, but do not integrate a method for alerting a human user. We introduce a framework for amplifying artifacts in deepfake videos to make them more detectable by people. We propose a novel, semi-supervised Artifact Attention module, which is trained on human responses to create attention maps that highlight video artifacts, and magnify them to create a novel visual indicator we call "Deepfake Caricatures". In a user study, we demonstrate that Caricatures greatly increase human detection, across video presentation times and user engagement levels. We also introduce a deepfake detection model that incorporates the Artifact Attention module to increase its accuracy and robustness. Overall, we demonstrate the success of a human-centered approach to designing deepfake mitigation methods.
summary: Deepfakes can fuel online misinformation. As deepfakes get harder to recognize with the naked eye, human users become more reliant on deepfake detection models to help them decide whether a video is real or fake. Currently, models yield a prediction for a video's authenticity, but do not integrate a method for alerting a human user. We introduce a framework for amplifying artifacts in deepfake videos to make them more detectable by people. We propose a novel, semi-supervised Artifact Attention module, which is trained on human responses to create attention maps that highlight video artifacts, and magnify them to create a novel visual indicator we call "Deepfake Caricatures". In a user study, we demonstrate that Caricatures greatly increase human detection, across video presentation times and user engagement levels. We also introduce a deepfake detection model that incorporates the Artifact Attention module to increase its accuracy and robustness. Overall, we demonstrate the success of a human-centered approach to designing deepfake mitigation methods.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 可能助长网上错误信息。随着 Deepfake 越来越难以用肉眼识别，人类用户越来越依赖 Deepfake 检测模型来帮助他们确定视频是真是假。目前，模型可以预测视频的真实性，但没有集成提醒人类用户的方法。我们引入了一个框架，用于放大深度伪造视频中的伪影，使人们更容易检测到它们。我们提出了一种新颖的半监督伪像注意力模块，该模块根据人类反应进行训练，以创建突出显示视频伪像的注意力图，并将其放大以创建我们称为“Deepfake Caricatures”的新颖视觉指示器。在一项用户研究中，我们证明漫画在视频呈现时间和用户参与度方面极大地提高了人体检测能力。我们还引入了一种 Deepfake 检测模型，该模型结合了 Artifact Attention 模块，以提高其准确性和鲁棒性。总的来说，我们展示了以人为本的方法来设计深度伪造缓解方法的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过放大深伪视频中的伪影来提高人类和机器检测深伪的能力。
AI.motivation: 随着深伪技术越来越难以用肉眼识别，用户依赖检测模型判断视频真实性，但现有模型缺乏有效的人类警示机制。
AI.method: 设计半监督的伪影注意力模块，基于人类对伪影的反应生成注意力图并放大伪影，形成'深伪漫画'视觉提示，并集成到检测模型中。
AI.result: 用户实验显示'深伪漫画'显著提升人类检测率，且检测模型准确率和鲁棒性均提高。
AI.conclusion: 以人类为中心的设计方法能有效增强深伪检测的可解释性和实用性。

title: When happy accidents spark creativity: Bringing collaborative speculation to life with generative AI
title_zh: 当快乐的意外激发创造力：通过生成人工智能将协作推测变为现实
abstract: Generative AI techniques like those that synthesize images from text (text-to-image models) offer new possibilities for creatively imagining new ideas. We investigate the capabilities of these models to help communities engage in conversations about their collective future. In particular, we design and deploy a facilitated experience where participants collaboratively speculate on utopias they want to see, and then produce AI-generated imagery from those speculations. In a series of in-depth user interviews, we invite participants to reflect on the generated images and refine their visions for the future. We synthesize findings with a bespoke community zine on the experience. We observe that participants often generated ideas for implementing their vision and drew new lateral considerations as a result of viewing the generated images. Critically, we find that the unexpected difference between the participant's imagined output and the generated image is what facilitated new insight for the participant. We hope our experimental model for co-creation, computational creativity, and community reflection inspires the use of generative models to help communities and organizations envision better futures.
summary: Generative AI techniques like those that synthesize images from text (text-to-image models) offer new possibilities for creatively imagining new ideas. We investigate the capabilities of these models to help communities engage in conversations about their collective future. In particular, we design and deploy a facilitated experience where participants collaboratively speculate on utopias they want to see, and then produce AI-generated imagery from those speculations. In a series of in-depth user interviews, we invite participants to reflect on the generated images and refine their visions for the future. We synthesize findings with a bespoke community zine on the experience. We observe that participants often generated ideas for implementing their vision and drew new lateral considerations as a result of viewing the generated images. Critically, we find that the unexpected difference between the participant's imagined output and the generated image is what facilitated new insight for the participant. We hope our experimental model for co-creation, computational creativity, and community reflection inspires the use of generative models to help communities and organizations envision better futures.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能技术，例如从文本合成图像（文本到图像模型）的技术，为创造性地想象新想法提供了新的可能性。我们研究这些模型的能力，以帮助社区参与有关其共同未来的对话。特别是，我们设计并部署了一种便利的体验，参与者可以协作推测他们想要看到的乌托邦，然后根据这些推测生成人工智能生成的图像。在一系列深入的用户访谈中，我们邀请参与者反思生成的图像并完善他们对未来的愿景。我们将调查结果与有关体验的定制社区杂志综合起来。我们观察到，参与者经常产生实现其愿景的想法，并在查看生成的图像后得出新的横向考虑。重要的是，我们发现参与者的想象输出和生成的图像之间的意外差异促进了参与者的新见解。我们希望我们的共同创造、计算创造力和社区反思的实验模型能够激发生成模型的使用，帮助社区和组织设想更美好的未来。

AI.conclusion: 证明生成式AI可作为协作创意工具，促进社区反思与未来愿景构建，意外差异是关键创新点

search_text: When happy accidents spark creativity: Bringing collaborative speculation to life with generative AI 当快乐的意外激发创造力：通过生成人工智能将协作推测变为现实 Generative AI techniques like those that synthesize images from text (text-to-image models) offer new possibilities for creatively imagining new ideas. We investigate the capabilities of these models to help communities engage in conversations about their collective future. In particular, we design and deploy a facilitated experience where participants collaboratively speculate on utopias they want to see, and then produce AI-generated imagery from those speculations. In a series of in-depth user interviews, we invite participants to reflect on the generated images and refine their visions for the future. We synthesize findings with a bespoke community zine on the experience. We observe that participants often generated ideas for implementing their vision and drew new lateral considerations as a result of viewing the generated images. Critically, we find that the unexpected difference between the participant's imagined output and the generated image is what facilitated new insight for the participant. We hope our experimental model for co-creation, computational creativity, and community reflection inspires the use of generative models to help communities and organizations envision better futures. 生成式人工智能技术，例如从文本合成图像（文本到图像模型）的技术，为创造性地想象新想法提供了新的可能性。我们研究这些模型的能力，以帮助社区参与有关其共同未来的对话。特别是，我们设计并部署了一种便利的体验，参与者可以协作推测他们想要看到的乌托邦，然后根据这些推测生成人工智能生成的图像。在一系列深入的用户访谈中，我们邀请参与者反思生成的图像并完善他们对未来的愿景。我们将调查结果与有关体验的定制社区杂志综合起来。我们观察到，参与者经常产生实现其愿景的想法，并在查看生成的图像后得出新的横向考虑。重要的是，我们发现参与者的想象输出和生成的图像之间的意外差异促进了参与者的新见解。我们希望我们的共同创造、计算创造力和社区反思的实验模型能够激发生成模型的使用，帮助社区和组织设想更美好的未来。 研究生成式AI如何促进社区协作推测与创意生成，以构想理想未来 Ziv Epstein,Hope Schroeder,Dava Newman cs.HC

authors_text: Ruoshi Wen,Quentin Rouxel,Michael Mistry,Zhibin Li,Carlo Tiseo
title: Collaborative Bimanual Manipulation Using Optimal Motion Adaptation and Interaction Control
title_zh: 使用最佳运动适应和交互控制的协作双手操纵
abstract: This work developed collaborative bimanual manipulation for reliable and safe human-robot collaboration, which allows remote and local human operators to work interactively for bimanual tasks. We proposed an optimal motion adaptation to retarget arbitrary commands from multiple human operators into feasible control references. The collaborative manipulation framework has three main modules: (1) contact force modulation for compliant physical interactions with objects via admittance control; (2) task-space sequential equilibrium and inverse kinematics optimization, which adapts interactive commands from multiple operators to feasible motions by satisfying the task constraints and physical limits of the robots; and (3) an interaction controller adopted from the fractal impedance control, which is robust to time delay and stable to superimpose multiple control efforts for generating desired joint torques and controlling the dual-arm robots. Extensive experiments demonstrated the capability of the collaborative bimanual framework, including (1) dual-arm teleoperation that adapts arbitrary infeasible commands that violate joint torque limits into continuous operations within safe boundaries, compared to failures without the proposed optimization; (2) robust maneuver of a stack of objects via physical interactions in presence of model inaccuracy; (3) collaborative multi-operator part assembly, and teleoperated industrial connector insertion, which validate the guaranteed stability of reliable human-robot co-manipulation.
summary: This work developed collaborative bimanual manipulation for reliable and safe human-robot collaboration, which allows remote and local human operators to work interactively for bimanual tasks. We proposed an optimal motion adaptation to retarget arbitrary commands from multiple human operators into feasible control references. The collaborative manipulation framework has three main modules: (1) contact force modulation for compliant physical interactions with objects via admittance control; (2) task-space sequential equilibrium and inverse kinematics optimization, which adapts interactive commands from multiple operators to feasible motions by satisfying the task constraints and physical limits of the robots; and (3) an interaction controller adopted from the fractal impedance control, which is robust to time delay and stable to superimpose multiple control efforts for generating desired joint torques and controlling the dual-arm robots. Extensive experiments demonstrated the capability of the collaborative bimanual framework, including (1) dual-arm teleoperation that adapts arbitrary infeasible commands that violate joint torque limits into continuous operations within safe boundaries, compared to failures without the proposed optimization; (2) robust maneuver of a stack of objects via physical interactions in presence of model inaccuracy; (3) collaborative multi-operator part assembly, and teleoperated industrial connector insertion, which validate the guaranteed stability of reliable human-robot co-manipulation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作开发了协作双手操纵，以实现可靠和安全的人机协作，允许远程和本地操作员交互式地完成双手任务。我们提出了一种最佳运动自适应，将多个操作员的任意命令重新定位为可行的控制参考。协作操纵框架具有三个主要模块：（1）接触力调制，通过准入控制与物体进行顺应的物理交互； （2）任务空间顺序平衡和逆运动学优化，通过满足机器人的任务约束和物理限制，将多个操作员的交互命令调整为可行的运动； (3)采用分形阻抗控制的交互控制器，其对时间延迟具有鲁棒性，并且能够稳定地叠加多个控制努力以产生期望的关节扭矩并控制双臂机器人。大量实验证明了协作双手框架的能力，包括（1）双臂远程操作，与没有提出优化的故障相比，可以将违反关节扭矩限制的任意不可行命令调整为安全边界内的连续操作； (2) 在模型不准确的情况下通过物理交互对一堆物体进行稳健的操纵； （3）协作多操作员零件组装和遥控工业连接器插入，验证了可靠的人机协同操作的稳定性保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作双臂操作框架，通过最优运动适应和交互控制实现安全可靠的人机协作。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在处理多操作员指令、物理约束及时间延迟时存在稳定性与安全性不足的问题，需开发适应复杂任务的协作控制方法。
AI.method: 框架包含三部分：1) 基于阻抗控制的接触力调节；2) 任务空间序贯平衡与逆运动学优化；3) 基于分形阻抗控制的交互控制器，以处理时延并融合多控制指令。
AI.result: 实验验证了框架在双臂遥操作、物体堆叠操作及多操作员装配任务中的有效性，成功处理了超出关节扭矩限制的指令并保持稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过优化运动适应与鲁棒交互控制，实现了复杂场景下人机协作的安全性与可靠性，适用于工业场景的双臂机器人操作。

title: Amodal Cityscapes: A New Dataset, its Generation, and an Amodal Semantic Segmentation Challenge Baseline
title_zh: Amodal 城市景观：新数据集、其生成以及 Amodal 语义分割挑战基线
comment: This paper is accepted at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
comments: This paper is accepted at IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
abstract: Amodal perception terms the ability of humans to imagine the entire shapes of occluded objects. This gives humans an advantage to keep track of everything that is going on, especially in crowded situations. Typical perception functions, however, lack amodal perception abilities and are therefore at a disadvantage in situations with occlusions. Complex urban driving scenarios often experience many different types of occlusions and, therefore, amodal perception for automated vehicles is an important task to investigate. In this paper, we consider the task of amodal semantic segmentation and propose a generic way to generate datasets to train amodal semantic segmentation methods. We use this approach to generate an amodal Cityscapes dataset. Moreover, we propose and evaluate a method as baseline on Amodal Cityscapes, showing its applicability for amodal semantic segmentation in automotive environment perception. We provide the means to re-generate this dataset on github.
summary: Amodal perception terms the ability of humans to imagine the entire shapes of occluded objects. This gives humans an advantage to keep track of everything that is going on, especially in crowded situations. Typical perception functions, however, lack amodal perception abilities and are therefore at a disadvantage in situations with occlusions. Complex urban driving scenarios often experience many different types of occlusions and, therefore, amodal perception for automated vehicles is an important task to investigate. In this paper, we consider the task of amodal semantic segmentation and propose a generic way to generate datasets to train amodal semantic segmentation methods. We use this approach to generate an amodal Cityscapes dataset. Moreover, we propose and evaluate a method as baseline on Amodal Cityscapes, showing its applicability for amodal semantic segmentation in automotive environment perception. We provide the means to re-generate this dataset on github.
abstract_zh: 非模态感知是指人类想象被遮挡物体的整个形状的能力。这使人类有能力跟踪正在发生的一切，尤其是在拥挤的情况下。然而，典型的感知功能缺乏非模态感知能力，因此在有遮挡的情况下处于不利地位。复杂的城市驾驶场景经常会遇到许多不同类型的遮挡，因此，自动驾驶车辆的非模态感知是一项需要研究的重要任务。在本文中，我们考虑了非模态语义分割的任务，并提出了一种生成数据集以训练非模态语义分割方法的通用方法。我们使用这种方法来生成非模态城市景观数据集。此外，我们提出并评估了一种方法作为 Amodal Cityscapes 的基线，展示了其在汽车环境感知中 Amodal 语义分割的适用性。我们在 github 上提供了重新生成此数据集的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成遮挡场景语义分割数据集的新方法，并构建了Amodal Cityscapes数据集，同时提供了一个用于自动驾驶环境感知的遮挡语义分割基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有感知系统在处理城市复杂遮挡场景时表现不足，而人类可通过遮挡物想象完整物体形状来保持环境感知，这对自动驾驶车辆的安全性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过通用数据生成框架创建遮挡标注数据集，基于Cityscapes数据集生成Amodal Cityscapes，并设计包含遮挡预测的语义分割网络作为基线方法。
AI.result: 验证了基线方法在遮挡场景中的有效性，证明了该数据集和方法对自动驾驶环境感知任务的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基线方法为遮挡场景下的自动驾驶感知研究提供了重要工具，推动了对复杂城市环境的鲁棒性感知技术发展。

ai_content_json.method: 通过通用数据生成框架创建遮挡标注数据集，基于Cityscapes数据集生成Amodal Cityscapes，并设计包含遮挡预测的语义分割网络作为基线方法。
ai_content_json.result: 验证了基线方法在遮挡场景中的有效性，证明了该数据集和方法对自动驾驶环境感知任务的适用性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该数据集和基线方法为遮挡场景下的自动驾驶感知研究提供了重要工具，推动了对复杂城市环境的鲁棒性感知技术发展。

search_text: Amodal Cityscapes: A New Dataset, its Generation, and an Amodal Semantic Segmentation Challenge Baseline Amodal 城市景观：新数据集、其生成以及 Amodal 语义分割挑战基线 Amodal perception terms the ability of humans to imagine the entire shapes of occluded objects. This gives humans an advantage to keep track of everything that is going on, especially in crowded situations. Typical perception functions, however, lack amodal perception abilities and are therefore at a disadvantage in situations with occlusions. Complex urban driving scenarios often experience many different types of occlusions and, therefore, amodal perception for automated vehicles is an important task to investigate. In this paper, we consider the task of amodal semantic segmentation and propose a generic way to generate datasets to train amodal semantic segmentation methods. We use this approach to generate an amodal Cityscapes dataset. Moreover, we propose and evaluate a method as baseline on Amodal Cityscapes, showing its applicability for amodal semantic segmentation in automotive environment perception. We provide the means to re-generate this dataset on github. 非模态感知是指人类想象被遮挡物体的整个形状的能力。这使人类有能力跟踪正在发生的一切，尤其是在拥挤的情况下。然而，典型的感知功能缺乏非模态感知能力，因此在有遮挡的情况下处于不利地位。复杂的城市驾驶场景经常会遇到许多不同类型的遮挡，因此，自动驾驶车辆的非模态感知是一项需要研究的重要任务。在本文中，我们考虑了非模态语义分割的任务，并提出了一种生成数据集以训练非模态语义分割方法的通用方法。我们使用这种方法来生成非模态城市景观数据集。此外，我们提出并评估了一种方法作为 Amodal Cityscapes 的基线，展示了其在汽车环境感知中 Amodal 语义分割的适用性。我们在 github 上提供了重新生成此数据集的方法。 本文提出一种生成遮挡场景语义分割数据集的新方法，并构建了Amodal Cityscapes数据集，同时提供了一个用于自动驾驶环境感知的遮挡语义分割基线方法。 Jasmin Breitenstein,Tim Fingscheidt cs.CV

title: Minimum-Cost Flows Over Time
title_zh: 随时间变化的最低成本流
abstract: In this paper we show that every maximum minimum-cost flow over time problem has an optimal solution with a repeated structure if the given time horizon is large enough.
summary: In this paper we show that every maximum minimum-cost flow over time problem has an optimal solution with a repeated structure if the given time horizon is large enough.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们证明，如果给定的时间范围足够大，每个时间上的最大最小成本流问题都有一个具有重复结构的最优解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在足够长的时间范围内，最小成本流问题的最优解具有重复结构的特性。
AI.motivation: 传统最小成本流问题未考虑时间动态性，而实际应用场景中时间因素对流网络优化至关重要，需探索时间维度下的最优解结构。
AI.method: 通过分析时间扩展网络中的循环结构，结合线性规划对偶理论及周期性解的性质，证明长期时间范围下的最优解必然存在重复模式。
AI.result: 证明当时间范围足够大时，最大最小成本流问题的最优解必然具有周期性重复的结构特征。
AI.conclusion: 该结论为动态流网络优化提供了理论依据，表明长期时间尺度下的最优解可通过分析重复结构简化求解过程。

authors_text: Khanh Q. Tran,An T. Nguyen,Phu Gia Hoang,Canh Duc Luu,Trong-Hop Do,Kiet Van Nguyen
title: Vietnamese Hate and Offensive Detection using PhoBERT-CNN and Social Media Streaming Data
title_zh: 使用 PhoBERT-CNN 和社交媒体流数据检测越南人仇恨和攻击性
abstract: Society needs to develop a system to detect hate and offense to build a healthy and safe environment. However, current research in this field still faces four major shortcomings, including deficient pre-processing techniques, indifference to data imbalance issues, modest performance models, and lacking practical applications. This paper focused on developing an intelligent system capable of addressing these shortcomings. Firstly, we proposed an efficient pre-processing technique to clean comments collected from Vietnamese social media. Secondly, a novel hate speech detection (HSD) model, which is the combination of a pre-trained PhoBERT model and a Text-CNN model, was proposed for solving tasks in Vietnamese. Thirdly, EDA techniques are applied to deal with imbalanced data to improve the performance of classification models. Besides, various experiments were conducted as baselines to compare and investigate the proposed model's performance against state-of-the-art methods. The experiment results show that the proposed PhoBERT-CNN model outperforms SOTA methods and achieves an F1-score of 67,46% and 98,45% on two benchmark datasets, ViHSD and HSD-VLSP, respectively. Finally, we also built a streaming HSD application to demonstrate the practicality of our proposed system.
summary: Society needs to develop a system to detect hate and offense to build a healthy and safe environment. However, current research in this field still faces four major shortcomings, including deficient pre-processing techniques, indifference to data imbalance issues, modest performance models, and lacking practical applications. This paper focused on developing an intelligent system capable of addressing these shortcomings. Firstly, we proposed an efficient pre-processing technique to clean comments collected from Vietnamese social media. Secondly, a novel hate speech detection (HSD) model, which is the combination of a pre-trained PhoBERT model and a Text-CNN model, was proposed for solving tasks in Vietnamese. Thirdly, EDA techniques are applied to deal with imbalanced data to improve the performance of classification models. Besides, various experiments were conducted as baselines to compare and investigate the proposed model's performance against state-of-the-art methods. The experiment results show that the proposed PhoBERT-CNN model outperforms SOTA methods and achieves an F1-score of 67,46% and 98,45% on two benchmark datasets, ViHSD and HSD-VLSP, respectively. Finally, we also built a streaming HSD application to demonstrate the practicality of our proposed system.
abstract_zh: 社会需要开发一个系统来检测仇恨和冒犯行为，以建立一个健康和安全的环境。然而，目前该领域的研究仍面临预处理技术不足、对数据不平衡问题漠不关心、性能模型不高、缺乏实际应用等四大缺陷。本文重点开发一种能够解决这些缺点的智能系统。首先，我们提出了一种有效的预处理技术来清理从越南社交媒体收集的评论。其次，提出了一种新颖的仇恨语音检测（HSD）模型，该模型是预训练的 PhoBERT 模型和 Text-CNN 模型的组合，用于解决越南语任务。第三，应用EDA技术处理不平衡数据，提高分类模型的性能。此外，还进行了各种实验作为基线，以比较和研究所提出的模型与最先进方法的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 PhoBERT-CNN 模型优于 SOTA 方法，在两个基准数据集 ViHSD 和 HSD-VLSP 上分别实现了 67.46% 和 98.45% 的 F1 分数。最后，我们还构建了一个流 HSD 应用程序来演示我们提出的系统的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合PhoBERT和Text-CNN的模型，用于检测越南社交媒体中的仇恨和冒犯性内容，并通过流数据应用验证其实用性。
AI.motivation: 当前仇恨言论检测研究存在预处理技术不足、数据不平衡问题被忽视、模型性能有限及缺乏实际应用等缺陷，需开发更高效且实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出高效预处理技术清洗数据，结合预训练PhoBERT与Text-CNN构建检测模型，应用EDA技术处理数据不平衡问题，并通过基准实验对比验证模型性能。
AI.result: PhoBERT-CNN模型在ViHSD和HSD-VLSP数据集上分别达到67.46%和98.45%的F1分数，且成功开发了流式检测应用。
AI.conclusion: 该模型优于现有方法，有效解决了预处理、数据不平衡及实际应用等核心问题，为越南语仇恨言论检测提供了可行方案。

title: Deep Learning Opacity in Scientific Discovery
title_zh: 科学发现中的深度学习不透明性
comment: Forthcoming at "Philosophy of Science" 12 pages, 1 figure
comments: Forthcoming at "Philosophy of Science" 12 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Philosophers have recently focused on critical, epistemological challenges that arise from the opacity of deep neural networks. One might conclude from this literature that doing good science with opaque models is exceptionally challenging, if not impossible. Yet, this is hard to square with the recent boom in optimism for AI in science alongside a flood of recent scientific breakthroughs driven by AI methods. In this paper, I argue that the disconnect between philosophical pessimism and scientific optimism is driven by a failure to examine how AI is actually used in science. I show that, in order to understand the epistemic justification for AI-powered breakthroughs, philosophers must examine the role played by deep learning as part of a wider process of discovery. The philosophical distinction between the 'context of discovery' and the 'context of justification' is helpful in this regard. I demonstrate the importance of attending to this distinction with two cases drawn from the scientific literature, and show that epistemic opacity need not diminish AI's capacity to lead scientists to significant and justifiable breakthroughs.
summary: Philosophers have recently focused on critical, epistemological challenges that arise from the opacity of deep neural networks. One might conclude from this literature that doing good science with opaque models is exceptionally challenging, if not impossible. Yet, this is hard to square with the recent boom in optimism for AI in science alongside a flood of recent scientific breakthroughs driven by AI methods. In this paper, I argue that the disconnect between philosophical pessimism and scientific optimism is driven by a failure to examine how AI is actually used in science. I show that, in order to understand the epistemic justification for AI-powered breakthroughs, philosophers must examine the role played by deep learning as part of a wider process of discovery. The philosophical distinction between the 'context of discovery' and the 'context of justification' is helpful in this regard. I demonstrate the importance of attending to this distinction with two cases drawn from the scientific literature, and show that epistemic opacity need not diminish AI's capacity to lead scientists to significant and justifiable breakthroughs.
abstract_zh: 哲学家最近关注由深层神经网络的不透明性引起的关键认识论挑战。人们可能会从这篇文献中得出结论，用不透明的模型进行良好的科学研究即使不是不可能，也是异常具有挑战性的。然而，这很难与最近人工智能在科学领域的乐观情绪以及人工智能方法驱动的近期科学突破相一致。在本文中，我认为哲学悲观主义和科学乐观主义之间的脱节是由于未能研究人工智能在科学中的实际应用而造成的。我表明，为了理解人工智能突破的认知合理性，哲学家必须审视深度学习在更广泛的发现过程中所扮演的角色。 “发现的背景”和“论证的背景”之间的哲学区别在这方面是有帮助的。我通过科学文献中的两个案例证明了关注这种区别的重要性，并表明认知的不透明性不会削弱人工智能引导科学家取得重大和合理突破的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨深度学习模型在科学发现中的不透明性问题，分析哲学界对AI乐观态度与科学实践之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 哲学界对深度学习模型的不透明性持悲观态度，但科学界却因AI驱动的突破而乐观，需弥合这一认知差距。
AI.method: 通过区分科学发现的'发现语境'与'辩护语境'，结合两个科学案例分析AI在实际应用中的作用。
AI.result: 证明认知不透明性并不妨碍AI引导科学家实现可辩护的重大突破，需重新审视AI在科学流程中的角色。
AI.conclusion: 哲学家应关注AI在科学发现过程中的实际应用，而非仅聚焦其不透明性，以更全面评估其科学价值。

search_text: Deep Learning Opacity in Scientific Discovery 科学发现中的深度学习不透明性 Philosophers have recently focused on critical, epistemological challenges that arise from the opacity of deep neural networks. One might conclude from this literature that doing good science with opaque models is exceptionally challenging, if not impossible. Yet, this is hard to square with the recent boom in optimism for AI in science alongside a flood of recent scientific breakthroughs driven by AI methods. In this paper, I argue that the disconnect between philosophical pessimism and scientific optimism is driven by a failure to examine how AI is actually used in science. I show that, in order to understand the epistemic justification for AI-powered breakthroughs, philosophers must examine the role played by deep learning as part of a wider process of discovery. The philosophical distinction between the 'context of discovery' and the 'context of justification' is helpful in this regard. I demonstrate the importance of attending to this distinction with two cases drawn from the scientific literature, and show that epistemic opacity need not diminish AI's capacity to lead scientists to significant and justifiable breakthroughs. 哲学家最近关注由深层神经网络的不透明性引起的关键认识论挑战。人们可能会从这篇文献中得出结论，用不透明的模型进行良好的科学研究即使不是不可能，也是异常具有挑战性的。然而，这很难与最近人工智能在科学领域的乐观情绪以及人工智能方法驱动的近期科学突破相一致。在本文中，我认为哲学悲观主义和科学乐观主义之间的脱节是由于未能研究人工智能在科学中的实际应用而造成的。我表明，为了理解人工智能突破的认知合理性，哲学家必须审视深度学习在更广泛的发现过程中所扮演的角色。 “发现的背景”和“论证的背景”之间的哲学区别在这方面是有帮助的。我通过科学文献中的两个案例证明了关注这种区别的重要性，并表明认知的不透明性不会削弱人工智能引导科学家取得重大和合理突破的能力。 本文探讨深度学习模型在科学发现中的不透明性问题，分析哲学界对AI乐观态度与科学实践之间的矛盾。 Eamon Duede cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG,physics.soc-ph

title: Efficient Scheduling of Data Augmentation for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的数据增强的高效调度
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.08581
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.08581
abstract: In deep reinforcement learning (RL), data augmentation is widely considered as a tool to induce a set of useful priors about semantic consistency and improve sample efficiency and generalization performance. However, even when the prior is useful for generalization, distilling it to RL agent often interferes with RL training and degenerates sample efficiency. Meanwhile, the agent is forgetful of the prior due to the non-stationary nature of RL. These observations suggest two extreme schedules of distillation: (i) over the entire training; or (ii) only at the end. Hence, we devise a stand-alone network distillation method to inject the consistency prior at any time (even after RL), and a simple yet efficient framework to automatically schedule the distillation. Specifically, the proposed framework first focuses on mastering train environments regardless of generalization by adaptively deciding which {\it or no} augmentation to be used for the training. After this, we add the distillation to extract the remaining benefits for generalization from all the augmentations, which requires no additional new samples. In our experiments, we demonstrate the utility of the proposed framework, in particular, that considers postponing the augmentation to the end of RL training.
summary: In deep reinforcement learning (RL), data augmentation is widely considered as a tool to induce a set of useful priors about semantic consistency and improve sample efficiency and generalization performance. However, even when the prior is useful for generalization, distilling it to RL agent often interferes with RL training and degenerates sample efficiency. Meanwhile, the agent is forgetful of the prior due to the non-stationary nature of RL. These observations suggest two extreme schedules of distillation: (i) over the entire training; or (ii) only at the end. Hence, we devise a stand-alone network distillation method to inject the consistency prior at any time (even after RL), and a simple yet efficient framework to automatically schedule the distillation. Specifically, the proposed framework first focuses on mastering train environments regardless of generalization by adaptively deciding which {\it or no} augmentation to be used for the training. After this, we add the distillation to extract the remaining benefits for generalization from all the augmentations, which requires no additional new samples. In our experiments, we demonstrate the utility of the proposed framework, in particular, that considers postponing the augmentation to the end of RL training.
abstract_zh: 在深度强化学习（RL）中，数据增强被广泛认为是一种工具，可以诱导一组有关语义一致性的有用先验，并提高样本效率和泛化性能。然而，即使先验对于泛化有用，将其提炼为 RL 代理也常常会干扰 RL 训练并降低样本效率。同时，由于 RL 的非平稳性质，智能体会忘记先验信息。这些观察结果表明了两种极端的蒸馏计划：（i）在整个训练过程中；或 (ii) 仅在最后。因此，我们设计了一种独立的网络蒸馏方法，可以随时（甚至在强化学习之后）注入先验一致性，以及一个简单而有效的框架来自动安排蒸馏。具体来说，所提出的框架首先侧重于通过自适应地决定用于训练的{\it或no}增强来掌握训练环境，而不管泛化如何。之后，我们添加蒸馏以从所有增强中提取泛化的剩余好处，这不需要额外的新样本。在我们的实验中，我们展示了所提出的框架的实用性，特别是考虑将增强推迟到强化学习训练结束时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的数据增强调度框架，用于深度强化学习，以优化先验知识的注入时机。
AI.motivation: 数据增强虽能提升强化学习的泛化能力，但直接应用会干扰训练过程且难以适应非稳态特性，现有方法存在效率与泛化之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 设计独立的网络蒸馏模块在任意训练阶段注入一致性先验，并通过自适应框架决定是否使用增强，最终在训练后期提取剩余泛化收益。
AI.result: 实验表明，延迟增强至训练末期的策略显著提升了样本效率和泛化性能，验证了调度框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态调度数据增强时机，可在不增加样本量的前提下平衡训练稳定性与泛化能力，为强化学习优化提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient Scheduling of Data Augmentation for Deep Reinforcement Learning 深度强化学习的数据增强的高效调度 In deep reinforcement learning (RL), data augmentation is widely considered as a tool to induce a set of useful priors about semantic consistency and improve sample efficiency and generalization performance. However, even when the prior is useful for generalization, distilling it to RL agent often interferes with RL training and degenerates sample efficiency. Meanwhile, the agent is forgetful of the prior due to the non-stationary nature of RL. These observations suggest two extreme schedules of distillation: (i) over the entire training; or (ii) only at the end. Hence, we devise a stand-alone network distillation method to inject the consistency prior at any time (even after RL), and a simple yet efficient framework to automatically schedule the distillation. Specifically, the proposed framework first focuses on mastering train environments regardless of generalization by adaptively deciding which {\it or no} augmentation to be used for the training. After this, we add the distillation to extract the remaining benefits for generalization from all the augmentations, which requires no additional new samples. In our experiments, we demonstrate the utility of the proposed framework, in particular, that considers postponing the augmentation to the end of RL training. 在深度强化学习（RL）中，数据增强被广泛认为是一种工具，可以诱导一组有关语义一致性的有用先验，并提高样本效率和泛化性能。然而，即使先验对于泛化有用，将其提炼为 RL 代理也常常会干扰 RL 训练并降低样本效率。同时，由于 RL 的非平稳性质，智能体会忘记先验信息。这些观察结果表明了两种极端的蒸馏计划：（i）在整个训练过程中；或 (ii) 仅在最后。因此，我们设计了一种独立的网络蒸馏方法，可以随时（甚至在强化学习之后）注入先验一致性，以及一个简单而有效的框架来自动安排蒸馏。具体来说，所提出的框架首先侧重于通过自适应地决定用于训练的{\it或no}增强来掌握训练环境，而不管泛化如何。之后，我们添加蒸馏以从所有增强中提取泛化的剩余好处，这不需要额外的新样本。在我们的实验中，我们展示了所提出的框架的实用性，特别是考虑将增强推迟到强化学习训练结束时。 本文提出了一种高效的数据增强调度框架，用于深度强化学习，以优化先验知识的注入时机。 Byungchan Ko,Jungseul Ok cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Omid Ghorbanzadeh,Yonghao Xu,Pedram Ghamisi,Michael Kopp,David Kreil
title: Landslide4Sense: Reference Benchmark Data and Deep Learning Models for Landslide Detection
title_zh: Landslide4Sense：山体滑坡检测的参考基准数据和深度学习模型
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-17, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-17, 2022
abstract: This study introduces \textit{Landslide4Sense}, a reference benchmark for landslide detection from remote sensing. The repository features 3,799 image patches fusing optical layers from Sentinel-2 sensors with the digital elevation model and slope layer derived from ALOS PALSAR. The added topographical information facilitates the accurate detection of landslide borders, which recent researches have shown to be challenging using optical data alone. The extensive data set supports deep learning (DL) studies in landslide detection and the development and validation of methods for the systematic update of landslide inventories. The benchmark data set has been collected at four different times and geographical locations: Iburi (September 2018), Kodagu (August 2018), Gorkha (April 2015), and Taiwan (August 2009). Each image pixel is labelled as belonging to a landslide or not, incorporating various sources and thorough manual annotation. We then evaluate the landslide detection performance of 11 state-of-the-art DL segmentation models: U-Net, ResU-Net, PSPNet, ContextNet, DeepLab-v2, DeepLab-v3+, FCN-8s, LinkNet, FRRN-A, FRRN-B, and SQNet. All models were trained from scratch on patches from one quarter of each study area and tested on independent patches from the other three quarters. Our experiments demonstrate that ResU-Net outperformed the other models for the landslide detection task. We make the multi-source landslide benchmark data (Landslide4Sense) and the tested DL models publicly available at \url{https://www.iarai.ac.at/landslide4sense}, establishing an important resource for remote sensing, computer vision, and machine learning communities in studies of image classification in general and applications to landslide detection in particular.
summary: This study introduces \textit{Landslide4Sense}, a reference benchmark for landslide detection from remote sensing. The repository features 3,799 image patches fusing optical layers from Sentinel-2 sensors with the digital elevation model and slope layer derived from ALOS PALSAR. The added topographical information facilitates the accurate detection of landslide borders, which recent researches have shown to be challenging using optical data alone. The extensive data set supports deep learning (DL) studies in landslide detection and the development and validation of methods for the systematic update of landslide inventories. The benchmark data set has been collected at four different times and geographical locations: Iburi (September 2018), Kodagu (August 2018), Gorkha (April 2015), and Taiwan (August 2009). Each image pixel is labelled as belonging to a landslide or not, incorporating various sources and thorough manual annotation. We then evaluate the landslide detection performance of 11 state-of-the-art DL segmentation models: U-Net, ResU-Net, PSPNet, ContextNet, DeepLab-v2, DeepLab-v3+, FCN-8s, LinkNet, FRRN-A, FRRN-B, and SQNet. All models were trained from scratch on patches from one quarter of each study area and tested on independent patches from the other three quarters. Our experiments demonstrate that ResU-Net outperformed the other models for the landslide detection task. We make the multi-source landslide benchmark data (Landslide4Sense) and the tested DL models publicly available at \url{https://www.iarai.ac.at/landslide4sense}, establishing an important resource for remote sensing, computer vision, and machine learning communities in studies of image classification in general and applications to landslide detection in particular.
abstract_zh: 本研究引入了 \textit{Landslide4Sense}，这是遥感滑坡检测的参考基准。该存储库包含 3,799 个图像块，将 Sentinel-2 传感器的光学层与源自 ALOS PALSAR 的数字高程模型和坡度层融合在一起。添加的地形信息有助于准确检测滑坡边界，最近的研究表明，仅使用光学数据很难检测到滑坡边界。广泛的数据集支持滑坡检测方面的深度学习（DL）研究以及滑坡清单系统更新方法的开发和验证。基准数据集是在四个不同时间和地理位置收集的：Iburi（2018年9月）、Kodagu（2018年8月）、Gorkha（2015年4月）和台湾（2009年8月）。每个图像像素都被标记为是否属于山体滑坡，结合了各种来源和彻底的手动注释。然后，我们评估了 11 种最先进的深度学习分割模型的山体滑坡检测性能：U-Net、ResU-Net、PSPNet、ContextNet、DeepLab-v2、DeepLab-v3+、FCN-8s、LinkNet、FRRN-A、FRRN-B 和 SQNet。所有模型都在每个研究区域四分之一的斑块上从头开始训练，并在其他四分之三的独立斑块上进行测试。我们的实验表明，ResU-Net 在山体滑坡检测任务中优于其他模型。我们在 \url{https://www.iarai.ac.at/landslide4sense} 公开提供多源滑坡基准数据 (Landslide4Sense) 和经过测试的深度学习模型，为遥感、计算机视觉和机器学习社区在一般图像分类研究和特别是滑坡检测应用方面建立了重要资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Landslide4Sense基准数据集及深度学习模型，用于改进滑坡检测的遥感图像分析。
AI.motivation: 光学数据单独检测滑坡边界存在挑战，需融合地形信息提升准确性，并为滑坡库存系统更新提供数据支持。
AI.method: 整合Sentinel-2光学数据与ALOS PALSAR地形数据，构建包含3,799张图像块的数据集，标注像素级滑坡区域，并测试11种深度学习分割模型性能。
AI.result: ResU-Net模型在滑坡检测任务中表现最优，数据集与模型已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: Landslide4Sense为遥感、计算机视觉及机器学习领域提供了重要资源，推动滑坡检测相关研究。

tldr: 本文提出Landslide4Sense基准数据集及深度学习模型，用于改进滑坡检测的遥感图像分析。
motivation: 光学数据单独检测滑坡边界存在挑战，需融合地形信息提升准确性，并为滑坡库存系统更新提供数据支持。
method: 整合Sentinel-2光学数据与ALOS PALSAR地形数据，构建包含3,799张图像块的数据集，标注像素级滑坡区域，并测试11种深度学习分割模型性能。
result: ResU-Net模型在滑坡检测任务中表现最优，数据集与模型已公开共享。
conclusion: Landslide4Sense为遥感、计算机视觉及机器学习领域提供了重要资源，推动滑坡检测相关研究。
search_text: Landslide4Sense: Reference Benchmark Data and Deep Learning Models for Landslide Detection Landslide4Sense：山体滑坡检测的参考基准数据和深度学习模型 This study introduces \textit{Landslide4Sense}, a reference benchmark for landslide detection from remote sensing. The repository features 3,799 image patches fusing optical layers from Sentinel-2 sensors with the digital elevation model and slope layer derived from ALOS PALSAR. The added topographical information facilitates the accurate detection of landslide borders, which recent researches have shown to be challenging using optical data alone. The extensive data set supports deep learning (DL) studies in landslide detection and the development and validation of methods for the systematic update of landslide inventories. The benchmark data set has been collected at four different times and geographical locations: Iburi (September 2018), Kodagu (August 2018), Gorkha (April 2015), and Taiwan (August 2009). Each image pixel is labelled as belonging to a landslide or not, incorporating various sources and thorough manual annotation. We then evaluate the landslide detection performance of 11 state-of-the-art DL segmentation models: U-Net, ResU-Net, PSPNet, ContextNet, DeepLab-v2, DeepLab-v3+, FCN-8s, LinkNet, FRRN-A, FRRN-B, and SQNet. All models were trained from scratch on patches from one quarter of each study area and tested on independent patches from the other three quarters. Our experiments demonstrate that ResU-Net outperformed the other models for the landslide detection task. We make the multi-source landslide benchmark data (Landslide4Sense) and the tested DL models publicly available at \url{https://www.iarai.ac.at/landslide4sense}, establishing an important resource for remote sensing, computer vision, and machine learning communities in studies of image classification in general and applications to landslide detection in particular. 本研究引入了 \textit{Landslide4Sense}，这是遥感滑坡检测的参考基准。该存储库包含 3,799 个图像块，将 Sentinel-2 传感器的光学层与源自 ALOS PALSAR 的数字高程模型和坡度层融合在一起。添加的地形信息有助于准确检测滑坡边界，最近的研究表明，仅使用光学数据很难检测到滑坡边界。广泛的数据集支持滑坡检测方面的深度学习（DL）研究以及滑坡清单系统更新方法的开发和验证。基准数据集是在四个不同时间和地理位置收集的：Iburi（2018年9月）、Kodagu（2018年8月）、Gorkha（2015年4月）和台湾（2009年8月）。每个图像像素都被标记为是否属于山体滑坡，结合了各种来源和彻底的手动注释。然后，我们评估了 11 种最先进的深度学习分割模型的山体滑坡检测性能：U-Net、ResU-Net、PSPNet、ContextNet、DeepLab-v2、DeepLab-v3+、FCN-8s、LinkNet、FRRN-A、FRRN-B 和 SQNet。所有模型都在每个研究区域四分之一的斑块上从头开始训练，并在其他四分之三的独立斑块上进行测试。我们的实验表明，ResU-Net 在山体滑坡检测任务中优于其他模型。我们在 \url{https://www.iarai.ac.at/landslide4sense} 公开提供多源滑坡基准数据 (Landslide4Sense) 和经过测试的深度学习模型，为遥感、计算机视觉和机器学习社区在一般图像分类研究和特别是滑坡检测应用方面建立了重要资源。 本文提出Landslide4Sense基准数据集及深度学习模型，用于改进滑坡检测的遥感图像分析。 Omid Ghorbanzadeh,Yonghao Xu,Pedram Ghamisi,Michael Kopp,David Kreil cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Proximally Sensitive Error for Anomaly Detection and Feature Learning
title_zh: 用于异常检测和特征学习的近端敏感误差
abstract: Mean squared error (MSE) is one of the most widely used metrics to expression differences between multi-dimensional entities, including images. However, MSE is not locally sensitive as it does not take into account the spatial arrangement of the (pixel) differences, which matters for structured data types like images. Such spatial arrangements carry information about the source of the differences; therefore, an error function that also incorporates the location of errors can lead to a more meaningful distance measure. We introduce Proximally Sensitive Error (PSE), through which we suggest that a regional emphasis in the error measure can 'highlight' semantic differences between images over syntactic/random deviations. We demonstrate that this emphasis can be leveraged upon for the task of anomaly/occlusion detection. We further explore its utility as a loss function to help a model focus on learning representations of semantic objects instead of minimizing syntactic reconstruction noise.
summary: Mean squared error (MSE) is one of the most widely used metrics to expression differences between multi-dimensional entities, including images. However, MSE is not locally sensitive as it does not take into account the spatial arrangement of the (pixel) differences, which matters for structured data types like images. Such spatial arrangements carry information about the source of the differences; therefore, an error function that also incorporates the location of errors can lead to a more meaningful distance measure. We introduce Proximally Sensitive Error (PSE), through which we suggest that a regional emphasis in the error measure can 'highlight' semantic differences between images over syntactic/random deviations. We demonstrate that this emphasis can be leveraged upon for the task of anomaly/occlusion detection. We further explore its utility as a loss function to help a model focus on learning representations of semantic objects instead of minimizing syntactic reconstruction noise.
abstract_zh: 均方误差 (MSE) 是表达多维实体（包括图像）之间差异的最广泛使用的指标之一。然而，MSE 并不局部敏感，因为它没有考虑（像素）差异的空间排列，而这对于图像等结构化数据类型很重要。这种空间排列携带着有关差异来源的信息；因此，还包含错误位置的误差函数可以产生更有意义的距离测量。我们引入了近端敏感误差（PSE），通过它我们建议误差测量中的区域重点可以“突出”图像之间相对于句法/随机偏差的语义差异。我们证明这种强调可以用于异常/遮挡检测的任务。我们进一步探索其作为损失函数的实用性，以帮助模型专注于学习语义对象的表示，而不是最小化句法重建噪声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Proximally Sensitive Error（PSE）的新误差度量方法，用于改进图像的异常检测和特征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统均方误差（MSE）无法捕捉图像中像素差异的空间分布信息，导致对语义差异的敏感度不足，而结构化数据的空间信息对异常检测至关重要。
AI.method: 通过引入区域敏感机制，使误差计算对局部空间位置加权，从而增强对语义差异的响应，弱化随机噪声影响，并将该误差函数作为损失函数指导模型学习语义特征。
AI.result: 实验表明PSE在异常/遮挡检测任务中优于传统方法，且能有效引导模型关注语义对象而非单纯优化像素级重建精度。
AI.conclusion: PSE通过空间敏感的误差度量提升了图像分析任务的语义感知能力，为异常检测和特征学习提供了新的有效工具。

title: Benign Overfitting in Classification: Provably Counter Label Noise with Larger Models
title_zh: 分类中的良性过度拟合：可证明用较大的模型来对抗标签噪声
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Studies on benign overfitting provide insights for the success of overparameterized deep learning models. In this work, we examine whether overfitting is truly benign in real-world classification tasks. We start with the observation that a ResNet model overfits benignly on Cifar10 but not benignly on ImageNet. To understand why benign overfitting fails in the ImageNet experiment, we theoretically analyze benign overfitting under a more restrictive setup where the number of parameters is not significantly larger than the number of data points. Under this mild overparameterization setup, our analysis identifies a phase change: unlike in the previous heavy overparameterization settings, benign overfitting can now fail in the presence of label noise. Our analysis explains our empirical observations, and is validated by a set of control experiments with ResNets. Our work highlights the importance of understanding implicit bias in underfitting regimes as a future direction.
summary: Studies on benign overfitting provide insights for the success of overparameterized deep learning models. In this work, we examine whether overfitting is truly benign in real-world classification tasks. We start with the observation that a ResNet model overfits benignly on Cifar10 but not benignly on ImageNet. To understand why benign overfitting fails in the ImageNet experiment, we theoretically analyze benign overfitting under a more restrictive setup where the number of parameters is not significantly larger than the number of data points. Under this mild overparameterization setup, our analysis identifies a phase change: unlike in the previous heavy overparameterization settings, benign overfitting can now fail in the presence of label noise. Our analysis explains our empirical observations, and is validated by a set of control experiments with ResNets. Our work highlights the importance of understanding implicit bias in underfitting regimes as a future direction.
abstract_zh: 对良性过度拟合的研究为过度参数化深度学习模型的成功提供了见解。在这项工作中，我们研究了现实世界的分类任务中过度拟合是否真正是良性的。我们首先观察到 ResNet 模型在 Cifar10 上良性过拟合，但在 ImageNet 上却不是良性过拟合。为了理解为什么良性过拟合在 ImageNet 实验中失败，我们从理论上分析了在更严格的设置下的良性过拟合，其中参数的数量不会明显大于数据点的数量。在这种温和的过度参数化设置下，我们的分析确定了一个阶段变化：与之前的严重过度参数化设置不同，良性过度拟合现在可能会在存在标签噪声的情况下失败。我们的分析解释了我们的经验观察结果，并通过一组 ResNet 控制实验进行了验证。我们的工作强调了理解欠拟合机制中隐含偏见作为未来方向的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究分类任务中良性过拟合现象的可靠性，发现标签噪声和模型规模差异会导致良性过拟合失效。
AI.motivation: 现有理论认为过参数化模型可实现良性过拟合，但实际在ImageNet等复杂数据集上该现象未被观察到，需探究其失效原因。
AI.method: 通过理论分析轻度过参数化场景下的良性过拟合条件，并设计ResNet控制实验验证标签噪声对过拟合的影响。
AI.result: 理论证明轻度过参数化下标签噪声会导致良性过拟合失效，实验验证了Cifar10与ImageNet的差异性表现。
AI.conclusion: 需关注欠拟合场景下的隐式偏差机制，未来研究应深入理解模型规模与噪声容忍度的关联性。

title: Semantic Room Wireframe Detection from a Single View
title_zh: 从单一视图进行语义室线框检测
abstract: Reconstruction of indoor surfaces with limited texture information or with repeated textures, a situation common in walls and ceilings, may be difficult with a monocular Structure from Motion system. We propose a Semantic Room Wireframe Detection task to predict a Semantic Wireframe from a single perspective image. Such predictions may be used with shape priors to estimate the Room Layout and aid reconstruction. To train and test the proposed algorithm we create a new set of annotations from the simulated Structured3D dataset. We show qualitatively that the SRW-Net handles complex room geometries better than previous Room Layout Estimation algorithms while quantitatively out-performing the baseline in non-semantic Wireframe Detection.
summary: Reconstruction of indoor surfaces with limited texture information or with repeated textures, a situation common in walls and ceilings, may be difficult with a monocular Structure from Motion system. We propose a Semantic Room Wireframe Detection task to predict a Semantic Wireframe from a single perspective image. Such predictions may be used with shape priors to estimate the Room Layout and aid reconstruction. To train and test the proposed algorithm we create a new set of annotations from the simulated Structured3D dataset. We show qualitatively that the SRW-Net handles complex room geometries better than previous Room Layout Estimation algorithms while quantitatively out-performing the baseline in non-semantic Wireframe Detection.
abstract_zh: 使用运动系统的单目结构重建具有有限纹理信息或重复纹理的室内表面（墙壁和天花板中常见的情况）可能很困难。我们提出了语义房间线框检测任务来从单个透视图像预测语义线框。此类预测可以与形状先验一起使用来估计房间布局并帮助重建。为了训练和测试所提出的算法，我们从模拟的 Structured3D 数据集中创建了一组新的注释。我们定性地表明，SRW-Net 比以前的房间布局估计算法更好地处理复杂的房间几何形状，同时在非语义线框检测中定量地优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单视角图像预测语义房间线框的新任务，用于辅助室内场景重建。
AI.motivation: 传统单目视觉系统在纹理稀疏或重复的室内表面（如墙壁、天花板）重建中表现不足，需结合语义信息提升布局估计准确性。
AI.method: 设计SRW-Net网络模型，结合Structured3D数据集生成的语义线框标注，利用形状先验知识估计房间布局。
AI.result: 在复杂几何场景中优于现有房间布局算法，非语义线框检测指标超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义线框检测方法通过融合几何与语义信息，可有效提升室内场景重建质量，为相关应用提供新思路。

search_text: Semantic Room Wireframe Detection from a Single View 从单一视图进行语义室线框检测 Reconstruction of indoor surfaces with limited texture information or with repeated textures, a situation common in walls and ceilings, may be difficult with a monocular Structure from Motion system. We propose a Semantic Room Wireframe Detection task to predict a Semantic Wireframe from a single perspective image. Such predictions may be used with shape priors to estimate the Room Layout and aid reconstruction. To train and test the proposed algorithm we create a new set of annotations from the simulated Structured3D dataset. We show qualitatively that the SRW-Net handles complex room geometries better than previous Room Layout Estimation algorithms while quantitatively out-performing the baseline in non-semantic Wireframe Detection. 使用运动系统的单目结构重建具有有限纹理信息或重复纹理的室内表面（墙壁和天花板中常见的情况）可能很困难。我们提出了语义房间线框检测任务来从单个透视图像预测语义线框。此类预测可以与形状先验一起使用来估计房间布局并帮助重建。为了训练和测试所提出的算法，我们从模拟的 Structured3D 数据集中创建了一组新的注释。我们定性地表明，SRW-Net 比以前的房间布局估计算法更好地处理复杂的房间几何形状，同时在非语义线框检测中定量地优于基线。 本文提出一种从单视角图像预测语义房间线框的新任务，用于辅助室内场景重建。 David Gillsjö,Gabrielle Flood,Kalle Åström cs.CV

title: Attack-Agnostic Adversarial Detection
title_zh: 与攻击无关的对抗性检测
abstract: The growing number of adversarial attacks in recent years gives attackers an advantage over defenders, as defenders must train detectors after knowing the types of attacks, and many models need to be maintained to ensure good performance in detecting any upcoming attacks. We propose a way to end the tug-of-war between attackers and defenders by treating adversarial attack detection as an anomaly detection problem so that the detector is agnostic to the attack. We quantify the statistical deviation caused by adversarial perturbations in two aspects. The Least Significant Component Feature (LSCF) quantifies the deviation of adversarial examples from the statistics of benign samples and Hessian Feature (HF) reflects how adversarial examples distort the landscape of the model's optima by measuring the local loss curvature. Empirical results show that our method can achieve an overall ROC AUC of 94.9%, 89.7%, and 94.6% on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and SVHN, respectively, and has comparable performance to adversarial detectors trained with adversarial examples on most of the attacks.
summary: The growing number of adversarial attacks in recent years gives attackers an advantage over defenders, as defenders must train detectors after knowing the types of attacks, and many models need to be maintained to ensure good performance in detecting any upcoming attacks. We propose a way to end the tug-of-war between attackers and defenders by treating adversarial attack detection as an anomaly detection problem so that the detector is agnostic to the attack. We quantify the statistical deviation caused by adversarial perturbations in two aspects. The Least Significant Component Feature (LSCF) quantifies the deviation of adversarial examples from the statistics of benign samples and Hessian Feature (HF) reflects how adversarial examples distort the landscape of the model's optima by measuring the local loss curvature. Empirical results show that our method can achieve an overall ROC AUC of 94.9%, 89.7%, and 94.6% on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and SVHN, respectively, and has comparable performance to adversarial detectors trained with adversarial examples on most of the attacks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，对抗性攻击数量的不断增加使攻击者比防御者更具优势，因为防御者必须在了解攻击类型后训练检测器，并且需要维护许多模型以确保在检测任何即将到来的攻击时具有良好的性能。我们提出了一种结束攻击者和防御者之间拉锯战的方法，将对抗性攻击检测视为异常检测问题，以便检测器对攻击不可知。我们从两个方面量化对抗性扰动引起的统计偏差。最小显着分量特征 (LSCF) 量化了对抗性示例与良性样本统计数据的偏差，Hessian 特征 (HF) 反映了对抗性示例如何通过测量局部损失曲率来扭曲模型最优的景观。实证结果表明，我们的方法可以在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 SVHN 上分别实现 94.9%、89.7% 和 94.6% 的总体 ROC AUC，并且在大多数攻击中与使用对抗性示例训练的对抗性检测器具有相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需针对特定攻击类型的对抗样本检测方法，通过将对抗检测转化为异常检测问题，提升检测器的通用性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗检测需针对已知攻击类型训练模型，维护成本高且难以应对新型攻击，亟需一种通用检测方案。
AI.method: 通过量化对抗扰动引发的统计偏差，提出两个指标：LSCF衡量对抗样本与正常样本的统计偏离，HF通过损失曲率反映对抗样本对模型最优解的影响。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/CIFAR100/SVHN数据集上分别达到94.9%/89.7%/94.6%的ROC AUC，性能与基于对抗样本训练的检测器相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需预知攻击类型即可实现高精度检测，在多个基准数据集上验证了其有效性与实用性。
