title: Co-creation and ownership for AI radio
title_zh: AI 广播的共同创建和所有权
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in AI-generated music open the door for new forms for co-creation and co-creativity. We present Artificial$.\!$fm, a proof-of-concept casual creator that blends AI-music generation, subjective ratings, and personalized recommendation for the creation and curation of AI-generated music. Listeners can rate emergent songs to steer the evolution of future music. They can also personalize their preferences to better navigate the possibility space. As a "slow creator" with many human stakeholders, Artificial$.\!$fm is an example of how casual creators can leverage human curation at scale to collectively navigate a possibility space. It also provides a case study to reflect on how ownership should be considered in these contexts. We report on the design and development of Artificial$.\!$fm, and provide a legal analysis on the ownership of artifacts generated on the platform.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in AI-generated music open the door for new forms for co-creation and co-creativity. We present Artificial$.\!$fm, a proof-of-concept casual creator that blends AI-music generation, subjective ratings, and personalized recommendation for the creation and curation of AI-generated music. Listeners can rate emergent songs to steer the evolution of future music. They can also personalize their preferences to better navigate the possibility space. As a "slow creator" with many human stakeholders, Artificial$.\!$fm is an example of how casual creators can leverage human curation at scale to collectively navigate a possibility space. It also provides a case study to reflect on how ownership should be considered in these contexts. We report on the design and development of Artificial$.\!$fm, and provide a legal analysis on the ownership of artifacts generated on the platform.
abstract_zh: 人工智能生成音乐的最新突破为共同创造和共同创造力的新形式打开了大门。我们推出Artificial$.\!$fm，这是一款概念验证的休闲创作者，它融合了人工智能音乐生成、主观评分和个性化推荐，用于创作和管理人工智能生成的音乐。听众可以对新兴歌曲进行评分，以引导未来音乐的演变。他们还可以个性化自己的偏好，以更好地驾驭可能性空间。作为一个拥有许多人类利益相关者的“慢速创作者”，Artificial$.\!$fm 是休闲创作者如何大规模利用人类管理来共同探索可能性空间的一个例子。它还提供了一个案例研究，以反思在这些背景下应如何考虑所有权。我们报告Artificial$.\!$fm的设计和开发，并对平台上生成的工件的所有权提供法律分析。

AI.tldr: 设计AI音乐共创平台并探讨其所有权问题
AI.motivation: AI生成音乐技术进步促使共创新形式，但需解决所有权问题
AI.method: 开发结合AI生成、用户评分和推荐系统的平台，并进行法律分析
AI.result: 展示了平台设计及所有权法律分析结果
AI.conclusion: 验证了用户驱动共创的可行性，并强调明确所有权的重要性

authors_text: Pierre Schumacher,Daniel Häufle,Dieter Büchler,Syn Schmitt,Georg Martius
title: DEP-RL: Embodied Exploration for Reinforcement Learning in Overactuated and Musculoskeletal Systems
title_zh: DEP-RL：过度驱动和肌肉骨骼系统中强化学习的具体探索
abstract: Muscle-actuated organisms are capable of learning an unparalleled diversity of dexterous movements despite their vast amount of muscles. Reinforcement learning (RL) on large musculoskeletal models, however, has not been able to show similar performance. We conjecture that ineffective exploration in large overactuated action spaces is a key problem. This is supported by the finding that common exploration noise strategies are inadequate in synthetic examples of overactuated systems. We identify differential extrinsic plasticity (DEP), a method from the domain of self-organization, as being able to induce state-space covering exploration within seconds of interaction. By integrating DEP into RL, we achieve fast learning of reaching and locomotion in musculoskeletal systems, outperforming current approaches in all considered tasks in sample efficiency and robustness.
summary: Muscle-actuated organisms are capable of learning an unparalleled diversity of dexterous movements despite their vast amount of muscles. Reinforcement learning (RL) on large musculoskeletal models, however, has not been able to show similar performance. We conjecture that ineffective exploration in large overactuated action spaces is a key problem. This is supported by the finding that common exploration noise strategies are inadequate in synthetic examples of overactuated systems. We identify differential extrinsic plasticity (DEP), a method from the domain of self-organization, as being able to induce state-space covering exploration within seconds of interaction. By integrating DEP into RL, we achieve fast learning of reaching and locomotion in musculoskeletal systems, outperforming current approaches in all considered tasks in sample efficiency and robustness.
abstract_zh: 尽管肌肉驱动的生物体拥有大量肌肉，但它们仍能够学习无与伦比的多种灵巧运动。然而，大型肌肉骨骼模型上的强化学习（RL）尚未能够表现出类似的性能。我们推测，在大型过度驱动动作空间中的无效探索是一个关键问题。这一发现得到了支持，即常见的探索噪声策略在过驱动系统的综合示例中是不够的。我们确定了微分外在可塑性（DEP），这是一种来自自组织领域的方法，能够在交互的几秒钟内引发状态空间覆盖探索。通过将 DEP 集成到 RL 中，我们实现了肌肉骨骼系统中的到达和运动的快速学习，在样本效率和鲁棒性方面优于所有考虑的任务中的当前方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEP-RL方法，通过结合差分外在可塑性（DEP）与强化学习（RL），解决过度驱动及肌肉骨骼系统中的高效探索问题，提升学习效率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理过度驱动系统时因探索效率低下，难以模拟生物体的多样化运动能力，需改进探索策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 将自组织领域中的差分外在可塑性（DEP）方法整合至强化学习框架，利用其快速覆盖状态空间的特性，优化动作空间探索过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，DEP-RL在肌肉骨骼系统的抓取与运动任务中，相较现有方法显著提升样本效率与鲁棒性，且能在数秒内实现有效探索。
AI.conclusion: DEP-RL通过引入DEP机制，有效解决了RL在复杂系统中的探索瓶颈，为高维动作空间的学习提供了新思路与方法。

search_text: DEP-RL: Embodied Exploration for Reinforcement Learning in Overactuated and Musculoskeletal Systems DEP-RL：过度驱动和肌肉骨骼系统中强化学习的具体探索 Muscle-actuated organisms are capable of learning an unparalleled diversity of dexterous movements despite their vast amount of muscles. Reinforcement learning (RL) on large musculoskeletal models, however, has not been able to show similar performance. We conjecture that ineffective exploration in large overactuated action spaces is a key problem. This is supported by the finding that common exploration noise strategies are inadequate in synthetic examples of overactuated systems. We identify differential extrinsic plasticity (DEP), a method from the domain of self-organization, as being able to induce state-space covering exploration within seconds of interaction. By integrating DEP into RL, we achieve fast learning of reaching and locomotion in musculoskeletal systems, outperforming current approaches in all considered tasks in sample efficiency and robustness. 尽管肌肉驱动的生物体拥有大量肌肉，但它们仍能够学习无与伦比的多种灵巧运动。然而，大型肌肉骨骼模型上的强化学习（RL）尚未能够表现出类似的性能。我们推测，在大型过度驱动动作空间中的无效探索是一个关键问题。这一发现得到了支持，即常见的探索噪声策略在过驱动系统的综合示例中是不够的。我们确定了微分外在可塑性（DEP），这是一种来自自组织领域的方法，能够在交互的几秒钟内引发状态空间覆盖探索。通过将 DEP 集成到 RL 中，我们实现了肌肉骨骼系统中的到达和运动的快速学习，在样本效率和鲁棒性方面优于所有考虑的任务中的当前方法。 本文提出DEP-RL方法，通过结合差分外在可塑性（DEP）与强化学习（RL），解决过度驱动及肌肉骨骼系统中的高效探索问题，提升学习效率与鲁棒性。 Pierre Schumacher,Daniel Häufle,Dieter Büchler,Syn Schmitt,Georg Martius cs.RO,cs.LG

title: Where are my Neighbors? Exploiting Patches Relations in Self-Supervised Vision Transformer
title_zh: 我的邻居在哪里？利用自监督视觉变压器中的补丁关系
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) enabled the use of the transformer architecture on vision tasks showing impressive performances when trained on big datasets. However, on relatively small datasets, ViTs are less accurate given their lack of inductive bias. To this end, we propose a simple but still effective Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) strategy to train ViTs, that without any external annotation or external data, can significantly improve the results. Specifically, we define a set of SSL tasks based on relations of image patches that the model has to solve before or jointly the supervised task. Differently from ViT, our RelViT model optimizes all the output tokens of the transformer encoder that are related to the image patches, thus exploiting more training signals at each training step. We investigated our methods on several image benchmarks finding that RelViT improves the SSL state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, especially on small datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/guglielmocamporese/relvit.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) enabled the use of the transformer architecture on vision tasks showing impressive performances when trained on big datasets. However, on relatively small datasets, ViTs are less accurate given their lack of inductive bias. To this end, we propose a simple but still effective Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) strategy to train ViTs, that without any external annotation or external data, can significantly improve the results. Specifically, we define a set of SSL tasks based on relations of image patches that the model has to solve before or jointly the supervised task. Differently from ViT, our RelViT model optimizes all the output tokens of the transformer encoder that are related to the image patches, thus exploiting more training signals at each training step. We investigated our methods on several image benchmarks finding that RelViT improves the SSL state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, especially on small datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/guglielmocamporese/relvit.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViTs) 允许在视觉任务中使用变压器架构，在大数据集上进行训练时显示出令人印象深刻的性能。然而，在相对较小的数据集上，由于缺乏归纳偏差，ViT 的准确度较低。为此，我们提出了一种简单但仍然有效的自监督学习（SSL）策略来训练 ViT，无需任何外部注释或外部数据，就可以显着改善结果。具体来说，我们根据图像块的关系定义了一组 SSL 任务，模型必须在监督任务之前或联合解决这些任务。与 ViT 不同，我们的 RelViT 模型优化了与图像块相关的 Transformer 编码器的所有输出标记，从而在每个训练步骤中利用更多的训练信号。我们在多个图像基准测试中研究了我们的方法，发现 RelViT 大幅改进了 SSL 最先进的方法，尤其是在小型数据集上。代码位于：https://github.com/guglielmocamporese/relvit。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法RelViT，通过利用图像块之间的关系来提升视觉Transformer在小数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在大型数据集上表现优异，但在小数据集上因缺乏归纳偏置而效果不佳，需设计无需外部数据的自监督学习策略以增强模型表现。
AI.method: 定义基于图像块关系的自监督任务，优化与图像块相关的所有Transformer编码器输出标记，通过联合训练提升模型学习效率。
AI.result: RelViT在多个图像基准测试中显著超越现有自监督方法，尤其在小数据集上提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘图像块间关系，RelViT有效增强了视觉Transformer的自监督学习能力，为小数据场景提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Yuri Nakao,Lorenzo Strappelli,Simone Stumpf,Aisha Naseer,Daniele Regoli,Giulia Del Gamba
title: Towards Responsible AI: A Design Space Exploration of Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence User Interfaces to Investigate Fairness
title_zh: 迈向负责任的人工智能：以人为中心的人工智能用户界面的设计空间探索以调查公平性
comment: 44 pages, 17 figures, the draft of a paper on International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction
comments: 44 pages, 17 figures, the draft of a paper on International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction
abstract: With Artificial intelligence (AI) to aid or automate decision-making advancing rapidly, a particular concern is its fairness. In order to create reliable, safe and trustworthy systems through human-centred artificial intelligence (HCAI) design, recent efforts have produced user interfaces (UIs) for AI experts to investigate the fairness of AI models. In this work, we provide a design space exploration that supports not only data scientists but also domain experts to investigate AI fairness. Using loan applications as an example, we held a series of workshops with loan officers and data scientists to elicit their requirements. We instantiated these requirements into FairHIL, a UI to support human-in-the-loop fairness investigations, and describe how this UI could be generalized to other use cases. We evaluated FairHIL through a think-aloud user study. Our work contributes better designs to investigate an AI model's fairness-and move closer towards responsible AI.
summary: With Artificial intelligence (AI) to aid or automate decision-making advancing rapidly, a particular concern is its fairness. In order to create reliable, safe and trustworthy systems through human-centred artificial intelligence (HCAI) design, recent efforts have produced user interfaces (UIs) for AI experts to investigate the fairness of AI models. In this work, we provide a design space exploration that supports not only data scientists but also domain experts to investigate AI fairness. Using loan applications as an example, we held a series of workshops with loan officers and data scientists to elicit their requirements. We instantiated these requirements into FairHIL, a UI to support human-in-the-loop fairness investigations, and describe how this UI could be generalized to other use cases. We evaluated FairHIL through a think-aloud user study. Our work contributes better designs to investigate an AI model's fairness-and move closer towards responsible AI.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）辅助或自动化决策的快速发展，人们特别关心的是它的公平性。为了通过以人为本的人工智能（HCAI）设计创建可靠、安全和值得信赖的系统，最近的努力已经为人工智能专家创建了用户界面（UI），以调查人工智能模型的公平性。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种设计空间探索，不仅支持数据科学家，还支持领域专家调查人工智能公平性。以贷款申请为例，我们与信贷员和数据科学家举办了一系列研讨会，以了解他们的需求。我们将这些要求实例化到 FairHIL（一个支持人机交互公平性调查的 UI）中，并描述了如何将此 UI 推广到其他用例。我们通过有声思考用户研究评估了 FairHIL。我们的工作提供了更好的设计来调查人工智能模型的公平性，并朝着负责任的人工智能迈进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以人为中心的人工智能用户界面设计框架，用于支持领域专家和数据科学家共同探讨AI模型的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI决策系统的普及，其公平性问题日益受到关注。现有工具主要面向数据科学家，缺乏支持领域专家参与公平性分析的交互设计，难以实现负责任的AI目标。
AI.method: 通过贷款审批场景的多轮工作坊收集贷款官与数据科学家需求，构建支持人机协作的FairHIL交互界面，并采用思考出声法进行用户研究验证。
AI.result: 验证了FairHIL界面能有效支持跨领域专家协同分析AI公平性，发现不同专业背景用户对公平性指标的关注点存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为空间探索提供了可推广的交互范式，通过整合领域知识与技术视角，有助于推动更负责任的AI系统开发。

motivation: 随着AI决策系统的普及，其公平性问题日益受到关注。现有工具主要面向数据科学家，缺乏支持领域专家参与公平性分析的交互设计，难以实现负责任的AI目标。
method: 通过贷款审批场景的多轮工作坊收集贷款官与数据科学家需求，构建支持人机协作的FairHIL交互界面，并采用思考出声法进行用户研究验证。
result: 验证了FairHIL界面能有效支持跨领域专家协同分析AI公平性，发现不同专业背景用户对公平性指标的关注点存在显著差异。
conclusion: 该设计为空间探索提供了可推广的交互范式，通过整合领域知识与技术视角，有助于推动更负责任的AI系统开发。
search_text: Towards Responsible AI: A Design Space Exploration of Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence User Interfaces to Investigate Fairness 迈向负责任的人工智能：以人为中心的人工智能用户界面的设计空间探索以调查公平性 With Artificial intelligence (AI) to aid or automate decision-making advancing rapidly, a particular concern is its fairness. In order to create reliable, safe and trustworthy systems through human-centred artificial intelligence (HCAI) design, recent efforts have produced user interfaces (UIs) for AI experts to investigate the fairness of AI models. In this work, we provide a design space exploration that supports not only data scientists but also domain experts to investigate AI fairness. Using loan applications as an example, we held a series of workshops with loan officers and data scientists to elicit their requirements. We instantiated these requirements into FairHIL, a UI to support human-in-the-loop fairness investigations, and describe how this UI could be generalized to other use cases. We evaluated FairHIL through a think-aloud user study. Our work contributes better designs to investigate an AI model's fairness-and move closer towards responsible AI. 随着人工智能（AI）辅助或自动化决策的快速发展，人们特别关心的是它的公平性。为了通过以人为本的人工智能（HCAI）设计创建可靠、安全和值得信赖的系统，最近的努力已经为人工智能专家创建了用户界面（UI），以调查人工智能模型的公平性。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种设计空间探索，不仅支持数据科学家，还支持领域专家调查人工智能公平性。以贷款申请为例，我们与信贷员和数据科学家举办了一系列研讨会，以了解他们的需求。我们将这些要求实例化到 FairHIL（一个支持人机交互公平性调查的 UI）中，并描述了如何将此 UI 推广到其他用例。我们通过有声思考用户研究评估了 FairHIL。我们的工作提供了更好的设计来调查人工智能模型的公平性，并朝着负责任的人工智能迈进。 本文提出一种以人为中心的人工智能用户界面设计框架，用于支持领域专家和数据科学家共同探讨AI模型的公平性问题。 Yuri Nakao,Lorenzo Strappelli,Simone Stumpf,Aisha Naseer,Daniele Regoli,Giulia Del Gamba cs.AI,cs.HC

title: Augmentation Component Analysis: Modeling Similarity via the Augmentation Overlaps
title_zh: 增强成分分析：通过增强重叠建模相似性
abstract: Self-supervised learning aims to learn a embedding space where semantically similar samples are close. Contrastive learning methods pull views of samples together and push different samples away, which utilizes semantic invariance of augmentation but ignores the relationship between samples. To better exploit the power of augmentation, we observe that semantically similar samples are more likely to have similar augmented views. Therefore, we can take the augmented views as a special description of a sample. In this paper, we model such a description as the augmentation distribution and we call it augmentation feature. The similarity in augmentation feature reflects how much the views of two samples overlap and is related to their semantical similarity. Without computational burdens to explicitly estimate values of the augmentation feature, we propose Augmentation Component Analysis (ACA) with a contrastive-like loss to learn principal components and an on-the-fly projection loss to embed data. ACA equals an efficient dimension reduction by PCA and extracts low-dimensional embeddings, theoretically preserving the similarity of augmentation distribution between samples. Empirical results show our method can achieve competitive results against various traditional contrastive learning methods on different benchmarks.
summary: Self-supervised learning aims to learn a embedding space where semantically similar samples are close. Contrastive learning methods pull views of samples together and push different samples away, which utilizes semantic invariance of augmentation but ignores the relationship between samples. To better exploit the power of augmentation, we observe that semantically similar samples are more likely to have similar augmented views. Therefore, we can take the augmented views as a special description of a sample. In this paper, we model such a description as the augmentation distribution and we call it augmentation feature. The similarity in augmentation feature reflects how much the views of two samples overlap and is related to their semantical similarity. Without computational burdens to explicitly estimate values of the augmentation feature, we propose Augmentation Component Analysis (ACA) with a contrastive-like loss to learn principal components and an on-the-fly projection loss to embed data. ACA equals an efficient dimension reduction by PCA and extracts low-dimensional embeddings, theoretically preserving the similarity of augmentation distribution between samples. Empirical results show our method can achieve competitive results against various traditional contrastive learning methods on different benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习旨在学习语义相似样本接近的嵌入空间。对比学习方法将样本的视图拉在一起并将不同的样本推开，它利用了增强的语义不变性，但忽略了样本之间的关系。为了更好地利用增强的力量，我们观察到语义相似的样本更有可能具有相似的增强视图。因此，我们可以将增强视图作为对样本的特殊描述。在本文中，我们将这种描述建模为增强分布，并将其称为增强特征。增强特征的相似度反映了两个样本的视图重叠程度，并且与它们的语义相似度有关。由于没有计算负担来明确估计增强特征的值，我们提出了增强分量分析（ACA），它具有用于学习主成分的类对比损失和用于嵌入数据的动态投影损失。 ACA相当于PCA的有效降维并提取低维嵌入，理论上保留了样本之间增强分布的相似性。实证结果表明，我们的方法可以在不同的基准上取得与各种传统对比学习方法竞争的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Augmentation Component Analysis (ACA)的方法，通过建模增强重叠来学习样本的嵌入表示，以提升自监督学习中语义相似性的表征能力。
AI.motivation: 对比学习方法虽利用增强不变性，但忽视了样本间增强视图的关系，而语义相似样本的增强视图更可能相似，因此需建模增强分布以捕捉这种关联。
AI.method: 通过将增强视图建模为样本的增强特征分布，设计ACA方法，结合对比似损失学习主成分，并使用实时投影损失嵌入数据，理论保留增强分布相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明，ACA在多个基准测试中表现优于传统对比学习方法，且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: ACA通过增强特征分布建模有效捕捉样本相似性，在保持效率的同时实现了竞争力的表征学习效果。

authors_text: Naiyu Gao,Fei He,Jian Jia,Yanhu Shan,Haoyang Zhang,Xin Zhao,Kaiqi Huang
title: PanopticDepth: A Unified Framework for Depth-aware Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: PanopticDepth：深度感知全景分割的统一框架
abstract: This paper presents a unified framework for depth-aware panoptic segmentation (DPS), which aims to reconstruct 3D scene with instance-level semantics from one single image. Prior works address this problem by simply adding a dense depth regression head to panoptic segmentation (PS) networks, resulting in two independent task branches. This neglects the mutually-beneficial relations between these two tasks, thus failing to exploit handy instance-level semantic cues to boost depth accuracy while also producing sub-optimal depth maps. To overcome these limitations, we propose a unified framework for the DPS task by applying a dynamic convolution technique to both the PS and depth prediction tasks. Specifically, instead of predicting depth for all pixels at a time, we generate instance-specific kernels to predict depth and segmentation masks for each instance. Moreover, leveraging the instance-wise depth estimation scheme, we add additional instance-level depth cues to assist with supervising the depth learning via a new depth loss. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes-DPS and SemKITTI-DPS show the effectiveness and promise of our method. We hope our unified solution to DPS can lead a new paradigm in this area. Code is available at https://github.com/NaiyuGao/PanopticDepth.
summary: This paper presents a unified framework for depth-aware panoptic segmentation (DPS), which aims to reconstruct 3D scene with instance-level semantics from one single image. Prior works address this problem by simply adding a dense depth regression head to panoptic segmentation (PS) networks, resulting in two independent task branches. This neglects the mutually-beneficial relations between these two tasks, thus failing to exploit handy instance-level semantic cues to boost depth accuracy while also producing sub-optimal depth maps. To overcome these limitations, we propose a unified framework for the DPS task by applying a dynamic convolution technique to both the PS and depth prediction tasks. Specifically, instead of predicting depth for all pixels at a time, we generate instance-specific kernels to predict depth and segmentation masks for each instance. Moreover, leveraging the instance-wise depth estimation scheme, we add additional instance-level depth cues to assist with supervising the depth learning via a new depth loss. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes-DPS and SemKITTI-DPS show the effectiveness and promise of our method. We hope our unified solution to DPS can lead a new paradigm in this area. Code is available at https://github.com/NaiyuGao/PanopticDepth.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种深度感知全景分割 (DPS) 的统一框架，旨在从单个图像中重建具有实例级语义的 3D 场景。先前的工作通过简单地向全景分割（PS）网络添加密集深度回归头来解决这个问题，从而产生两个独立的任务分支。这忽略了这两个任务之间的互利关系，因此无法利用方便的实例级语义线索来提高深度准确性，同时还生成次优的深度图。为了克服这些限制，我们通过将动态卷积技术应用于 PS 和深度预测任务，提出了 DPS 任务的统一框架。具体来说，我们不是一次预测所有像素的深度，而是生成特定于实例的内核来预测每个实例的深度和分割掩模。此外，利用实例级深度估计方案，我们添加了额外的实例级深度线索，以通过新的深度损失来协助监督深度学习。在 Cityscapes-DPS 和 SemKITTI-DPS 上进行的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性和前景。我们希望我们的统一 DPS 解决方案能够在该领域引领新的范例。代码可在 https://github.com/NaiyuGao/PanopticDepth 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的深度感知全景分割框架，旨在通过单张图像重建具有实例级语义的3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过在全景分割网络中添加深度回归分支，忽略了分割与深度预测任务间的相互促进关系，导致深度准确性不足且分割结果次优。
AI.method: 采用动态卷积技术，为每个实例生成特定内核以联合预测深度和分割掩码，并引入实例级深度线索设计新型深度损失函数。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes-DPS和SemKITTI-DPS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在深度估计和全景分割任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一框架为深度感知全景分割任务提供了新范式，未来可进一步探索多模态感知的协同优化。

Extensive experiments on Cityscapes-DPS and SemKITTI-DPS show the effectiveness and promise of our method. We hope our unified solution to DPS can lead a new paradigm in this area. authors_text: Bangwei Guo,Xingyu Li,Miaomiao Yang,Hong Zhang,Xu Steven Xu
title: A robust and lightweight deep attention multiple instance learning algorithm for predicting genetic alterations
title_zh: 一种用于预测遗传改变的稳健且轻量级的深度关注多实例学习算法
abstract: Deep-learning models based on whole-slide digital pathology images (WSIs) become increasingly popular for predicting molecular biomarkers. Instance-based models has been the mainstream strategy for predicting genetic alterations using WSIs although bag-based models along with self-attention mechanism-based algorithms have been proposed for other digital pathology applications. In this paper, we proposed a novel Attention-based Multiple Instance Mutation Learning (AMIML) model for predicting gene mutations. AMIML was comprised of successive 1-D convolutional layers, a decoder, and a residual weight connection to facilitate further integration of a lightweight attention mechanism to detect the most predictive image patches. Using data for 24 clinically relevant genes from four cancer cohorts in The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) studies (UCEC, BRCA, GBM and KIRC), we compared AMIML with one popular instance-based model and four recently published bag-based models (e.g., CHOWDER, HE2RNA, etc.). AMIML demonstrated excellent robustness, not only outperforming all the five baseline algorithms in the vast majority of the tested genes (17 out of 24), but also providing near-best-performance for the other seven genes. Conversely, the performance of the baseline published algorithms varied across different cancers/genes. In addition, compared to the published models for genetic alterations, AMIML provided a significant improvement for predicting a wide range of genes (e.g., KMT2C, TP53, and SETD2 for KIRC; ERBB2, BRCA1, and BRCA2 for BRCA; JAK1, POLE, and MTOR for UCEC) as well as produced outstanding predictive models for other clinically relevant gene mutations, which have not been reported in the current literature. Furthermore, with the flexible and interpretable attention-based MIL pooling mechanism, AMIML could further zero-in and detect predictive image patches.

AMIML was comprised of successive 1-D convolutional layers, a decoder, and a residual weight connection to facilitate further integration of a lightweight attention mechanism to detect the most predictive image patches. Using data for 24 clinically relevant genes from four cancer cohorts in The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) studies (UCEC, BRCA, GBM and KIRC), we compared AMIML with one popular instance-based model and four recently published bag-based models (e.g., CHOWDER, HE2RNA, etc.). AMIML demonstrated excellent robustness, not only outperforming all the five baseline algorithms in the vast majority of the tested genes (17 out of 24), but also providing near-best-performance for the other seven genes. Conversely, the performance of the baseline published algorithms varied across different cancers/genes. In addition, compared to the published models for genetic alterations, AMIML provided a significant improvement for predicting a wide range of genes (e.g., KMT2C, TP53, and SETD2 for KIRC; ERBB2, BRCA1, and BRCA2 for BRCA; JAK1, POLE, and MTOR for UCEC) as well as produced outstanding predictive models for other clinically relevant gene mutations, which have not been reported in the current literature. Furthermore, with the flexible and interpretable attention-based MIL pooling mechanism, AMIML could further zero-in and detect predictive image patches.
abstract_zh: 基于全幻灯片数字病理图像 (WSI) 的深度学习模型在预测分子生物标志物方面变得越来越流行。基于实例的模型一直是使用 WSI 预测遗传改变的主流策略，尽管基于包的模型以及基于自注意力机制的算法已被提出用于其他数字病理学应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于注意力的多实例突变学习（AMIML）模型来预测基因突变。 AMIML 由连续的一维卷积层、解码器和残差权重连接组成，以促进轻量级注意力机制的进一步集成，以检测最具预测性的图像块。使用来自癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 研究中四个癌症队列（UCEC、BRCA、GBM 和 KIRC）的 24 个临床相关基因的数据，我们将 AMIML 与一种流行的基于实例的模型和四个最近发布的基于包的模型（例如 CHOWDER、HE2RNA 等）进行了比较。 AMIML 表现出出色的鲁棒性，不仅在绝大多数测试基因（24 个基因中的 17 个）中优于所有五种基线算法，而且还为其他 7 个基因提供了接近最佳的性能。相反，已发布的基线算法的性能因不同的癌症/基因而异。此外，与已发表的基因改变模型相比，AMIML 在预测各种基因（例如 KIRC 的 KMT2C、TP53 和 SETD2；BRCA 的 ERBB2、BRCA1 和 BRCA2；UCEC 的 JAK1、POLE 和 MTOR）方面提供了显着的改进，并为其他临床相关基因突变提供了出色的预测模型，这些突变在当前文献中尚未报道。此外，借助灵活且可解释的基于注意力的 MIL 池化机制，AMIML 可以进一步归零并检测预测图像块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度注意力机制的多重实例学习算法AMIML，用于预测基因突变，通过分析全切片数字病理图像（WSIs）提高分子生物标志物预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于实例的模型在预测基因改变时存在性能波动，而基于包的模型和自注意力机制在其他病理应用中表现优异。本文旨在开发一种更稳健、轻量化的模型以提升跨癌症类型和基因的预测能力。
AI.method: 设计AMIML模型，包含1-D卷积层、解码器和残差连接，结合轻量级注意力机制筛选关键图像区域，并在TCGA数据库的24个基因数据上进行验证。
AI.result: AMIML在17个基因中优于所有基线模型，在其余7个基因中表现接近最优。显著提升了KIRC、BRCA、UCEC等癌症相关基因（如TP53、ERBB2）的预测性能，并实现了可解释的注意力机制。
AI.conclusion: AMIML通过注意力驱动的多重实例学习框架，在基因突变预测任务中展现出更高的鲁棒性和跨癌症泛化能力，为病理图像分析提供了新的技术路径。

title: Towards Context-Aware Neural Performance-Score Synchronisation
title_zh: 迈向上下文感知神经性能分数同步
comment: PhD Thesis, Queen Mary University of London (190 pages)
comments: PhD Thesis, Queen Mary University of London (190 pages)
abstract: Music can be represented in multiple forms, such as in the audio form as a recording of a performance, in the symbolic form as a computer readable score, or in the image form as a scan of the sheet music. Music synchronisation provides a way to navigate among multiple representations of music in a unified manner by generating an accurate mapping between them, lending itself applicable to a myriad of domains like music education, performance analysis, automatic accompaniment and music editing. Traditional synchronisation methods compute alignment using knowledge-driven and stochastic approaches, typically employing handcrafted features. These methods are often unable to generalise well to different instruments, acoustic environments and recording conditions, and normally assume complete structural agreement between the performances and the scores. This PhD furthers the development of performance-score synchronisation research by proposing data-driven, context-aware alignment approaches, on three fronts: Firstly, I replace the handcrafted features by employing a metric learning based approach that is adaptable to different acoustic settings and performs well in data-scarce conditions. Secondly, I address the handling of structural differences between the performances and scores, which is a common limitation of standard alignment methods. Finally, I eschew the reliance on both feature engineering and dynamic programming, and propose a completely data-driven synchronisation method that computes alignments using a neural framework, whilst also being robust to structural differences between the performances and scores.

This PhD furthers the development of performance-score synchronisation research by proposing data-driven, context-aware alignment approaches, on three fronts: Firstly, I replace the handcrafted features by employing a metric learning based approach that is adaptable to different acoustic settings and performs well in data-scarce conditions. Finally, I eschew the reliance on both feature engineering and dynamic programming, and propose a completely data-driven synchronisation method that computes alignments using a neural framework, whilst also being robust to structural differences between the performances and scores.
abstract_zh: 音乐可以以多种形式表示，例如以音频形式作为表演录音，以符号形式作为计算机可读乐谱，或者以图像形式作为乐谱的扫描。音乐同步提供了一种通过在音乐的多种表示之间生成准确的映射以统一的方式在它们之间导航的方法，使其适用于音乐教育、演奏分析、自动伴奏和音乐编辑等众多领域。传统的同步方法使用知识驱动和随机方法来计算对齐，通常采​​用手工制作的特征。这些方法通常无法很好地推广到不同的乐器、声学环境和录音条件，并且通常假设演奏和乐谱之间结构完全一致。该博士通过在三个方面提出数据驱动、上下文感知的对齐方法，进一步发展了性能分数同步研究：首先，我通过采用基于度量学习的方法来取代手工制作的特征，该方法能够适应不同的声学设置，并在数据稀缺的条件下表现良好。其次，我解决了性能和分数之间结构差异的处理，这是标准对齐方法的常见限制。最后，我避免了对特征工程和动态编程的依赖，并提出了一种完全数据驱动的同步方法，该方法使用神经框架计算对齐，同时对性能和分数之间的结构差异也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出数据驱动的上下文感知对齐方法，解决音乐表演与乐谱间的同步问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工特征且无法适应不同乐器、环境及结构差异，需开发更通用的同步技术。
AI.method: 采用度量学习替代手工特征，设计神经网络框架处理结构差异，并摒弃动态规划实现端到端对齐。
AI.result: 方法在数据稀缺场景下表现优异，有效处理表演与乐谱间的结构性差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的上下文感知神经同步方法提升了跨模态音乐对齐的鲁棒性与适应性。

Music synchronisation provides a way to navigate among multiple representations of music in a unified manner by generating an accurate mapping between them, lending itself applicable to a myriad of domains like music education, performance analysis, automatic accompaniment and music editing. Traditional synchronisation methods compute alignment using knowledge-driven and stochastic approaches, typically employing handcrafted features. These methods are often unable to generalise well to different instruments, acoustic environments and recording conditions, and normally assume complete structural agreement between the performances and the scores. This PhD furthers the development of performance-score synchronisation research by proposing data-driven, context-aware alignment approaches, on three fronts: Firstly, I replace the handcrafted features by employing a metric learning based approach that is adaptable to different acoustic settings and performs well in data-scarce conditions. Secondly, I address the handling of structural differences between the performances and scores, which is a common limitation of standard alignment methods. Finally, I eschew the reliance on both feature engineering and dynamic programming, and propose a completely data-driven synchronisation method that computes alignments using a neural framework, whilst also being robust to structural differences between the performances and scores. 音乐可以以多种形式表示，例如以音频形式作为表演录音，以符号形式作为计算机可读乐谱，或者以图像形式作为乐谱的扫描。音乐同步提供了一种通过在音乐的多种表示之间生成准确的映射以统一的方式在它们之间导航的方法，使其适用于音乐教育、演奏分析、自动伴奏和音乐编辑等众多领域。传统的同步方法使用知识驱动和随机方法来计算对齐，通常采​​用手工制作的特征。这些方法通常无法很好地推广到不同的乐器、声学环境和录音条件，并且通常假设演奏和乐谱之间结构完全一致。该博士通过在三个方面提出数据驱动、上下文感知的对齐方法，进一步发展了性能分数同步研究：首先，我通过采用基于度量学习的方法来取代手工制作的特征，该方法能够适应不同的声学设置，并在数据稀缺的条件下表现良好。其次，我解决了性能和分数之间结构差异的处理，这是标准对齐方法的常见限制。最后，我避免了对特征工程和动态编程的依赖，并提出了一种完全数据驱动的同步方法，该方法使用神经框架计算对齐，同时对性能和分数之间的结构差异也具有鲁棒性。 本论文提出数据驱动的上下文感知对齐方法，解决音乐表演与乐谱间的同步问题。 Ruchit Agrawal cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bo Xiong,Shichao Zhu,Mojtaba Nayyeri,Chengjin Xu,Shirui Pan,Chuan Zhou,Steffen Staab
title: Ultrahyperbolic Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 超双曲知识图嵌入
abstract: Recent knowledge graph (KG) embeddings have been advanced by hyperbolic geometry due to its superior capability for representing hierarchies. The topological structures of real-world KGs, however, are rather heterogeneous, i.e., a KG is composed of multiple distinct hierarchies and non-hierarchical graph structures. Therefore, a homogeneous (either Euclidean or hyperbolic) geometry is not sufficient for fairly representing such heterogeneous structures. To capture the topological heterogeneity of KGs, we present an ultrahyperbolic KG embedding (UltraE) in an ultrahyperbolic (or pseudo-Riemannian) manifold that seamlessly interleaves hyperbolic and spherical manifolds. In particular, we model each relation as a pseudo-orthogonal transformation that preserves the pseudo-Riemannian bilinear form. The pseudo-orthogonal transformation is decomposed into various operators (i.e., circular rotations, reflections and hyperbolic rotations), allowing for simultaneously modeling heterogeneous structures as well as complex relational patterns. Experimental results on three standard KGs show that UltraE outperforms previous Euclidean- and hyperbolic-based approaches.
summary: Recent knowledge graph (KG) embeddings have been advanced by hyperbolic geometry due to its superior capability for representing hierarchies. The topological structures of real-world KGs, however, are rather heterogeneous, i.e., a KG is composed of multiple distinct hierarchies and non-hierarchical graph structures. Therefore, a homogeneous (either Euclidean or hyperbolic) geometry is not sufficient for fairly representing such heterogeneous structures. To capture the topological heterogeneity of KGs, we present an ultrahyperbolic KG embedding (UltraE) in an ultrahyperbolic (or pseudo-Riemannian) manifold that seamlessly interleaves hyperbolic and spherical manifolds. In particular, we model each relation as a pseudo-orthogonal transformation that preserves the pseudo-Riemannian bilinear form. The pseudo-orthogonal transformation is decomposed into various operators (i.e., circular rotations, reflections and hyperbolic rotations), allowing for simultaneously modeling heterogeneous structures as well as complex relational patterns. Experimental results on three standard KGs show that UltraE outperforms previous Euclidean- and hyperbolic-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于双曲几何具有卓越的表示层次结构的能力，最近的知识图（KG）嵌入得到了改进。然而，现实世界知识图谱的拓扑结构相当异构，即知识图谱由多个不同的层次结构和非层次图结构组成。因此，同质（欧几里得或双曲）几何形状不足以公平地表示这种异质结构。为了捕获 KG 的拓扑异质性，我们在超双曲（或伪黎曼）流形中提出了超双曲 KG 嵌入（UltraE），该流形无缝交错双曲流形和球流形。特别是，我们将每个关系建模为保留伪黎曼双线性形式的伪正交变换。伪正交变换被分解为各种算子（即圆形旋转、反射和双曲旋转），允许同时对异构结构以及复杂的关系模式进行建模。三个标准 KG 的实验结果表明，UltraE 优于之前基于欧几里德和双曲线的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超双曲流形的知识图谱嵌入方法UltraE，用于处理知识图谱中异构拓扑结构的表示问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法仅使用欧几里得或双曲几何，难以有效表示包含多层级结构和非层级结构的异构知识图谱。
AI.method: 在超双曲（伪黎曼）流形中构建嵌入模型，通过伪正交变换（分解为圆旋转、反射和双曲旋转等操作）同时建模异构结构和复杂关系模式。
AI.result: 在三个标准知识图谱数据集上的实验表明，UltraE优于现有的欧几里得和双曲几何方法。
AI.conclusion: 超双曲流形能够有效融合双曲与球面几何特性，为异构知识图谱提供更准确的拓扑表示。

search_text: Ultrahyperbolic Knowledge Graph Embeddings 超双曲知识图嵌入 Recent knowledge graph (KG) embeddings have been advanced by hyperbolic geometry due to its superior capability for representing hierarchies. The topological structures of real-world KGs, however, are rather heterogeneous, i.e., a KG is composed of multiple distinct hierarchies and non-hierarchical graph structures. Therefore, a homogeneous (either Euclidean or hyperbolic) geometry is not sufficient for fairly representing such heterogeneous structures. To capture the topological heterogeneity of KGs, we present an ultrahyperbolic KG embedding (UltraE) in an ultrahyperbolic (or pseudo-Riemannian) manifold that seamlessly interleaves hyperbolic and spherical manifolds. In particular, we model each relation as a pseudo-orthogonal transformation that preserves the pseudo-Riemannian bilinear form. The pseudo-orthogonal transformation is decomposed into various operators (i.e., circular rotations, reflections and hyperbolic rotations), allowing for simultaneously modeling heterogeneous structures as well as complex relational patterns. Experimental results on three standard KGs show that UltraE outperforms previous Euclidean- and hyperbolic-based approaches. 由于双曲几何具有卓越的表示层次结构的能力，最近的知识图（KG）嵌入得到了改进。然而，现实世界知识图谱的拓扑结构相当异构，即知识图谱由多个不同的层次结构和非层次图结构组成。因此，同质（欧几里得或双曲）几何形状不足以公平地表示这种异质结构。为了捕获 KG 的拓扑异质性，我们在超双曲（或伪黎曼）流形中提出了超双曲 KG 嵌入（UltraE），该流形无缝交错双曲流形和球流形。特别是，我们将每个关系建模为保留伪黎曼双线性形式的伪正交变换。伪正交变换被分解为各种算子（即圆形旋转、反射和双曲旋转），允许同时对异构结构以及复杂的关系模式进行建模。三个标准 KG 的实验结果表明，UltraE 优于之前基于欧几里德和双曲线的方法。 本文提出了一种基于超双曲流形的知识图谱嵌入方法UltraE，用于处理知识图谱中异构拓扑结构的表示问题。 Bo Xiong,Shichao Zhu,Mojtaba Nayyeri,Chengjin Xu,Shirui Pan,Chuan Zhou,Steffen Staab cs.LG,cs.AI

title: CD$^2$: Fine-grained 3D Mesh Reconstruction With Twice Chamfer Distance
title_zh: CD$^2$：具有两倍倒角距离的细粒度 3D 网格重建
abstract: Monocular 3D reconstruction is to reconstruct the shape of object and its other information from a single RGB image. In 3D reconstruction, polygon mesh, with detailed surface information and low computational cost, is the most prevalent expression form obtained from deep learning models. However, the state-of-the-art schemes fail to directly generate well-structured meshes, and we identify that most meshes have severe Vertices Clustering (VC) and Illegal Twist (IT) problems. By analyzing the mesh deformation process, we pinpoint that the inappropriate usage of Chamfer Distance (CD) loss is a root cause of VC and IT problems in deep learning model. In this paper, we initially demonstrate these two problems induced by CD loss with visual examples and quantitative analyses. Then, we propose a fine-grained reconstruction method CD$^2$ by employing Chamfer distance twice to perform a plausible and adaptive deformation. Extensive experiments on two 3D datasets and comparisons with five latest schemes demonstrate that our CD$^2$ directly generates a well-structured mesh and outperforms others in terms of several quantitative metrics.
summary: Monocular 3D reconstruction is to reconstruct the shape of object and its other information from a single RGB image. In 3D reconstruction, polygon mesh, with detailed surface information and low computational cost, is the most prevalent expression form obtained from deep learning models. However, the state-of-the-art schemes fail to directly generate well-structured meshes, and we identify that most meshes have severe Vertices Clustering (VC) and Illegal Twist (IT) problems. By analyzing the mesh deformation process, we pinpoint that the inappropriate usage of Chamfer Distance (CD) loss is a root cause of VC and IT problems in deep learning model. In this paper, we initially demonstrate these two problems induced by CD loss with visual examples and quantitative analyses. Then, we propose a fine-grained reconstruction method CD$^2$ by employing Chamfer distance twice to perform a plausible and adaptive deformation. Extensive experiments on two 3D datasets and comparisons with five latest schemes demonstrate that our CD$^2$ directly generates a well-structured mesh and outperforms others in terms of several quantitative metrics.
abstract_zh: 单目3D重建是从单个RGB图像中重建物体的形状及其其他信息。在3D重建中，多边形网格具有详细的表面信息和较低的计算成本，是深度学习模型中最普遍的表达形式。然而，最先进的方案无法直接生成结构良好的网格，并且我们发现大多数网格都存在严重的顶点聚类（VC）和非法扭曲（IT）问题。通过分析网格变形过程，我们发现切角距离（CD）损失的不当使用是深度学习模型中VC和IT问题的根本原因。在本文中，我们首先通过可视化示例和定量分析来证明 CD 损失引起的这两个问题。然后，我们提出了一种细粒度重建方法 CD$^2$，通过两次使用 Chamfer 距离来执行合理的自适应变形。对两个 3D 数据集的广泛实验以及与五个最新方案的比较表明，我们的 CD$^2$ 直接生成结构良好的网格，并且在几个定量指标方面优于其他方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CD²方法，通过两次使用Chamfer Distance损失解决单目3D网格重建中的顶点聚类和非法扭曲问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的3D网格存在顶点聚类（VC）和非法扭曲（IT）问题，根源在于Chamfer Distance（CD）损失的不当使用。
AI.method: 设计CD²方法，通过两次应用Chamfer Distance损失进行自适应网格变形，优化网格结构。
AI.result: 在两个3D数据集上，CD²生成的网格结构优于其他五种最新方法，多个定量指标表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CD²通过改进Chamfer Distance的使用方式，有效解决了网格重建中的结构缺陷问题。

title: Algorithmic Foundations of Empirical X-risk Minimization
title_zh: 经验 X 风险最小化的算法基础
abstract: This manuscript introduces a new optimization framework for machine learning and AI, named {\bf empirical X-risk minimization (EXM)}. X-risk is a term introduced to represent a family of compositional measures or objectives, in which each data point is compared with a large number of items explicitly or implicitly for defining a risk function. It includes surrogate objectives of many widely used measures and non-decomposable losses, e.g., AUROC, AUPRC, partial AUROC, NDCG, MAP, precision/recall at top $K$ positions, precision at a certain recall level, listwise losses, p-norm push, top push, global contrastive losses, etc. While these non-decomposable objectives and their optimization algorithms have been studied in the literature of machine learning, computer vision, information retrieval, and etc, optimizing these objectives has encountered some unique challenges for deep learning. In this paper, we present recent rigorous efforts for EXM with a focus on its algorithmic foundations and its applications. We introduce a class of algorithmic techniques for solving EXM with smooth non-convex objectives. We formulate EXM into three special families of non-convex optimization problems belonging to non-convex compositional optimization, non-convex min-max optimization and non-convex bilevel optimization, respectively. For each family of problems, we present some strong baseline algorithms and their complexities, which will motivate further research for improving the existing results. Discussions about the presented results and future studies are given at the end. Efficient algorithms for optimizing a variety of X-risks are implemented in the LibAUC library at \url{www.libauc.org}.
summary: This manuscript introduces a new optimization framework for machine learning and AI, named {\bf empirical X-risk minimization (EXM)}. X-risk is a term introduced to represent a family of compositional measures or objectives, in which each data point is compared with a large number of items explicitly or implicitly for defining a risk function. It includes surrogate objectives of many widely used measures and non-decomposable losses, e.g., AUROC, AUPRC, partial AUROC, NDCG, MAP, precision/recall at top $K$ positions, precision at a certain recall level, listwise losses, p-norm push, top push, global contrastive losses, etc. While these non-decomposable objectives and their optimization algorithms have been studied in the literature of machine learning, computer vision, information retrieval, and etc, optimizing these objectives has encountered some unique challenges for deep learning. In this paper, we present recent rigorous efforts for EXM with a focus on its algorithmic foundations and its applications. We introduce a class of algorithmic techniques for solving EXM with smooth non-convex objectives. We formulate EXM into three special families of non-convex optimization problems belonging to non-convex compositional optimization, non-convex min-max optimization and non-convex bilevel optimization, respectively. For each family of problems, we present some strong baseline algorithms and their complexities, which will motivate further research for improving the existing results. Discussions about the presented results and future studies are given at the end. Efficient algorithms for optimizing a variety of X-risks are implemented in the LibAUC library at \url{www.libauc.org}.
abstract_zh: 本手稿介绍了一种新的机器学习和人工智能优化框架，名为 {\bf 经验 X 风险最小化 (EXM)}。 X-风险是一个术语，用于表示一系列组合度量或目标，其中每个数据点都与大量项目进行显式或隐式比较，以定义风险函数。它包括许多广泛使用的度量和不可分解损失的替代目标，例如 AUROC、AUPRC、部分 AUROC、NDCG、MAP、顶部 $K$ 位置的精度/召回率、特定召回级别的精度、列表损失、p-范数推送、顶部推送、全局对比损失等。虽然这些不可分解目标及其优化算法已在机器学习、计算机视觉、信息检索等文献中进行了研究，但优化这些目标遇到了深度学习的一些独特挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 EXM 最近的严格工作，重点关注其算法基础和应用。我们介绍一类用于求解具有平滑非凸目标的 EXM 的算法技术。我们将 EXM 表述为三个特殊的非凸优化问题族，分别属于非凸组合优化、非凸最小-最大优化和非凸双层优化。对于每一类问题，我们提出了一些强大的基线算法及其复杂性，这将激励进一步的研究以改进现有的结果。最后对所提出的结果和未来的研究进行了讨论。用于优化各种 X 风险的高效算法在位于 \url{www.libauc.org} 的 LibAUC 库中实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为经验X风险最小化（EXM）的新优化框架，用于解决机器学习和AI中的非分解目标优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非分解目标（如AUROC、NDCG等）在深度学习中的优化面临独特挑战，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 将EXM分为三类非凸优化问题（非凸复合优化、非凸极小极大优化、非凸双层优化），并提出对应的基线算法及复杂度分析。
AI.result: 提出了针对三类问题的强基线算法，复杂度分析及其实现库LibAUC的开源代码。
AI.conclusion: 为EXM的算法研究提供了理论基础，并为未来改进现有结果指明了方向。

search_text: Algorithmic Foundations of Empirical X-risk Minimization 经验 X 风险最小化的算法基础 This manuscript introduces a new optimization framework for machine learning and AI, named {\bf empirical X-risk minimization (EXM)}. X-risk is a term introduced to represent a family of compositional measures or objectives, in which each data point is compared with a large number of items explicitly or implicitly for defining a risk function. It includes surrogate objectives of many widely used measures and non-decomposable losses, e.g., AUROC, AUPRC, partial AUROC, NDCG, MAP, precision/recall at top $K$ positions, precision at a certain recall level, listwise losses, p-norm push, top push, global contrastive losses, etc. While these non-decomposable objectives and their optimization algorithms have been studied in the literature of machine learning, computer vision, information retrieval, and etc, optimizing these objectives has encountered some unique challenges for deep learning. In this paper, we present recent rigorous efforts for EXM with a focus on its algorithmic foundations and its applications. We introduce a class of algorithmic techniques for solving EXM with smooth non-convex objectives. We formulate EXM into three special families of non-convex optimization problems belonging to non-convex compositional optimization, non-convex min-max optimization and non-convex bilevel optimization, respectively. For each family of problems, we present some strong baseline algorithms and their complexities, which will motivate further research for improving the existing results. Discussions about the presented results and future studies are given at the end. Efficient algorithms for optimizing a variety of X-risks are implemented in the LibAUC library at \url{www.libauc.org}. 本手稿介绍了一种新的机器学习和人工智能优化框架，名为 {\bf 经验 X 风险最小化 (EXM)}。 X-风险是一个术语，用于表示一系列组合度量或目标，其中每个数据点都与大量项目进行显式或隐式比较，以定义风险函数。它包括许多广泛使用的度量和不可分解损失的替代目标，例如 AUROC、AUPRC、部分 AUROC、NDCG、MAP、顶部 $K$ 位置的精度/召回率、特定召回级别的精度、列表损失、p-范数推送、顶部推送、全局对比损失等。虽然这些不可分解目标及其优化算法已在机器学习、计算机视觉、信息检索等文献中进行了研究，但优化这些目标遇到了深度学习的一些独特挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 EXM 最近的严格工作，重点关注其算法基础和应用。我们介绍一类用于求解具有平滑非凸目标的 EXM 的算法技术。我们将 EXM 表述为三个特殊的非凸优化问题族，分别属于非凸组合优化、非凸最小-最大优化和非凸双层优化。对于每一类问题，我们提出了一些强大的基线算法及其复杂性，这将激励进一步的研究以改进现有的结果。最后对所提出的结果和未来的研究进行了讨论。用于优化各种 X 风险的高效算法在位于 \url{www.libauc.org} 的 LibAUC 库中实现。 本文提出了一种名为经验X风险最小化（EXM）的新优化框架，用于解决机器学习和AI中的非分解目标优化问题。 Tianbao Yang cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: William Prew,Toby P. Breckon,Magnus Bordewich,Ulrik Beierholm
title: Evaluating Gaussian Grasp Maps for Generative Grasping Models
title_zh: 评估生成抓取模型的高斯抓取图
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, to be published in IJCNN 2022
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, to be published in IJCNN 2022
abstract: Generalising robotic grasping to previously unseen objects is a key task in general robotic manipulation. The current method for training many antipodal generative grasping models rely on a binary ground truth grasp map generated from the centre thirds of correctly labelled grasp rectangles. However, these binary maps do not accurately reflect the positions in which a robotic arm can correctly grasp a given object. We propose a continuous Gaussian representation of annotated grasps to generate ground truth training data which achieves a higher success rate on a simulated robotic grasping benchmark. Three modern generative grasping networks are trained with either binary or Gaussian grasp maps, along with recent advancements from the robotic grasping literature, such as discretisation of grasp angles into bins and an attentional loss function. Despite negligible difference according to the standard rectangle metric, Gaussian maps better reproduce the training data and therefore improve success rates when tested on the same simulated robot arm by avoiding collisions with the object: achieving 87.94\% accuracy. Furthermore, the best performing model is shown to operate with a high success rate when transferred to a real robotic arm, at high inference speeds, without the need for transfer learning. The system is then shown to be capable of performing grasps on an antagonistic physical object dataset benchmark.
summary: Generalising robotic grasping to previously unseen objects is a key task in general robotic manipulation. The current method for training many antipodal generative grasping models rely on a binary ground truth grasp map generated from the centre thirds of correctly labelled grasp rectangles. However, these binary maps do not accurately reflect the positions in which a robotic arm can correctly grasp a given object. We propose a continuous Gaussian representation of annotated grasps to generate ground truth training data which achieves a higher success rate on a simulated robotic grasping benchmark. Three modern generative grasping networks are trained with either binary or Gaussian grasp maps, along with recent advancements from the robotic grasping literature, such as discretisation of grasp angles into bins and an attentional loss function. Despite negligible difference according to the standard rectangle metric, Gaussian maps better reproduce the training data and therefore improve success rates when tested on the same simulated robot arm by avoiding collisions with the object: achieving 87.94\% accuracy. Furthermore, the best performing model is shown to operate with a high success rate when transferred to a real robotic arm, at high inference speeds, without the need for transfer learning. The system is then shown to be capable of performing grasps on an antagonistic physical object dataset benchmark.
abstract_zh: 将机器人抓取推广到以前未见过的物体是一般机器人操作中的一项关键任务。当前训练许多对映生成抓取模型的方法依赖于从正确标记的抓取矩形的中心三分之一生成的二进制地面实况抓取图。然而，这些二值图并不能准确反映机械臂可以正确抓取给定物体的位置。我们提出了带注释的抓取的连续高斯表示，以生成地面实况训练数据，从而在模拟机器人抓取基准上实现更高的成功率。三个现代生成抓取网络使用二元或高斯抓取图进行训练，以及机器人抓取文献的最新进展，例如将抓取角度离散化为箱和注意力损失函数。尽管根据标准矩形度量的差异可以忽略不计，但高斯图可以更好地再现训练数据，因此在同一模拟机器人手臂上进行测试时，通过避免与物体碰撞来提高成功率：实现 87.94% 的准确度。此外，表现最佳的模型在转移到真实的机器人手臂上时，以高推理速度，可以实现很高的成功率，而无需转移学习。然后，该系统被证明能够对对抗性物理对象数据集基准执行抓取。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了高斯抓取图在生成抓取模型中的应用，以提升机器人对未知物体的抓取泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统二值抓取图无法准确反映机械臂实际抓取位置，导致训练模型在真实场景中易发生碰撞。
AI.method: 提出连续高斯分布表示标注抓取点，结合角度离散化和注意力损失函数，训练三种生成模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: 高斯图模型在模拟环境中达到87.94%准确率，且无需迁移学习即可在真实机械臂上实现高效抓取。
AI.conclusion: 高斯抓取图能更精确还原训练数据分布，有效提升抓取成功率并具备实际部署价值。

authors_text: Kareem Ahmed,Stefano Teso,Kai-Wei Chang,Guy Van den Broeck,Antonio Vergari
title: Semantic Probabilistic Layers for Neuro-Symbolic Learning
title_zh: 神经符号学习的语义概率层
abstract: We design a predictive layer for structured-output prediction (SOP) that can be plugged into any neural network guaranteeing its predictions are consistent with a set of predefined symbolic constraints. Our Semantic Probabilistic Layer (SPL) can model intricate correlations, and hard constraints, over a structured output space all while being amenable to end-to-end learning via maximum likelihood. SPLs combine exact probabilistic inference with logical reasoning in a clean and modular way, learning complex distributions and restricting their support to solutions of the constraint. As such, they can faithfully, and efficiently, model complex SOP tasks beyond the reach of alternative neuro-symbolic approaches. We empirically demonstrate that SPLs outperform these competitors in terms of accuracy on challenging SOP tasks including hierarchical multi-label classification, pathfinding and preference learning, while retaining perfect constraint satisfaction.
summary: We design a predictive layer for structured-output prediction (SOP) that can be plugged into any neural network guaranteeing its predictions are consistent with a set of predefined symbolic constraints. Our Semantic Probabilistic Layer (SPL) can model intricate correlations, and hard constraints, over a structured output space all while being amenable to end-to-end learning via maximum likelihood. SPLs combine exact probabilistic inference with logical reasoning in a clean and modular way, learning complex distributions and restricting their support to solutions of the constraint. As such, they can faithfully, and efficiently, model complex SOP tasks beyond the reach of alternative neuro-symbolic approaches. We empirically demonstrate that SPLs outperform these competitors in terms of accuracy on challenging SOP tasks including hierarchical multi-label classification, pathfinding and preference learning, while retaining perfect constraint satisfaction.
abstract_zh: 我们为结构化输出预测（SOP）设计了一个预测层，可以将其插入任何神经网络中，以保证其预测与一组预定义的符号约束一致。我们的语义概率层 (SPL) 可以在结构化输出空间上对复杂的相关性和硬约束进行建模，同时能够通过最大似然进行端到端学习。 SPL 以简洁和模块化的方式将精确的概率推理与逻辑推理结合起来，学习复杂的分布并将其支持限制为约束的解决方案。因此，他们可以忠实、高效地对复杂的 SOP 任务进行建模，超出了替代神经符号方法的范围。我们凭经验证明，SPL 在具有挑战性的 SOP 任务（包括分层多标签分类、寻路和偏好学习）的准确性方面优于这些竞争对手，同时保持完美的约束满足。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种语义概率层（SPL），用于神经符号学习中的结构化输出预测任务，确保预测结果符合预定义的符号约束。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络难以有效处理结构化输出中的复杂约束和逻辑关系，而现有神经符号方法在准确性和约束满足上存在局限。
AI.method: 提出语义概率层（SPL），结合精确概率推理与逻辑推理，通过最大似然端到端学习，将符号约束嵌入神经网络输出空间。
AI.result: 在分层多标签分类、路径规划和偏好学习等任务中，SPL在保持完美约束满足的同时，准确率优于现有神经符号方法。
AI.conclusion: SPL通过统一概率建模与符号约束，为复杂结构化输出任务提供了高效且可靠的神经符号学习框架。

search_text: Semantic Probabilistic Layers for Neuro-Symbolic Learning 神经符号学习的语义概率层 We design a predictive layer for structured-output prediction (SOP) that can be plugged into any neural network guaranteeing its predictions are consistent with a set of predefined symbolic constraints. Our Semantic Probabilistic Layer (SPL) can model intricate correlations, and hard constraints, over a structured output space all while being amenable to end-to-end learning via maximum likelihood. SPLs combine exact probabilistic inference with logical reasoning in a clean and modular way, learning complex distributions and restricting their support to solutions of the constraint. As such, they can faithfully, and efficiently, model complex SOP tasks beyond the reach of alternative neuro-symbolic approaches. We empirically demonstrate that SPLs outperform these competitors in terms of accuracy on challenging SOP tasks including hierarchical multi-label classification, pathfinding and preference learning, while retaining perfect constraint satisfaction. 我们为结构化输出预测（SOP）设计了一个预测层，可以将其插入任何神经网络中，以保证其预测与一组预定义的符号约束一致。我们的语义概率层 (SPL) 可以在结构化输出空间上对复杂的相关性和硬约束进行建模，同时能够通过最大似然进行端到端学习。 SPL 以简洁和模块化的方式将精确的概率推理与逻辑推理结合起来，学习复杂的分布并将其支持限制为约束的解决方案。因此，他们可以忠实、高效地对复杂的 SOP 任务进行建模，超出了替代神经符号方法的范围。我们凭经验证明，SPL 在具有挑战性的 SOP 任务（包括分层多标签分类、寻路和偏好学习）的准确性方面优于这些竞争对手，同时保持完美的约束满足。 本文设计了一种语义概率层（SPL），用于神经符号学习中的结构化输出预测任务，确保预测结果符合预定义的符号约束。 Kareem Ahmed,Stefano Teso,Kai-Wei Chang,Guy Van den Broeck,Antonio Vergari cs.LG,cs.AI

title: The Use of NLP-Based Text Representation Techniques to Support Requirement Engineering Tasks: A Systematic Mapping Review
title_zh: 使用基于 NLP 的文本表示技术支持需求工程任务：系统映射审查
abstract: Natural Language Processing (NLP) is widely used to support the automation of different Requirements Engineering (RE) tasks. Most of the proposed approaches start with various NLP steps that analyze requirements statements, extract their linguistic information, and convert them to easy-to-process representations, such as lists of features or embedding-based vector representations. These NLP-based representations are usually used at a later stage as inputs for machine learning techniques or rule-based methods. Thus, requirements representations play a major role in determining the accuracy of different approaches. In this paper, we conducted a survey in the form of a systematic literature mapping (classification) to find out (1) what are the representations used in RE tasks literature, (2) what is the main focus of these works, (3) what are the main research directions in this domain, and (4) what are the gaps and potential future directions. After compiling an initial pool of 2,227 papers, and applying a set of inclusion/exclusion criteria, we obtained a final pool containing 104 relevant papers. Our survey shows that the research direction has changed from the use of lexical and syntactic features to the use of advanced embedding techniques, especially in the last two years. Using advanced embedding representations has proved its effectiveness in most RE tasks (such as requirement analysis, extracting requirements from reviews and forums, and semantic-level quality tasks). However, representations that are based on lexical and syntactic features are still more appropriate for other RE tasks (such as modeling and syntax-level quality tasks) since they provide the required information for the rules and regular expressions used when handling these tasks. In addition, we identify four gaps in the existing literature, why they matter, and how future research can begin to address them.

Thus, requirements representations play a major role in determining the accuracy of different approaches. In this paper, we conducted a survey in the form of a systematic literature mapping (classification) to find out (1) what are the representations used in RE tasks literature, (2) what is the main focus of these works, (3) what are the main research directions in this domain, and (4) what are the gaps and potential future directions. After compiling an initial pool of 2,227 papers, and applying a set of inclusion/exclusion criteria, we obtained a final pool containing 104 relevant papers. Our survey shows that the research direction has changed from the use of lexical and syntactic features to the use of advanced embedding techniques, especially in the last two years. Using advanced embedding representations has proved its effectiveness in most RE tasks (such as requirement analysis, extracting requirements from reviews and forums, and semantic-level quality tasks). However, representations that are based on lexical and syntactic features are still more appropriate for other RE tasks (such as modeling and syntax-level quality tasks) since they provide the required information for the rules and regular expressions used when handling these tasks. In addition, we identify four gaps in the existing literature, why they matter, and how future research can begin to address them.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理 (NLP) 广泛用于支持不同需求工程 (RE) 任务的自动化。大多数提出的方法都是从各种 NLP 步骤开始，这些步骤分析需求陈述，提取其语言信息，并将其转换为易于处理的表示形式，例如特征列表或基于嵌入的向量表示形式。这些基于 NLP 的表示通常在后期用作机器学习技术或基于规则的方法的输入。因此，需求表示在确定不同方法的准确性方面发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们以系统文献图谱（分类）的形式进行了调查，以找出（1）RE任务文献中使用的表征是什么，（2）这些作品的主要焦点是什么，（3）该领域的主要研究方向是什么，以及（4）差距和未来潜在的方向是什么。在编制了 2,227 篇论文的初始库并应用一组纳入/排除标准后，我们​​获得了包含 104 篇相关论文的最终库。我们的调查显示，研究方向已经从词汇和句法特征的使用转向先进嵌入技术的使用，特别是在最近两年。使用高级嵌入表示已证明其在大多数 RE 任务（例如需求分析、从评论和论坛中提取需求以及语义级质量任务）中的有效性。然而，基于词汇和句法特征的表示仍然更适合其他 RE 任务（例如建模和语法级质量任务），因为它们为处理这些任务时使用的规则和正则表达式提供了所需的信息。此外，我们还确定了现有文献中的四个缺陷、它们为何重要以及未来的研究如何开始解决这些缺陷。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统映射综述，分析NLP文本表示技术在需求工程任务中的应用现状，总结常用方法、研究重点、未来方向及现有研究空白。
AI.motivation: 随着NLP在需求工程自动化中的应用增加，需系统梳理现有文本表示方法，明确其适用场景及研究空白，以指导未来技术发展和应用。
AI.method: 采用系统文献映射方法，筛选并分析2227篇论文，最终纳入104篇，分类总结文本表示方法、研究重点及趋势。
AI.result: 结果显示，近两研究转向高级嵌入技术，其在语义任务中效果显著；传统特征仍适用于语法任务。识别出四个研究空白，如跨领域适应性、可解释性等。
AI.conclusion: NLP文本表示技术在需求工程中应用广泛，但需进一步解决跨领域适应性、可解释性等问题，以提升方法的通用性和实用性。

authors_text: Tian Zhang,Kongming Liang,Ruoyi Du,Xian Sun,Zhanyu Ma,Jun Guo
title: Learning Invariant Visual Representations for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 学习组合零样本学习的不变视觉表示
abstract: Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize novel compositions using knowledge learned from seen attribute-object compositions in the training set. Previous works mainly project an image and a composition into a common embedding space to measure their compatibility score. However, both attributes and objects share the visual representations learned above, leading the model to exploit spurious correlations and bias towards seen pairs. Instead, we reconsider CZSL as an out-of-distribution generalization problem. If an object is treated as a domain, we can learn object-invariant features to recognize the attributes attached to any object reliably. Similarly, attribute-invariant features can also be learned when recognizing the objects with attributes as domains. Specifically, we propose an invariant feature learning framework to align different domains at the representation and gradient levels to capture the intrinsic characteristics associated with the tasks. Experiments on two CZSL benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art.
summary: Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize novel compositions using knowledge learned from seen attribute-object compositions in the training set. Previous works mainly project an image and a composition into a common embedding space to measure their compatibility score. However, both attributes and objects share the visual representations learned above, leading the model to exploit spurious correlations and bias towards seen pairs. Instead, we reconsider CZSL as an out-of-distribution generalization problem. If an object is treated as a domain, we can learn object-invariant features to recognize the attributes attached to any object reliably. Similarly, attribute-invariant features can also be learned when recognizing the objects with attributes as domains. Specifically, we propose an invariant feature learning framework to align different domains at the representation and gradient levels to capture the intrinsic characteristics associated with the tasks. Experiments on two CZSL benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 组合零样本学习（CZSL）旨在使用从训练集中看到的属性-对象组合中学到的知识来识别新颖的组合。以前的作品主要将图像和合成投影到公共嵌入空间中以测量它们的兼容性分数。然而，属性和对象都共享上面学到的视觉表示，导致模型利用虚假相关性和对所见对的偏见。相反，我们将 CZSL 重新视为分布外泛化问题。如果一个对象被视为一个域，我们就可以学习对象不变的特征来可靠地识别附加到任何对象的属性。类似地，在将具有属性的对象识别为域时，也可以学习属性不变特征。具体来说，我们提出了一个不变的特征学习框架，以在表示和梯度级别上对齐不同的域，以捕获与任务相关的内在特征。两个 CZSL 基准测试的实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于之前的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习不变视觉表示的方法，以解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）问题，旨在通过从训练集中学习到的已知属性-对象组合知识，识别新的组合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在将图像和组合映射到共同嵌入空间时，容易利用虚假相关性并偏向于已见组合。因此，本文将CZSL视为分布外泛化问题，以学习对象和属性不变的特征。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种不变特征学习框架，通过在表示和梯度层面对不同领域进行对齐，以捕捉任务相关的内在特征。
AI.result: 在两个CZSL基准测试中，所提出的方法显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习对象和属性不变的特征，该方法在组合零样本学习任务中表现出更好的泛化能力。

method: 本文提出了一种不变特征学习框架，通过在表示和梯度层面对不同领域进行对齐，以捕捉任务相关的内在特征。
result: 在两个CZSL基准测试中，所提出的方法显著优于现有最先进的方法。
conclusion: 通过学习对象和属性不变的特征，该方法在组合零样本学习任务中表现出更好的泛化能力。
search_text: Learning Invariant Visual Representations for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning 学习组合零样本学习的不变视觉表示 Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize novel compositions using knowledge learned from seen attribute-object compositions in the training set. Previous works mainly project an image and a composition into a common embedding space to measure their compatibility score. However, both attributes and objects share the visual representations learned above, leading the model to exploit spurious correlations and bias towards seen pairs. Instead, we reconsider CZSL as an out-of-distribution generalization problem. If an object is treated as a domain, we can learn object-invariant features to recognize the attributes attached to any object reliably. Similarly, attribute-invariant features can also be learned when recognizing the objects with attributes as domains. Specifically, we propose an invariant feature learning framework to align different domains at the representation and gradient levels to capture the intrinsic characteristics associated with the tasks. Experiments on two CZSL benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art. 组合零样本学习（CZSL）旨在使用从训练集中看到的属性-对象组合中学到的知识来识别新颖的组合。以前的作品主要将图像和合成投影到公共嵌入空间中以测量它们的兼容性分数。然而，属性和对象都共享上面学到的视觉表示，导致模型利用虚假相关性和对所见对的偏见。相反，我们将 CZSL 重新视为分布外泛化问题。如果一个对象被视为一个域，我们就可以学习对象不变的特征来可靠地识别附加到任何对象的属性。类似地，在将具有属性的对象识别为域时，也可以学习属性不变特征。具体来说，我们提出了一个不变的特征学习框架，以在表示和梯度级别上对齐不同的域，以捕获与任务相关的内在特征。两个 CZSL 基准测试的实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于之前的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种学习不变视觉表示的方法，以解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）问题，旨在通过从训练集中学习到的已知属性-对象组合知识，识别新的组合。 Tian Zhang,Kongming Liang,Ruoyi Du,Xian Sun,Zhanyu Ma,Jun Guo cs.CV

title: Generalized Delayed Feedback Model with Post-Click Information in Recommender Systems
title_zh: 推荐系统中带有点击后信息的广义延迟反馈模型
abstract: Predicting conversion rate (e.g., the probability that a user will purchase an item) is a fundamental problem in machine learning based recommender systems. However, accurate conversion labels are revealed after a long delay, which harms the timeliness of recommender systems. Previous literature concentrates on utilizing early conversions to mitigate such a delayed feedback problem. In this paper, we show that post-click user behaviors are also informative to conversion rate prediction and can be used to improve timeliness. We propose a generalized delayed feedback model (GDFM) that unifies both post-click behaviors and early conversions as stochastic post-click information, which could be utilized to train GDFM in a streaming manner efficiently. Based on GDFM, we further establish a novel perspective that the performance gap introduced by delayed feedback can be attributed to a temporal gap and a sampling gap. Inspired by our analysis, we propose to measure the quality of post-click information with a combination of temporal distance and sample complexity. The training objective is re-weighted accordingly to highlight informative and timely signals. We validate our analysis on public datasets, and experimental performance confirms the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Predicting conversion rate (e.g., the probability that a user will purchase an item) is a fundamental problem in machine learning based recommender systems. However, accurate conversion labels are revealed after a long delay, which harms the timeliness of recommender systems. Previous literature concentrates on utilizing early conversions to mitigate such a delayed feedback problem. In this paper, we show that post-click user behaviors are also informative to conversion rate prediction and can be used to improve timeliness. We propose a generalized delayed feedback model (GDFM) that unifies both post-click behaviors and early conversions as stochastic post-click information, which could be utilized to train GDFM in a streaming manner efficiently. Based on GDFM, we further establish a novel perspective that the performance gap introduced by delayed feedback can be attributed to a temporal gap and a sampling gap. Inspired by our analysis, we propose to measure the quality of post-click information with a combination of temporal distance and sample complexity. The training objective is re-weighted accordingly to highlight informative and timely signals. We validate our analysis on public datasets, and experimental performance confirms the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 预测转化率（例如，用户购买商品的概率）是基于机器学习的推荐系统中的一个基本问题。然而，准确的转化​​标签在长时间延迟后才会显示，这损害了推荐系统的时效性。先前的文献集中于利用早期转换来缓解这种延迟反馈问题。在本文中，我们表明点击后用户行为对于转化率预测也提供了信息，并且可以用来提高及时性。我们提出了一种广义延迟反馈模型（GDFM），它将点击后行为和早期转化统一为随机点击后信息，可用于以流方式有效地训练 GDFM。基于GDFM，我们进一步建立了一个新的观点，即延迟反馈引入的性能差距可以归因于时间差距和采样差距。受我们分析的启发，我们建议结合时间距离和样本复杂性来衡量点击后信息的质量。培训目标相应地重新加权，以突出信息丰富且及时的信号。我们验证了对公共数据集的分析，实验性能证实了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合点击后行为信息的广义延迟反馈模型（GDFM），以解决推荐系统中转化率预测因标签延迟导致的实时性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖早期转化数据缓解延迟反馈问题，但忽略了点击后用户行为中可能蕴含的有用信息，导致模型时效性不足。
AI.method: 构建GDFM模型，统一处理点击后行为与早期转化作为随机信息源，通过流式训练高效利用数据；引入时间距离与样本复杂度的组合指标，动态加权训练目标以强化及时信号。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验验证了GDFM在提升转化率预测时效性方面的有效性，缩小了延迟反馈导致的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合点击后行为信息并优化训练目标，GDFM有效缓解了推荐系统中延迟反馈问题，为实时预测提供了新思路。

title: Towards Generalisable Audio Representations for Audio-Visual Navigation
title_zh: 面向视听导航的通用音频表示
abstract: In audio-visual navigation (AVN), an intelligent agent needs to navigate to a constantly sound-making object in complex 3D environments based on its audio and visual perceptions. While existing methods attempt to improve the navigation performance with preciously designed path planning or intricate task settings, none has improved the model generalisation on unheard sounds with task settings unchanged. We thus propose a contrastive learning-based method to tackle this challenge by regularising the audio encoder, where the sound-agnostic goal-driven latent representations can be learnt from various audio signals of different classes. In addition, we consider two data augmentation strategies to enrich the training sounds. We demonstrate that our designs can be easily equipped to existing AVN frameworks to obtain an immediate performance gain (13.4%$\uparrow$ in SPL on Replica and 12.2%$\uparrow$ in SPL on MP3D). Our project is available at https://AV-GeN.github.io/.
summary: In audio-visual navigation (AVN), an intelligent agent needs to navigate to a constantly sound-making object in complex 3D environments based on its audio and visual perceptions. While existing methods attempt to improve the navigation performance with preciously designed path planning or intricate task settings, none has improved the model generalisation on unheard sounds with task settings unchanged. We thus propose a contrastive learning-based method to tackle this challenge by regularising the audio encoder, where the sound-agnostic goal-driven latent representations can be learnt from various audio signals of different classes. In addition, we consider two data augmentation strategies to enrich the training sounds. We demonstrate that our designs can be easily equipped to existing AVN frameworks to obtain an immediate performance gain (13.4%$\uparrow$ in SPL on Replica and 12.2%$\uparrow$ in SPL on MP3D). Our project is available at https://AV-GeN.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 在视听导航 (AVN) 中，智能代理需要根据其音频和视觉感知导航到复杂 3D 环境中不断发声的对象。虽然现有的方法试图通过精心设计的路径规划或复杂的任务设置来提高导航性能，但没有一种方法可以在任务设置不变的情况下提高对未听到的声音的模型泛化。因此，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的方法，通过规范音频编码器来应对这一挑战，其中可以从不同类别的各种音频信号中学习与声音无关的目标驱动的潜在表示。此外，我们考虑了两种数据增强策略来丰富训练声音。我们证明，我们的设计可以轻松地配备到现有的 AVN 框架，以立即获得性能提升（Replica 上的 SPL 为 13.4%$\uparrow$，MP3D 上的 SPL 为 12.2%$\uparrow$）。我们的项目可在 https://AV-GeN.github.io/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的音频编码器正则化方法，以提升音频视觉导航任务中对未听过声音的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有音频视觉导航方法在复杂3D环境中无法有效处理未听过的声音，且未在保持任务设置不变的前提下提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计对比学习框架正则化音频编码器，学习跨声音类别的目标驱动潜在表示，并结合两种数据增强策略丰富训练数据。
AI.result: 在Replica和MP3D数据集上分别实现13.4%和12.2%的SPL指标提升，且方法可无缝集成现有AVN框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦声音特征与任务目标，所提方法有效提升了模型对未知音频信号的泛化能力，为通用音频表示学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Luca Deininger,Bernhard Stimpel,Anil Yuce,Samaneh Abbasi-Sureshjani,Simon Schönenberger,Paolo Ocampo,Konstanty Korski,Fabien Gaire
title: A comparative study between vision transformers and CNNs in digital pathology
title_zh: 数字病理学中视觉变换器和 CNN 的比较研究
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, accepted for workshop T4Vision (CVPR 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures, accepted for workshop T4Vision (CVPR 2022)
abstract: Recently, vision transformers were shown to be capable of outperforming convolutional neural networks when pretrained on sufficient amounts of data. In comparison to convolutional neural networks, vision transformers have a weaker inductive bias and therefore allow a more flexible feature detection. Due to their promising feature detection, this work explores vision transformers for tumor detection in digital pathology whole slide images in four tissue types, and for tissue type identification. We compared the patch-wise classification performance of the vision transformer DeiT-Tiny to the state-of-the-art convolutional neural network ResNet18. Due to the sparse availability of annotated whole slide images, we further compared both models pretrained on large amounts of unlabeled whole-slide images using state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches. The results show that the vision transformer performed slightly better than the ResNet18 for three of four tissue types for tumor detection while the ResNet18 performed slightly better for the remaining tasks. The aggregated predictions of both models on slide level were correlated, indicating that the models captured similar imaging features. All together, the vision transformer models performed on par with the ResNet18 while requiring more effort to train. In order to surpass the performance of convolutional neural networks, vision transformers might require more challenging tasks to benefit from their weak inductive bias.
summary: Recently, vision transformers were shown to be capable of outperforming convolutional neural networks when pretrained on sufficient amounts of data. In comparison to convolutional neural networks, vision transformers have a weaker inductive bias and therefore allow a more flexible feature detection. Due to their promising feature detection, this work explores vision transformers for tumor detection in digital pathology whole slide images in four tissue types, and for tissue type identification. We compared the patch-wise classification performance of the vision transformer DeiT-Tiny to the state-of-the-art convolutional neural network ResNet18. Due to the sparse availability of annotated whole slide images, we further compared both models pretrained on large amounts of unlabeled whole-slide images using state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches. The results show that the vision transformer performed slightly better than the ResNet18 for three of four tissue types for tumor detection while the ResNet18 performed slightly better for the remaining tasks. The aggregated predictions of both models on slide level were correlated, indicating that the models captured similar imaging features. All together, the vision transformer models performed on par with the ResNet18 while requiring more effort to train. In order to surpass the performance of convolutional neural networks, vision transformers might require more challenging tasks to benefit from their weak inductive bias.
abstract_zh: 最近，事实证明，在对足够数量的数据进行预训练时，视觉变换器能够超越卷积神经网络。与卷积神经网络相比，视觉变换器具有较弱的归纳偏差，因此允许更灵活的特征检测。由于其具有前景的特征检测，这项工作探索了用于四种组织类型的数字病理学全切片图像中的肿瘤检测和组织类型识别的视觉变换器。我们将视觉转换器 DeiT-Tiny 的 patch-wise 分类性能与最先进的卷积神经网络 ResNet18 进行了比较。由于带注释的整张幻灯片图像的稀缺性，我们进一步比较了使用最先进的自监督方法在大量未标记的整张幻灯片图像上预训练的两种模型。结果表明，对于肿瘤检测的四种组织类型中的三种，视觉 Transformer 的表现略优于 ResNet18，而 ResNet18 在其余任务中的表现略好。两个模型在载玻片水平上的聚合预测是相关的，表明这些模型捕获了相似的成像特征。总而言之，视觉 Transformer 模型的性能与 ResNet18 相当，但需要更多的努力来训练。为了超越卷积神经网络的性能，视觉转换器可能需要更具挑战性的任务才能从其弱归纳偏差中受益。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了视觉Transformer（ViT）与卷积神经网络（CNN）在数字病理学中的性能，特别是在肿瘤检测和组织类型识别任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在大量数据预训练下可能优于CNN，但其归纳偏置较弱，需验证其在数字病理学这种数据稀缺场景下的适用性。
AI.method: 在四种组织类型上对比DeiT-Tiny（ViT）与ResNet18的补丁级分类性能，并通过自监督预训练应对标注数据不足的问题。
AI.result: ViT在三种组织类型的肿瘤检测中略优于ResNet18，但ResNet18在剩余任务中表现更好，两者滑动级预测结果相关性较高，但ViT训练成本更高。
AI.conclusion: ViT与ResNet18性能相当，但需更复杂任务才能发挥其弱归纳偏置优势，当前数据条件下未完全超越CNN。

Due to their promising feature detection, this work explores vision transformers for tumor detection in digital pathology whole slide images in four tissue types, and for tissue type identification. We compared the patch-wise classification performance of the vision transformer DeiT-Tiny to the state-of-the-art convolutional neural network ResNet18. Due to the sparse availability of annotated whole slide images, we further compared both models pretrained on large amounts of unlabeled whole-slide images using state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches. The results show that the vision transformer performed slightly better than the ResNet18 for three of four tissue types for tumor detection while the ResNet18 performed slightly better for the remaining tasks. The aggregated predictions of both models on slide level were correlated, indicating that the models captured similar imaging features. authors_text: Jie Shi,Chenfei Wu,Jian Liang,Xiang Liu,Nan Duan
title: DiVAE: Photorealistic Images Synthesis with Denoising Diffusion Decoder
title_zh: DiVAE：使用去噪扩散解码器进行真实感图像合成
abstract: Recently most successful image synthesis models are multi stage process to combine the advantages of different methods, which always includes a VAE-like model for faithfully reconstructing embedding to image and a prior model to generate image embedding. At the same time, diffusion models have shown be capacity to generate high-quality synthetic images. Our work proposes a VQ-VAE architecture model with a diffusion decoder (DiVAE) to work as the reconstructing component in image synthesis. We explore how to input image embedding into diffusion model for excellent performance and find that simple modification on diffusion's UNet can achieve it. Training on ImageNet, Our model achieves state-of-the-art results and generates more photorealistic images specifically. In addition, we apply the DiVAE with an Auto-regressive generator on conditional synthesis tasks to perform more human-feeling and detailed samples.
summary: Recently most successful image synthesis models are multi stage process to combine the advantages of different methods, which always includes a VAE-like model for faithfully reconstructing embedding to image and a prior model to generate image embedding. At the same time, diffusion models have shown be capacity to generate high-quality synthetic images. Our work proposes a VQ-VAE architecture model with a diffusion decoder (DiVAE) to work as the reconstructing component in image synthesis. We explore how to input image embedding into diffusion model for excellent performance and find that simple modification on diffusion's UNet can achieve it. Training on ImageNet, Our model achieves state-of-the-art results and generates more photorealistic images specifically. In addition, we apply the DiVAE with an Auto-regressive generator on conditional synthesis tasks to perform more human-feeling and detailed samples.
abstract_zh: 最近最成功的图像合成模型是结合不同方法优点的多阶段过程，其中总是包括用于忠实地重建图像嵌入的类VAE模型和用于生成图像嵌入的先验模型。与此同时，扩散模型已显示出生成高质量合成图像的能力。我们的工作提出了一种带有扩散解码器（DiVAE）的 VQ-VAE 架构模型，作为图像合成中的重建组件。我们探索了如何将图像嵌入输入到扩散模型中以获得优异的性能，并发现对扩散的 UNet 进行简单修改即可实现。在 ImageNet 上进行训练，我们的模型取得了最先进的结果，并专门生成了更加真实的图像。此外，我们将带有自回归生成器的 DiVAE 应用于条件合成任务，以执行更人性化和更详细的样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiVAE模型，通过结合VQ-VAE与扩散解码器，实现高质量的图像合成。
AI.motivation: 现有图像合成模型多采用多阶段流程，需平衡重建与生成能力，而扩散模型在生成质量上表现优异，但需改进嵌入输入方式。
AI.method: 设计VQ-VAE架构的扩散解码器（DiVAE），通过修改扩散模型的UNet结构，实现图像嵌入的有效输入，并结合自回归生成器处理条件合成任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上达到最先进水平，生成更具真实感的图像，且在条件合成任务中生成更细腻的人类感知样本。
AI.conclusion: DiVAE通过整合VQ-VAE与扩散模型优势，有效提升了图像合成的逼真度与细节表现力。
