authors_text: Jaewon Kim,Hyukjong Lee,Jooyoung Chang,Sang Min Park
title: Generalized Supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 广义监督对比学习
abstract: With the recent promising results of contrastive learning in the self-supervised learning paradigm, supervised contrastive learning has successfully extended these contrastive approaches to supervised contexts, outperforming cross-entropy on various datasets. However, supervised contrastive learning inherently employs label information in a binary form--either positive or negative--using a one-hot target vector. This structure struggles to adapt to methods that exploit label information as a probability distribution, such as CutMix and knowledge distillation. In this paper, we introduce a generalized supervised contrastive loss, which measures cross-entropy between label similarity and latent similarity. This concept enhances the capabilities of supervised contrastive loss by fully utilizing the label distribution and enabling the adaptation of various existing techniques for training modern neural networks. Leveraging this generalized supervised contrastive loss, we construct a tailored framework: the Generalized Supervised Contrastive Learning (GenSCL). Compared to existing contrastive learning frameworks, GenSCL incorporates additional enhancements, including advanced image-based regularization techniques and an arbitrary teacher classifier. When applied to ResNet50 with the Momentum Contrast technique, GenSCL achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.3% on ImageNet, a 4.1% relative improvement over traditional supervised contrastive learning. Moreover, our method establishes new state-of-the-art accuracies of 98.2% and 87.0% on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 respectively when applied to ResNet50, marking the highest reported figures for this architecture.
summary: With the recent promising results of contrastive learning in the self-supervised learning paradigm, supervised contrastive learning has successfully extended these contrastive approaches to supervised contexts, outperforming cross-entropy on various datasets. However, supervised contrastive learning inherently employs label information in a binary form--either positive or negative--using a one-hot target vector. This structure struggles to adapt to methods that exploit label information as a probability distribution, such as CutMix and knowledge distillation. In this paper, we introduce a generalized supervised contrastive loss, which measures cross-entropy between label similarity and latent similarity. This concept enhances the capabilities of supervised contrastive loss by fully utilizing the label distribution and enabling the adaptation of various existing techniques for training modern neural networks. Leveraging this generalized supervised contrastive loss, we construct a tailored framework: the Generalized Supervised Contrastive Learning (GenSCL). Compared to existing contrastive learning frameworks, GenSCL incorporates additional enhancements, including advanced image-based regularization techniques and an arbitrary teacher classifier. When applied to ResNet50 with the Momentum Contrast technique, GenSCL achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.3% on ImageNet, a 4.1% relative improvement over traditional supervised contrastive learning. Moreover, our method establishes new state-of-the-art accuracies of 98.2% and 87.0% on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 respectively when applied to ResNet50, marking the highest reported figures for this architecture.
abstract_zh: 随着自监督学习范式中对比学习最近取得的有希望的结果，监督对比学习已成功地将这些对比方法扩展到监督环境中，在各种数据集上优于交叉熵。然而，监督对比学习本质上采用二进制形式的标签信息（正或负），使用单热目标向量。这种结构很难适应利用标签信息作为概率分布的方法，例如 CutMix 和知识蒸馏。在本文中，我们引入了一种广义监督对比损失，它测量标签相似性和潜在相似性之间的交叉熵。这一概念通过充分利用标签分布并能够适应各种现有技术来训练现代神经网络，从而增强了监督对比损失的能力。利用这种广义监督对比损失，我们构建了一个量身定制的框架：广义监督对比学习（GenSCL）。与现有的对比学习框架相比，GenSCL 融入了额外的增强功能，包括先进的基于图像的正则化技术和任意教师分类器。当使用 Momentum Contrast 技术应用于 ResNet50 时，GenSCL 在 ImageNet 上实现了 77.3% 的 top-1 准确率，比传统的监督对比学习相对提高了 4.1%。此外，当应用于 ResNet50 时，我们的方法在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 上分别达到了 98.2% 和 87.0% 的最新准确率，标志着该架构的最高报告数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出广义监督对比学习方法GenSCL，通过改进标签信息利用方式提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有监督对比学习仅使用二元标签信息，难以适应CutMix和知识蒸馏等依赖概率分布的方法。
AI.method: 引入标签相似度与潜在相似度的交叉熵损失，构建包含正则化技术和任意教师分类器的GenSCL框架。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上ResNet50达到77.3% top-1准确率（提升4.1%），CIFAR10/CIFAR100分别达98.2%/87.0%新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 广义对比损失有效利用标签分布，显著提升模型性能并兼容多种训练技术。

search_text: Generalized Supervised Contrastive Learning 广义监督对比学习 With the recent promising results of contrastive learning in the self-supervised learning paradigm, supervised contrastive learning has successfully extended these contrastive approaches to supervised contexts, outperforming cross-entropy on various datasets. However, supervised contrastive learning inherently employs label information in a binary form--either positive or negative--using a one-hot target vector. This structure struggles to adapt to methods that exploit label information as a probability distribution, such as CutMix and knowledge distillation. In this paper, we introduce a generalized supervised contrastive loss, which measures cross-entropy between label similarity and latent similarity. This concept enhances the capabilities of supervised contrastive loss by fully utilizing the label distribution and enabling the adaptation of various existing techniques for training modern neural networks. Leveraging this generalized supervised contrastive loss, we construct a tailored framework: the Generalized Supervised Contrastive Learning (GenSCL). Compared to existing contrastive learning frameworks, GenSCL incorporates additional enhancements, including advanced image-based regularization techniques and an arbitrary teacher classifier. When applied to ResNet50 with the Momentum Contrast technique, GenSCL achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.3% on ImageNet, a 4.1% relative improvement over traditional supervised contrastive learning. Moreover, our method establishes new state-of-the-art accuracies of 98.2% and 87.0% on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 respectively when applied to ResNet50, marking the highest reported figures for this architecture. 随着自监督学习范式中对比学习最近取得的有希望的结果，监督对比学习已成功地将这些对比方法扩展到监督环境中，在各种数据集上优于交叉熵。然而，监督对比学习本质上采用二进制形式的标签信息（正或负），使用单热目标向量。这种结构很难适应利用标签信息作为概率分布的方法，例如 CutMix 和知识蒸馏。在本文中，我们引入了一种广义监督对比损失，它测量标签相似性和潜在相似性之间的交叉熵。这一概念通过充分利用标签分布并能够适应各种现有技术来训练现代神经网络，从而增强了监督对比损失的能力。利用这种广义监督对比损失，我们构建了一个量身定制的框架：广义监督对比学习（GenSCL）。与现有的对比学习框架相比，GenSCL 融入了额外的增强功能，包括先进的基于图像的正则化技术和任意教师分类器。当使用 Momentum Contrast 技术应用于 ResNet50 时，GenSCL 在 ImageNet 上实现了 77.3% 的 top-1 准确率，比传统的监督对比学习相对提高了 4.1%。此外，当应用于 ResNet50 时，我们的方法在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 上分别达到了 98.2% 和 87.0% 的最新准确率，标志着该架构的最高报告数据。 本文提出广义监督对比学习方法GenSCL，通过改进标签信息利用方式提升模型性能。 Jaewon Kim,Hyukjong Lee,Jooyoung Chang,Sang Min Park cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Neural Improvement Heuristics for Graph Combinatorial Optimization Problems
title_zh: 图组合优化问题的神经改进启发法
abstract: Recent advances in graph neural network architectures and increased computation power have revolutionized the field of combinatorial optimization (CO). Among the proposed models for CO problems, Neural Improvement (NI) models have been particularly successful. However, existing NI approaches are limited in their applicability to problems where crucial information is encoded in the edges, as they only consider node features and node-wise positional encodings. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel NI model capable of handling graph-based problems where information is encoded in the nodes, edges, or both. The presented model serves as a fundamental component for hill-climbing-based algorithms that guide the selection of neighborhood operations for each iteration. Conducted experiments demonstrate that the proposed model can recommend neighborhood operations that outperform conventional versions for the Preference Ranking Problem with a performance in the 99th percentile. We also extend the proposal to two well-known problems: the Traveling Salesman Problem and the Graph Partitioning Problem, recommending operations in the 98th and 97th percentile, respectively.
summary: Recent advances in graph neural network architectures and increased computation power have revolutionized the field of combinatorial optimization (CO). Among the proposed models for CO problems, Neural Improvement (NI) models have been particularly successful. However, existing NI approaches are limited in their applicability to problems where crucial information is encoded in the edges, as they only consider node features and node-wise positional encodings. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel NI model capable of handling graph-based problems where information is encoded in the nodes, edges, or both. The presented model serves as a fundamental component for hill-climbing-based algorithms that guide the selection of neighborhood operations for each iteration. Conducted experiments demonstrate that the proposed model can recommend neighborhood operations that outperform conventional versions for the Preference Ranking Problem with a performance in the 99th percentile. We also extend the proposal to two well-known problems: the Traveling Salesman Problem and the Graph Partitioning Problem, recommending operations in the 98th and 97th percentile, respectively.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络架构的最新进展和计算能力的提高已经彻底改变了组合优化（CO）领域。在针对 CO 问题提出的模型中，神经改进（NI）模型特别成功。然而，现有的 NI 方法对于关键信息在边缘进行编码的问题的适用性受到限制，因为它们只考虑节点特征和逐节点位置编码。为了克服这一限制，我们引入了一种新颖的 NI 模型，能够处理基于图的问题，其中信息在节点、边或两者中进行编码。所提出的模型作为基于爬山算法的基本组成部分，指导每次迭代的邻域操作的选择。进行的实验表明，所提出的模型可以推荐邻域操作，其性能优于偏好排名问题的传统版本，性能达到第 99 个百分点。我们还将该提案扩展到两个著名的问题：旅行商问题和图分区问题，分别推荐第 98 个百分位数和第 97 个百分位数的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的神经改进模型，用于解决基于图的组合优化问题，能够同时处理节点和边的信息。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经改进模型在处理边信息编码的问题时存在局限性，本文旨在开发一种能够处理节点、边或两者信息的模型，以提高组合优化问题的解决效果。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新型的神经改进模型，该模型能够处理节点和边的信息，并作为基于爬山算法的邻域操作选择的基础组件。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在偏好排序问题中的表现达到第99百分位，同时在旅行商问题和图划分问题中的表现分别达到第98和97百分位。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的模型有效克服了现有方法在处理边信息方面的局限性，并在多个组合优化问题中表现出色。

authors_text: Xiaozhi Deng,Dong Huang,Ding-Hua Chen,Chang-Dong Wang,Jian-Huang Lai
title: Strongly Augmented Contrastive Clustering
title_zh: 强增强对比聚类
abstract: Deep clustering has attracted increasing attention in recent years due to its capability of joint representation learning and clustering via deep neural networks. In its latest developments, the contrastive learning has emerged as an effective technique to substantially enhance the deep clustering performance. However, the existing contrastive learning based deep clustering algorithms mostly focus on some carefully-designed augmentations (often with limited transformations to preserve the structure), referred to as weak augmentations, but cannot go beyond the weak augmentations to explore the more opportunities in stronger augmentations (with more aggressive transformations or even severe distortions). In this paper, we present an end-to-end deep clustering approach termed Strongly Augmented Contrastive Clustering (SACC), which extends the conventional two-augmentation-view paradigm to multiple views and jointly leverages strong and weak augmentations for strengthened deep clustering. Particularly, we utilize a backbone network with triply-shared weights, where a strongly augmented view and two weakly augmented views are incorporated. Based on the representations produced by the backbone, the weak-weak view pair and the strong-weak view pairs are simultaneously exploited for the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector), which, together with the backbone, can be jointly optimized in a purely unsupervised manner. Experimental results on five challenging image datasets have shown the superiority of our SACC approach over the state-of-the-art. The code is available at https://github.com/dengxiaozhi/SACC.
summary: Deep clustering has attracted increasing attention in recent years due to its capability of joint representation learning and clustering via deep neural networks. In its latest developments, the contrastive learning has emerged as an effective technique to substantially enhance the deep clustering performance. However, the existing contrastive learning based deep clustering algorithms mostly focus on some carefully-designed augmentations (often with limited transformations to preserve the structure), referred to as weak augmentations, but cannot go beyond the weak augmentations to explore the more opportunities in stronger augmentations (with more aggressive transformations or even severe distortions). In this paper, we present an end-to-end deep clustering approach termed Strongly Augmented Contrastive Clustering (SACC), which extends the conventional two-augmentation-view paradigm to multiple views and jointly leverages strong and weak augmentations for strengthened deep clustering. Particularly, we utilize a backbone network with triply-shared weights, where a strongly augmented view and two weakly augmented views are incorporated. Based on the representations produced by the backbone, the weak-weak view pair and the strong-weak view pairs are simultaneously exploited for the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector), which, together with the backbone, can be jointly optimized in a purely unsupervised manner. Experimental results on five challenging image datasets have shown the superiority of our SACC approach over the state-of-the-art. The code is available at https://github.com/dengxiaozhi/SACC.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度聚类由于其通过深度神经网络进行联合表示学习和聚类的能力而受到越来越多的关注。在其最新发展中，对比学习已成为一种显着增强深度聚类性能的有效技术。然而，现有的基于对比学习的深度聚类算法大多集中在一些精心设计的增强（通常具有有限的变换以保留结构），称为弱增强，但不能超越弱增强来探索更强增强的更多机会（具有更激进的变换甚至严重的扭曲）。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为强增强对比聚类（SACC）的端到端深度聚类方法，它将传统的双增强视图范式扩展到多个视图，并联合利用强增强和弱增强来增强深度聚类。特别是，我们利用具有三重共享权重的主干网络，其中合并了一个强增强视图和两个弱增强视图。基于主干网产生的表示，弱-弱视图对和强-弱视图对同时用于实例级对比学习（通过实例投影仪）和集群级对比学习（通过集群投影仪），与主干网一起可以以纯粹无监督的方式联合优化。五个具有挑战性的图像数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 SACC 方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/dengxiaozhi/SACC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的深度聚类方法SACC，通过多视角联合利用强增强和弱增强策略提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习聚类方法局限于结构保留的弱增强，未能充分挖掘强增强（如剧烈变换）的潜力。
AI.method: 设计三共享权重主干网络，结合强增强视角与两个弱增强视角，通过实例级和聚类级对比学习联合优化。
AI.result: 在五个图像数据集上优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 强弱增强多视角联合学习能有效提升无监督深度聚类效果，SACC方法具有显著优势。

Based on the representations produced by the backbone, the weak-weak view pair and the strong-weak view pairs are simultaneously exploited for the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector), which, together with the backbone, can be jointly optimized in a purely unsupervised manner. Experimental results on five challenging image datasets have shown the superiority of our SACC approach over the state-of-the-art. The code is available at https://github.com/dengxiaozhi/SACC. 近年来，深度聚类由于其通过深度神经网络进行联合表示学习和聚类的能力而受到越来越多的关注。在其最新发展中，对比学习已成为一种显着增强深度聚类性能的有效技术。然而，现有的基于对比学习的深度聚类算法大多集中在一些精心设计的增强（通常具有有限的变换以保留结构），称为弱增强，但不能超越弱增强来探索更强增强的更多机会（具有更激进的变换甚至严重的扭曲）。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为强增强对比聚类（SACC）的端到端深度聚类方法，它将传统的双增强视图范式扩展到多个视图，并联合利用强增强和弱增强来增强深度聚类。特别是，我们利用具有三重共享权重的主干网络，其中合并了一个强增强视图和两个弱增强视图。基于主干网产生的表示，弱-弱视图对和强-弱视图对同时用于实例级对比学习（通过实例投影仪）和集群级对比学习（通过集群投影仪），与主干网一起可以以纯粹无监督的方式联合优化。五个具有挑战性的图像数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 SACC 方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/dengxiaozhi/SACC 获取。 本文提出一种端到端的深度聚类方法SACC，通过多视角联合利用强增强和弱增强策略提升聚类性能。 Xiaozhi Deng,Dong Huang,Ding-Hua Chen,Chang-Dong Wang,Jian-Huang Lai cs.LG,cs.CV

title: String Attractors and Infinite Words
title_zh: 字符串吸引子和无限单词
abstract: The notion of string attractor has been introduced in [Kempa and Prezza, 2018] in the context of Data Compression and it represents a set of positions of a finite word in which all of its factors can be "attracted". The smallest size $γ^*$ of a string attractor for a finite word is a lower bound for several repetitiveness measures associated with the most common compression schemes, including BWT-based and LZ-based compressors. The combinatorial properties of the measure $γ^*$ have been studied in [Mantaci et al., 2021]. Very recently, a complexity measure, called string attractor profile function, has been introduced for infinite words, by evaluating $γ^*$ on each prefix. Such a measure has been studied for automatic sequences and linearly recurrent infinite words [Schaeffer and Shallit, 2021]. In this paper, we study the relationship between such a complexity measure and other well-known combinatorial notions related to repetitiveness in the context of infinite words, such as the factor complexity and the recurrence. Furthermore, we introduce new string attractor-based complexity measures, in which the structure and the distribution of positions in a string attractor of the prefixes of infinite words are considered. We show that such measures provide a finer classification of some infinite families of words.
summary: The notion of string attractor has been introduced in [Kempa and Prezza, 2018] in the context of Data Compression and it represents a set of positions of a finite word in which all of its factors can be "attracted". The smallest size $γ^*$ of a string attractor for a finite word is a lower bound for several repetitiveness measures associated with the most common compression schemes, including BWT-based and LZ-based compressors. The combinatorial properties of the measure $γ^*$ have been studied in [Mantaci et al., 2021]. Very recently, a complexity measure, called string attractor profile function, has been introduced for infinite words, by evaluating $γ^*$ on each prefix. Such a measure has been studied for automatic sequences and linearly recurrent infinite words [Schaeffer and Shallit, 2021]. In this paper, we study the relationship between such a complexity measure and other well-known combinatorial notions related to repetitiveness in the context of infinite words, such as the factor complexity and the recurrence. Furthermore, we introduce new string attractor-based complexity measures, in which the structure and the distribution of positions in a string attractor of the prefixes of infinite words are considered. We show that such measures provide a finer classification of some infinite families of words.
abstract_zh: [Kempa 和 Prezza，2018] 在数据压缩的背景下引入了字符串吸引子的概念，它表示有限词的一组位置，其中它的所有因子都可以被“吸引”。有限字的字符串吸引子的最小大小 $γ^*$ 是与最常见的压缩方案（包括基于 BWT 和基于 LZ 的压缩器）相关的几种重复性度量的下界。 [Mantaci et al., 2021] 研究了度量 $γ^*$ 的组合属性。最近，通过评估每个前缀上的 $γ^*$ ，为无限单词引入了一种称为字符串吸引子轮廓函数的复杂性度量。这种度量已经针对自动序列和线性循环无限词进行了研究[Schaeffer 和 Shallit，2021]。在本文中，我们研究了这种复杂性度量与无限词背景下与重复性相关的其他众所周知的组合概念（例如因子复杂性和递归性）之间的关系。此外，我们引入了新的基于字符串吸引子的复杂性度量，其中考虑了无限单词前缀的字符串吸引子中的结构和位置分布。我们表明，这些措施可以对一些无限词族进行更精细的分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无限单词的字符串吸引子轮廓函数与其他重复性度量之间的关系，并引入新的基于吸引子结构的复杂性度量。
AI.motivation: 字符串吸引子是数据压缩中的关键概念，其扩展到无限单词有助于分析无限序列的重复性特征，但现有研究对其与其他组合概念的关系尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析无限单词前缀的字符串吸引子轮廓函数，结合因子复杂度和递归性等传统度量，提出考虑吸引子位置分布的新复杂性度量。
AI.result: 证明新度量能更精细地分类无限单词族，并揭示轮廓函数与因子复杂度、递归性之间的关联。
AI.conclusion: 基于吸引子结构的复杂性度量为无限单词的重复性分析提供了更细致的工具，未来可进一步探索其在压缩算法中的应用。

authors_text: Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard,Thorbjørn Mosekjær Iversen,Anders Glent Buch,Aljaz Kramberger,Simon Faarvang Mathiesen
title: A Flexible and Robust Vision Trap for Automated Part Feeder Design
title_zh: 用于自动零件送料器设计的灵活且稳健的视觉陷阱
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Fast, robust, and flexible part feeding is essential for enabling automation of low volume, high variance assembly tasks. An actuated vision-based solution on a traditional vibratory feeder, referred to here as a vision trap, should in principle be able to meet these demands for a wide range of parts. However, in practice, the flexibility of such a trap is limited as an expert is needed to both identify manageable tasks and to configure the vision system. We propose a novel approach to vision trap design in which the identification of manageable tasks is automatic and the configuration of these tasks can be delegated to an automated feeder design system. We show that the trap's capabilities can be formalized in such a way that it integrates seamlessly into the ecosystem of automated feeder design. Our results on six canonical parts show great promise for autonomous configuration of feeder systems.
summary: Fast, robust, and flexible part feeding is essential for enabling automation of low volume, high variance assembly tasks. An actuated vision-based solution on a traditional vibratory feeder, referred to here as a vision trap, should in principle be able to meet these demands for a wide range of parts. However, in practice, the flexibility of such a trap is limited as an expert is needed to both identify manageable tasks and to configure the vision system. We propose a novel approach to vision trap design in which the identification of manageable tasks is automatic and the configuration of these tasks can be delegated to an automated feeder design system. We show that the trap's capabilities can be formalized in such a way that it integrates seamlessly into the ecosystem of automated feeder design. Our results on six canonical parts show great promise for autonomous configuration of feeder systems.
abstract_zh: 快速、稳健且灵活的零件供给对于实现小批量、高差异装配任务的自动化至关重要。传统振动送料机上基于视觉的驱动解决方案（此处称为视觉陷阱）原则上应该能够满足各种零件的这些需求。然而，在实践中，这种陷阱的灵活性受到限制，因为需要专家来识别可管理的任务并配置视觉系统。我们提出了一种新的视觉陷阱设计方法，其中可管理任务的识别是自动的，并且这些任务的配置可以委托给自动供料器设计系统。我们表明，陷阱的功能可以通过无缝集成到自动喂食器设计生态系统中的方式形式化。我们对六个规范零件的结果显示了馈线系统自主配置的巨大前景。

AI.tldr: 提出一种灵活且稳健的视觉陷阱设计方法，用于自动化零件送料系统，实现自主配置。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉陷阱依赖专家手动配置和任务识别，限制了灵活性和自动化程度，需自动化的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过自动识别可管理任务并委托自动化设计系统进行配置，结合形式化方法将视觉陷阱能力整合至自动化送料系统。
AI.result: 在六个标准零件上的实验验证了该方法在自主配置送料系统中的有效性与潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的方法有效提升了自动化送料系统的灵活性和自主性，为低产量高变种装配任务提供了可行的自动化解决方案。

title: Elucidating the Design Space of Diffusion-Based Generative Models
title_zh: 阐明基于扩散的生成模型的设计空间
abstract: We argue that the theory and practice of diffusion-based generative models are currently unnecessarily convoluted and seek to remedy the situation by presenting a design space that clearly separates the concrete design choices. This lets us identify several changes to both the sampling and training processes, as well as preconditioning of the score networks. Together, our improvements yield new state-of-the-art FID of 1.79 for CIFAR-10 in a class-conditional setting and 1.97 in an unconditional setting, with much faster sampling (35 network evaluations per image) than prior designs. To further demonstrate their modular nature, we show that our design changes dramatically improve both the efficiency and quality obtainable with pre-trained score networks from previous work, including improving the FID of a previously trained ImageNet-64 model from 2.07 to near-SOTA 1.55, and after re-training with our proposed improvements to a new SOTA of 1.36.
summary: We argue that the theory and practice of diffusion-based generative models are currently unnecessarily convoluted and seek to remedy the situation by presenting a design space that clearly separates the concrete design choices. This lets us identify several changes to both the sampling and training processes, as well as preconditioning of the score networks. Together, our improvements yield new state-of-the-art FID of 1.79 for CIFAR-10 in a class-conditional setting and 1.97 in an unconditional setting, with much faster sampling (35 network evaluations per image) than prior designs. To further demonstrate their modular nature, we show that our design changes dramatically improve both the efficiency and quality obtainable with pre-trained score networks from previous work, including improving the FID of a previously trained ImageNet-64 model from 2.07 to near-SOTA 1.55, and after re-training with our proposed improvements to a new SOTA of 1.36.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，基于扩散的生成模型的理论和实践目前不必要地复杂化，并试图通过提出一个明确区分具体设计选择的设计空间来弥补这种情况。这让我们能够识别采样和训练过程以及评分网络的预处理的一些变化。总之，我们的改进使 CIFAR-10 在类条件设置下的 FID 达到 1.79，在无条件设置下达到 1.97，采样速度比之前的设计快得多（每个图像 35 个网络评估）。为了进一步证明其模块化性质，我们表明，我们的设计更改极大地提高了之前工作中预训练评分网络的效率和质量，包括将之前训练的 ImageNet-64 模型的 FID 从 2.07 提高到接近 SOTA 1.55，并在重新训练后使用我们建议的改进将新的 SOTA 提高到 1.36。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过明确扩散生成模型的设计空间，分离具体设计选择以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当前扩散模型的理论和实践过于复杂，缺乏清晰的设计框架，阻碍了进一步优化。
AI.method: 通过构建模块化设计空间，改进采样与训练流程，并优化分数网络预处理方法。

search_text: Elucidating the Design Space of Diffusion-Based Generative Models 阐明基于扩散的生成模型的设计空间 We argue that the theory and practice of diffusion-based generative models are currently unnecessarily convoluted and seek to remedy the situation by presenting a design space that clearly separates the concrete design choices. This lets us identify several changes to both the sampling and training processes, as well as preconditioning of the score networks. Together, our improvements yield new state-of-the-art FID of 1.79 for CIFAR-10 in a class-conditional setting and 1.97 in an unconditional setting, with much faster sampling (35 network evaluations per image) than prior designs. To further demonstrate their modular nature, we show that our design changes dramatically improve both the efficiency and quality obtainable with pre-trained score networks from previous work, including improving the FID of a previously trained ImageNet-64 model from 2.07 to near-SOTA 1.55, and after re-training with our proposed improvements to a new SOTA of 1.36. 我们认为，基于扩散的生成模型的理论和实践目前不必要地复杂化，并试图通过提出一个明确区分具体设计选择的设计空间来弥补这种情况。这让我们能够识别采样和训练过程以及评分网络的预处理的一些变化。总之，我们的改进使 CIFAR-10 在类条件设置下的 FID 达到 1.79，在无条件设置下达到 1.97，采样速度比之前的设计快得多（每个图像 35 个网络评估）。为了进一步证明其模块化性质，我们表明，我们的设计更改极大地提高了之前工作中预训练评分网络的效率和质量，包括将之前训练的 ImageNet-64 模型的 FID 从 2.07 提高到接近 SOTA 1.55，并在重新训练后使用我们建议的改进将新的 SOTA 提高到 1.36。 本文旨在通过明确扩散生成模型的设计空间，分离具体设计选择以提升模型性能。 Tero Karras,Miika Aittala,Timo Aila,Samuli Laine cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Dingmin Wang,Shengchao Liu,Hanchen Wang,Bernardo Cuenca Grau,Linfeng Song,Jian Tang,Song Le,Qi Liu
title: An Empirical Study of Retrieval-enhanced Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 检索增强图神经网络的实证研究
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are effective tools for graph representation learning. Most GNNs rely on a recursive neighborhood aggregation scheme, named message passing, thereby their theoretical expressive power is limited to the first-order Weisfeiler-Lehman test (1-WL). An effective approach to this challenge is to explicitly retrieve some annotated examples used to enhance GNN models. While retrieval-enhanced models have been proved to be effective in many language and vision domains, it remains an open question how effective retrieval-enhanced GNNs are when applied to graph datasets. Motivated by this, we want to explore how the retrieval idea can help augment the useful information learned in the graph neural networks, and we design a retrieval-enhanced scheme called GRAPHRETRIEVAL, which is agnostic to the choice of graph neural network models. In GRAPHRETRIEVAL, for each input graph, similar graphs together with their ground-true labels are retrieved from an existing database. Thus they can act as a potential enhancement to complete various graph property predictive tasks. We conduct comprehensive experiments over 13 datasets, and we observe that GRAPHRETRIEVAL is able to reach substantial improvements over existing GNNs. Moreover, our empirical study also illustrates that retrieval enhancement is a promising remedy for alleviating the long-tailed label distribution problem.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are effective tools for graph representation learning. Most GNNs rely on a recursive neighborhood aggregation scheme, named message passing, thereby their theoretical expressive power is limited to the first-order Weisfeiler-Lehman test (1-WL). An effective approach to this challenge is to explicitly retrieve some annotated examples used to enhance GNN models. While retrieval-enhanced models have been proved to be effective in many language and vision domains, it remains an open question how effective retrieval-enhanced GNNs are when applied to graph datasets. Motivated by this, we want to explore how the retrieval idea can help augment the useful information learned in the graph neural networks, and we design a retrieval-enhanced scheme called GRAPHRETRIEVAL, which is agnostic to the choice of graph neural network models. In GRAPHRETRIEVAL, for each input graph, similar graphs together with their ground-true labels are retrieved from an existing database. Thus they can act as a potential enhancement to complete various graph property predictive tasks. We conduct comprehensive experiments over 13 datasets, and we observe that GRAPHRETRIEVAL is able to reach substantial improvements over existing GNNs. Moreover, our empirical study also illustrates that retrieval enhancement is a promising remedy for alleviating the long-tailed label distribution problem.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是图表示学习的有效工具。大多数 GNN 依赖于递归邻域聚合方案，称为消息传递，因此它们的理论表达能力仅限于一阶 Weisfeiler-Lehman 测试（1-WL）。应对这一挑战的有效方法是显式检索一些用于增强 GNN 模型的带注释示例。虽然检索增强型模型已被证明在许多语言和视觉领域都有效，但检索增强型 GNN 在应用于图数据集时效果如何仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。受此启发，我们想要探索检索思想如何帮助增强在图神经网络中学到的有用信息，并且我们设计了一种名为 GRAPHRETRIEVAL 的检索增强方案，该方案与图神经网络模型的选择无关。在 GRAPHRETRIEVAL 中，对于每个输入图，从现有数据库中检索相似的图及其真实标签。因此，它们可以作为完成各种图属性预测任务的潜在增强功能。我们对 13 个数据集进行了全面的实验，我们观察到 GRAPHRETRIEVAL 能够比现有的 GNN 取得实质性的改进。此外，我们的实证研究还表明，检索增强是缓解长尾标签分布问题的有希望的补救措施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRAPHRETRIEVAL的检索增强图神经网络方法，通过从数据库中检索相似图及其标签来提升图属性预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络（GNN）的表达能力受限于1-WL测试，且在长尾标签分布下表现不佳，而检索增强方法在语言和视觉领域已证明有效，但尚未在图数据中充分验证。
AI.method: 设计了一种与GNN模型无关的检索增强框架GRAPHRETRIEVAL，通过为每个输入图检索相似图及其真实标签，利用这些信息增强模型对图属性的预测能力。
AI.result: 在13个数据集上的实验表明，GRAPHRETRIEVAL显著优于现有GNN方法，并有效缓解了长尾标签分布带来的性能下降问题。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强为提升GNN表达能力和处理长尾标签问题提供了有效途径，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Dong Huang,Ding-Hua Chen,Xiangji Chen,Chang-Dong Wang,Jian-Huang Lai
title: DeepCluE: Enhanced Image Clustering via Multi-layer Ensembles in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: DeepCluE：通过深度神经网络中的多层集成增强图像聚类
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence
abstract: Deep clustering has recently emerged as a promising technique for complex data clustering. Despite the considerable progress, previous deep clustering works mostly build or learn the final clustering by only utilizing a single layer of representation, e.g., by performing the K-means clustering on the last fully-connected layer or by associating some clustering loss to a specific layer, which neglect the possibilities of jointly leveraging multi-layer representations for enhancing the deep clustering performance. In view of this, this paper presents a Deep Clustering via Ensembles (DeepCluE) approach, which bridges the gap between deep clustering and ensemble clustering by harnessing the power of multiple layers in deep neural networks. In particular, we utilize a weight-sharing convolutional neural network as the backbone, which is trained with both the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector) in an unsupervised manner. Thereafter, multiple layers of feature representations are extracted from the trained network, upon which the ensemble clustering process is further conducted. Specifically, a set of diversified base clusterings are generated from the multi-layer representations via a highly efficient clusterer. Then the reliability of clusters in multiple base clusterings is automatically estimated by exploiting an entropy-based criterion, based on which the set of base clusterings are re-formulated into a weighted-cluster bipartite graph. By partitioning this bipartite graph via transfer cut, the final consensus clustering can be obtained. Experimental results on six image datasets confirm the advantages of DeepCluE over the state-of-the-art deep clustering approaches.
summary: Deep clustering has recently emerged as a promising technique for complex data clustering. Despite the considerable progress, previous deep clustering works mostly build or learn the final clustering by only utilizing a single layer of representation, e.g., by performing the K-means clustering on the last fully-connected layer or by associating some clustering loss to a specific layer, which neglect the possibilities of jointly leveraging multi-layer representations for enhancing the deep clustering performance. In view of this, this paper presents a Deep Clustering via Ensembles (DeepCluE) approach, which bridges the gap between deep clustering and ensemble clustering by harnessing the power of multiple layers in deep neural networks. In particular, we utilize a weight-sharing convolutional neural network as the backbone, which is trained with both the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector) in an unsupervised manner. Thereafter, multiple layers of feature representations are extracted from the trained network, upon which the ensemble clustering process is further conducted. Specifically, a set of diversified base clusterings are generated from the multi-layer representations via a highly efficient clusterer. Then the reliability of clusters in multiple base clusterings is automatically estimated by exploiting an entropy-based criterion, based on which the set of base clusterings are re-formulated into a weighted-cluster bipartite graph. By partitioning this bipartite graph via transfer cut, the final consensus clustering can be obtained. Experimental results on six image datasets confirm the advantages of DeepCluE over the state-of-the-art deep clustering approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度聚类最近已成为复杂数据聚类的一种有前途的技术。尽管取得了相当大的进步，但以前的深度聚类工作大多仅利用单层表示来构建或学习最终聚类，例如通过在最后一个全连接层上执行 K 均值聚类或将一些聚类损失关联到特定层，这忽略了联合利用多层表示来增强深度聚类性能的可能性。鉴于此，本文提出了一种通过集成进行深度聚类（DeepCluE）方法，该方法通过利用深度神经网络中多层的力量来弥合深度聚类和集成聚类之间的差距。特别是，我们利用权重共享卷积神经网络作为主干，以无监督的方式通过实例级对比学习（通过实例投影仪）和集群级对比学习（通过集群投影仪）进行训练。此后，从经过训练的网络中提取多层特征表示，并在此基础上进一步进行集成聚类过程。具体来说，通过高效的聚类器从多层表示生成一组多样化的基础聚类。然后，通过利用基于熵的标准来自动估计多个基本聚类中的聚类的可靠性，基于该标准，将基本聚类集重新制定为加权聚类二分图。通过转移切割对二部图进行划分，可以获得最终的共识聚类。六个图像数据集的实验结果证实了 DeepCluE 相对于最先进的深度聚类方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepCluE方法，通过深度神经网络中多层特征表示的集成增强图像聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度聚类方法仅利用单层表示，未能有效结合多层特征提升聚类效果，存在性能局限。
AI.method: 采用权重共享卷积网络作为主干，通过实例级和聚类级对比学习联合训练；提取多层特征生成多样化基聚类，基于熵准则评估可靠性并构建加权二分图，最终通过转移切割获得共识聚类。
AI.result: 在六个图像数据集上的实验验证了DeepCluE优于现有最先进的深度聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多层表示集成与自适应可靠性评估，DeepCluE有效提升了深度聚类的性能，为复杂数据聚类提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出DeepCluE方法，通过深度神经网络中多层特征表示的集成增强图像聚类性能。
motivation: 现有深度聚类方法仅利用单层表示，未能有效结合多层特征提升聚类效果，存在性能局限。
method: 采用权重共享卷积网络作为主干，通过实例级和聚类级对比学习联合训练；提取多层特征生成多样化基聚类，基于熵准则评估可靠性并构建加权二分图，最终通过转移切割获得共识聚类。
result: 在六个图像数据集上的实验验证了DeepCluE优于现有最先进的深度聚类方法。
conclusion: 通过多层表示集成与自适应可靠性评估，DeepCluE有效提升了深度聚类的性能，为复杂数据聚类提供了新思路。
search_text: DeepCluE: Enhanced Image Clustering via Multi-layer Ensembles in Deep Neural Networks DeepCluE：通过深度神经网络中的多层集成增强图像聚类 Deep clustering has recently emerged as a promising technique for complex data clustering. Despite the considerable progress, previous deep clustering works mostly build or learn the final clustering by only utilizing a single layer of representation, e.g., by performing the K-means clustering on the last fully-connected layer or by associating some clustering loss to a specific layer, which neglect the possibilities of jointly leveraging multi-layer representations for enhancing the deep clustering performance. In view of this, this paper presents a Deep Clustering via Ensembles (DeepCluE) approach, which bridges the gap between deep clustering and ensemble clustering by harnessing the power of multiple layers in deep neural networks. In particular, we utilize a weight-sharing convolutional neural network as the backbone, which is trained with both the instance-level contrastive learning (via an instance projector) and the cluster-level contrastive learning (via a cluster projector) in an unsupervised manner. Thereafter, multiple layers of feature representations are extracted from the trained network, upon which the ensemble clustering process is further conducted. Specifically, a set of diversified base clusterings are generated from the multi-layer representations via a highly efficient clusterer. Then the reliability of clusters in multiple base clusterings is automatically estimated by exploiting an entropy-based criterion, based on which the set of base clusterings are re-formulated into a weighted-cluster bipartite graph. By partitioning this bipartite graph via transfer cut, the final consensus clustering can be obtained. Experimental results on six image datasets confirm the advantages of DeepCluE over the state-of-the-art deep clustering approaches. 深度聚类最近已成为复杂数据聚类的一种有前途的技术。尽管取得了相当大的进步，但以前的深度聚类工作大多仅利用单层表示来构建或学习最终聚类，例如通过在最后一个全连接层上执行 K 均值聚类或将一些聚类损失关联到特定层，这忽略了联合利用多层表示来增强深度聚类性能的可能性。鉴于此，本文提出了一种通过集成进行深度聚类（DeepCluE）方法，该方法通过利用深度神经网络中多层的力量来弥合深度聚类和集成聚类之间的差距。特别是，我们利用权重共享卷积神经网络作为主干，以无监督的方式通过实例级对比学习（通过实例投影仪）和集群级对比学习（通过集群投影仪）进行训练。此后，从经过训练的网络中提取多层特征表示，并在此基础上进一步进行集成聚类过程。具体来说，通过高效的聚类器从多层表示生成一组多样化的基础聚类。然后，通过利用基于熵的标准来自动估计多个基本聚类中的聚类的可靠性，基于该标准，将基本聚类集重新制定为加权聚类二分图。通过转移切割对二部图进行划分，可以获得最终的共识聚类。六个图像数据集的实验结果证实了 DeepCluE 相对于最先进的深度聚类方法的优势。 本文提出DeepCluE方法，通过深度神经网络中多层特征表示的集成增强图像聚类性能。 Dong Huang,Ding-Hua Chen,Xiangji Chen,Chang-Dong Wang,Jian-Huang Lai cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zahra Mirikharaji,Kumar Abhishek,Alceu Bissoto,Catarina Barata,Sandra Avila,Eduardo Valle,M. Emre Celebi,Ghassan Hamarneh
title: A Survey on Deep Learning for Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 皮肤病变分割深度学习的调查
comment: Published in Medical Image Analysis (2023); 55 pages, 10 figures; Mirikharaji and Abhishek: Joint first authors; Celebi and Hamarneh: Joint senior authors
comments: Published in Medical Image Analysis (2023); 55 pages, 10 figures; Mirikharaji and Abhishek: Joint first authors; Celebi and Hamarneh: Joint senior authors
abstract: Skin cancer is a major public health problem that could benefit from computer-aided diagnosis to reduce the burden of this common disease. Skin lesion segmentation from images is an important step toward achieving this goal. However, the presence of natural and artificial artifacts (e.g., hair and air bubbles), intrinsic factors (e.g., lesion shape and contrast), and variations in image acquisition conditions make skin lesion segmentation a challenging task. Recently, various researchers have explored the applicability of deep learning models to skin lesion segmentation. In this survey, we cross-examine 177 research papers that deal with deep learning-based segmentation of skin lesions. We analyze these works along several dimensions, including input data (datasets, preprocessing, and synthetic data generation), model design (architecture, modules, and losses), and evaluation aspects (data annotation requirements and segmentation performance). We discuss these dimensions both from the viewpoint of select seminal works, and from a systematic viewpoint, examining how those choices have influenced current trends, and how their limitations should be addressed. To facilitate comparisons, we summarize all examined works in a comprehensive table as well as an interactive table available online at https://github.com/sfu-mial/skin-lesion-segmentation-survey.
summary: Skin cancer is a major public health problem that could benefit from computer-aided diagnosis to reduce the burden of this common disease. Skin lesion segmentation from images is an important step toward achieving this goal. However, the presence of natural and artificial artifacts (e.g., hair and air bubbles), intrinsic factors (e.g., lesion shape and contrast), and variations in image acquisition conditions make skin lesion segmentation a challenging task. Recently, various researchers have explored the applicability of deep learning models to skin lesion segmentation. In this survey, we cross-examine 177 research papers that deal with deep learning-based segmentation of skin lesions. We analyze these works along several dimensions, including input data (datasets, preprocessing, and synthetic data generation), model design (architecture, modules, and losses), and evaluation aspects (data annotation requirements and segmentation performance). We discuss these dimensions both from the viewpoint of select seminal works, and from a systematic viewpoint, examining how those choices have influenced current trends, and how their limitations should be addressed. To facilitate comparisons, we summarize all examined works in a comprehensive table as well as an interactive table available online at https://github.com/sfu-mial/skin-lesion-segmentation-survey.
abstract_zh: 皮肤癌是一个主要的公共卫生问题，计算机辅助诊断可以减轻这种常见疾病的负担。图像中的皮肤病变分割是实现这一目标的重要一步。然而，自然和人造伪影（例如毛发和气泡）、内在因素（例如病变形状和对比度）以及图像采集条件的变化的存在使得皮肤病变分割成为一项具有挑战性的任务。最近，各种研究人员探索了深度学习模型在皮肤病变分割中的适用性。在这项调查中，我们交叉审查了 177 篇涉及基于深度学习的皮肤病变分割的研究论文。我们从多个维度分析这些工作，包括输入数据（数据集、预处理和合成数据生成）、模型设计（架构、模块和损失）和评估方面（数据注释要求和分割性能）。我们从精选的开创性作品的角度和系统的角度讨论这些维度，研究这些选择如何影响当前趋势，以及应如何解决它们的局限性。为了便于比较，我们将所有检查的作品总结在一个综合表格以及一个在线交互式表格中，网址为https://github.com/sfu-mial/skin-lesion-segmentation-survey。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了177篇基于深度学习的皮肤病变分割研究，分析了数据、模型设计和评估方法等维度。
AI.motivation: 皮肤癌是重大公共卫生问题，病变分割是计算机辅助诊断的关键步骤，但存在伪影、形状差异和图像条件变化等挑战。
AI.method: 系统梳理并对比分析了深度学习在皮肤病变分割中的输入数据、模型架构、损失函数及评估指标等核心要素。
AI.result: 总结了现有方法的优缺点，提供了在线交互表格，揭示了当前研究趋势及局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步解决伪影处理、数据多样性及模型泛化能力问题，以推动临床应用落地。

title: Self-Supervised Learning as a Means To Reduce the Need for Labeled Data in Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 自监督学习是减少医学图像分析中标记数据需求的一种方法
comment: Accepted by 30th European Signal Processing Conference, EUSIPCO 2022
comments: Accepted by 30th European Signal Processing Conference, EUSIPCO 2022
abstract: One of the largest problems in medical image processing is the lack of annotated data. Labeling medical images often requires highly trained experts and can be a time-consuming process. In this paper, we evaluate a method of reducing the need for labeled data in medical image object detection by using self-supervised neural network pretraining. We use a dataset of chest X-ray images with bounding box labels for 13 different classes of anomalies. The networks are pretrained on a percentage of the dataset without labels and then fine-tuned on the rest of the dataset. We show that it is possible to achieve similar performance to a fully supervised model in terms of mean average precision and accuracy with only 60\% of the labeled data. We also show that it is possible to increase the maximum performance of a fully-supervised model by adding a self-supervised pretraining step, and this effect can be observed with even a small amount of unlabeled data for pretraining.
summary: One of the largest problems in medical image processing is the lack of annotated data. Labeling medical images often requires highly trained experts and can be a time-consuming process. In this paper, we evaluate a method of reducing the need for labeled data in medical image object detection by using self-supervised neural network pretraining. We use a dataset of chest X-ray images with bounding box labels for 13 different classes of anomalies. The networks are pretrained on a percentage of the dataset without labels and then fine-tuned on the rest of the dataset. We show that it is possible to achieve similar performance to a fully supervised model in terms of mean average precision and accuracy with only 60\% of the labeled data. We also show that it is possible to increase the maximum performance of a fully-supervised model by adding a self-supervised pretraining step, and this effect can be observed with even a small amount of unlabeled data for pretraining.
abstract_zh: 医学图像处理中最大的问题之一是缺乏注释数据。标记医学图像通常需要训练有素的专家，并且可能是一个耗时的过程。在本文中，我们评估了一种通过使用自监督神经网络预训练来减少医学图像对象检测中对标记数据的需求的方法。我们使用胸部 X 射线图像数据集，其中包含 13 种不同异常类别的边界框标签。网络在没有标签的数据集的百分比上进行预训练，然后对数据集的其余部分进行微调。我们证明，仅用 60% 的标记数据就可以在平均精度和准确度方面实现与完全监督模型类似的性能。我们还表明，通过添加自监督预训练步骤可以提高完全监督模型的最大性能，并且即使使用少量未标记数据进行预训练也可以观察到这种效果。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了使用自监督神经网络预训练减少医学图像分析中标注数据需求的方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像处理中缺乏标注数据是主要问题，标注过程耗时且依赖专家。本文旨在通过自监督学习降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 使用包含13类异常的胸部X光图像数据集，网络在部分无标签数据上预训练后，在剩余数据上微调，对比全监督模型性能。
AI.result: 仅用60%标注数据即可达到全监督模型的平均精度和准确率，且少量无标签数据预训练可提升全监督模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练能有效减少医学图像检测对标注数据的需求，并提升模型性能上限。

title: Towards view-invariant vehicle speed detection from driving simulator images
title_zh: 从驾驶模拟器图像中实现视图不变的车速检测

abstract: The use of cameras for vehicle speed measurement is much more cost effective compared to other technologies such as inductive loops, radar or laser. However, accurate speed measurement remains a challenge due to the inherent limitations of cameras to provide accurate range estimates. In addition, classical vision-based methods are very sensitive to extrinsic calibration between the camera and the road. In this context, the use of data-driven approaches appears as an interesting alternative. However, data collection requires a complex and costly setup to record videos under real traffic conditions from the camera synchronized with a high-precision speed sensor to generate the ground truth speed values. It has recently been demonstrated that the use of driving simulators (e.g., CARLA) can serve as a robust alternative for generating large synthetic datasets to enable the application of deep learning techniques for vehicle speed estimation for a single camera. In this paper, we study the same problem using multiple cameras in different virtual locations and with different extrinsic parameters. We address the question of whether complex 3D-CNN architectures are capable of implicitly learning view-invariant speeds using a single model, or whether view-specific models are more appropriate. The results are very promising as they show that a single model with data from multiple views reports even better accuracy than camera-specific models, paving the way towards a view-invariant vehicle speed measurement system.

abstract_zh: 与感应环路、雷达或激光等其他技术相比，使用摄像头进行车速测量更具成本效益。然而，由于相机提供准确距离估计的固有限制，准确的速度测量仍然是一个挑战。此外，经典的基于视觉的方法对相机和道路之间的外部校准非常敏感。在这种情况下，使用数据驱动的方法似乎是一个有趣的替代方案。然而，数据收集需要复杂且昂贵的设置来记录真实交通条件下的视频，并与高精度速度传感器同步，以生成地面真实速度值。最近已经证明，使用驾驶模拟器（例如 CARLA）可以作为生成大型合成数据集的可靠替代方案，从而能够应用深度学习技术来估计单个摄像头的车辆速度。在本文中，我们使用不同虚拟位置和不同外在参数的多个摄像机来研究同一问题。我们解决了复杂的 3D-CNN 架构是否能够使用单个模型隐式学习视图不变速度，或者视图特定模型是否更合适的问题。结果非常有希望，因为它们表明，具有多个视图数据的单一模型比相机特定模型的准确性更高，为视图不变的车辆速度测量系统铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用驾驶模拟器生成的多视角图像数据，开发一种无需依赖特定视角的车辆速度检测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头测速受视角和标定限制，实际数据采集成本高，而驾驶模拟器可生成大量合成数据，为深度学习提供训练基础。
AI.method: 通过CARLA等模拟器生成多视角合成数据，对比3D-CNN单模型与视角特异性模型的性能，验证视角不变性学习的可行性。
AI.result: 单模型在多视角数据上表现优于视角特异性模型，证明了视角不变性速度检测的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 基于多视角合成数据训练的单模型可实现更准确的车辆速度检测，为构建视角不变的测速系统提供可行方案。

title: CellCentroidFormer: Combining Self-attention and Convolution for Cell Detection
title_zh: CellCentroidFormer：结合自注意力和卷积进行细胞检测
comment: Accepted at MIUA 2022; Added experiments with CircleNets and extended figure captions
comments: Accepted at MIUA 2022; Added experiments with CircleNets and extended figure captions
abstract: Cell detection in microscopy images is important to study how cells move and interact with their environment. Most recent deep learning-based methods for cell detection use convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, inspired by the success in other computer vision applications, vision transformers (ViTs) are also used for this purpose. We propose a novel hybrid CNN-ViT model for cell detection in microscopy images to exploit the advantages of both types of deep learning models. We employ an efficient CNN, that was pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset, to extract image features and utilize transfer learning to reduce the amount of required training data. Extracted image features are further processed by a combination of convolutional and transformer layers, so that the convolutional layers can focus on local information and the transformer layers on global information. Our centroid-based cell detection method represents cells as ellipses and is end-to-end trainable. Furthermore, we show that our proposed model can outperform fully convolutional one-stage detectors on four different 2D microscopy datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/roydenwa/cell-centroid-former
summary: Cell detection in microscopy images is important to study how cells move and interact with their environment. Most recent deep learning-based methods for cell detection use convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, inspired by the success in other computer vision applications, vision transformers (ViTs) are also used for this purpose. We propose a novel hybrid CNN-ViT model for cell detection in microscopy images to exploit the advantages of both types of deep learning models. We employ an efficient CNN, that was pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset, to extract image features and utilize transfer learning to reduce the amount of required training data. Extracted image features are further processed by a combination of convolutional and transformer layers, so that the convolutional layers can focus on local information and the transformer layers on global information. Our centroid-based cell detection method represents cells as ellipses and is end-to-end trainable. Furthermore, we show that our proposed model can outperform fully convolutional one-stage detectors on four different 2D microscopy datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/roydenwa/cell-centroid-former
abstract_zh: 显微图像中的细胞检测对于研究细胞如何移动以及与其环境相互作用非常重要。最近基于深度学习的细胞检测方法使用卷积神经网络 (CNN)。然而，受到其他计算机视觉应用成功的启发，视觉转换器（ViT）也用于此目的。我们提出了一种新颖的混合 CNN-ViT 模型，用于显微图像中的细胞检测，以利用两种深度学习模型的优势。我们采用在 ImageNet 数据集上预先训练的高效 CNN 来提取图像特征并利用迁移学习来减少所需的训练数据量。提取的图像特征通过卷积层和变换层的组合进一步处理，使得卷积层可以关注局部信息，变换层可以关注全局信息。我们基于质心的细胞检测方法将细胞表示为椭圆，并且是端到端可训练的。此外，我们表明，我们提出的模型在四个不同的二维显微镜数据集上可以优于完全卷积的一级探测器。代码位于：https://github.com/roydenwa/cell-centroid-former

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合自注意力机制和卷积神经网络的混合模型CellCentroidFormer，用于显微镜图像中的细胞检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNNs）已被广泛用于细胞检测，但受视觉变换器（ViTs）在其他计算机视觉任务中成功应用的启发，本文旨在探索结合CNN和ViT的优势以提升细胞检测性能。
AI.method: 本文采用预训练的高效CNN提取图像特征，并结合卷积层和变换器层进行特征处理，以利用局部和全局信息。细胞检测方法基于椭圆表示，且模型端到端可训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的模型在四个不同的二维显微镜数据集上优于全卷积单阶段检测器。
AI.conclusion: CellCentroidFormer通过结合CNN和ViT的优势，实现了更高效的细胞检测，具有较好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Sergio Martín Serrano,David Fernández Llorca,Iván García Daza,Miguel Ángel Sotelo
title: Insertion of real agents behaviors in CARLA autonomous driving simulator
title_zh: 在 CARLA 自动驾驶模拟器中插入真实代理行为
comment: International Conference on Computer-Human Interaction Research and Applications (CHIRA) 2022
comments: International Conference on Computer-Human Interaction Research and Applications (CHIRA) 2022
abstract: The role of simulation in autonomous driving is becoming increasingly important due to the need for rapid prototyping and extensive testing. The use of physics-based simulation involves multiple benefits and advantages at a reasonable cost while eliminating risks to prototypes, drivers and vulnerable road users. However, there are two main limitations. First, the well-known reality gap which refers to the discrepancy between reality and simulation that prevents simulated autonomous driving experience from enabling effective real-world performance. Second, the lack of empirical knowledge about the behavior of real agents, including backup drivers or passengers and other road users such as vehicles, pedestrians or cyclists. Agent simulation is usually pre-programmed deterministically, randomized probabilistically or generated based on real data, but it does not represent behaviors from real agents interacting with the specific simulated scenario. In this paper we present a preliminary framework to enable real-time interaction between real agents and the simulated environment (including autonomous vehicles) and generate synthetic sequences from simulated sensor data from multiple views that can be used for training predictive systems that rely on behavioral models. Our approach integrates immersive virtual reality and human motion capture systems with the CARLA simulator for autonomous driving. We describe the proposed hardware and software architecture, and discuss about the so-called behavioural gap or presence. We present preliminary, but promising, results that support the potential of this methodology and discuss about future steps.
summary: The role of simulation in autonomous driving is becoming increasingly important due to the need for rapid prototyping and extensive testing. The use of physics-based simulation involves multiple benefits and advantages at a reasonable cost while eliminating risks to prototypes, drivers and vulnerable road users. However, there are two main limitations. First, the well-known reality gap which refers to the discrepancy between reality and simulation that prevents simulated autonomous driving experience from enabling effective real-world performance. Second, the lack of empirical knowledge about the behavior of real agents, including backup drivers or passengers and other road users such as vehicles, pedestrians or cyclists. Agent simulation is usually pre-programmed deterministically, randomized probabilistically or generated based on real data, but it does not represent behaviors from real agents interacting with the specific simulated scenario. In this paper we present a preliminary framework to enable real-time interaction between real agents and the simulated environment (including autonomous vehicles) and generate synthetic sequences from simulated sensor data from multiple views that can be used for training predictive systems that rely on behavioral models. Our approach integrates immersive virtual reality and human motion capture systems with the CARLA simulator for autonomous driving. We describe the proposed hardware and software architecture, and discuss about the so-called behavioural gap or presence. We present preliminary, but promising, results that support the potential of this methodology and discuss about future steps.
abstract_zh: 由于需要快速原型设计和广泛的测试，仿真在自动驾驶中的作用变得越来越重要。基于物理的模拟的使用以合理的成本带来多种好处和优势，同时消除了原型机、驾驶员和弱势道路使用者的风险。然而，有两个主要限制。首先，众所周知的现实差距，指的是现实与模拟之间的差异，它阻碍了模拟自动驾驶体验实现有效的现实世界性能。其次，缺乏关于真实代理人行为的经验知识，包括后备司机或乘客以及其他道路使用者，如车辆、行人或骑自行车的人。代理模拟通常是确定性、随机概率或基于真实数据生成的预编程，但它并不代表真实代理与特定模拟场景交互的行为。在本文中，我们提出了一个初步框架，以实现真实代理与模拟环境（包括自动驾驶车辆）之间的实时交互，并从多个视图的模拟传感器数据生成合成序列，可用于训练依赖于行为模型的预测系统。我们的方法将沉浸式虚拟现实和人体动作捕捉系统与用于自动驾驶的 CARLA 模拟器集成。我们描述了所提出的硬件和软件架构，并讨论了所谓的行为差距或存在。我们提出了初步但有希望的结果，支持这种方法的潜力，并讨论了未来的步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将真实代理行为嵌入CARLA自动驾驶模拟器的框架，以生成用于训练预测系统的合成传感器数据。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶模拟存在现实差距及缺乏真实代理行为数据的问题，导致模拟场景与实际环境不匹配，影响系统训练效果。
AI.method: 结合沉浸式虚拟现实、人体动作捕捉系统与CARLA模拟器，构建软硬件架构，实现真实代理与模拟环境的实时交互。
AI.result: 初步实验验证了该方法在生成多视角合成数据方面的可行性，为预测系统训练提供了潜在支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有助于缩小现实差距，但需进一步优化硬件集成与行为建模以提升模拟真实性。

search_text: Insertion of real agents behaviors in CARLA autonomous driving simulator 在 CARLA 自动驾驶模拟器中插入真实代理行为 The role of simulation in autonomous driving is becoming increasingly important due to the need for rapid prototyping and extensive testing. The use of physics-based simulation involves multiple benefits and advantages at a reasonable cost while eliminating risks to prototypes, drivers and vulnerable road users. However, there are two main limitations. First, the well-known reality gap which refers to the discrepancy between reality and simulation that prevents simulated autonomous driving experience from enabling effective real-world performance. Second, the lack of empirical knowledge about the behavior of real agents, including backup drivers or passengers and other road users such as vehicles, pedestrians or cyclists. Agent simulation is usually pre-programmed deterministically, randomized probabilistically or generated based on real data, but it does not represent behaviors from real agents interacting with the specific simulated scenario. In this paper we present a preliminary framework to enable real-time interaction between real agents and the simulated environment (including autonomous vehicles) and generate synthetic sequences from simulated sensor data from multiple views that can be used for training predictive systems that rely on behavioral models. Our approach integrates immersive virtual reality and human motion capture systems with the CARLA simulator for autonomous driving. We describe the proposed hardware and software architecture, and discuss about the so-called behavioural gap or presence. We present preliminary, but promising, results that support the potential of this methodology and discuss about future steps. 由于需要快速原型设计和广泛的测试，仿真在自动驾驶中的作用变得越来越重要。基于物理的模拟的使用以合理的成本带来多种好处和优势，同时消除了原型机、驾驶员和弱势道路使用者的风险。然而，有两个主要限制。首先，众所周知的现实差距，指的是现实与模拟之间的差异，它阻碍了模拟自动驾驶体验实现有效的现实世界性能。其次，缺乏关于真实代理人行为的经验知识，包括后备司机或乘客以及其他道路使用者，如车辆、行人或骑自行车的人。代理模拟通常是确定性、随机概率或基于真实数据生成的预编程，但它并不代表真实代理与特定模拟场景交互的行为。在本文中，我们提出了一个初步框架，以实现真实代理与模拟环境（包括自动驾驶车辆）之间的实时交互，并从多个视图的模拟传感器数据生成合成序列，可用于训练依赖于行为模型的预测系统。我们的方法将沉浸式虚拟现实和人体动作捕捉系统与用于自动驾驶的 CARLA 模拟器集成。我们描述了所提出的硬件和软件架构，并讨论了所谓的行为差距或存在。我们提出了初步但有希望的结果，支持这种方法的潜力，并讨论了未来的步骤。 本文提出一种将真实代理行为嵌入CARLA自动驾驶模拟器的框架，以生成用于训练预测系统的合成传感器数据。 Sergio Martín Serrano,David Fernández Llorca,Iván García Daza,Miguel Ángel Sotelo cs.RO

title: Putting AI Ethics into Practice: The Hourglass Model of Organizational AI Governance
title_zh: 将人工智能伦理付诸实践：组织人工智能治理的沙漏模型
abstract: The organizational use of artificial intelligence (AI) has rapidly spread across various sectors. Alongside the awareness of the benefits brought by AI, there is a growing consensus on the necessity of tackling the risks and potential harms, such as bias and discrimination, brought about by advanced AI technologies. A multitude of AI ethics principles have been proposed to tackle these risks, but the outlines of organizational processes and practices for ensuring socially responsible AI development are in a nascent state. To address the paucity of comprehensive governance models, we present an AI governance framework, the hourglass model of organizational AI governance, which targets organizations that develop and use AI systems. The framework is designed to help organizations deploying AI systems translate ethical AI principles into practice and align their AI systems and processes with the forthcoming European AI Act. The hourglass framework includes governance requirements at the environmental, organizational, and AI system levels. At the AI system level, we connect governance requirements to AI system life cycles to ensure governance throughout the system's life span. The governance model highlights the systemic nature of AI governance and opens new research avenues into its practical implementation, the mechanisms that connect different AI governance layers, and the dynamics between the AI governance actors. The model also offers a starting point for organizational decision-makers to consider the governance components needed to ensure social acceptability, mitigate risks, and realize the potential of AI.
summary: The organizational use of artificial intelligence (AI) has rapidly spread across various sectors. Alongside the awareness of the benefits brought by AI, there is a growing consensus on the necessity of tackling the risks and potential harms, such as bias and discrimination, brought about by advanced AI technologies. A multitude of AI ethics principles have been proposed to tackle these risks, but the outlines of organizational processes and practices for ensuring socially responsible AI development are in a nascent state. To address the paucity of comprehensive governance models, we present an AI governance framework, the hourglass model of organizational AI governance, which targets organizations that develop and use AI systems. The framework is designed to help organizations deploying AI systems translate ethical AI principles into practice and align their AI systems and processes with the forthcoming European AI Act. The hourglass framework includes governance requirements at the environmental, organizational, and AI system levels. At the AI system level, we connect governance requirements to AI system life cycles to ensure governance throughout the system's life span. The governance model highlights the systemic nature of AI governance and opens new research avenues into its practical implementation, the mechanisms that connect different AI governance layers, and the dynamics between the AI governance actors. The model also offers a starting point for organizational decision-makers to consider the governance components needed to ensure social acceptability, mitigate risks, and realize the potential of AI.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的组织应用已迅速扩展到各个领域。除了认识到人工智能带来的好处外，人们越来越认识到有必要解决先进人工智能技术带来的风险和潜在危害，例如偏见和歧视。为了应对这些风险，人们提出了多种人工智能伦理原则，但确保对社会负责的人工智能开发的组织流程和实践的轮廓仍处于萌芽状态。为了解决缺乏全面治理模型的问题，我们提出了一个人工智能治理框架，即组织人工智能治理的沙漏模型，针对开发和使用人工智能系统的组织。该框架旨在帮助部署人工智能系统的组织将人工智能道德原则转化为实践，并使他们的人工智能系统和流程与即将出台的欧洲人工智能法案保持一致。沙漏框架包括环境、组织和人工智能系统层面的治理要求。在AI系统层面，我们将治理需求与AI系统生命周期联系起来，以确保整个系统生命周期的治理。该治理模型凸显了人工智能治理的系统性，并为其实际实施、连接不同人工智能治理层的机制以及人工智能治理参与者之间的动态开辟了新的研究途径。该模型还为组织决策者提供了一个起点，以考虑确保社会可接受性、降低风险和实现人工智能潜力所需的治理组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'沙漏模型'的组织级AI治理框架，旨在将AI伦理原则转化为实际实践，并与欧盟AI法案接轨。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI伦理原则众多，但缺乏系统性的组织治理模型来应对AI风险，如偏见和歧视，且现有治理实践处于初级阶段。
AI.method: 构建包含环境层、组织层和AI系统层的沙漏模型，将治理要求与AI系统生命周期结合，强调治理的系统性和多层级联动机制。
AI.result: 该模型为组织提供治理组件参考，帮助确保AI社会可接受性、风险缓解及技术潜力实现，同时开辟了治理机制和动态关系的新研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 沙漏模型为组织决策者提供了实践AI伦理的系统性框架，是连接伦理原则与实际治理的关键桥梁。

authors_text: Federico Chiariotti,Matteo Drago,Paolo Testolina,Mattia Lecci,Andrea Zanella,Michele Zorzi
title: Temporal Characterization of VR Traffic for Network Slicing Requirement Definition
title_zh: 用于网络切片需求定义的 VR 流量的时间特征
comment: 17 pages. 18 figures. This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing. Copyright may change without notice. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.07043
comments: 17 pages. 18 figures. This paper has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing. Copyright may change without notice. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.07043
abstract: Over the past few years, the concept of VR has attracted increasing interest thanks to its extensive industrial and commercial applications. Currently, the 3D models of the virtual scenes are generally stored in the VR visor itself, which operates as a standalone device. However, applications that entail multi-party interactions will likely require the scene to be processed by an external server and then streamed to the visors. However, the stringent Quality of Service (QoS) constraints imposed by VR's interactive nature require Network Slicing (NS) solutions, for which profiling the traffic generated by the VR application is crucial. To this end, we collected more than 4 hours of traces in a real setup and analyzed their temporal correlation. More specifically, we focused on the CBR encoding mode, which should generate more predictable traffic streams. From the collected data, we then distilled two prediction models for future frame size, which can be instrumental in the design of dynamic resource allocation algorithms. Our results show that even the state-of-the-art H.264 CBR mode can have significant fluctuations, which can impact the NS optimization. We then exploited the proposed models to dynamically determine the Service Level Agreement (SLA) parameters in an NS scenario, providing service with the required QoS while minimizing resource usage.
summary: Over the past few years, the concept of VR has attracted increasing interest thanks to its extensive industrial and commercial applications. Currently, the 3D models of the virtual scenes are generally stored in the VR visor itself, which operates as a standalone device. However, applications that entail multi-party interactions will likely require the scene to be processed by an external server and then streamed to the visors. However, the stringent Quality of Service (QoS) constraints imposed by VR's interactive nature require Network Slicing (NS) solutions, for which profiling the traffic generated by the VR application is crucial. To this end, we collected more than 4 hours of traces in a real setup and analyzed their temporal correlation. More specifically, we focused on the CBR encoding mode, which should generate more predictable traffic streams. From the collected data, we then distilled two prediction models for future frame size, which can be instrumental in the design of dynamic resource allocation algorithms. Our results show that even the state-of-the-art H.264 CBR mode can have significant fluctuations, which can impact the NS optimization. We then exploited the proposed models to dynamically determine the Service Level Agreement (SLA) parameters in an NS scenario, providing service with the required QoS while minimizing resource usage.
abstract_zh: 近年来，VR概念因其广泛的工业和商业应用而引起了越来越多的关注。目前，虚拟场景的 3D 模型通常存储在 VR 遮阳板本身中，VR 遮阳板作为独立设备运行。然而，需要多方交互的应用程序可能需要外部服务器处理场景，然后传输到遮阳板。然而，VR 的交互性质所带来的严格服务质量 (QoS) 限制需要网络切片 (NS) 解决方案，而分析 VR 应用程序生成的流量至关重要。为此，我们在实际设置中收集了 4 个多小时的轨迹，并分析了它们的时间相关性。更具体地说，我们专注于 CBR 编码模式，它应该生成更可预测的流量流。然后，我们从收集的数据中提炼出两个未来帧大小的预测模型，这有助于动态资源分配算法的设计。我们的结果表明，即使是最先进的 H.264 CBR 模式也会有显着的波动，这可能会影响 NS 优化。然后，我们利用所提出的模型动态确定 NS 场景中的服务级别协议 (SLA) 参数，提供具有所需 QoS 的服务，同时最大限度地减少资源使用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析虚拟现实（VR）应用的流量时序特征，为网络切片（NS）的资源分配提供依据。
AI.motivation: 随着多用户交互式VR应用的普及，其流量特性对网络服务质量（QoS）提出严格要求，需通过网络切片实现动态资源优化。
AI.method: 采集真实环境下的4小时VR流量数据，聚焦恒定比特率（CBR）编码模式，建立未来帧大小预测模型以辅助资源分配算法设计。
AI.result: 实验表明H.264 CBR模式下流量仍存在显著波动，基于预测模型可动态调整网络切片服务等级协议（SLA）参数，在保证QoS的同时减少资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: VR流量时序特征分析对网络切片参数优化具有重要意义，预测模型可有效支持动态资源分配策略的制定。

search_text: Temporal Characterization of VR Traffic for Network Slicing Requirement Definition 用于网络切片需求定义的 VR 流量的时间特征 Over the past few years, the concept of VR has attracted increasing interest thanks to its extensive industrial and commercial applications. Currently, the 3D models of the virtual scenes are generally stored in the VR visor itself, which operates as a standalone device. However, applications that entail multi-party interactions will likely require the scene to be processed by an external server and then streamed to the visors. However, the stringent Quality of Service (QoS) constraints imposed by VR's interactive nature require Network Slicing (NS) solutions, for which profiling the traffic generated by the VR application is crucial. To this end, we collected more than 4 hours of traces in a real setup and analyzed their temporal correlation. More specifically, we focused on the CBR encoding mode, which should generate more predictable traffic streams. From the collected data, we then distilled two prediction models for future frame size, which can be instrumental in the design of dynamic resource allocation algorithms. Our results show that even the state-of-the-art H.264 CBR mode can have significant fluctuations, which can impact the NS optimization. We then exploited the proposed models to dynamically determine the Service Level Agreement (SLA) parameters in an NS scenario, providing service with the required QoS while minimizing resource usage. 近年来，VR概念因其广泛的工业和商业应用而引起了越来越多的关注。目前，虚拟场景的 3D 模型通常存储在 VR 遮阳板本身中，VR 遮阳板作为独立设备运行。然而，需要多方交互的应用程序可能需要外部服务器处理场景，然后传输到遮阳板。然而，VR 的交互性质所带来的严格服务质量 (QoS) 限制需要网络切片 (NS) 解决方案，而分析 VR 应用程序生成的流量至关重要。为此，我们在实际设置中收集了 4 个多小时的轨迹，并分析了它们的时间相关性。更具体地说，我们专注于 CBR 编码模式，它应该生成更可预测的流量流。然后，我们从收集的数据中提炼出两个未来帧大小的预测模型，这有助于动态资源分配算法的设计。我们的结果表明，即使是最先进的 H.264 CBR 模式也会有显着的波动，这可能会影响 NS 优化。然后，我们利用所提出的模型动态确定 NS 场景中的服务级别协议 (SLA) 参数，提供具有所需 QoS 的服务，同时最大限度地减少资源使用。 本文通过分析虚拟现实（VR）应用的流量时序特征，为网络切片（NS）的资源分配提供依据。 Federico Chiariotti,Matteo Drago,Paolo Testolina,Mattia Lecci,Andrea Zanella,Michele Zorzi cs.NI,eess.IV

authors_text: Pengyuan Lyu,Chengquan Zhang,Shanshan Liu,Meina Qiao,Yangliu Xu,Liang Wu,Kun Yao,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: MaskOCR: Text Recognition with Masked Encoder-Decoder Pretraining
title_zh: MaskOCR：使用掩码编码器-解码器预训练进行文本识别
abstract: Text images contain both visual and linguistic information. However, existing pre-training techniques for text recognition mainly focus on either visual representation learning or linguistic knowledge learning. In this paper, we propose a novel approach MaskOCR to unify vision and language pre-training in the classical encoder-decoder recognition framework. We adopt the masked image modeling approach to pre-train the feature encoder using a large set of unlabeled real text images, which allows us to learn strong visual representations. In contrast to introducing linguistic knowledge with an additional language model, we directly pre-train the sequence decoder. Specifically, we transform text data into synthesized text images to unify the data modalities of vision and language, and enhance the language modeling capability of the sequence decoder using a proposed masked image-language modeling scheme. Significantly, the encoder is frozen during the pre-training phase of the sequence decoder. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance on benchmark datasets, including Chinese and English text images.
summary: Text images contain both visual and linguistic information. However, existing pre-training techniques for text recognition mainly focus on either visual representation learning or linguistic knowledge learning. In this paper, we propose a novel approach MaskOCR to unify vision and language pre-training in the classical encoder-decoder recognition framework. We adopt the masked image modeling approach to pre-train the feature encoder using a large set of unlabeled real text images, which allows us to learn strong visual representations. In contrast to introducing linguistic knowledge with an additional language model, we directly pre-train the sequence decoder. Specifically, we transform text data into synthesized text images to unify the data modalities of vision and language, and enhance the language modeling capability of the sequence decoder using a proposed masked image-language modeling scheme. Significantly, the encoder is frozen during the pre-training phase of the sequence decoder. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance on benchmark datasets, including Chinese and English text images.
abstract_zh: 文本图像包含视觉和语言信息。然而，现有的文本识别预训练技术主要集中在视觉表示学习或语言知识学习。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法 MaskOCR 在经典编码器-解码器识别框架中统一视觉和语言预训练。我们采用掩模图像建模方法，使用大量未标记的真实文本图像来预训练特征编码器，这使我们能够学习强大的视觉表示。与通过额外的语言模型引入语言知识相比，我们直接预训练序列解码器。具体来说，我们将文本数据转换为合成文本图像，以统一视觉和语言的数据模态，并使用提出的掩模图像语言建模方案增强序列解码器的语言建模能力。值得注意的是，编码器在序列解码器的预训练阶段被冻结。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在基准数据集（包括中文和英文文本图像）上取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaskOCR方法，通过掩码编码器-解码器预训练统一视觉与语言信息，提升文本识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本识别预训练方法仅单独关注视觉或语言信息，未能有效融合两者，限制了模型表现。
AI.method: 采用掩码图像建模预训练特征编码器，利用合成文本图像统一模态，并通过掩码图像-语言建模直接预训练序列解码器，预训练时冻结编码器。
AI.result: 在中英文基准数据集上取得优于现有方法的文本识别性能。
AI.conclusion: MaskOCR通过统一视觉与语言预训练有效提升文本识别效果，为未来研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Jay Zhangjie Wu,David Junhao Zhang,Wynne Hsu,Mengmi Zhang,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Label-Efficient Online Continual Object Detection in Streaming Video
title_zh: 流视频中高效标签的在线连续目标检测
abstract: Humans can watch a continuous video stream and effortlessly perform continual acquisition and transfer of new knowledge with minimal supervision yet retaining previously learnt experiences. In contrast, existing continual learning (CL) methods require fully annotated labels to effectively learn from individual frames in a video stream. Here, we examine a more realistic and challenging problem$\unicode{x2014}$Label-Efficient Online Continual Object Detection (LEOCOD) in streaming video. We propose a plug-and-play module, Efficient-CLS, that can be easily inserted into and improve existing continual learners for object detection in video streams with reduced data annotation costs and model retraining time. We show that our method has achieved significant improvement with minimal forgetting across all supervision levels on two challenging CL benchmarks for streaming real-world videos. Remarkably, with only 25% annotated video frames, our method still outperforms the base CL learners, which are trained with 100% annotations on all video frames. The data and source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/showlab/Efficient-CLS.
summary: Humans can watch a continuous video stream and effortlessly perform continual acquisition and transfer of new knowledge with minimal supervision yet retaining previously learnt experiences. In contrast, existing continual learning (CL) methods require fully annotated labels to effectively learn from individual frames in a video stream. Here, we examine a more realistic and challenging problem$\unicode{x2014}$Label-Efficient Online Continual Object Detection (LEOCOD) in streaming video. We propose a plug-and-play module, Efficient-CLS, that can be easily inserted into and improve existing continual learners for object detection in video streams with reduced data annotation costs and model retraining time. We show that our method has achieved significant improvement with minimal forgetting across all supervision levels on two challenging CL benchmarks for streaming real-world videos. Remarkably, with only 25% annotated video frames, our method still outperforms the base CL learners, which are trained with 100% annotations on all video frames. The data and source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/showlab/Efficient-CLS.
abstract_zh: 人类可以观看连续的视频流，并在最少的监督下毫不费力地持续获取和转移新知识，同时保留以前学到的经验。相比之下，现有的持续学习（CL）方法需要完全注释的标签才能有效地从视频流中的各个帧中学习。在这里，我们研究流视频中一个更现实且更具挑战性的问题$\unicode{x2014}$Label-Efficient Online Continuous Object Inspection (LEOCOD)。我们提出了一个即插即用的模块 Efficient-CLS，它可以轻松插入并改进现有的连续学习器，用于视频流中的对象检测，同时减少数据注释成本和模型重新训练时间。我们表明，我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的流媒体真实世界视频的 CL 基准上，在所有监督级别上取得了显着的改进，并且遗忘最少。值得注意的是，尽管只有 25% 带注释的视频帧，我们的方法仍然优于基础 CL 学习器，后者是在所有视频帧上使用 100% 注释进行训练的。数据和源代码将在 https://github.com/showlab/Efficient-CLS 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的在线持续目标检测方法，用于流媒体视频，在减少标注成本的情况下实现知识持续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法需要完全标注的标签才能有效学习视频流中的单帧数据，而人类只需少量监督即可完成连续知识获取，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一个即插即用模块Efficient-CLS，可集成到现有持续学习框架中，降低数据标注成本和模型再训练时间。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的持续学习基准测试中，仅使用25%标注视频帧时，该方法仍优于使用100%标注数据的基线方法，且遗忘率显著降低。
AI.conclusion: Efficient-CLS模块有效提升了流媒体视频目标检测的标签效率，为现实场景中的持续学习提供了可行方案。
