motivation: 现有持续学习方法需要完全标注的标签才能有效学习视频流中的单帧数据，而人类只需少量监督即可完成连续知识获取，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
method: 设计了一个即插即用模块Efficient-CLS，可集成到现有持续学习框架中，降低数据标注成本和模型再训练时间。
result: 在两个具有挑战性的持续学习基准测试中，仅使用25%标注视频帧时，该方法仍优于使用100%标注数据的基线方法，且遗忘率显著降低。
conclusion: Efficient-CLS模块有效提升了流媒体视频目标检测的标签效率，为现实场景中的持续学习提供了可行方案。
search_text: Label-Efficient Online Continual Object Detection in Streaming Video 流视频中高效标签的在线连续目标检测 Humans can watch a continuous video stream and effortlessly perform continual acquisition and transfer of new knowledge with minimal supervision yet retaining previously learnt experiences. In contrast, existing continual learning (CL) methods require fully annotated labels to effectively learn from individual frames in a video stream. Here, we examine a more realistic and challenging problem$\unicode{x2014}$Label-Efficient Online Continual Object Detection (LEOCOD) in streaming video. We propose a plug-and-play module, Efficient-CLS, that can be easily inserted into and improve existing continual learners for object detection in video streams with reduced data annotation costs and model retraining time. We show that our method has achieved significant improvement with minimal forgetting across all supervision levels on two challenging CL benchmarks for streaming real-world videos. Remarkably, with only 25% annotated video frames, our method still outperforms the base CL learners, which are trained with 100% annotations on all video frames. The data and source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/showlab/Efficient-CLS. 人类可以观看连续的视频流，并在最少的监督下毫不费力地持续获取和转移新知识，同时保留以前学到的经验。相比之下，现有的持续学习（CL）方法需要完全注释的标签才能有效地从视频流中的各个帧中学习。在这里，我们研究流视频中一个更现实且更具挑战性的问题$\unicode{x2014}$Label-Efficient Online Continuous Object Inspection (LEOCOD)。我们提出了一个即插即用的模块 Efficient-CLS，它可以轻松插入并改进现有的连续学习器，用于视频流中的对象检测，同时减少数据注释成本和模型重新训练时间。我们表明，我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的流媒体真实世界视频的 CL 基准上，在所有监督级别上取得了显着的改进，并且遗忘最少。值得注意的是，尽管只有 25% 带注释的视频帧，我们的方法仍然优于基础 CL 学习器，后者是在所有视频帧上使用 100% 注释进行训练的。数据和源代码将在 https://github.com/showlab/Efficient-CLS 上公开提供。 本文提出了一种高效的在线持续目标检测方法，用于流媒体视频，在减少标注成本的情况下实现知识持续学习。 Jay Zhangjie Wu,David Junhao Zhang,Wynne Hsu,Mengmi Zhang,Mike Zheng Shou cs.CV

authors_text: Jakub Jurek,Andrzej Materka,Kamil Ludwisiak,Agata Majos,Kamil Gorczewski,Kamil Cepuch,Agata Zawadzka
title: Supervised Denoising of Diffusion-Weighted Magnetic Resonance Images Using a Convolutional Neural Network and Transfer Learning
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络和迁移学习对扩散加权磁共振图像进行监督去噪
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method for denoising diffusion-weighted images (DWI) of the brain using a convolutional neural network trained on realistic, synthetic MR data. We compare our results to averaging of repeated scans, a widespread method used in clinics to improve signal-to-noise ratio of MR images. To obtain training data for transfer learning, we model, in a data-driven fashion, the effects of echo-planar imaging (EPI): Nyquist ghosting and ramp sampling. We introduce these effects to the digital phantom of brain anatomy (BrainWeb). Instead of simulating pseudo-random noise with a defined probability distribution, we perform noise scans with a brain-DWI-designed protocol to obtain realistic noise maps. We combine them with the simulated, noise-free EPI images. We also measure the Point Spread Function in a DW image of an AJR-approved geometrical phantom and inter-scan movement in a brain scan of a healthy volunteer. Their influence on image denoising and averaging of repeated images is investigated at different signal-to-noise ratio levels. Denoising performance is evaluated quantitatively using the simulated EPI images and qualitatively in real EPI DWI of the brain. We show that the application of our method allows for a significant reduction in scan time by lowering the number of repeated scans. Visual comparisons made in the acquired brain images indicate that the denoised single-repetition images are less noisy than multi-repetition averaged images. We also analyse the convolutional neural network denoiser and point out the challenges accompanying this denoising method.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method for denoising diffusion-weighted images (DWI) of the brain using a convolutional neural network trained on realistic, synthetic MR data. We compare our results to averaging of repeated scans, a widespread method used in clinics to improve signal-to-noise ratio of MR images. To obtain training data for transfer learning, we model, in a data-driven fashion, the effects of echo-planar imaging (EPI): Nyquist ghosting and ramp sampling. We introduce these effects to the digital phantom of brain anatomy (BrainWeb). Instead of simulating pseudo-random noise with a defined probability distribution, we perform noise scans with a brain-DWI-designed protocol to obtain realistic noise maps. We combine them with the simulated, noise-free EPI images. We also measure the Point Spread Function in a DW image of an AJR-approved geometrical phantom and inter-scan movement in a brain scan of a healthy volunteer. Their influence on image denoising and averaging of repeated images is investigated at different signal-to-noise ratio levels. Denoising performance is evaluated quantitatively using the simulated EPI images and qualitatively in real EPI DWI of the brain. We show that the application of our method allows for a significant reduction in scan time by lowering the number of repeated scans. Visual comparisons made in the acquired brain images indicate that the denoised single-repetition images are less noisy than multi-repetition averaged images. We also analyse the convolutional neural network denoiser and point out the challenges accompanying this denoising method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于真实合成 MR 数据训练的卷积神经网络对大脑扩散加权图像 (DWI) 进行去噪的方法。我们将我们的结果与重复扫描的平均值进行比较，这是临床中广泛使用的一种提高 MR 图像信噪比的方法。为了获得迁移学习的训练数据，我们以数据驱动的方式对平面回波成像（EPI）的效果进行建模：奈奎斯特重影和斜坡采样。我们将这些效应引入大脑解剖学数字模型 (BrainWeb)。我们不是用定义的概率分布来模拟伪随机噪声，而是使用大脑 DWI 设计的协议进行噪声扫描，以获得真实的噪声图。我们将它们与模拟的无噪声 EPI 图像结合起来。我们还测量了 AJR 批准的几何体模的 DW 图像中的点扩散函数，以及健康志愿者脑部扫描中的扫描间运动。在不同的信噪比水平下研究了它们对图像去噪和重复图像平均的影响。使用模拟 EPI 图像定量评估去噪性能，并在大脑的真实 EPI DWI 中定性评估。我们表明，我们的方法的应用可以通过减少重复扫描的次数来显着减少扫描时间。在获取的大脑图像中进行的视觉比较表明，去噪的单次重复图像比多次重复平均图像的噪声要小。我们还分析了卷积神经网络降噪器，并指出了这种降噪方法所面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络和迁移学习的脑部扩散加权磁共振图像去噪方法，通过合成数据训练模型并对比传统扫描平均法。
AI.motivation: 临床常用多次扫描平均法提升MRI信噪比但耗时较长，需开发更高效的去噪方法以减少扫描次数。
AI.method: 构建包含Nyquist幽灵和梯度采样效应的合成数据集，结合真实噪声图与模拟EPI图像训练CNN，并通过几何体测量和志愿者扫描验证去噪效果。
AI.result: 实验表明单次扫描去噪图像噪声低于多次平均图像，可显著缩短扫描时间，但CNN去噪方法仍存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持图像质量前提下有效降低扫描次数，为临床提供潜在优化方案，但需进一步解决CNN去噪的稳定性问题。

authors_text: J. E. Dominguez-Vidal,Nicolas Rodriguez,Rene Alquezar,Alberto Sanfeliu
title: Perception-Intention-Action Cycle in Human-Robot Collaborative Tasks
title_zh: 人机协作任务中的感知-意图-行动循环
abstract: In this work we argue that in Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC) tasks, the Perception-Action cycle in HRC tasks can not fully explain the collaborative behaviour of the human and robot and it has to be extended to Perception-Intention-Action cycle, where Intention is a key topic. In some cases, agent Intention can be perceived or inferred by the other agent, but in others, it has to be explicitly informed to the other agent to succeed the goal of the HRC task. The Perception-Intention-Action cycle includes three basic functional procedures: Perception-Intention, Situation Awareness and Action. The Perception and the Intention are the input of the Situation Awareness, which evaluates the current situation and projects it, into the future situation. The agents receive this information, plans and agree with the actions to be executed and modify their action roles while perform the HRC task. In this work, we validate the Perception-Intention-Action cycle in a joint object transportation task, modeling the Perception-Intention-Action cycle through a force model which uses real life and social forces. The perceived world is projected into a force world and the human intention (perceived or informed) is also modelled as a force that acts in the HRC task. Finally, we show that the action roles (master-slave, collaborative, neutral or adversary) are intrinsic to any HRC task and they appear in the different steps of a collaborative sequence of actions performed during the task.
summary: In this work we argue that in Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC) tasks, the Perception-Action cycle in HRC tasks can not fully explain the collaborative behaviour of the human and robot and it has to be extended to Perception-Intention-Action cycle, where Intention is a key topic. In some cases, agent Intention can be perceived or inferred by the other agent, but in others, it has to be explicitly informed to the other agent to succeed the goal of the HRC task. The Perception-Intention-Action cycle includes three basic functional procedures: Perception-Intention, Situation Awareness and Action. The Perception and the Intention are the input of the Situation Awareness, which evaluates the current situation and projects it, into the future situation. The agents receive this information, plans and agree with the actions to be executed and modify their action roles while perform the HRC task. In this work, we validate the Perception-Intention-Action cycle in a joint object transportation task, modeling the Perception-Intention-Action cycle through a force model which uses real life and social forces. The perceived world is projected into a force world and the human intention (perceived or informed) is also modelled as a force that acts in the HRC task. Finally, we show that the action roles (master-slave, collaborative, neutral or adversary) are intrinsic to any HRC task and they appear in the different steps of a collaborative sequence of actions performed during the task.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们认为在人机协作（HRC）任务中，HRC任务中的感知-行动循环不能完全解释人类和机器人的协作行为，必须扩展到感知-意图-行动循环，其中意图是一个关键主题。在某些情况下，智能体意图可以被其他智能体感知或推断，但在其他情况下，必须明确告知其他智能体才能成功实现 HRC 任务的目标。感知-意图-行动循环包括三个基本功能程序：感知-意图、情境意识和行动。感知和意图是情境意识的输入，它评估当前情境并将其预测到未来情境。代理接收此信息、计划并同意要执行的操作，并在执行 HRC 任务时修改其操作角色。在这项工作中，我们验证了联合对象运输任务中的感知-意图-行动循环，通过使用现实生活和社会力量的力模型对感知-意图-行动循环进行建模。感知世界被投射到一个力量世界中，人类意图（感知或告知）也被建模为在 HRC 任务中起作用的力量。最后，我们表明，动作角色（主从、协作、中立或对手）是任何 HRC 任务所固有的，并且它们出现在任务期间执行的协作动作序列的不同步骤中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了人机协作任务中感知-意图-行动循环模型，以更全面地解释协作行为。
AI.motivation: 传统感知-行动循环无法充分解释人机协作中的复杂行为，需引入意图作为关键要素以提升协作目标的达成。
AI.method: 通过力模型模拟感知-意图-行动循环，将现实与社会力结合，将人类意图建模为作用力，并在联合物体运输任务中验证。
AI.result: 证明行动角色（如主从、协作、中立或对抗）是人机协作任务的固有属性，并在协作步骤中动态出现。
AI.conclusion: 感知-意图-行动循环为理解人机协作提供了新框架，强调意图显式传递与角色动态调整的重要性。

In some cases, agent Intention can be perceived or inferred by the other agent, but in others, it has to be explicitly informed to the other agent to succeed the goal of the HRC task. The Perception-Intention-Action cycle includes three basic functional procedures: Perception-Intention, Situation Awareness and Action. The Perception and the Intention are the input of the Situation Awareness, which evaluates the current situation and projects it, into the future situation. The agents receive this information, plans and agree with the actions to be executed and modify their action roles while perform the HRC task. In this work, we validate the Perception-Intention-Action cycle in a joint object transportation task, modeling the Perception-Intention-Action cycle through a force model which uses real life and social forces. The perceived world is projected into a force world and the human intention (perceived or informed) is also modelled as a force that acts in the HRC task. Finally, we show that the action roles (master-slave, collaborative, neutral or adversary) are intrinsic to any HRC task and they appear in the different steps of a collaborative sequence of actions performed during the task. 在这项工作中，我们认为在人机协作（HRC）任务中，HRC任务中的感知-行动循环不能完全解释人类和机器人的协作行为，必须扩展到感知-意图-行动循环，其中意图是一个关键主题。在某些情况下，智能体意图可以被其他智能体感知或推断，但在其他情况下，必须明确告知其他智能体才能成功实现 HRC 任务的目标。感知-意图-行动循环包括三个基本功能程序：感知-意图、情境意识和行动。感知和意图是情境意识的输入，它评估当前情境并将其预测到未来情境。代理接收此信息、计划并同意要执行的操作，并在执行 HRC 任务时修改其操作角色。在这项工作中，我们验证了联合对象运输任务中的感知-意图-行动循环，通过使用现实生活和社会力量的力模型对感知-意图-行动循环进行建模。感知世界被投射到一个力量世界中，人类意图（感知或告知）也被建模为在 HRC 任务中起作用的力量。最后，我们表明，动作角色（主从、协作、中立或对手）是任何 HRC 任务所固有的，并且它们出现在任务期间执行的协作动作序列的不同步骤中。 本文提出并验证了人机协作任务中感知-意图-行动循环模型，以更全面地解释协作行为。 J. E. Dominguez-Vidal,Nicolas Rodriguez,Rene Alquezar,Alberto Sanfeliu cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC

title: Predecessor Features
title_zh: 前身特征
abstract: Any reinforcement learning system must be able to identify which past events contributed to observed outcomes, a problem known as credit assignment. A common solution to this problem is to use an eligibility trace to assign credit to recency-weighted set of experienced events. However, in many realistic tasks, the set of recently experienced events are only one of the many possible action events that could have preceded the current outcome. This suggests that reinforcement learning can be made more efficient by allowing credit assignment to any viable preceding state, rather than only those most recently experienced. Accordingly, we examine ``Predecessor Features'', the fully bootstrapped version of van Hasselt's ``Expected Trace'', an algorithm that achieves this richer form of credit assignment. By maintaining a representation that approximates the expected sum of past occupancies, this algorithm allows temporal difference (TD) errors to be propagated accurately to a larger number of predecessor states than conventional methods, greatly improving learning speed. The algorithm can also be naturally extended from tabular state representation to feature representations allowing for increased performance on a wide range of environments. We demonstrate several use cases for Predecessor Features and compare its performance with other approaches.
summary: Any reinforcement learning system must be able to identify which past events contributed to observed outcomes, a problem known as credit assignment. A common solution to this problem is to use an eligibility trace to assign credit to recency-weighted set of experienced events. However, in many realistic tasks, the set of recently experienced events are only one of the many possible action events that could have preceded the current outcome. This suggests that reinforcement learning can be made more efficient by allowing credit assignment to any viable preceding state, rather than only those most recently experienced. Accordingly, we examine ``Predecessor Features'', the fully bootstrapped version of van Hasselt's ``Expected Trace'', an algorithm that achieves this richer form of credit assignment. By maintaining a representation that approximates the expected sum of past occupancies, this algorithm allows temporal difference (TD) errors to be propagated accurately to a larger number of predecessor states than conventional methods, greatly improving learning speed. The algorithm can also be naturally extended from tabular state representation to feature representations allowing for increased performance on a wide range of environments. We demonstrate several use cases for Predecessor Features and compare its performance with other approaches.
abstract_zh: 任何强化学习系统都必须能够识别哪些过去的事件促成了观察到的结果，这个问题被称为学分分配。此问题的常见解决方案是使用资格跟踪将信用分配给经历过的事件的新近度加权集。然而，在许多现实任务中，最近经历的一组事件只是当前结果之前可能发生的许多可能的行动事件之一。这表明，通过允许将学分分配给任何可行的先前状态，而不仅仅是最近经历过的状态，可以使强化学习更加有效。因此，我们研究了“前身特征”，这是范哈塞尔特“预期轨迹”的完全引导版本，这是一种实现这种更丰富的信用分配形式的算法。通过维持近似过去占用率预期总和的表示，该算法允许将时间差 (TD) 误差准确地传播到比传统方法更多的前驱状态，从而大大提高学习速度。该算法还可以自然地从表格状态表示扩展到特征表示，从而在各种环境中提高性能。我们演示了前身特征的几个用例，并将其性能与其他方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'Predecessor Features'的强化学习算法，通过更全面的信用分配机制提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统信用分配方法仅依赖近期事件，无法有效处理复杂任务中多样的前置状态，导致学习效率受限。
AI.method: 基于van Hasselt的'Expected Trace'算法，通过维护过去状态占用的期望表示，扩展信用传播范围至所有潜在前置状态，并支持特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个环境中验证了该方法的学习速度显著优于传统方法，且能有效扩展到高维特征空间。
AI.conclusion: Predecessor Features通过更全面的信用分配机制，为强化学习提供了更高效的状态价值传播方案。

title: Efficient Multi-Purpose Cross-Attention Based Image Alignment Block for Edge Devices
title_zh: 适用于边缘设备的高效多用途基于交叉注意的图像对齐模块
comment: Accepted into Embedded Vision Workshop 2022 of CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted into Embedded Vision Workshop 2022 of CVPR 2022
abstract: Image alignment, also known as image registration, is a critical block used in many computer vision problems. One of the key factors in alignment is efficiency, as inefficient aligners can cause significant overhead to the overall problem. In the literature, there are some blocks that appear to do the alignment operation, although most do not focus on efficiency. Therefore, an image alignment block which can both work in time and/or space and can work on edge devices would be beneficial for almost all networks dealing with multiple images. Given its wide usage and importance, we propose an efficient, cross-attention-based, multi-purpose image alignment block (XABA) suitable to work within edge devices. Using cross-attention, we exploit the relationships between features extracted from images. To make cross-attention feasible for real-time image alignment problems and handle large motions, we provide a pyramidal block based cross-attention scheme. This also captures local relationships besides reducing memory requirements and number of operations. Efficient XABA models achieve real-time requirements of running above 20 FPS performance on NVIDIA Jetson Xavier with 30W power consumption compared to other powerful computers. Used as a sub-block in a larger network, XABA also improves multi-image super-resolution network performance in comparison to other alignment methods.
summary: Image alignment, also known as image registration, is a critical block used in many computer vision problems. One of the key factors in alignment is efficiency, as inefficient aligners can cause significant overhead to the overall problem. In the literature, there are some blocks that appear to do the alignment operation, although most do not focus on efficiency. Therefore, an image alignment block which can both work in time and/or space and can work on edge devices would be beneficial for almost all networks dealing with multiple images. Given its wide usage and importance, we propose an efficient, cross-attention-based, multi-purpose image alignment block (XABA) suitable to work within edge devices. Using cross-attention, we exploit the relationships between features extracted from images. To make cross-attention feasible for real-time image alignment problems and handle large motions, we provide a pyramidal block based cross-attention scheme. This also captures local relationships besides reducing memory requirements and number of operations. Efficient XABA models achieve real-time requirements of running above 20 FPS performance on NVIDIA Jetson Xavier with 30W power consumption compared to other powerful computers. Used as a sub-block in a larger network, XABA also improves multi-image super-resolution network performance in comparison to other alignment methods.
abstract_zh: 图像对齐，也称为图像配准，是许多计算机视觉问题中使用的关键模块。对齐的关键因素之一是效率，因为低效的对齐器可能会给整个问题带来巨大的开销。在文献中，有一些块似乎可以执行对齐操作，尽管大多数块并不关注效率。因此，既可以在时间和/或空间上工作并且可以在边缘设备上工作的图像对齐块对于几乎所有处理多个图像的网络来说都是有益的。鉴于其广泛的用途和重要性，我们提出了一种高效、基于交叉注意力的多用途图像对齐块（XABA），适合在边缘设备中工作。使用交叉注意力，我们利用从图像中提取的特征之间的关系。为了使交叉注意适用于实时图像对齐问题并处理大运动，我们提供了一种基于金字塔块的交叉注意方案。除了减少内存需求和操作数量之外，这还可以捕获本地关系。高效的 XABA 模型在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier 上实现了运行超过 20 FPS 性能的实时要求，与其他功能强大的计算机相比，功耗为 30W。与其他对齐方法相比，XABA 用作较大网络中的子块，还提高了多图像超分辨率网络性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交叉注意力的高效多用途图像对齐模块XABA，适用于边缘设备的实时图像对齐任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图像对齐方法在效率和边缘设备适配性方面存在不足，难以满足实时性与低功耗需求，需开发兼顾性能与资源限制的对齐方案。
AI.method: 通过交叉注意力机制捕捉图像特征间关系，结合金字塔结构优化计算效率，减少内存占用与运算量，适配边缘设备实时处理需求。
AI.result: XABA在NVIDIA Jetson Xavier上实现20+ FPS的实时性能（30W功耗），且作为子模块提升多图像超分辨率网络性能，优于传统对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: XABA为边缘设备提供了高效、通用的图像对齐解决方案，在保证实时性的同时提升多图像任务的整体性能。

authors_text: Yutong Wang,Renze Lou,Kai Zhang,MaoYan Chen,Yujiu Yang
title: MORE: A Metric Learning Based Framework for Open-domain Relation Extraction
title_zh: 更多：基于度量学习的开放域关系提取框架
abstract: Open relation extraction (OpenRE) is the task of extracting relation schemes from open-domain corpora. Most existing OpenRE methods either do not fully benefit from high-quality labeled corpora or can not learn semantic representation directly, affecting downstream clustering efficiency. To address these problems, in this work, we propose a novel learning framework named MORE (Metric learning-based Open Relation Extraction). The framework utilizes deep metric learning to obtain rich supervision signals from labeled data and drive the neural model to learn semantic relational representation directly. Experiments result in two real-world datasets show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code is available on Github.
summary: Open relation extraction (OpenRE) is the task of extracting relation schemes from open-domain corpora. Most existing OpenRE methods either do not fully benefit from high-quality labeled corpora or can not learn semantic representation directly, affecting downstream clustering efficiency. To address these problems, in this work, we propose a novel learning framework named MORE (Metric learning-based Open Relation Extraction). The framework utilizes deep metric learning to obtain rich supervision signals from labeled data and drive the neural model to learn semantic relational representation directly. Experiments result in two real-world datasets show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code is available on Github.
abstract_zh: 开放关系提取（OpenRE）是从开放域语料库中提取关系方案的任务。大多数现有的 OpenRE 方法要么不能充分受益于高质量的标记语料库，要么无法直接学习语义表示，从而影响下游的聚类效率。为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 MORE（基于度量学习的开放关系提取）的新型学习框架。该框架利用深度度量学习从标记数据中获取丰富的监督信号，并驱动神经模型直接学习语义关系表示。两个现实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他最先进的基线。我们的源代码可以在 Github 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MORE框架，通过度量学习解决开放领域关系抽取中语义表示学习不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放关系抽取方法无法充分使用高质量标注数据或直接学习语义表示，导致下游任务效率低下。
AI.method: 设计基于深度度量学习的MORE框架，利用标注数据生成丰富监督信号，驱动模型直接学习语义关系表示。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上实验表明，MORE方法优于现有先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MORE框架有效解决了开放关系抽取中的语义表示学习问题，代码已开源供研究使用。

search_text: MORE: A Metric Learning Based Framework for Open-domain Relation Extraction 更多：基于度量学习的开放域关系提取框架 Open relation extraction (OpenRE) is the task of extracting relation schemes from open-domain corpora. Most existing OpenRE methods either do not fully benefit from high-quality labeled corpora or can not learn semantic representation directly, affecting downstream clustering efficiency. To address these problems, in this work, we propose a novel learning framework named MORE (Metric learning-based Open Relation Extraction). The framework utilizes deep metric learning to obtain rich supervision signals from labeled data and drive the neural model to learn semantic relational representation directly. Experiments result in two real-world datasets show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art baselines. Our source code is available on Github. 开放关系提取（OpenRE）是从开放域语料库中提取关系方案的任务。大多数现有的 OpenRE 方法要么不能充分受益于高质量的标记语料库，要么无法直接学习语义表示，从而影响下游的聚类效率。为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 MORE（基于度量学习的开放关系提取）的新型学习框架。该框架利用深度度量学习从标记数据中获取丰富的监督信号，并驱动神经模型直接学习语义关系表示。两个现实世界数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于其他最先进的基线。我们的源代码可以在 Github 上找到。 本文提出MORE框架，通过度量学习解决开放领域关系抽取中语义表示学习不足的问题。 Yutong Wang,Renze Lou,Kai Zhang,MaoYan Chen,Yujiu Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Needle In A Haystack, Fast: Benchmarking Image Perceptual Similarity Metrics At Scale
title_zh: 大海捞针，快速：大规模图像感知相似度指标基准测试
abstract: The advent of the internet, followed shortly by the social media made it ubiquitous in consuming and sharing information between anyone with access to it. The evolution in the consumption of media driven by this change, led to the emergence of images as means to express oneself, convey information and convince others efficiently. With computer vision algorithms progressing radically over the last decade, it is become easier and easier to study at scale the role of images in the flow of information online. While the research questions and overall pipelines differ radically, almost all start with a crucial first step - evaluation of global perceptual similarity between different images. That initial step is crucial for overall pipeline performance and processes most images. A number of algorithms are available and currently used to perform it, but so far no comprehensive review was available to guide the choice of researchers as to the choice of an algorithm best suited to their question, assumptions and computational resources. With this paper we aim to fill this gap, showing that classical computer vision methods are not necessarily the best approach, whereas a pair of relatively little used methods - Dhash perceptual hash and SimCLR v2 ResNets achieve excellent performance, scale well and are computationally efficient.
summary: The advent of the internet, followed shortly by the social media made it ubiquitous in consuming and sharing information between anyone with access to it. The evolution in the consumption of media driven by this change, led to the emergence of images as means to express oneself, convey information and convince others efficiently. With computer vision algorithms progressing radically over the last decade, it is become easier and easier to study at scale the role of images in the flow of information online. While the research questions and overall pipelines differ radically, almost all start with a crucial first step - evaluation of global perceptual similarity between different images. That initial step is crucial for overall pipeline performance and processes most images. A number of algorithms are available and currently used to perform it, but so far no comprehensive review was available to guide the choice of researchers as to the choice of an algorithm best suited to their question, assumptions and computational resources. With this paper we aim to fill this gap, showing that classical computer vision methods are not necessarily the best approach, whereas a pair of relatively little used methods - Dhash perceptual hash and SimCLR v2 ResNets achieve excellent performance, scale well and are computationally efficient.
abstract_zh: 互联网的出现以及随后不久的社交媒体的出现，使得互联网在任何有权访问它的人之间消费和共享信息变得无处不在。这种变化推动了媒体消费的演变，导致图像的出现，作为表达自我、传达信息和有效说服他人的手段。随着计算机视觉算法在过去十年中的巨大进步，大规模研究图像在在线信息流中的作用变得越来越容易。虽然研究问题和整体流程截然不同，但几乎所有研究都从关键的第一步开始——评估不同图像之间的全局感知相似性。该初始步骤对于整体管道性能和处理大多数图像至关重要。目前有许多算法可供使用，但迄今为止还没有全面的审查来指导研究人员选择最适合他们的问题、假设和计算资源的算法。通过本文，我们旨在填补这一空白，表明经典的计算机视觉方法不一定是最好的方法，而一对相对较少使用的方法 - Dhash 感知哈希和 SimCLR v2 ResNets 实现了出色的性能、良好的扩展性和计算效率。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在大规模数据下评估图像感知相似性度量方法的性能，以指导研究者选择合适算法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像感知相似性度量方法缺乏全面比较，研究者难以根据自身需求选择最佳算法。
AI.method: 对多种图像相似性算法进行基准测试，比较其在大规模数据集上的准确率、扩展性及计算效率。
AI.result: 传统计算机视觉方法表现不佳，而Dhash感知哈希和SimCLR v2 ResNets在性能与效率上均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 论文填补了算法选择指南的空白，推荐使用Dhash和SimCLR v2 ResNets以实现高效准确的图像相似性评估。

authors_text: Manuela Geiß,Raphael Wagner,Martin Baresch,Josef Steiner,Michael Zwick
title: Automatic Bounding Box Annotation with Small Training Data Sets for Industrial Manufacturing
title_zh: 用于工业制造的带有小型训练数据集的自动边界框注释
abstract: In the past few years, object detection has attracted a lot of attention in the context of human-robot collaboration and Industry 5.0 due to enormous quality improvements in deep learning technologies. In many applications, object detection models have to be able to quickly adapt to a changing environment, i.e., to learn new objects. A crucial but challenging prerequisite for this is the automatic generation of new training data which currently still limits the broad application of object detection methods in industrial manufacturing. In this work, we discuss how to adapt state-of-the-art object detection methods for the task of automatic bounding box annotation for the use case where the background is homogeneous and the object's label is provided by a human. We compare an adapted version of Faster R-CNN and the Scaled Yolov4-p5 architecture and show that both can be trained to distinguish unknown objects from a complex but homogeneous background using only a small amount of training data.
summary: In the past few years, object detection has attracted a lot of attention in the context of human-robot collaboration and Industry 5.0 due to enormous quality improvements in deep learning technologies. In many applications, object detection models have to be able to quickly adapt to a changing environment, i.e., to learn new objects. A crucial but challenging prerequisite for this is the automatic generation of new training data which currently still limits the broad application of object detection methods in industrial manufacturing. In this work, we discuss how to adapt state-of-the-art object detection methods for the task of automatic bounding box annotation for the use case where the background is homogeneous and the object's label is provided by a human. We compare an adapted version of Faster R-CNN and the Scaled Yolov4-p5 architecture and show that both can be trained to distinguish unknown objects from a complex but homogeneous background using only a small amount of training data.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，由于深度学习技术质量的巨大进步，物体检测在人机协作和工业 5.0 背景下引起了广泛关注。在许多应用中，对象检测模型必须能够快速适应不断变化的环境，即学习新对象。一个关键但具有挑战性的先决条件是自动生成新的训练数据，目前仍然限制了物体检测方法在工业制造中的广泛应用。在这项工作中，我们讨论如何采用最先进的对象检测方法来执行自动边界框注释任务，以适应背景均匀且对象标签由人类提供的用例。我们比较了 Faster R-CNN 的改编版本和 Scaled Yolov4-p5 架构，并表明两者都可以通过训练来仅使用少量训练数据从复杂但均匀的背景中区分未知对象。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨如何在工业制造场景中，利用少量训练数据实现自动边界框标注，以应对动态环境下的新目标检测需求。
AI.motivation: 工业制造中物体检测需快速适应新目标，但现有方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际场景中数据获取困难，限制了技术应用。
AI.method: 对Faster R-CNN和Scaled Yolov4-p5架构进行改进，针对背景均一且有人类标签的场景，比较两种模型在小数据集下的性能。
AI.result: 两种改进模型均能有效区分复杂但均一背景中的未知目标，且仅需少量训练数据即可达到可用检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的模型为工业场景下的自动标注提供了可行方案，减少了数据依赖性，推动了检测技术在制造业的实际落地。

authors_text: Tianyu Chen,Shaohan Huang,Yuan Xie,Binxing Jiao,Daxin Jiang,Haoyi Zhou,Jianxin Li,Furu Wei
title: Task-Specific Expert Pruning for Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
title_zh: 针对稀疏专家混合的特定任务专家剪枝
abstract: The sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model is powerful for large-scale pre-training and has achieved promising results due to its model capacity. However, with trillions of parameters, MoE is hard to be deployed on cloud or mobile environment. The inference of MoE requires expert parallelism, which is not hardware-friendly and communication expensive. Especially for resource-limited downstream tasks, such sparse structure has to sacrifice a lot of computing efficiency for limited performance gains. In this work, we observe most experts contribute scarcely little to the MoE fine-tuning and inference. We further propose a general method to progressively drop the non-professional experts for the target downstream task, which preserves the benefits of MoE while reducing the MoE model into one single-expert dense model. Our experiments reveal that the fine-tuned single-expert model could preserve 99.3% benefits from MoE across six different types of tasks while enjoying 2x inference speed with free communication cost.
summary: The sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model is powerful for large-scale pre-training and has achieved promising results due to its model capacity. However, with trillions of parameters, MoE is hard to be deployed on cloud or mobile environment. The inference of MoE requires expert parallelism, which is not hardware-friendly and communication expensive. Especially for resource-limited downstream tasks, such sparse structure has to sacrifice a lot of computing efficiency for limited performance gains. In this work, we observe most experts contribute scarcely little to the MoE fine-tuning and inference. We further propose a general method to progressively drop the non-professional experts for the target downstream task, which preserves the benefits of MoE while reducing the MoE model into one single-expert dense model. Our experiments reveal that the fine-tuned single-expert model could preserve 99.3% benefits from MoE across six different types of tasks while enjoying 2x inference speed with free communication cost.
abstract_zh: 稀疏专家混合（MoE）模型对于大规模预训练来说非常强大，并且由于其模型容量而取得了可喜的结果。然而，MoE 拥有数万亿个参数，很难部署在云端或移动环境中。 MoE的推理需要专家并行，这对硬件不友好并且通信昂贵。特别是对于资源有限的下游任务，这种稀疏结构必须牺牲大量计算效率来换取有限的性能提升。在这项工作中，我们观察到大多数专家对 MoE 的微调和推理的贡献几乎没有。我们进一步提出了一种通用方法，逐步减少目标下游任务的非专业专家，这保留了 MoE 的优势，同时将 MoE 模型简化为一个单专家密集模型。我们的实验表明，经过微调的单专家模型可以在六种不同类型的任务中保留 MoE 99.3% 的收益，同时享受 2 倍的推理速度和免费的通信成本。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对特定任务的专家剪枝方法，用于稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，以提高其在资源受限环境下的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型在大规模预训练中表现出色，但其庞大的参数量使得在云或移动设备上部署变得困难，且推理过程中需要专家并行，通信成本高，资源有限的任务难以获得性能提升。
AI.method: 作者观察到大多数专家在MoE的微调和推理中贡献很小，因此提出了一种通用的方法，逐步去除非专业专家，从而将MoE模型转化为单专家密集模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，经过微调的单专家模型在六个不同任务中保留了MoE模型99.3%的性能优势，同时推理速度提高了2倍且无需通信成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持MoE性能优势的同时，显著提高了模型的推理效率，适用于资源受限的下游任务。

authors_text: Yongtao Ge,Qiang Zhou,Xinlong Wang,Zhibin Wang,Hao Li,Chunhua Shen
title: Point-Teaching: Weakly Semi-Supervised Object Detection with Point Annotations
title_zh: 点教学：带有点注释的弱半监督目标检测
abstract: Point annotations are considerably more time-efficient than bounding box annotations. However, how to use cheap point annotations to boost the performance of semi-supervised object detection remains largely unsolved. In this work, we present Point-Teaching, a weakly semi-supervised object detection framework to fully exploit the point annotations. Specifically, we propose a Hungarian-based point matching method to generate pseudo labels for point annotated images. We further propose multiple instance learning (MIL) approaches at the level of images and points to supervise the object detector with point annotations. Finally, we propose a simple-yet-effective data augmentation, termed point-guided copy-paste, to reduce the impact of the unmatched points. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a few datasets and various data regimes.
summary: Point annotations are considerably more time-efficient than bounding box annotations. However, how to use cheap point annotations to boost the performance of semi-supervised object detection remains largely unsolved. In this work, we present Point-Teaching, a weakly semi-supervised object detection framework to fully exploit the point annotations. Specifically, we propose a Hungarian-based point matching method to generate pseudo labels for point annotated images. We further propose multiple instance learning (MIL) approaches at the level of images and points to supervise the object detector with point annotations. Finally, we propose a simple-yet-effective data augmentation, termed point-guided copy-paste, to reduce the impact of the unmatched points. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a few datasets and various data regimes.
abstract_zh: 点注释比边界框注释更加省时。然而，如何使用廉价的点注释来提高半监督目标检测的性能在很大程度上仍然悬而未决。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Point-Teaching，这是一种弱半监督对象检测框架，可以充分利用点注释。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于匈牙利的点匹配方法来为点注释图像生成伪标签。我们进一步提出了图像和点级别的多实例学习（MIL）方法，以通过点注释来监督对象检测器。最后，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据增强，称为点引导复制粘贴，以减少不匹配点的影响。实验证明了我们的方法在一些数据集和各种数据机制上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点标注的弱半监督目标检测框架Point-Teaching，通过伪标签生成和数据增强提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 点标注比边界框标注更高效，但如何有效利用点标注提升半监督目标检测性能仍是一个未解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出匈牙利点匹配生成伪标签、图像与点级多实例学习（MIL）以及点引导的复制粘贴数据增强方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集和不同数据制度下均有效，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: Point-Teaching通过有效利用点标注，为半监督目标检测提供了简单而有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Kai Han,Yunhe Wang,Jianyuan Guo,Yehui Tang,Enhua Wu
title: Vision GNN: An Image is Worth Graph of Nodes
title_zh: Vision GNN：图像是有价值的节点图
abstract: Network architecture plays a key role in the deep learning-based computer vision system. The widely-used convolutional neural network and transformer treat the image as a grid or sequence structure, which is not flexible to capture irregular and complex objects. In this paper, we propose to represent the image as a graph structure and introduce a new Vision GNN (ViG) architecture to extract graph-level feature for visual tasks. We first split the image to a number of patches which are viewed as nodes, and construct a graph by connecting the nearest neighbors. Based on the graph representation of images, we build our ViG model to transform and exchange information among all the nodes. ViG consists of two basic modules: Grapher module with graph convolution for aggregating and updating graph information, and FFN module with two linear layers for node feature transformation. Both isotropic and pyramid architectures of ViG are built with different model sizes. Extensive experiments on image recognition and object detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our ViG architecture. We hope this pioneering study of GNN on general visual tasks will provide useful inspiration and experience for future research. The PyTorch code is available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/Efficient-AI-Backbones and the MindSpore code is available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models.
summary: Network architecture plays a key role in the deep learning-based computer vision system. The widely-used convolutional neural network and transformer treat the image as a grid or sequence structure, which is not flexible to capture irregular and complex objects. In this paper, we propose to represent the image as a graph structure and introduce a new Vision GNN (ViG) architecture to extract graph-level feature for visual tasks. We first split the image to a number of patches which are viewed as nodes, and construct a graph by connecting the nearest neighbors. Based on the graph representation of images, we build our ViG model to transform and exchange information among all the nodes. ViG consists of two basic modules: Grapher module with graph convolution for aggregating and updating graph information, and FFN module with two linear layers for node feature transformation. Both isotropic and pyramid architectures of ViG are built with different model sizes. Extensive experiments on image recognition and object detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our ViG architecture. We hope this pioneering study of GNN on general visual tasks will provide useful inspiration and experience for future research. The PyTorch code is available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/Efficient-AI-Backbones and the MindSpore code is available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models.
abstract_zh: 网络架构在基于深度学习的计算机视觉系统中起着关键作用。广泛使用的卷积神经网络和Transformer将图像视为网格或序列结构，这对于捕获不规则和复杂的物体并不灵活。在本文中，我们建议将图像表示为图结构，并引入一种新的 Vision GNN (ViG) 架构来提取视觉任务的图级特征。我们首先将图像分割为许多被视为节点的块，并通过连接最近的邻居来构造一个图。基于图像的图形表示，我们构建了 ViG 模型来在所有节点之间转换和交换信息。 ViG 由两个基本模块组成：具有用于聚合和更新图信息的图卷积的 Grapher 模块，以及具有两个用于节点特征转换的线性层的 FFN 模块。 ViG 的各向同性和金字塔架构都是使用不同的模型大小构建的。关于图像识别和目标检测任务的大量实验证明了我们的 ViG 架构的优越性。我们希望 GNN 在一般视觉任务上的开创性研究能为未来的研究提供有益的启发和经验。 PyTorch 代码可在 https://github.com/huawei-noah/Efficient-AI-Backbones 获取，MindSpore 代码可在 https://gitee.com/mindspore/models 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图神经网络的视觉模型ViG，用于图像识别和目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN和Transformer将图像视为网格或序列结构，难以灵活捕捉不规则和复杂物体的关系。
AI.method: 将图像分割为图节点，构建邻近关系图，设计Grapher模块（图卷积）和FFN模块进行特征聚合与转换，构建不同规模的ViG架构。
AI.result: 在图像识别和目标检测任务中验证了ViG架构的优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 开创性地将GNN应用于通用视觉任务，为未来研究提供参考，代码已公开在PyTorch和MindSpore平台。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于图神经网络的视觉模型ViG，用于图像识别和目标检测任务。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN和Transformer将图像视为网格或序列结构，难以灵活捕捉不规则和复杂物体的关系。
ai_content.method: 将图像分割为图节点，构建邻近关系图，设计Grapher模块（图卷积）和FFN模块进行特征聚合与转换，构建不同规模的ViG架构。
ai_content.result: 在图像识别和目标检测任务中验证了ViG架构的优越性，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 开创性地将GNN应用于通用视觉任务，为未来研究提供参考，代码已公开在PyTorch和MindSpore平台。

search_text: Vision GNN: An Image is Worth Graph of Nodes Vision GNN：图像是有价值的节点图 Network architecture plays a key role in the deep learning-based computer vision system. The widely-used convolutional neural network and transformer treat the image as a grid or sequence structure, which is not flexible to capture irregular and complex objects. In this paper, we propose to represent the image as a graph structure and introduce a new Vision GNN (ViG) architecture to extract graph-level feature for visual tasks. We first split the image to a number of patches which are viewed as nodes, and construct a graph by connecting the nearest neighbors. Based on the graph representation of images, we build our ViG model to transform and exchange information among all the nodes. ViG consists of two basic modules: Grapher module with graph convolution for aggregating and updating graph information, and FFN module with two linear layers for node feature transformation. Both isotropic and pyramid architectures of ViG are built with different model sizes. Extensive experiments on image recognition and object detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our ViG architecture. We hope this pioneering study of GNN on general visual tasks will provide useful inspiration and experience for future research. The PyTorch code is available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/Efficient-AI-Backbones and the MindSpore code is available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models. 网络架构在基于深度学习的计算机视觉系统中起着关键作用。广泛使用的卷积神经网络和Transformer将图像视为网格或序列结构，这对于捕获不规则和复杂的物体并不灵活。在本文中，我们建议将图像表示为图结构，并引入一种新的 Vision GNN (ViG) 架构来提取视觉任务的图级特征。我们首先将图像分割为许多被视为节点的块，并通过连接最近的邻居来构造一个图。基于图像的图形表示，我们构建了 ViG 模型来在所有节点之间转换和交换信息。 ViG 由两个基本模块组成：具有用于聚合和更新图信息的图卷积的 Grapher 模块，以及具有两个用于节点特征转换的线性层的 FFN 模块。 ViG 的各向同性和金字塔架构都是使用不同的模型大小构建的。关于图像识别和目标检测任务的大量实验证明了我们的 ViG 架构的优越性。我们希望 GNN 在一般视觉任务上的开创性研究能为未来的研究提供有益的启发和经验。 PyTorch 代码可在 https://github.com/huawei-noah/Efficient-AI-Backbones 获取，MindSpore 代码可在 https://gitee.com/mindspore/models 获取。 提出一种基于图神经网络的视觉模型ViG，用于图像识别和目标检测任务。 Kai Han,Yunhe Wang,Jianyuan Guo,Yehui Tang,Enhua Wu cs.CV

title: PaGO-LOAM: Robust Ground-Optimized LiDAR Odometry
title_zh: PaGO-LOAM：强大的地面优化激光雷达里程计
abstract: Numerous researchers have conducted studies to achieve fast and robust ground-optimized LiDAR odometry methods for terrestrial mobile platforms. In particular, ground-optimized LiDAR odometry usually employs ground segmentation as a preprocessing method. This is because most of the points in a 3D point cloud captured by a 3D LiDAR sensor on a terrestrial platform are from the ground. However, the effect of the performance of ground segmentation on LiDAR odometry is still not closely examined. In this paper, a robust ground-optimized LiDAR odometry framework is proposed to facilitate the study to check the effect of ground segmentation on LiDAR SLAM based on the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method. By using our proposed odometry framework, it is easy and straightforward to test whether ground segmentation algorithms help extract well-described features and thus improve SLAM performance. In addition, by leveraging the SOTA ground segmentation method called Patchwork, which shows robust ground segmentation even in complex and uneven urban environments with little performance perturbation, a novel ground-optimized LiDAR odometry is proposed, called PaGO-LOAM. The methods were tested using the KITTI odometry dataset. \textit{PaGO-LOAM} shows robust and accurate performance compared with the baseline method. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/AlterGround-LeGO-LOAM.
summary: Numerous researchers have conducted studies to achieve fast and robust ground-optimized LiDAR odometry methods for terrestrial mobile platforms. In particular, ground-optimized LiDAR odometry usually employs ground segmentation as a preprocessing method. This is because most of the points in a 3D point cloud captured by a 3D LiDAR sensor on a terrestrial platform are from the ground. However, the effect of the performance of ground segmentation on LiDAR odometry is still not closely examined. In this paper, a robust ground-optimized LiDAR odometry framework is proposed to facilitate the study to check the effect of ground segmentation on LiDAR SLAM based on the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method. By using our proposed odometry framework, it is easy and straightforward to test whether ground segmentation algorithms help extract well-described features and thus improve SLAM performance. In addition, by leveraging the SOTA ground segmentation method called Patchwork, which shows robust ground segmentation even in complex and uneven urban environments with little performance perturbation, a novel ground-optimized LiDAR odometry is proposed, called PaGO-LOAM. The methods were tested using the KITTI odometry dataset. \textit{PaGO-LOAM} shows robust and accurate performance compared with the baseline method. Our code is available at https://github.com/url-kaist/AlterGround-LeGO-LOAM.
abstract_zh: 许多研究人员进行了研究，以实现用于地面移动平台的快速、稳健的地面优化激光雷达测距方法。特别是，地面优化的激光雷达里程计通常采用地面分割作为预处理方法。这是因为地面平台上的 3D LiDAR 传感器捕获的 3D 点云中的大多数点都来自地面。然而，地面分割性能对 LiDAR 里程计的影响尚未得到仔细研究。本文提出了一种鲁棒的地面优化LiDAR里程计框架，以方便研究基于最先进（SOTA）方法检查地面分割对LiDAR SLAM的影响。通过使用我们提出的里程计框架，可以轻松直接地测试地面分割算法是否有助于提取明确描述的特征，从而提高 SLAM 性能。此外，通过利用称为 Patchwork 的 SOTA 地面分割方法，即使在复杂且不平坦的城市环境中也能表现出稳健的地面分割，且性能扰动很小，提出了一种新型的地面优化 LiDAR 里程计，称为 PaGO-LOAM。使用 KITTI 里程计数据集对这些方法进行了测试。与基线方法相比，\textit{PaGO-LOAM} 显示出稳健且准确的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/url-kaist/AlterGround-LeGO-LOAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PaGO-LOAM的鲁棒地面优化激光雷达里程计框架，旨在研究地面分割对SLAM性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有地面优化激光雷达里程计方法未充分验证地面分割性能对SLAM的影响，需建立框架评估其作用并提升性能。
AI.method: 基于最新地面分割方法Patchwork，设计可评估地面分割效果的里程计框架，通过KITTI数据集验证PaGO-LOAM的鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.result: PaGO-LOAM在KITTI数据集上表现出比基线方法更鲁棒且精确的性能，验证了地面分割优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架与方法为研究地面分割对SLAM的影响提供了有效工具，证明了优化地面分割可提升里程计性能。

title: Multi-block Min-max Bilevel Optimization with Applications in Multi-task Deep AUC Maximization
title_zh: 多块最小最大双层优化及其在多任务深度 AUC 最大化中的应用
abstract: In this paper, we study multi-block min-max bilevel optimization problems, where the upper level is non-convex strongly-concave minimax objective and the lower level is a strongly convex objective, and there are multiple blocks of dual variables and lower level problems. Due to the intertwined multi-block min-max bilevel structure, the computational cost at each iteration could be prohibitively high, especially with a large number of blocks. To tackle this challenge, we present a single-loop randomized stochastic algorithm, which requires updates for only a constant number of blocks at each iteration. Under some mild assumptions on the problem, we establish its sample complexity of $O(1/ε^4)$ for finding an $ε$-stationary point. This matches the optimal complexity for solving stochastic nonconvex optimization under a general unbiased stochastic oracle model. Moreover, we provide two applications of the proposed method in multi-task deep AUC (area under ROC curve) maximization and multi-task deep partial AUC maximization. Experimental results validate our theory and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on problems with hundreds of tasks.
summary: In this paper, we study multi-block min-max bilevel optimization problems, where the upper level is non-convex strongly-concave minimax objective and the lower level is a strongly convex objective, and there are multiple blocks of dual variables and lower level problems. Due to the intertwined multi-block min-max bilevel structure, the computational cost at each iteration could be prohibitively high, especially with a large number of blocks. To tackle this challenge, we present a single-loop randomized stochastic algorithm, which requires updates for only a constant number of blocks at each iteration. Under some mild assumptions on the problem, we establish its sample complexity of $O(1/ε^4)$ for finding an $ε$-stationary point. This matches the optimal complexity for solving stochastic nonconvex optimization under a general unbiased stochastic oracle model. Moreover, we provide two applications of the proposed method in multi-task deep AUC (area under ROC curve) maximization and multi-task deep partial AUC maximization. Experimental results validate our theory and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on problems with hundreds of tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了多块最小-最大双层优化问题，其中上层是非凸强凹极小最大目标，下层是强凸目标，并且存在多个双变量块和较低层问题。由于交织的多块最小-最大双层结构，每次迭代的计算成本可能非常高，尤其是在块数量很大的情况下。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种单循环随机随机算法，该算法在每次迭代时仅需要更新恒定数量的块。在对该问题的一些温和假设下，我们确定其样本复杂度为 $O(1/ε^4)$，以找到 $ε$-驻点。这与一般无偏随机预言模型下求解随机非凸优化的最佳复杂度相匹配。此外，我们还提供了该方法在多任务深度 AUC（ROC 曲线下面积）最大化和多任务深度部分 AUC 最大化中的两种应用。实验结果验证了我们的理论，并证明了我们的方法在数百个任务问题上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多块最小-最大双层优化问题，并将其应用于多任务深度AUC最大化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多块双层优化问题时计算成本高，尤其当块数量较大时难以高效求解。
AI.method: 提出单循环随机随机算法，每次迭代仅更新常数数量的块，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 算法样本复杂度为O(1/ε^4)，实验验证在数百任务场景下有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论复杂度和实际应用中均表现优异，适用于多任务深度学习优化场景。

This matches the optimal complexity for solving stochastic nonconvex optimization under a general unbiased stochastic oracle model. Moreover, we provide two applications of the proposed method in multi-task deep AUC (area under ROC curve) maximization and multi-task deep partial AUC maximization. Experimental results validate our theory and demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on problems with hundreds of tasks. 在本文中，我们研究了多块最小-最大双层优化问题，其中上层是非凸强凹极小最大目标，下层是强凸目标，并且存在多个双变量块和较低层问题。由于交织的多块最小-最大双层结构，每次迭代的计算成本可能非常高，尤其是在块数量很大的情况下。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种单循环随机随机算法，该算法在每次迭代时仅需要更新恒定数量的块。在对该问题的一些温和假设下，我们确定其样本复杂度为 $O(1/ε^4)$，以找到 $ε$-驻点。这与一般无偏随机预言模型下求解随机非凸优化的最佳复杂度相匹配。此外，我们还提供了该方法在多任务深度 AUC（ROC 曲线下面积）最大化和多任务深度部分 AUC 最大化中的两种应用。实验结果验证了我们的理论，并证明了我们的方法在数百个任务问题上的有效性。 本文研究多块最小-最大双层优化问题，并将其应用于多任务深度AUC最大化。 Quanqi Hu,Yongjian Zhong,Tianbao Yang math.OC,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: IDANI: Inference-time Domain Adaptation via Neuron-level Interventions
title_zh: IDANI：通过神经元级干预进行推理时域适应
comment: Our code is available at https://github.com/technion-cs-nlp/idani
comments: Our code is available at https://github.com/technion-cs-nlp/idani
abstract: Large pre-trained models are usually fine-tuned on downstream task data, and tested on unseen data. When the train and test data come from different domains, the model is likely to struggle, as it is not adapted to the test domain. We propose a new approach for domain adaptation (DA), using neuron-level interventions: We modify the representation of each test example in specific neurons, resulting in a counterfactual example from the source domain, which the model is more familiar with. The modified example is then fed back into the model. While most other DA methods are applied during training time, ours is applied during inference only, making it more efficient and applicable. Our experiments show that our method improves performance on unseen domains.
summary: Large pre-trained models are usually fine-tuned on downstream task data, and tested on unseen data. When the train and test data come from different domains, the model is likely to struggle, as it is not adapted to the test domain. We propose a new approach for domain adaptation (DA), using neuron-level interventions: We modify the representation of each test example in specific neurons, resulting in a counterfactual example from the source domain, which the model is more familiar with. The modified example is then fed back into the model. While most other DA methods are applied during training time, ours is applied during inference only, making it more efficient and applicable. Our experiments show that our method improves performance on unseen domains.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练模型通常会根据下游任务数据进行微调，并在未见过的数据上进行测试。当训练和测试数据来自不同的领域时，模型可能会陷入困境，因为它不适合测试领域。我们提出了一种使用神经元级干预的域适应（DA）新方法：我们修改特定神经元中每个测试示例的表示，从而从模型更熟悉的源域中产生反事实示例。然后将修改后的示例反馈到模型中。虽然大多数其他 DA 方法在训练期间应用，但我们的方法仅在推理期间应用，使其更加高效和适用。我们的实验表明，我们的方法提高了未知领域的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在推理阶段通过神经元层面干预实现领域适应的新方法，解决训练与测试数据领域差异导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法多依赖训练阶段调整，难以应对推理时遇到的未知领域数据，且效率较低。
AI.method: 通过修改测试样本特定神经元的表示生成源领域反事实示例，再将该示例反馈至模型进行推理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个未见领域数据集上显著提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: IDANI提供了一种高效且无需修改训练流程的推理阶段领域适应方案，有效应对跨领域数据挑战。

title: CoNSoLe: Convex Neural Symbolic Learning
title_zh: CoNSoLe：凸神经符号学习
abstract: Learning the underlying equation from data is a fundamental problem in many disciplines. Recent advances rely on Neural Networks (NNs) but do not provide theoretical guarantees in obtaining the exact equations owing to the non-convexity of NNs. In this paper, we propose Convex Neural Symbolic Learning (CoNSoLe) to seek convexity under mild conditions. The main idea is to decompose the recovering process into two steps and convexify each step. In the first step of searching for right symbols, we convexify the deep Q-learning. The key is to maintain double convexity for both the negative Q-function and the negative reward function in each iteration, leading to provable convexity of the negative optimal Q function to learn the true symbol connections. Conditioned on the exact searching result, we construct a Locally Convex equation Learner (LoCaL) neural network to convexify the estimation of symbol coefficients. With such a design, we quantify a large region with strict convexity in the loss surface of LoCaL for commonly used physical functions. Finally, we demonstrate the superior performance of the CoNSoLe framework over the state-of-the-art on a diverse set of datasets.
summary: Learning the underlying equation from data is a fundamental problem in many disciplines. Recent advances rely on Neural Networks (NNs) but do not provide theoretical guarantees in obtaining the exact equations owing to the non-convexity of NNs. In this paper, we propose Convex Neural Symbolic Learning (CoNSoLe) to seek convexity under mild conditions. The main idea is to decompose the recovering process into two steps and convexify each step. In the first step of searching for right symbols, we convexify the deep Q-learning. The key is to maintain double convexity for both the negative Q-function and the negative reward function in each iteration, leading to provable convexity of the negative optimal Q function to learn the true symbol connections. Conditioned on the exact searching result, we construct a Locally Convex equation Learner (LoCaL) neural network to convexify the estimation of symbol coefficients. With such a design, we quantify a large region with strict convexity in the loss surface of LoCaL for commonly used physical functions. Finally, we demonstrate the superior performance of the CoNSoLe framework over the state-of-the-art on a diverse set of datasets.
abstract_zh: 从数据中学习基本方程是许多学科的基本问题。最近的进展依赖于神经网络（NN），但由于神经网络的非凸性，无法提供获得精确方程的理论保证。在本文中，我们提出凸神经符号学习（CoNSoLe）来在温和条件下寻求凸性。主要思想是将恢复过程分解为两个步骤并将每个步骤凸化。在搜索正确符号的第一步中，我们凸化了深度 Q 学习。关键是在每次迭代中保持负 Q 函数和负奖励函数的双凸性，从而导致负最优 Q 函数的可证明凸性以学习真实的符号连接。以精确的搜索结果为条件，我们构建了局部凸方程学习器（LoCaL）神经网络来凸化符号系数的估计。通过这样的设计，我们对常用物理函数的 LoCaL 损失面中具有严格凸性的大区域进行了量化。最后，我们在不同的数据集上展示了 CoNSoLe 框架相对于最先进框架的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoNSoLe框架，通过凸优化方法从数据中学习底层物理方程，解决传统神经网络因非凸性无法保证理论收敛的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法虽能学习方程，但因非凸性缺乏理论保证，难以确保找到精确的物理方程表达式。
AI.method: 分两阶段凸化：1) 用凸化深度Q学习搜索符号连接，保持Q函数与奖励函数双凸性；2) 构建LoCaL网络估计系数，确保损失函数严格凸性。
AI.result: 在多个物理函数数据集上验证，CoNSoLe相较现有方法在符号搜索准确率和系数估计精度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CoNSoLe通过分阶段凸化设计，首次在神经符号学习中实现理论保证的方程恢复，为物理建模提供新范式。

authors_text: Daniel Flores-Araiza,Francisco Lopez-Tiro,Elias Villalvazo-Avila,Jonathan El-Beze,Jacques Hubert,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Christian Daul
title: Interpretable Deep Learning Classifier by Detection of Prototypical Parts on Kidney Stones Images
title_zh: 通过检测肾结石图像上的典型部分来解释深度学习分类器
comment: Extended abstract accepted at LatinX in Computer Vision Research Workshop, at CVPR 2022
comments: Extended abstract accepted at LatinX in Computer Vision Research Workshop, at CVPR 2022
abstract: Identifying the type of kidney stones can allow urologists to determine their formation cause, improving the early prescription of appropriate treatments to diminish future relapses. However, currently, the associated ex-vivo diagnosis (known as morpho-constitutional analysis, MCA) is time-consuming, expensive, and requires a great deal of experience, as it requires a visual analysis component that is highly operator dependant. Recently, machine learning methods have been developed for in-vivo endoscopic stone recognition. Shallow methods have been demonstrated to be reliable and interpretable but exhibit low accuracy, while deep learning-based methods yield high accuracy but are not explainable. However, high stake decisions require understandable computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) to suggest a course of action based on reasonable evidence, rather than merely prescribe one. Herein, we investigate means for learning part-prototypes (PPs) that enable interpretable models. Our proposal suggests a classification for a kidney stone patch image and provides explanations in a similar way as those used on the MCA method.
summary: Identifying the type of kidney stones can allow urologists to determine their formation cause, improving the early prescription of appropriate treatments to diminish future relapses. However, currently, the associated ex-vivo diagnosis (known as morpho-constitutional analysis, MCA) is time-consuming, expensive, and requires a great deal of experience, as it requires a visual analysis component that is highly operator dependant. Recently, machine learning methods have been developed for in-vivo endoscopic stone recognition. Shallow methods have been demonstrated to be reliable and interpretable but exhibit low accuracy, while deep learning-based methods yield high accuracy but are not explainable. However, high stake decisions require understandable computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) to suggest a course of action based on reasonable evidence, rather than merely prescribe one. Herein, we investigate means for learning part-prototypes (PPs) that enable interpretable models. Our proposal suggests a classification for a kidney stone patch image and provides explanations in a similar way as those used on the MCA method.
abstract_zh: 确定肾结石的类型可以让泌尿科医生确定其形成原因，从而改进适当治疗的早期处方，以减少未来的复发。然而，目前，相关的体外诊断（称为形态体质分析，MCA）非常耗时、昂贵，并且需要大量的经验，因为它需要高度依赖操作员的视觉分析组件。最近，已经开发出用于体内内窥镜结石识别的机器学习方法。浅层方法已被证明是可靠且可解释的，但准确性较低，而基于深度学习的方法具有较高的准确性，但无法解释。然而，高风险的决策需要易于理解的计算机辅助诊断 (CAD)，以基于合理的证据提出一系列行动方案，而不仅仅是规定一个方案。在这里，我们研究了学习可解释模型的部分原型（PP）的方法。我们的提案建议对肾结石斑块图像进行分类，并以与 MCA 方法类似的方式提供解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于检测典型部件的可解释深度学习分类器，用于肾脏结石图像分类。
AI.motivation: 当前肾脏结石类型识别方法存在准确率低或不可解释的问题，需开发兼顾高准确率与可解释性的计算机辅助诊断系统。
AI.method: 通过学习部分原型（PPs）构建可解释模型，在分类肾脏结石图像时提供类似形态构成分析（MCA）方法的可视化解释。
AI.result: 实现高准确率的结石分类同时保持模型可解释性，验证了原型检测方法在医学图像分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为泌尿科医生提供基于合理证据的决策支持，推动了可解释性人工智能在医疗诊断中的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于检测典型部件的可解释深度学习分类器，用于肾脏结石图像分类。
ai_content.motivation: 当前肾脏结石类型识别方法存在准确率低或不可解释的问题，需开发兼顾高准确率与可解释性的计算机辅助诊断系统。

ai_content.result: 实现高准确率的结石分类同时保持模型可解释性，验证了原型检测方法在医学图像分析中的有效性。

search_text: Interpretable Deep Learning Classifier by Detection of Prototypical Parts on Kidney Stones Images 通过检测肾结石图像上的典型部分来解释深度学习分类器 Identifying the type of kidney stones can allow urologists to determine their formation cause, improving the early prescription of appropriate treatments to diminish future relapses. However, currently, the associated ex-vivo diagnosis (known as morpho-constitutional analysis, MCA) is time-consuming, expensive, and requires a great deal of experience, as it requires a visual analysis component that is highly operator dependant. Recently, machine learning methods have been developed for in-vivo endoscopic stone recognition. Shallow methods have been demonstrated to be reliable and interpretable but exhibit low accuracy, while deep learning-based methods yield high accuracy but are not explainable. However, high stake decisions require understandable computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) to suggest a course of action based on reasonable evidence, rather than merely prescribe one. Herein, we investigate means for learning part-prototypes (PPs) that enable interpretable models. Our proposal suggests a classification for a kidney stone patch image and provides explanations in a similar way as those used on the MCA method. 确定肾结石的类型可以让泌尿科医生确定其形成原因，从而改进适当治疗的早期处方，以减少未来的复发。然而，目前，相关的体外诊断（称为形态体质分析，MCA）非常耗时、昂贵，并且需要大量的经验，因为它需要高度依赖操作员的视觉分析组件。最近，已经开发出用于体内内窥镜结石识别的机器学习方法。浅层方法已被证明是可靠且可解释的，但准确性较低，而基于深度学习的方法具有较高的准确性，但无法解释。然而，高风险的决策需要易于理解的计算机辅助诊断 (CAD)，以基于合理的证据提出一系列行动方案，而不仅仅是规定一个方案。在这里，我们研究了学习可解释模型的部分原型（PP）的方法。我们的提案建议对肾结石斑块图像进行分类，并以与 MCA 方法类似的方式提供解释。 本文提出一种基于检测典型部件的可解释深度学习分类器，用于肾脏结石图像分类。 Daniel Flores-Araiza,Francisco Lopez-Tiro,Elias Villalvazo-Avila,Jonathan El-Beze,Jacques Hubert,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Christian Daul cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sandeep Kaur Kingra,Vivek Parmar,Manoj Sharma,Manan Suri
title: Time-multiplexed In-memory computation scheme for mapping Quantized Neural Networks on hybrid CMOS-OxRAM building blocks
title_zh: 用于在混合 CMOS-OxRAM 构建块上映射量化神经网络的时分复用内存计算方案
abstract: In this work, we experimentally demonstrate two key building blocks for realizing Binary/Ternary Neural Networks (BNNs/TNNs): (i) 130 nm CMOS based sigmoidal neurons and (ii) HfOx based multi-level (MLC) OxRAM-synaptic blocks. An optimized vector matrix multiplication programming scheme that utilizes the two building blocks is also presented. Compared to prior approaches that utilize differential synaptic structures, a single device per synapse with two sets of READ operations is used. Proposed hardware mapping strategy shows performance change of <5% (decrease of 2-5% for TNN, increase of 0.2% for BNN) compared to ideal quantized neural networks (QNN) with significant memory savings in the order of 16-32x for classification problem on Fashion MNIST (FMNIST) dataset. Impact of OxRAM device variability on the performance of Hardware QNN (BNN/TNN) is also analyzed.
summary: In this work, we experimentally demonstrate two key building blocks for realizing Binary/Ternary Neural Networks (BNNs/TNNs): (i) 130 nm CMOS based sigmoidal neurons and (ii) HfOx based multi-level (MLC) OxRAM-synaptic blocks. An optimized vector matrix multiplication programming scheme that utilizes the two building blocks is also presented. Compared to prior approaches that utilize differential synaptic structures, a single device per synapse with two sets of READ operations is used. Proposed hardware mapping strategy shows performance change of <5% (decrease of 2-5% for TNN, increase of 0.2% for BNN) compared to ideal quantized neural networks (QNN) with significant memory savings in the order of 16-32x for classification problem on Fashion MNIST (FMNIST) dataset. Impact of OxRAM device variability on the performance of Hardware QNN (BNN/TNN) is also analyzed.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过实验演示了实现二元/三元神经网络 (BNN/TNN) 的两个关键构建模块：(i) 基于 130 nm CMOS 的 S 形神经元和 (ii) 基于 HfOx 的多级 (MLC) OxRAM 突触模块。还提出了利用两个构建块的优化向量矩阵乘法编程方案。与利用差分突触结构的现有方法相比，每个突触使用具有两组读取操作的单个设备。与理想的量化神经网络 (QNN) 相比，所提出的硬件映射策略显示性能变化 <5%（TNN 降低 2-5%，BNN 提高 0.2%），并且在时尚 MNIST (FMNIST) 数据集上的分类问题上显着节省了 16-32 倍的内存。还分析了 OxRAM 器件变异性对硬件 QNN (BNN/TNN) 性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时间复用的内存计算方案，将二值/三值神经网络（BNN/TNN）映射到混合CMOS-OxRAM硬件架构，以提高能效和内存效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络加速方案存在能效低、内存占用大的问题，需开发新型硬件架构以支持量化神经网络的高效实现。
AI.method: 设计130nm CMOS S型神经元与HfOx多级OxRAM突触模块，提出单设备/突触的向量矩阵乘法编程方案，通过两次读取操作实现计算。
AI.result: 在FMNIST数据集上实现16-32倍内存节省，性能较理想量化网络仅下降2-5%（BNN微增0.2%），验证了硬件可行性。
AI.conclusion: 混合CMOS-OxRAM架构可有效支持量化神经网络，但需进一步优化OxRAM器件一致性以提升稳定性。

title: Fair Comparison between Efficient Attentions
title_zh: 有效注意力之间的公平比较
abstract: Transformers have been successfully used in various fields and are becoming the standard tools in computer vision. However, self-attention, a core component of transformers, has a quadratic complexity problem, which limits the use of transformers in various vision tasks that require dense prediction. Many studies aiming at solving this problem have been reported proposed. However, no comparative study of these methods using the same scale has been reported due to different model configurations, training schemes, and new methods. In our paper, we validate these efficient attention models on the ImageNet1K classification task by changing only the attention operation and examining which efficient attention is better.
summary: Transformers have been successfully used in various fields and are becoming the standard tools in computer vision. However, self-attention, a core component of transformers, has a quadratic complexity problem, which limits the use of transformers in various vision tasks that require dense prediction. Many studies aiming at solving this problem have been reported proposed. However, no comparative study of these methods using the same scale has been reported due to different model configurations, training schemes, and new methods. In our paper, we validate these efficient attention models on the ImageNet1K classification task by changing only the attention operation and examining which efficient attention is better.
abstract_zh: Transformer 已成功应用于各个领域，并正在成为计算机视觉的标准工具。然而，Transformer 的核心组件 self-attention 存在二次复杂度问题，这限制了 Transformer 在各种需要密集预测的视觉任务中的使用。已经报道提出了许多旨在解决这个问题的研究。然而，由于不同的模型配置、训练方案和新方法，尚未报道使用相同尺度的这些方法的比较研究。在我们的论文中，我们通过仅更改注意力操作并检查哪种有效注意力更好，在 ImageNet1K 分类任务上验证了这些有效的注意力模型。

AI.tldr: 本文在ImageNet1K分类任务中通过统一模型配置，对多种高效注意力机制进行公平性能比较。
AI.motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制存在二次复杂度问题，现有高效注意力方法因实验条件不统一缺乏直接对比。
AI.method: 固定模型结构和训练方案，仅替换不同注意力模块，在相同实验条件下进行对比测试。
AI.result: 发现特定高效注意力方法在保持计算效率的同时取得优于传统自注意力的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过标准化实验验证了某些高效注意力机制的有效性，为后续研究提供了公平的基准对比框架。

title: DM$^2$: Decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Distribution Matching
title_zh: DM$^2$：用于分布匹配的去中心化多智能体强化学习
abstract: Current approaches to multi-agent cooperation rely heavily on centralized mechanisms or explicit communication protocols to ensure convergence. This paper studies the problem of distributed multi-agent learning without resorting to centralized components or explicit communication. It examines the use of distribution matching to facilitate the coordination of independent agents. In the proposed scheme, each agent independently minimizes the distribution mismatch to the corresponding component of a target visitation distribution. The theoretical analysis shows that under certain conditions, each agent minimizing its individual distribution mismatch allows the convergence to the joint policy that generated the target distribution. Further, if the target distribution is from a joint policy that optimizes a cooperative task, the optimal policy for a combination of this task reward and the distribution matching reward is the same joint policy. This insight is used to formulate a practical algorithm (DM$^2$), in which each individual agent matches a target distribution derived from concurrently sampled trajectories from a joint expert policy. Experimental validation on the StarCraft domain shows that combining (1) a task reward, and (2) a distribution matching reward for expert demonstrations for the same task, allows agents to outperform a naive distributed baseline. Additional experiments probe the conditions under which expert demonstrations need to be sampled to obtain the learning benefits.
summary: Current approaches to multi-agent cooperation rely heavily on centralized mechanisms or explicit communication protocols to ensure convergence. This paper studies the problem of distributed multi-agent learning without resorting to centralized components or explicit communication. It examines the use of distribution matching to facilitate the coordination of independent agents. In the proposed scheme, each agent independently minimizes the distribution mismatch to the corresponding component of a target visitation distribution. The theoretical analysis shows that under certain conditions, each agent minimizing its individual distribution mismatch allows the convergence to the joint policy that generated the target distribution. Further, if the target distribution is from a joint policy that optimizes a cooperative task, the optimal policy for a combination of this task reward and the distribution matching reward is the same joint policy. This insight is used to formulate a practical algorithm (DM$^2$), in which each individual agent matches a target distribution derived from concurrently sampled trajectories from a joint expert policy. Experimental validation on the StarCraft domain shows that combining (1) a task reward, and (2) a distribution matching reward for expert demonstrations for the same task, allows agents to outperform a naive distributed baseline. Additional experiments probe the conditions under which expert demonstrations need to be sampled to obtain the learning benefits.
abstract_zh: 当前的多智能体合作方法严重依赖集中机制或显式通信协议来确保收敛。本文研究了分布式多智能体学习问题，无需借助集中组件或显式通信。它检查了分布匹配的使用以促进独立代理的协调。在所提出的方案中，每个代理独立地最小化与目标访问分布的相应分量的分布不匹配。理论分析表明，在某些条件下，每个代理最小化其个体分布失配可以收敛到生成目标分布的联合策略。此外，如果目标分布来自优化协作任务的联合策略，则该任务奖励和分布匹配奖励的组合的最优策略是相同的联合策略。这种见解用于制定实用算法（DM$^2$），其中每个单独的代理都匹配从联合专家策略的同时采样轨迹中得出的目标分布。星际争霸领域的实验验证表明，将（1）任务奖励和（2）针对同一任务的专家演示的分布匹配奖励相结合，可以使智能体的表现优于朴素的分布式基线。其他实验探讨了需要对专家演示进行采样以获得学习收益的条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需集中式组件或显式通信的分布式多智能体强化学习方法DM²，通过分布匹配实现智能体协调。
AI.motivation: 现有协作方法依赖集中式机制或显式通信，难以适应去中心化场景。本文旨在探索无需通信的分布式学习框架，通过分布匹配实现智能体自主协调。
AI.method: 设计DM²算法：每个智能体独立最小化自身行为分布与目标访问分布的差异，目标分布由联合专家策略的轨迹采样生成，结合任务奖励与分布匹配奖励进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在StarCraft领域实验表明，结合任务奖励与分布匹配奖励的DM²算法优于基础分布式方法，且验证了专家演示采样条件对学习效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: DM²通过分布匹配机制实现了去中心化多智能体协作，证明了在无需通信的前提下，利用专家轨迹生成的目标分布能有效引导智能体收敛到最优联合策略。

search_text: DM$^2$: Decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Distribution Matching DM$^2$：用于分布匹配的去中心化多智能体强化学习 Current approaches to multi-agent cooperation rely heavily on centralized mechanisms or explicit communication protocols to ensure convergence. This paper studies the problem of distributed multi-agent learning without resorting to centralized components or explicit communication. It examines the use of distribution matching to facilitate the coordination of independent agents. In the proposed scheme, each agent independently minimizes the distribution mismatch to the corresponding component of a target visitation distribution. The theoretical analysis shows that under certain conditions, each agent minimizing its individual distribution mismatch allows the convergence to the joint policy that generated the target distribution. Further, if the target distribution is from a joint policy that optimizes a cooperative task, the optimal policy for a combination of this task reward and the distribution matching reward is the same joint policy. This insight is used to formulate a practical algorithm (DM$^2$), in which each individual agent matches a target distribution derived from concurrently sampled trajectories from a joint expert policy. Experimental validation on the StarCraft domain shows that combining (1) a task reward, and (2) a distribution matching reward for expert demonstrations for the same task, allows agents to outperform a naive distributed baseline. Additional experiments probe the conditions under which expert demonstrations need to be sampled to obtain the learning benefits. 当前的多智能体合作方法严重依赖集中机制或显式通信协议来确保收敛。本文研究了分布式多智能体学习问题，无需借助集中组件或显式通信。它检查了分布匹配的使用以促进独立代理的协调。在所提出的方案中，每个代理独立地最小化与目标访问分布的相应分量的分布不匹配。理论分析表明，在某些条件下，每个代理最小化其个体分布失配可以收敛到生成目标分布的联合策略。此外，如果目标分布来自优化协作任务的联合策略，则该任务奖励和分布匹配奖励的组合的最优策略是相同的联合策略。这种见解用于制定实用算法（DM$^2$），其中每个单独的代理都匹配从联合专家策略的同时采样轨迹中得出的目标分布。星际争霸领域的实验验证表明，将（1）任务奖励和（2）针对同一任务的专家演示的分布匹配奖励相结合，可以使智能体的表现优于朴素的分布式基线。其他实验探讨了需要对专家演示进行采样以获得学习收益的条件。 本文提出了一种无需集中式组件或显式通信的分布式多智能体强化学习方法DM²，通过分布匹配实现智能体协调。 Caroline Wang,Ishan Durugkar,Elad Liebman,Peter Stone cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Wisdom C. Agboh,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Ken Goldberg,Mehmet R. Dogar
title: Multi-Object Grasping in the Plane
title_zh: 平面内多物体抓取
comment: Accepted to the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR), 2022
comments: Accepted to the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR), 2022
abstract: We consider a novel problem where multiple rigid convex polygonal objects rest in randomly placed positions and orientations on a planar surface visible from an overhead camera. The objective is to efficiently grasp and transport all objects into a bin using multi-object push-grasps, where multiple objects are pushed together to facilitate multi-object grasping. We provide necessary conditions for frictionless multi-object push-grasps and apply these to filter inadmissible grasps in a novel multi-object grasp planner. We find that our planner is 19 times faster than a Mujoco simulator baseline. We also propose a picking algorithm that uses both single- and multi-object grasps to pick objects. In physical grasping experiments comparing performance with a single-object picking baseline, we find that the frictionless multi-object grasping system achieves 13.6\% higher grasp success and is 59.9\% faster, from 212 PPH to 340 PPH. See \url{https://sites.google.com/view/multi-object-grasping} for videos and code.
summary: We consider a novel problem where multiple rigid convex polygonal objects rest in randomly placed positions and orientations on a planar surface visible from an overhead camera. The objective is to efficiently grasp and transport all objects into a bin using multi-object push-grasps, where multiple objects are pushed together to facilitate multi-object grasping. We provide necessary conditions for frictionless multi-object push-grasps and apply these to filter inadmissible grasps in a novel multi-object grasp planner. We find that our planner is 19 times faster than a Mujoco simulator baseline. We also propose a picking algorithm that uses both single- and multi-object grasps to pick objects. In physical grasping experiments comparing performance with a single-object picking baseline, we find that the frictionless multi-object grasping system achieves 13.6\% higher grasp success and is 59.9\% faster, from 212 PPH to 340 PPH. See \url{https://sites.google.com/view/multi-object-grasping} for videos and code.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个新问题，其中多个刚性凸多边形物体以随机放置的位置和方向放置在从头顶相机可见的平面上。目标是使用多物体推抓器有效地抓取所有物体并将其运输到箱子中，其中多个物体被推到一起以促进多物体抓取。我们为无摩擦多物体推握提供了必要的条件，并将这些条件应用于新型多物体握持规划器中过滤不允许的握持。我们发现我们的规划器比 Mujoco 模拟器基线快 19 倍。我们还提出了一种使用单对象和多对象抓取来拾取对象的拾取算法。在物理抓取实验中，将性能与单物体抓取基线进行比较，我们发现无摩擦多物体抓取系统的抓取成功率提高了 13.6%，速度提高了 59.9%，从 212 PPH 提高到 340 PPH。请参阅 \url{https://sites.google.com/view/multi-object-grasping} 了解视频和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效抓取平面内多个随机放置物体的方法，通过多物体推动抓取实现快速分拣。
AI.motivation: 传统单物体抓取效率低，难以应对工业场景中多物体混杂的分拣需求，需提升抓取速度与成功率。
AI.method: 建立无摩擦多物体推动抓取的必要条件，设计过滤非法抓取的规划器，并结合单/多物体抓取算法实现分拣。
AI.result: 规划器速度比Mujoco基准快19倍，实际实验成功率提升13.6%，分拣速度从212 PPH提升至340 PPH。
AI.conclusion: 多物体推动抓取策略显著提升分拣效率与成功率，为工业自动化提供有效解决方案。

title: Lower and Upper Bounds for Numbers of Linear Regions of Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 图卷积网络线性区域数量的下限和上限
abstract: The research for characterizing GNN expressiveness attracts much attention as graph neural networks achieve a champion in the last five years. The number of linear regions has been considered a good measure for the expressivity of neural networks with piecewise linear activation. In this paper, we present some estimates for the number of linear regions of the classic graph convolutional networks (GCNs) with one layer and multiple-layer scenarios. In particular, we obtain an optimal upper bound for the maximum number of linear regions for one-layer GCNs, and the upper and lower bounds for multi-layer GCNs. The simulated estimate shows that the true maximum number of linear regions is possibly closer to our estimated lower bound. These results imply that the number of linear regions of multi-layer GCNs is exponentially greater than one-layer GCNs per parameter in general. This suggests that deeper GCNs have more expressivity than shallow GCNs.
summary: The research for characterizing GNN expressiveness attracts much attention as graph neural networks achieve a champion in the last five years. The number of linear regions has been considered a good measure for the expressivity of neural networks with piecewise linear activation. In this paper, we present some estimates for the number of linear regions of the classic graph convolutional networks (GCNs) with one layer and multiple-layer scenarios. In particular, we obtain an optimal upper bound for the maximum number of linear regions for one-layer GCNs, and the upper and lower bounds for multi-layer GCNs. The simulated estimate shows that the true maximum number of linear regions is possibly closer to our estimated lower bound. These results imply that the number of linear regions of multi-layer GCNs is exponentially greater than one-layer GCNs per parameter in general. This suggests that deeper GCNs have more expressivity than shallow GCNs.
abstract_zh: 随着图神经网络在过去五年中取得冠军，表征 GNN 表达能力的研究引起了广泛关注。线性区域的数量被认为是衡量具有分段线性激活的神经网络表达能力的良好指标。在本文中，我们对具有一层和多层场景的经典图卷积网络（GCN）的线性区域数量进行了一些估计。特别是，我们获得了单层 GCN 的线性区域最大数量的最佳上限，以及多层 GCN 的上限和下限。模拟估计表明，线性区域的真实最大数量可能更接近我们估计的下限。这些结果意味着多层 GCN 的线性区域数量通常比每个参数的一层 GCN 呈指数级增长。这表明更深的 GCN 比浅层的 GCN 具有更高的表达能力。

AI.tldr: 研究图卷积网络（GCN）的线性区域数量的上下界，分析其表达能力。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）近年表现突出，但需量化其表达能力。线性区域数量是衡量分段线性网络表达能力的关键指标，因此需确定GCN的线性区域数量界限。
AI.method: 针对单层和多层GCN，分别推导线性区域数量的上下界，通过模拟验证理论估计。
AI.result: 获得单层GCN的最优上界及多层GCN的上下界，模拟显示实际值更接近下界，且多层GCN线性区域数随参数指数增长。
AI.conclusion: 多层GCN相比单层GCN具有指数级更高的表达能力，深度提升模型复杂度。
