result: 获得单层GCN的最优上界及多层GCN的上下界，模拟显示实际值更接近下界，且多层GCN线性区域数随参数指数增长。
conclusion: 多层GCN相比单层GCN具有指数级更高的表达能力，深度提升模型复杂度。
search_text: Lower and Upper Bounds for Numbers of Linear Regions of Graph Convolutional Networks 图卷积网络线性区域数量的下限和上限 The research for characterizing GNN expressiveness attracts much attention as graph neural networks achieve a champion in the last five years. The number of linear regions has been considered a good measure for the expressivity of neural networks with piecewise linear activation. In this paper, we present some estimates for the number of linear regions of the classic graph convolutional networks (GCNs) with one layer and multiple-layer scenarios. In particular, we obtain an optimal upper bound for the maximum number of linear regions for one-layer GCNs, and the upper and lower bounds for multi-layer GCNs. The simulated estimate shows that the true maximum number of linear regions is possibly closer to our estimated lower bound. These results imply that the number of linear regions of multi-layer GCNs is exponentially greater than one-layer GCNs per parameter in general. This suggests that deeper GCNs have more expressivity than shallow GCNs. 随着图神经网络在过去五年中取得冠军，表征 GNN 表达能力的研究引起了广泛关注。线性区域的数量被认为是衡量具有分段线性激活的神经网络表达能力的良好指标。在本文中，我们对具有一层和多层场景的经典图卷积网络（GCN）的线性区域数量进行了一些估计。特别是，我们获得了单层 GCN 的线性区域最大数量的最佳上限，以及多层 GCN 的上限和下限。模拟估计表明，线性区域的真实最大数量可能更接近我们估计的下限。这些结果意味着多层 GCN 的线性区域数量通常比每个参数的一层 GCN 呈指数级增长。这表明更深的 GCN 比浅层的 GCN 具有更高的表达能力。 研究图卷积网络（GCN）的线性区域数量的上下界，分析其表达能力。 Hao Chen,Yu Guang Wang,Huan Xiong cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Rethinking the Augmentation Module in Contrastive Learning: Learning Hierarchical Augmentation Invariance with Expanded Views
title_zh: 重新思考对比学习中的增强模块：通过扩展视图学习分层增强不变性
abstract: A data augmentation module is utilized in contrastive learning to transform the given data example into two views, which is considered essential and irreplaceable. However, the predetermined composition of multiple data augmentations brings two drawbacks. First, the artificial choice of augmentation types brings specific representational invariances to the model, which have different degrees of positive and negative effects on different downstream tasks. Treating each type of augmentation equally during training makes the model learn non-optimal representations for various downstream tasks and limits the flexibility to choose augmentation types beforehand. Second, the strong data augmentations used in classic contrastive learning methods may bring too much invariance in some cases, and fine-grained information that is essential to some downstream tasks may be lost. This paper proposes a general method to alleviate these two problems by considering where and what to contrast in a general contrastive learning framework. We first propose to learn different augmentation invariances at different depths of the model according to the importance of each data augmentation instead of learning representational invariances evenly in the backbone. We then propose to expand the contrast content with augmentation embeddings to reduce the misleading effects of strong data augmentations. Experiments based on several baseline methods demonstrate that we learn better representations for various benchmarks on classification, detection, and segmentation downstream tasks.
summary: A data augmentation module is utilized in contrastive learning to transform the given data example into two views, which is considered essential and irreplaceable. However, the predetermined composition of multiple data augmentations brings two drawbacks. First, the artificial choice of augmentation types brings specific representational invariances to the model, which have different degrees of positive and negative effects on different downstream tasks. Treating each type of augmentation equally during training makes the model learn non-optimal representations for various downstream tasks and limits the flexibility to choose augmentation types beforehand. Second, the strong data augmentations used in classic contrastive learning methods may bring too much invariance in some cases, and fine-grained information that is essential to some downstream tasks may be lost. This paper proposes a general method to alleviate these two problems by considering where and what to contrast in a general contrastive learning framework. We first propose to learn different augmentation invariances at different depths of the model according to the importance of each data augmentation instead of learning representational invariances evenly in the backbone. We then propose to expand the contrast content with augmentation embeddings to reduce the misleading effects of strong data augmentations. Experiments based on several baseline methods demonstrate that we learn better representations for various benchmarks on classification, detection, and segmentation downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 对比学习中使用数据增强模块将给定的数据示例转换为两个视图，这被认为是必要且不可替代的。然而，多个数据增强的预定组合带来了两个缺点。首先，人为选择的增强类型给模型带来了特定的表征不变性，这对不同的下游任务有不同程度的积极和消极影响。在训练过程中平等对待每种类型的增强会使模型学习各种下游任务的非最佳表示，并限制预先选择增强类型的灵活性。其次，经典对比学习方法中使用的强数据增强在某些情况下可能会带来太多的不变性，并且可能会丢失对某些下游任务至关重要的细粒度信息。本文提出了一种通过考虑在通用对比学习框架中对比的位置和内容来缓解这两个问题的通用方法。我们首先建议根据每个数据增强的重要性在模型的不同深度学习不同的增强不变性，而不是在主干中均匀地学习表示不变性。然后，我们建议通过增强嵌入来扩展对比内容，以减少强数据增强的误导性影响。基于几种基线方法的实验表明，我们可以为分类、检测和分割下游任务的各种基准学习到更好的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考对比学习中的数据增强模块，提出通过分层学习增强不变性与扩展视图的方法，以优化模型表示。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习中预定义的数据增强组合导致表示不变性对下游任务影响不一致，且强增强可能丢失关键信息，限制了模型灵活性与性能。
AI.method: 首先根据增强重要性在模型不同深度学习差异化的增强不变性；其次通过扩展对比内容中的增强嵌入，缓解强增强的负面影响。
AI.result: 在多个基准任务（分类、检测、分割）中，该方法均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过动态调整增强不变性与扩展对比内容，有效解决了传统对比学习中增强模块的局限性，提升了模型在多任务场景下的表现。

title: Accelerated first-order methods for a class of semidefinite programs
title_zh: 一类半定规划的加速一阶方法
abstract: This paper introduces a new storage-optimal first-order method (FOM), CertSDP, for solving a special class of semidefinite programs (SDPs) to high accuracy. The class of SDPs that we consider, the exact QMP-like SDPs, is characterized by low-rank solutions, a priori knowledge of the restriction of the SDP solution to a small subspace, and standard regularity assumptions such as strict complementarity. Crucially, we show how to use a certificate of strict complementarity to construct a low-dimensional strongly convex minimax problem whose optimizer coincides with a factorization of the SDP optimizer. From an algorithmic standpoint, we show how to construct the necessary certificate and how to solve the minimax problem efficiently. We accompany our theoretical results with preliminary numerical experiments suggesting that CertSDP significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on large sparse exact QMP-like SDPs.
summary: This paper introduces a new storage-optimal first-order method (FOM), CertSDP, for solving a special class of semidefinite programs (SDPs) to high accuracy. The class of SDPs that we consider, the exact QMP-like SDPs, is characterized by low-rank solutions, a priori knowledge of the restriction of the SDP solution to a small subspace, and standard regularity assumptions such as strict complementarity. Crucially, we show how to use a certificate of strict complementarity to construct a low-dimensional strongly convex minimax problem whose optimizer coincides with a factorization of the SDP optimizer. From an algorithmic standpoint, we show how to construct the necessary certificate and how to solve the minimax problem efficiently. We accompany our theoretical results with preliminary numerical experiments suggesting that CertSDP significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on large sparse exact QMP-like SDPs.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的存储优化一阶方法 (FOM) CertSDP，用于高精度求解一类特殊的半定规划 (SDP)。我们考虑的 SDP 类别，即精确的类似 QMP 的 SDP，其特征是低秩解、SDP 解限制在小子空间的先验知识，以及标准正则性假设（例如严格互补性）。至关重要的是，我们展示了如何使用严格互补性证书来构造低维强凸极小极大问题，其优化器与 SDP 优化器的因式分解一致。从算法的角度来看，我们展示了如何构建必要的证书以及如何有效地解决极小极大问题。我们将理论结果与初步数值实验相结合，表明 CertSDP 在大型稀疏精确 QMP 类 SDP 上显着优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的存储最优一阶方法CertSDP，用于求解具有低秩解和严格互补性条件的特殊半定规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统半定规划求解方法在处理大规模稀疏问题时存在存储和计算效率瓶颈，而该类问题在优化领域有广泛应用需求。
AI.method: 通过严格互补性证书构造低维强凸极小极大问题，利用一阶方法高效求解其最优解，从而获得原SDP的低秩分解。
AI.result: 数值实验表明CertSDP在大型稀疏QMP-like SDPs上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了理论分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为特定结构的半定规划提供了高效求解框架，理论分析与实验结果均证明其有效性，为相关领域研究提供新思路。

title: Cross-domain Detection Transformer based on Spatial-aware and Semantic-aware Token Alignment
title_zh: 基于空间感知和语义感知令牌对齐的跨域检测变压器
abstract: Detection transformers like DETR have recently shown promising performance on many object detection tasks, but the generalization ability of those methods is still quite challenging for cross-domain adaptation scenarios. To address the cross-domain issue, a straightforward way is to perform token alignment with adversarial training in transformers. However, its performance is often unsatisfactory as the tokens in detection transformers are quite diverse and represent different spatial and semantic information. In this paper, we propose a new method called Spatial-aware and Semantic-aware Token Alignment (SSTA) for cross-domain detection transformers. In particular, we take advantage of the characteristics of cross-attention as used in detection transformer and propose the spatial-aware token alignment (SpaTA) and the semantic-aware token alignment (SemTA) strategies to guide the token alignment across domains. For spatial-aware token alignment, we can extract the information from the cross-attention map (CAM) to align the distribution of tokens according to their attention to object queries. For semantic-aware token alignment, we inject the category information into the cross-attention map and construct domain embedding to guide the learning of a multi-class discriminator so as to model the category relationship and achieve category-level token alignment during the entire adaptation process. We conduct extensive experiments on several widely-used benchmarks, and the results clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Detection transformers like DETR have recently shown promising performance on many object detection tasks, but the generalization ability of those methods is still quite challenging for cross-domain adaptation scenarios. To address the cross-domain issue, a straightforward way is to perform token alignment with adversarial training in transformers. However, its performance is often unsatisfactory as the tokens in detection transformers are quite diverse and represent different spatial and semantic information. In this paper, we propose a new method called Spatial-aware and Semantic-aware Token Alignment (SSTA) for cross-domain detection transformers. In particular, we take advantage of the characteristics of cross-attention as used in detection transformer and propose the spatial-aware token alignment (SpaTA) and the semantic-aware token alignment (SemTA) strategies to guide the token alignment across domains. For spatial-aware token alignment, we can extract the information from the cross-attention map (CAM) to align the distribution of tokens according to their attention to object queries. For semantic-aware token alignment, we inject the category information into the cross-attention map and construct domain embedding to guide the learning of a multi-class discriminator so as to model the category relationship and achieve category-level token alignment during the entire adaptation process. We conduct extensive experiments on several widely-used benchmarks, and the results clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 像 DETR 这样的检测转换器最近在许多目标检测任务中表现出了良好的性能，但这些方法的泛化能力对于跨域适应场景仍然相当具有挑战性。为了解决跨域问题，一个简单的方法是通过 Transformer 中的对抗性训练来进行 token 对齐。然而，它的性能往往不能令人满意，因为检测变压器中的标记非常多样化并且代表不同的空间和语义信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨域检测变压器的新方法，称为空间感知和语义感知令牌对齐（SSTA）。特别是，我们利用检测变压器中使用的交叉注意的特性，提出了空间感知令牌对齐（SpaTA）和语义感知令牌对齐（SemTA）策略来指导跨域的令牌对齐。对于空间感知标记对齐，我们可以从交叉注意力图（CAM）中提取信息，根据标记对对象查询的关注来对齐标记的分布。对于语义感知的标记对齐，我们将类别信息注入交叉注意图中并构造域嵌入来指导多类鉴别器的学习，从而在整个适应过程中对类别关系进行建模并实现类别级标记对齐。我们对几个广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验，结果清楚地表明了我们提出的方法相对于现有最先进基准的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于空间感知和语义感知的标记对齐方法（SSTA），用于改进跨域检测Transformer的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的检测Transformer在跨域适应场景中泛化能力较差，传统的对抗训练方法在标记对齐上效果不理想，因为标记在空间和语义上具有多样性。
AI.method: 本文提出空间感知标记对齐（SpaTA）和语义感知标记对齐（SemTA）策略，利用跨注意力图提取空间信息，并注入类别信息和构建领域嵌入以实现跨域标记对齐。
AI.result: 在多个广泛使用的基准测试中，实验结果表明所提出的方法优于现有的先进基线。
AI.conclusion: SSTA方法通过空间和语义感知的标记对齐策略，有效提升了跨域检测Transformer的性能。

search_text: Cross-domain Detection Transformer based on Spatial-aware and Semantic-aware Token Alignment 基于空间感知和语义感知令牌对齐的跨域检测变压器 Detection transformers like DETR have recently shown promising performance on many object detection tasks, but the generalization ability of those methods is still quite challenging for cross-domain adaptation scenarios. To address the cross-domain issue, a straightforward way is to perform token alignment with adversarial training in transformers. However, its performance is often unsatisfactory as the tokens in detection transformers are quite diverse and represent different spatial and semantic information. In this paper, we propose a new method called Spatial-aware and Semantic-aware Token Alignment (SSTA) for cross-domain detection transformers. In particular, we take advantage of the characteristics of cross-attention as used in detection transformer and propose the spatial-aware token alignment (SpaTA) and the semantic-aware token alignment (SemTA) strategies to guide the token alignment across domains. For spatial-aware token alignment, we can extract the information from the cross-attention map (CAM) to align the distribution of tokens according to their attention to object queries. For semantic-aware token alignment, we inject the category information into the cross-attention map and construct domain embedding to guide the learning of a multi-class discriminator so as to model the category relationship and achieve category-level token alignment during the entire adaptation process. We conduct extensive experiments on several widely-used benchmarks, and the results clearly show the effectiveness of our proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines. 像 DETR 这样的检测转换器最近在许多目标检测任务中表现出了良好的性能，但这些方法的泛化能力对于跨域适应场景仍然相当具有挑战性。为了解决跨域问题，一个简单的方法是通过 Transformer 中的对抗性训练来进行 token 对齐。然而，它的性能往往不能令人满意，因为检测变压器中的标记非常多样化并且代表不同的空间和语义信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨域检测变压器的新方法，称为空间感知和语义感知令牌对齐（SSTA）。特别是，我们利用检测变压器中使用的交叉注意的特性，提出了空间感知令牌对齐（SpaTA）和语义感知令牌对齐（SemTA）策略来指导跨域的令牌对齐。对于空间感知标记对齐，我们可以从交叉注意力图（CAM）中提取信息，根据标记对对象查询的关注来对齐标记的分布。对于语义感知的标记对齐，我们将类别信息注入交叉注意图中并构造域嵌入来指导多类鉴别器的学习，从而在整个适应过程中对类别关系进行建模并实现类别级标记对齐。我们对几个广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验，结果清楚地表明了我们提出的方法相对于现有最先进基准的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于空间感知和语义感知的标记对齐方法（SSTA），用于改进跨域检测Transformer的泛化能力。 Jinhong Deng,Xiaoyue Zhang,Wen Li,Lixin Duan cs.CV

title: Quantum Error Mitigation by Pauli Check Sandwiching
title_zh: 通过泡利检查三明治减轻量子误差
abstract: We describe and analyze an error mitigation technique that uses multiple pairs of parity checks to detect the presence of errors. Each pair of checks uses one ancilla qubit to detect a component of the error operator and represents one layer of the technique. We build on the results on extended flag gadgets and put it on a firm theoretical foundation. We prove that this technique can recover the noiseless state under the assumption of noise not affecting the checks. The method does not incur any encoding overhead and instead chooses the checks based on the input circuit. We provide an algorithm for obtaining such checks for an arbitrary target circuit. Since the method applies to any circuit and input state, it can be easily combined with other error mitigation techniques. We evaluate the performance of the proposed methods using extensive numerical simulations on 1,850 random input circuits composed of Clifford gates and non-Clifford single-qubit rotations, a class of circuits encompassing most commonly considered variational algorithm circuits. We observe average improvements in fidelity of 34 percentage points with six layers of checks.
summary: We describe and analyze an error mitigation technique that uses multiple pairs of parity checks to detect the presence of errors. Each pair of checks uses one ancilla qubit to detect a component of the error operator and represents one layer of the technique. We build on the results on extended flag gadgets and put it on a firm theoretical foundation. We prove that this technique can recover the noiseless state under the assumption of noise not affecting the checks. The method does not incur any encoding overhead and instead chooses the checks based on the input circuit. We provide an algorithm for obtaining such checks for an arbitrary target circuit. Since the method applies to any circuit and input state, it can be easily combined with other error mitigation techniques. We evaluate the performance of the proposed methods using extensive numerical simulations on 1,850 random input circuits composed of Clifford gates and non-Clifford single-qubit rotations, a class of circuits encompassing most commonly considered variational algorithm circuits. We observe average improvements in fidelity of 34 percentage points with six layers of checks.
abstract_zh: 我们描述并分析了一种错误缓解技术，该技术使用多对奇偶校验来检测错误的存在。每对检查都使用一个辅助量子位来检测错误算子的一个组件，并代表该技术的一层。我们以扩展标志小工具的结果为基础，并为其奠定了坚实的理论基础。我们证明，在噪声不影响检查的假设下，该技术可以恢复无噪声状态。该方法不会产生任何编码开销，而是根据输入电路选择检查。我们提供了一种算法，用于对任意目标电路进行此类检查。由于该方法适用于任何电路和输入状态，因此它可以轻松地与其他错误缓解技术相结合。我们使用对 1,850 个由 Clifford 门和非 Clifford 单量子位旋转组成的随机输入电路进行广泛的数值模拟来评估所提出的方法的性能，该电路包含最常见的变分算法电路。我们观察到，通过六层检查，保真度平均提高了 34 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于泡利检查夹层的量子纠错技术，通过多组奇偶校验检测错误并恢复无噪声状态。
AI.motivation: 现有量子纠错方法存在编码开销大或适用性受限的问题，需开发无需额外编码且适用于任意电路的误差缓解方案。
AI.method: 利用多个辅助量子比特进行奇偶校验，结合扩展标志装置理论，通过算法为任意目标电路生成校验层，无需编码开销。
AI.result: 在1850个随机量子电路的数值模拟中，六层校验使保真度平均提升34个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法理论严谨且通用性强，可与其它纠错技术结合，为变分算法等实际应用提供有效误差缓解方案。

authors_text: Matthew Pitropov,Chengjie Huang,Vahdat Abdelzad,Krzysztof Czarnecki,Steven Waslander
title: LiDAR-MIMO: Efficient Uncertainty Estimation for LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: LiDAR-MIMO：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的高效不确定性估计
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures and 5 tables. Accepted in IEEE IV 2022
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures and 5 tables. Accepted in IEEE IV 2022
abstract: The estimation of uncertainty in robotic vision, such as 3D object detection, is an essential component in developing safe autonomous systems aware of their own performance. However, the deployment of current uncertainty estimation methods in 3D object detection remains challenging due to timing and computational constraints. To tackle this issue, we propose LiDAR-MIMO, an adaptation of the multi-input multi-output (MIMO) uncertainty estimation method to the LiDAR-based 3D object detection task. Our method modifies the original MIMO by performing multi-input at the feature level to ensure the detection, uncertainty estimation, and runtime performance benefits are retained despite the limited capacity of the underlying detector and the large computational costs of point cloud processing. We compare LiDAR-MIMO with MC dropout and ensembles as baselines and show comparable uncertainty estimation results with only a small number of output heads. Further, LiDAR-MIMO can be configured to be twice as fast as MC dropout and ensembles, while achieving higher mAP than MC dropout and approaching that of ensembles.
summary: The estimation of uncertainty in robotic vision, such as 3D object detection, is an essential component in developing safe autonomous systems aware of their own performance. However, the deployment of current uncertainty estimation methods in 3D object detection remains challenging due to timing and computational constraints. To tackle this issue, we propose LiDAR-MIMO, an adaptation of the multi-input multi-output (MIMO) uncertainty estimation method to the LiDAR-based 3D object detection task. Our method modifies the original MIMO by performing multi-input at the feature level to ensure the detection, uncertainty estimation, and runtime performance benefits are retained despite the limited capacity of the underlying detector and the large computational costs of point cloud processing. We compare LiDAR-MIMO with MC dropout and ensembles as baselines and show comparable uncertainty estimation results with only a small number of output heads. Further, LiDAR-MIMO can be configured to be twice as fast as MC dropout and ensembles, while achieving higher mAP than MC dropout and approaching that of ensembles.
abstract_zh: 机器人视觉的不确定性估计（例如 3D 对象检测）是开发了解自身性能的安全自主系统的重要组成部分。然而，由于时间和计算的限制，当前不确定性估计方法在 3D 对象检测中的部署仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LiDAR-MIMO，这是一种将多输入多输出 (MIMO) 不确定性估计方法应用于基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测任务的方法。我们的方法通过在特征级别执行多输入来修改原始 MIMO，以确保保留检测、不确定性估计和运行时性能优势，尽管底层检测器的容量有限且点云处理的计算成本较高。我们将 LiDAR-MIMO 与 MC 丢失和集成作为基线进行比较，并显示出仅使用少量输出头的可比较的不确定性估计结果。此外，LiDAR-MIMO 的配置速度可以是 MC dropout 和集成的两倍，同时实现比 MC dropout 更高并接近集成的 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiDAR-MIMO方法，用于高效估计基于LiDAR的3D目标检测中的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法在3D目标检测中面临计算成本高和实时性差的挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将多输入多输出（MIMO）方法适配至LiDAR场景，在特征层实现多输入以平衡检测性能与计算效率。
AI.result: 相比MC dropout和集成方法，LiDAR-MIMO速度提升2倍，mAP优于MC dropout且接近集成方法，不确定性估计效果相当。
AI.conclusion: LiDAR-MIMO在保持检测精度的同时显著提升效率，为实际部署提供了可行的不确定性估计方案。

motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法在3D目标检测中面临计算成本高和实时性差的挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
method: 将多输入多输出（MIMO）方法适配至LiDAR场景，在特征层实现多输入以平衡检测性能与计算效率。
result: 相比MC dropout和集成方法，LiDAR-MIMO速度提升2倍，mAP优于MC dropout且接近集成方法，不确定性估计效果相当。
conclusion: LiDAR-MIMO在保持检测精度的同时显著提升效率，为实际部署提供了可行的不确定性估计方案。
search_text: LiDAR-MIMO: Efficient Uncertainty Estimation for LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection LiDAR-MIMO：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的高效不确定性估计 The estimation of uncertainty in robotic vision, such as 3D object detection, is an essential component in developing safe autonomous systems aware of their own performance. However, the deployment of current uncertainty estimation methods in 3D object detection remains challenging due to timing and computational constraints. To tackle this issue, we propose LiDAR-MIMO, an adaptation of the multi-input multi-output (MIMO) uncertainty estimation method to the LiDAR-based 3D object detection task. Our method modifies the original MIMO by performing multi-input at the feature level to ensure the detection, uncertainty estimation, and runtime performance benefits are retained despite the limited capacity of the underlying detector and the large computational costs of point cloud processing. We compare LiDAR-MIMO with MC dropout and ensembles as baselines and show comparable uncertainty estimation results with only a small number of output heads. Further, LiDAR-MIMO can be configured to be twice as fast as MC dropout and ensembles, while achieving higher mAP than MC dropout and approaching that of ensembles. 机器人视觉的不确定性估计（例如 3D 对象检测）是开发了解自身性能的安全自主系统的重要组成部分。然而，由于时间和计算的限制，当前不确定性估计方法在 3D 对象检测中的部署仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LiDAR-MIMO，这是一种将多输入多输出 (MIMO) 不确定性估计方法应用于基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测任务的方法。我们的方法通过在特征级别执行多输入来修改原始 MIMO，以确保保留检测、不确定性估计和运行时性能优势，尽管底层检测器的容量有限且点云处理的计算成本较高。我们将 LiDAR-MIMO 与 MC 丢失和集成作为基线进行比较，并显示出仅使用少量输出头的可比较的不确定性估计结果。此外，LiDAR-MIMO 的配置速度可以是 MC dropout 和集成的两倍，同时实现比 MC dropout 更高并接近集成的 mAP。 本文提出LiDAR-MIMO方法，用于高效估计基于LiDAR的3D目标检测中的不确定性。 Matthew Pitropov,Chengjie Huang,Vahdat Abdelzad,Krzysztof Czarnecki,Steven Waslander cs.CV

title: The Quantum and Classical Streaming Complexity of Quantum and Classical Max-Cut
title_zh: 量子和经典最大割的量子和经典流复杂性
abstract: We investigate the space complexity of two graph streaming problems: Max-Cut and its quantum analogue, Quantum Max-Cut. Previous work by Kapralov and Krachun [STOC `19] resolved the classical complexity of the \emph{classical} problem, showing that any $(2 - \varepsilon)$-approximation requires $Ω(n)$ space (a $2$-approximation is trivial with $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ space). We generalize both of these qualifiers, demonstrating $Ω(n)$ space lower bounds for $(2 - \varepsilon)$-approximating Max-Cut and Quantum Max-Cut, even if the algorithm is allowed to maintain a quantum state. As the trivial approximation algorithm for Quantum Max-Cut only gives a $4$-approximation, we show tightness with an algorithm that returns a $(2 + \varepsilon)$-approximation to the Quantum Max-Cut value of a graph in $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ space. Our work resolves the quantum and classical approximability of quantum and classical Max-Cut using $\textrm{o}(n)$ space. We prove our lower bounds through the techniques of Boolean Fourier analysis. We give the first application of these methods to sequential one-way quantum communication, in which each player receives a quantum message from the previous player, and can then perform arbitrary quantum operations on it before sending it to the next. To this end, we show how Fourier-analytic techniques may be used to understand the application of a quantum channel.
summary: We investigate the space complexity of two graph streaming problems: Max-Cut and its quantum analogue, Quantum Max-Cut. Previous work by Kapralov and Krachun [STOC `19] resolved the classical complexity of the \emph{classical} problem, showing that any $(2 - \varepsilon)$-approximation requires $Ω(n)$ space (a $2$-approximation is trivial with $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ space). We generalize both of these qualifiers, demonstrating $Ω(n)$ space lower bounds for $(2 - \varepsilon)$-approximating Max-Cut and Quantum Max-Cut, even if the algorithm is allowed to maintain a quantum state. As the trivial approximation algorithm for Quantum Max-Cut only gives a $4$-approximation, we show tightness with an algorithm that returns a $(2 + \varepsilon)$-approximation to the Quantum Max-Cut value of a graph in $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ space. Our work resolves the quantum and classical approximability of quantum and classical Max-Cut using $\textrm{o}(n)$ space. We prove our lower bounds through the techniques of Boolean Fourier analysis. We give the first application of these methods to sequential one-way quantum communication, in which each player receives a quantum message from the previous player, and can then perform arbitrary quantum operations on it before sending it to the next. To this end, we show how Fourier-analytic techniques may be used to understand the application of a quantum channel.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了两个图流问题的空间复杂度：Max-Cut 及其量子类似物 Quantum Max-Cut。 Kapralov 和 Krachun [STOC `19] 之前的工作解决了 \emph{classical} 问题的经典复杂性，表明任何 $(2 - \varepsilon)$ 近似都需要 $Ω(n)$ 空间（$2$ 近似对于 $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ 空间来说是微不足道的）。我们概括了这两个限定符，证明了 $(2 - \varepsilon)$ 近似最大割和量子最大割的 $Ω(n)$ 空间下界，即使允许算法保持量子态也是如此。由于量子最大割的平凡近似算法仅给出 $4$ 近似值，因此我们使用返回 $(2 + \varepsilon)$ 近似值到 $\textrm{O}(\log n)$ 空间中图的量子最大割值的算法来显示紧密性。我们的工作使用 $\textrm{o}(n)$ 空间解决了量子和经典 Max-Cut 的量子和经典近似性。我们通过布尔傅里叶分析技术证明了我们的下界。我们将这些方法的第一个应用应用于顺序单向量子通信，其中每个玩家从前一个玩家接收量子消息，然后可以在将其发送给下一个玩家之前对其执行任意量子操作。为此，我们展示了如何使用傅里叶分析技术来理解量子通道的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了经典和量子流模型下Max-Cut及其量子变体的近似算法空间复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 经典Max-Cut的近似算法空间复杂度已解决，但量子场景下的复杂度分析尚未明确，需统一处理经典与量子问题的流模型限制。
AI.method: 通过布尔傅里叶分析技术，结合量子通信中的一维量子通道应用方法，证明空间复杂度下界并设计近似算法。
AI.result: 证明了经典和量子Max-Cut的(2-ε)近似需Ω(n)空间，且量子Max-Cut存在(2+ε)近似率的O(log n)空间算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了经典和量子Max-Cut在亚线性空间下的近似可行性问题，揭示了量子流模型与经典模型在复杂度上的本质关联。

We generalize both of these qualifiers, demonstrating $Ω(n)$ space lower bounds for $(2 - \varepsilon)$-approximating Max-Cut and Quantum Max-Cut, even if the algorithm is allowed to maintain a quantum state. authors_text: Kun Song,Heyang Xue,Xinsheng Wang,Jian Cong,Yongmao Zhang,Lei Xie,Bing Yang,Xiong Zhang,Dan Su
title: AdaVITS: Tiny VITS for Low Computing Resource Speaker Adaptation
title_zh: AdaVITS：用于低计算资源扬声器适配的微型 VITS
abstract: Speaker adaptation in text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) is to finetune a pre-trained TTS model to adapt to new target speakers with limited data. While much effort has been conducted towards this task, seldom work has been performed for low computational resource scenarios due to the challenges raised by the requirement of the lightweight model and less computational complexity. In this paper, a tiny VITS-based TTS model, named AdaVITS, for low computing resource speaker adaptation is proposed. To effectively reduce parameters and computational complexity of VITS, an iSTFT-based wave construction decoder is proposed to replace the upsampling-based decoder which is resource-consuming in the original VITS. Besides, NanoFlow is introduced to share the density estimate across flow blocks to reduce the parameters of the prior encoder. Furthermore, to reduce the computational complexity of the textual encoder, scaled-dot attention is replaced with linear attention. To deal with the instability caused by the simplified model, instead of using the original text encoder, phonetic posteriorgram (PPG) is utilized as linguistic feature via a text-to-PPG module, which is then used as input for the encoder. Experiment shows that AdaVITS can generate stable and natural speech in speaker adaptation with 8.97M model parameters and 0.72GFlops computational complexity.
summary: Speaker adaptation in text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) is to finetune a pre-trained TTS model to adapt to new target speakers with limited data. While much effort has been conducted towards this task, seldom work has been performed for low computational resource scenarios due to the challenges raised by the requirement of the lightweight model and less computational complexity. In this paper, a tiny VITS-based TTS model, named AdaVITS, for low computing resource speaker adaptation is proposed. To effectively reduce parameters and computational complexity of VITS, an iSTFT-based wave construction decoder is proposed to replace the upsampling-based decoder which is resource-consuming in the original VITS. Besides, NanoFlow is introduced to share the density estimate across flow blocks to reduce the parameters of the prior encoder. Furthermore, to reduce the computational complexity of the textual encoder, scaled-dot attention is replaced with linear attention. To deal with the instability caused by the simplified model, instead of using the original text encoder, phonetic posteriorgram (PPG) is utilized as linguistic feature via a text-to-PPG module, which is then used as input for the encoder. Experiment shows that AdaVITS can generate stable and natural speech in speaker adaptation with 8.97M model parameters and 0.72GFlops computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 文本转语音合成（TTS）中的说话人适应是对预先训练的 TTS 模型进行微调，以在数据有限的情况下适应新的目标说话人。尽管人们为这项任务付出了很多努力，但由于轻量级模型和较低计算复杂性的要求带来的挑战，很少针对低计算资源场景进行工作。本文提出了一种基于 VITS 的小型 TTS 模型，名为 AdaVITS，用于低计算资源说话人自适应。为了有效降低VITS的参数和计算复杂度，提出一种基于iSTFT的造波解码器来代替原来VITS中资源消耗大的基于上采样的解码器。此外，引入了NanoFlow来跨流块共享密度估计，以减少先前编码器的参数。此外，为了降低文本编码器的计算复杂度，将缩放点注意力替换为线性注意力。为了解决简化模型引起的不稳定问题，我们不使用原始文本编码器，而是通过文本到 PPG 模块将语音后验图（PPG）用作语言特征，然后将其用作编码器的输入。实验表明，AdaVITS 可以在 8.97M 模型参数和 0.72GFlops 计算复杂度的情况下生成稳定、自然的说话人自适应语音。

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级的VITS模型AdaVITS，用于在低计算资源环境下进行说话人自适应的文本到语音合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在低计算资源场景下效率不足，需兼顾模型轻量化与计算复杂度降低以实现有效说话人自适应。
AI.method: 采用iSTFT波构建解码器、NanoFlow共享密度估计、线性注意力机制及文本到PPG模块，降低参数量和计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，AdaVITS在低参数量和低计算复杂度下能生成稳定自然的语音，适应新说话人。
AI.conclusion: AdaVITS在保持性能的同时显著降低计算需求，为低资源环境下的说话人自适应TTS提供了有效解决方案。

Experiment shows that AdaVITS can generate stable and natural speech in speaker adaptation with 8.97M model parameters and 0.72GFlops computational complexity. 文本转语音合成（TTS）中的说话人适应是对预先训练的 TTS 模型进行微调，以在数据有限的情况下适应新的目标说话人。尽管人们为这项任务付出了很多努力，但由于轻量级模型和较低计算复杂性的要求带来的挑战，很少针对低计算资源场景进行工作。本文提出了一种基于 VITS 的小型 TTS 模型，名为 AdaVITS，用于低计算资源说话人自适应。为了有效降低VITS的参数和计算复杂度，提出一种基于iSTFT的造波解码器来代替原来VITS中资源消耗大的基于上采样的解码器。此外，引入了NanoFlow来跨流块共享密度估计，以减少先前编码器的参数。此外，为了降低文本编码器的计算复杂度，将缩放点注意力替换为线性注意力。为了解决简化模型引起的不稳定问题，我们不使用原始文本编码器，而是通过文本到 PPG 模块将语音后验图（PPG）用作语言特征，然后将其用作编码器的输入。实验表明，AdaVITS 可以在 8.97M 模型参数和 0.72GFlops 计算复杂度的情况下生成稳定、自然的说话人自适应语音。 提出一种轻量级的VITS模型AdaVITS，用于在低计算资源环境下进行说话人自适应的文本到语音合成。 Kun Song,Heyang Xue,Xinsheng Wang,Jian Cong,Yongmao Zhang,Lei Xie,Bing Yang,Xiong Zhang,Dan Su cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sanghun Jung,Jungsoo Lee,Nanhee Kim,Amirreza Shaban,Byron Boots,Jaegul Choo
title: CAFA: Class-Aware Feature Alignment for Test-Time Adaptation
title_zh: CAFA：用于测试时间适应的类感知特征对齐
abstract: Despite recent advancements in deep learning, deep neural networks continue to suffer from performance degradation when applied to new data that differs from training data. Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to address this challenge by adapting a model to unlabeled data at test time. TTA can be applied to pretrained networks without modifying their training procedures, enabling them to utilize a well-formed source distribution for adaptation. One possible approach is to align the representation space of test samples to the source distribution (\textit{i.e.,} feature alignment). However, performing feature alignment in TTA is especially challenging in that access to labeled source data is restricted during adaptation. That is, a model does not have a chance to learn test data in a class-discriminative manner, which was feasible in other adaptation tasks (\textit{e.g.,} unsupervised domain adaptation) via supervised losses on the source data. Based on this observation, we propose a simple yet effective feature alignment loss, termed as Class-Aware Feature Alignment (CAFA), which simultaneously 1) encourages a model to learn target representations in a class-discriminative manner and 2) effectively mitigates the distribution shifts at test time. Our method does not require any hyper-parameters or additional losses, which are required in previous approaches. We conduct extensive experiments on 6 different datasets and show our proposed method consistently outperforms existing baselines.
summary: Despite recent advancements in deep learning, deep neural networks continue to suffer from performance degradation when applied to new data that differs from training data. Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to address this challenge by adapting a model to unlabeled data at test time. TTA can be applied to pretrained networks without modifying their training procedures, enabling them to utilize a well-formed source distribution for adaptation. One possible approach is to align the representation space of test samples to the source distribution (\textit{i.e.,} feature alignment). However, performing feature alignment in TTA is especially challenging in that access to labeled source data is restricted during adaptation. That is, a model does not have a chance to learn test data in a class-discriminative manner, which was feasible in other adaptation tasks (\textit{e.g.,} unsupervised domain adaptation) via supervised losses on the source data. Based on this observation, we propose a simple yet effective feature alignment loss, termed as Class-Aware Feature Alignment (CAFA), which simultaneously 1) encourages a model to learn target representations in a class-discriminative manner and 2) effectively mitigates the distribution shifts at test time. Our method does not require any hyper-parameters or additional losses, which are required in previous approaches. We conduct extensive experiments on 6 different datasets and show our proposed method consistently outperforms existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习最近取得了进展，但深度神经网络在应用于与训练数据不同的新数据时仍然会遇到性能下降的问题。测试时适应 (TTA) 旨在通过在测试时使模型适应未标记的数据来应对这一挑战。 TTA 可以应用于预训练网络，而无需修改其训练程序，使它们能够利用格式良好的源分布进行适应。一种可能的方法是将测试样本的表示空间与源分布对齐（\textit{即}特征对齐）。然而，在 TTA 中执行特征对齐尤其具有挑战性，因为在适应过程中对标记源数据的访问受到限制。也就是说，模型没有机会以类别区分的方式学习测试数据，而这在其他适应任务（例如无监督域适应）中通过源数据的监督损失是可行的。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种简单而有效的特征对齐损失，称为类感知特征对齐（CAFA），它同时 1）鼓励模型以类判别方式学习目标表示，2）有效减轻测试时的分布变化。我们的方法不需要任何超参数或额外的损失，而这是以前的方法所需要的。我们对 6 个不同的数据集进行了广泛的实验，并表明我们提出的方法始终优于现有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAFA的类感知特征对齐方法，用于解决测试时适应（TTA）中因缺乏标记源数据导致的特征对齐难题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法在缺乏标记源数据时难以实现类判别性特征学习，导致分布偏移问题无法有效缓解。
AI.method: 设计无需超参数的类感知特征对齐损失（CAFA），通过同时优化目标域表示的类判别性与分布对齐效果，实现端到端的测试时适应。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上的实验表明，CAFA方法在多种场景下均优于现有基线方法，且无需额外损失函数或超参数调优。
AI.conclusion: CAFA为测试时适应提供了简单有效的解决方案，在保持模型泛化能力的同时显著提升了跨域适应性能。

title: Order-sensitive Shapley Values for Evaluating Conceptual Soundness of NLP Models
title_zh: 用于评估 NLP 模型概念健全性的顺序敏感 Shapley 值
abstract: Previous works show that deep NLP models are not always conceptually sound: they do not always learn the correct linguistic concepts. Specifically, they can be insensitive to word order. In order to systematically evaluate models for their conceptual soundness with respect to word order, we introduce a new explanation method for sequential data: Order-sensitive Shapley Values (OSV). We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation to validate the method and surface how well various deep NLP models learn word order. Using synthetic data, we first show that OSV is more faithful in explaining model behavior than gradient-based methods. Second, applying to the HANS dataset, we discover that the BERT-based NLI model uses only the word occurrences without word orders. Although simple data augmentation improves accuracy on HANS, OSV shows that the augmented model does not fundamentally improve the model's learning of order. Third, we discover that not all sentiment analysis models learn negation properly: some fail to capture the correct syntax of the negation construct. Finally, we show that pretrained language models such as BERT may rely on the absolute positions of subject words to learn long-range Subject-Verb Agreement. With each NLP task, we also demonstrate how OSV can be leveraged to generate adversarial examples.
summary: Previous works show that deep NLP models are not always conceptually sound: they do not always learn the correct linguistic concepts. Specifically, they can be insensitive to word order. In order to systematically evaluate models for their conceptual soundness with respect to word order, we introduce a new explanation method for sequential data: Order-sensitive Shapley Values (OSV). We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation to validate the method and surface how well various deep NLP models learn word order. Using synthetic data, we first show that OSV is more faithful in explaining model behavior than gradient-based methods. Second, applying to the HANS dataset, we discover that the BERT-based NLI model uses only the word occurrences without word orders. Although simple data augmentation improves accuracy on HANS, OSV shows that the augmented model does not fundamentally improve the model's learning of order. Third, we discover that not all sentiment analysis models learn negation properly: some fail to capture the correct syntax of the negation construct. Finally, we show that pretrained language models such as BERT may rely on the absolute positions of subject words to learn long-range Subject-Verb Agreement. With each NLP task, we also demonstrate how OSV can be leveraged to generate adversarial examples.
abstract_zh: 之前的研究表明，深度 NLP 模型在概念上并不总是合理的：它们并不总是学习正确的语言概念。具体来说，它们可能对词序不敏感。为了系统地评估模型在词序方面的概念健全性，我们引入了一种新的顺序数据解释方法：顺序敏感的 Shapley 值（OSV）。我们进行了广泛的实证评估，以验证该方法并揭示各种深度 NLP 模型学习词序的效果。使用合成数据，我们首先表明 OSV 比基于梯度的方法更忠实地解释模型行为。其次，应用于 HANS 数据集，我们发现基于 BERT 的 NLI 模型仅使用单词出现次数，而不使用单词顺序。尽管简单的数据增强提高了 HANS 的准确性，但 OSV 表明增强的模型并没有从根本上改善模型的阶数学习。第三，我们发现并非所有情感分析模型都能正确学习否定：有些模型无法捕获否定构造的正确语法。最后，我们表明，预训练的语言模型（例如 BERT）可能依赖主语词的绝对位置来学习长程主谓一致。对于每个 NLP 任务，我们还演示了如何利用 OSV 来生成对抗性示例。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的解释方法OSV，用于评估NLP模型在词序方面的概念正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度NLP模型可能对词序不敏感，缺乏系统评估其概念正确性的方法，需改进模型理解和解释。
AI.method: 引入顺序敏感的Shapley值（OSV）作为序列数据的解释方法，结合合成数据和实际数据集验证，并生成对抗样本测试模型。
AI.result: OSV更准确解释模型行为，BERT在HANS上忽略词序，数据增强无效，部分情感分析模型处理否定不当，预训练模型依赖绝对位置学习主谓一致。
AI.conclusion: OSV能有效评估模型概念正确性，揭示模型在词序学习中的缺陷，为改进模型提供依据。

authors_text: Ali Athar,Jonathon Luiten,Alexander Hermans,Deva Ramanan,Bastian Leibe
title: Differentiable Soft-Masked Attention
title_zh: 可微分软掩模注意力
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.09131
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.09131
abstract: Transformers have become prevalent in computer vision due to their performance and flexibility in modelling complex operations. Of particular significance is the 'cross-attention' operation, which allows a vector representation (e.g. of an object in an image) to be learned by attending to an arbitrarily sized set of input features. Recently, "Masked Attention" was proposed in which a given object representation only attends to those image pixel features for which the segmentation mask of that object is active. This specialization of attention proved beneficial for various image and video segmentation tasks. In this paper, we propose another specialization of attention which enables attending over `soft-masks' (those with continuous mask probabilities instead of binary values), and is also differentiable through these mask probabilities, thus allowing the mask used for attention to be learned within the network without requiring direct loss supervision. This can be useful for several applications. Specifically, we employ our "Differentiable Soft-Masked Attention" for the task of Weakly-Supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS), where we develop a transformer-based network for VOS which only requires a single annotated image frame for training, but can also benefit from cycle consistency training on a video with just one annotated frame. Although there is no loss for masks in unlabeled frames, the network is still able to segment objects in those frames due to our novel attention formulation. Code: https://github.com/Ali2500/HODOR/blob/main/hodor/modelling/encoder/soft_masked_attention.py

Recently, "Masked Attention" was proposed in which a given object representation only attends to those image pixel features for which the segmentation mask of that object is active. This specialization of attention proved beneficial for various image and video segmentation tasks. In this paper, we propose another specialization of attention which enables attending over `soft-masks' (those with continuous mask probabilities instead of binary values), and is also differentiable through these mask probabilities, thus allowing the mask used for attention to be learned within the network without requiring direct loss supervision. This can be useful for several applications. Specifically, we employ our "Differentiable Soft-Masked Attention" for the task of Weakly-Supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS), where we develop a transformer-based network for VOS which only requires a single annotated image frame for training, but can also benefit from cycle consistency training on a video with just one annotated frame. Although there is no loss for masks in unlabeled frames, the network is still able to segment objects in those frames due to our novel attention formulation. Code: https://github.com/Ali2500/HODOR/blob/main/hodor/modelling/encoder/soft_masked_attention.py
abstract_zh: 由于其在复杂操作建模方面的性能和灵活性，Transformer 在计算机视觉领域已变得普遍。特别重要的是“交叉注意”操作，它允许通过关注任意大小的输入特征集来学习向量表示（例如图像中的对象）。最近，提出了“掩模注意力”，其中给定的对象表示仅关注该对象的分割掩模处于活动状态的那些图像像素特征。事实证明，这种注意力的专门化对于各种图像和视频分割任务都是有益的。在本文中，我们提出了另一种注意力的专门化，它能够关注“软掩模”（具有连续掩模概率而不是二进制值的掩模），并且还可以通过这些掩模概率进行区分，从而允许在网络内学习用于注意力的掩模，而不需要直接损失监督。这对于多种应用程序很有用。具体来说，我们将“可微分软掩模注意力”用于弱监督视频对象分割（VOS）的任务，其中我们为 VOS 开发了一种基于变压器的网络，该网络仅需要单个带注释的图像帧进行训练，但也可以从仅具有一个带注释的帧的视频的循环一致性训练中受益。尽管未标记帧中的掩模没有损失，但由于我们新颖的注意力公式，网络仍然能够分割这些帧中的对象。代码：https://github.com/Ali2500/HODOR/blob/main/hodor/modelling/encoder/soft_masked_attention.py

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可微分的软掩码注意力机制，用于弱监督视频目标分割任务，仅需单帧标注即可训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码注意力依赖二值分割掩码，难以处理连续概率掩码且需显式掩码监督。本文旨在通过可微分学习软掩码，减少对标注数据的依赖，提升弱监督场景下的分割性能。
AI.method: 设计可微分软掩码注意力机制，使模型能通过连续掩码概率学习注意力权重；结合单帧标注与视频循环一致性训练，无需未标注帧的掩码损失即可实现分割。
AI.result: 在弱监督视频目标分割任务中，该方法在有限标注下实现了与现有方法相当甚至更优的分割效果，验证了软掩码注意力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 软掩码注意力机制为弱监督学习提供了新思路，通过可微分掩码学习和循环一致性训练，显著降低了对标注数据的需求，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Differentiable Soft-Masked Attention 可微分软掩模注意力 Transformers have become prevalent in computer vision due to their performance and flexibility in modelling complex operations. Of particular significance is the 'cross-attention' operation, which allows a vector representation (e.g. of an object in an image) to be learned by attending to an arbitrarily sized set of input features. Recently, "Masked Attention" was proposed in which a given object representation only attends to those image pixel features for which the segmentation mask of that object is active. This specialization of attention proved beneficial for various image and video segmentation tasks. In this paper, we propose another specialization of attention which enables attending over `soft-masks' (those with continuous mask probabilities instead of binary values), and is also differentiable through these mask probabilities, thus allowing the mask used for attention to be learned within the network without requiring direct loss supervision. This can be useful for several applications. Specifically, we employ our "Differentiable Soft-Masked Attention" for the task of Weakly-Supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS), where we develop a transformer-based network for VOS which only requires a single annotated image frame for training, but can also benefit from cycle consistency training on a video with just one annotated frame. Although there is no loss for masks in unlabeled frames, the network is still able to segment objects in those frames due to our novel attention formulation. authors_text: Fei Pan,Francois Rameau,Junsik Kim,In So Kweon
title: Labeling Where Adapting Fails: Cross-Domain Semantic Segmentation with Point Supervision via Active Selection
title_zh: 标记适应失败的地方：通过主动选择进行点监督的跨域语义分割
abstract: Training models dedicated to semantic segmentation requires a large amount of pixel-wise annotated data. Due to their costly nature, these annotations might not be available for the task at hand. To alleviate this problem, unsupervised domain adaptation approaches aim at aligning the feature distributions between the labeled source and the unlabeled target data. While these strategies lead to noticeable improvements, their effectiveness remains limited. To guide the domain adaptation task more efficiently, previous works attempted to include human interactions in this process under the form of sparse single-pixel annotations in the target data. In this work, we propose a new domain adaptation framework for semantic segmentation with annotated points via active selection. First, we conduct an unsupervised domain adaptation of the model; from this adaptation, we use an entropy-based uncertainty measurement for target points selection. Finally, to minimize the domain gap, we propose a domain adaptation framework utilizing these target points annotated by human annotators. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show the effectiveness of our methods against existing unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. The propose pipeline is generic and can be included as an extra module to existing domain adaptation strategies.
summary: Training models dedicated to semantic segmentation requires a large amount of pixel-wise annotated data. Due to their costly nature, these annotations might not be available for the task at hand. To alleviate this problem, unsupervised domain adaptation approaches aim at aligning the feature distributions between the labeled source and the unlabeled target data. While these strategies lead to noticeable improvements, their effectiveness remains limited. To guide the domain adaptation task more efficiently, previous works attempted to include human interactions in this process under the form of sparse single-pixel annotations in the target data. In this work, we propose a new domain adaptation framework for semantic segmentation with annotated points via active selection. First, we conduct an unsupervised domain adaptation of the model; from this adaptation, we use an entropy-based uncertainty measurement for target points selection. Finally, to minimize the domain gap, we propose a domain adaptation framework utilizing these target points annotated by human annotators. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show the effectiveness of our methods against existing unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. The propose pipeline is generic and can be included as an extra module to existing domain adaptation strategies.
abstract_zh: 专门用于语义分割的训练模型需要大量像素级注释数据。由于其成本高昂，这些注释可能不适用于当前的任务。为了缓解这个问题，无监督域适应方法旨在对齐标记源数据和未标记目标数据之间的特征分布。虽然这些策略带来了显着的改进，但其有效性仍然有限。为了更有效地指导域适应任务，以前的工作尝试以目标数据中的稀疏单像素注释的形式在此过程中包含人类交互。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的领域适应框架，用于通过主动选择带有注释点的语义分割。首先，我们对模型进行无监督的领域适应；根据这种调整，我们使用基于熵的不确定性测量来选择目标点。最后，为了最小化领域差距，我们提出了一个利用人类注释者注释的这些目标点的领域适应框架。基准数据集的实验结果表明我们的方法相对于现有的无监督域适应方法的有效性。建议的管道是通用的，可以作为现有域适应策略的额外模块包含在内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过主动选择点标注来改进跨域语义分割的领域自适应框架，以减少对大量像素级标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应方法在跨域语义分割任务中效果有限，且稀疏单像素标注方法效率不足，需更高效的标注策略。
AI.method: 首先进行无监督领域自适应，利用熵值衡量目标域不确定性以选择关键点，再通过人工标注这些点并结合领域自适应框架缩小域差距。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有无监督领域自适应方法，且其流程可作为通用模块集成到其他策略中。
AI.conclusion: 主动选择点标注策略有效提升了跨域语义分割的效率和性能，为领域自适应提供了灵活的解决方案。

title: On Gap-dependent Bounds for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线强化学习的间隙相关界限
abstract: This paper presents a systematic study on gap-dependent sample complexity in offline reinforcement learning. Prior work showed when the density ratio between an optimal policy and the behavior policy is upper bounded (the optimal policy coverage assumption), then the agent can achieve an $O\left(\frac{1}{ε^2}\right)$ rate, which is also minimax optimal. We show under the optimal policy coverage assumption, the rate can be improved to $O\left(\frac{1}ε\right)$ when there is a positive sub-optimality gap in the optimal $Q$-function. Furthermore, we show when the visitation probabilities of the behavior policy are uniformly lower bounded for states where an optimal policy's visitation probabilities are positive (the uniform optimal policy coverage assumption), the sample complexity of identifying an optimal policy is independent of $\frac{1}ε$. Lastly, we present nearly-matching lower bounds to complement our gap-dependent upper bounds.
summary: This paper presents a systematic study on gap-dependent sample complexity in offline reinforcement learning. Prior work showed when the density ratio between an optimal policy and the behavior policy is upper bounded (the optimal policy coverage assumption), then the agent can achieve an $O\left(\frac{1}{ε^2}\right)$ rate, which is also minimax optimal. We show under the optimal policy coverage assumption, the rate can be improved to $O\left(\frac{1}ε\right)$ when there is a positive sub-optimality gap in the optimal $Q$-function. Furthermore, we show when the visitation probabilities of the behavior policy are uniformly lower bounded for states where an optimal policy's visitation probabilities are positive (the uniform optimal policy coverage assumption), the sample complexity of identifying an optimal policy is independent of $\frac{1}ε$. Lastly, we present nearly-matching lower bounds to complement our gap-dependent upper bounds.
abstract_zh: 本文对离线强化学习中的间隙相关样本复杂性进行了系统研究。先前的工作表明，当最优策略和行为策略之间的密度比有上限（最优策略覆盖假设）时，代理可以实现 $O\left(\frac{1}{ε^2}\right)$ 速率，这也是极小极大最优。我们表明，在最优政策覆盖假设下，当最优 $Q$ 函数存在正次优差距时，利率可以提高到 $O\left(\frac{1}ε\right)$。此外，我们表明，当行为策略的访问概率对于最优策略的访问概率为正的状态一致下界（统一最优策略覆盖假设）时，识别最优策略的样本复杂度与 $\frac{1}ε$ 无关。最后，我们提出了几乎匹配的下限来补充我们的间隙相关上限。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了离线强化学习中基于差距的样本复杂度，分析了在不同策略覆盖假设下样本复杂度的改进。
AI.motivation: 先前工作在最优策略覆盖假设下证明了样本复杂度为O(1/ε²)，但希望进一步探索在子最优差距存在时的更优界。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，结合最优Q函数的子最优差距及均匀覆盖假设，推导出更紧的样本复杂度上界并证明对应的下界。
AI.result: 在子最优差距存在时样本复杂度提升至O(1/ε)，在均匀覆盖假设下与1/ε无关，并给出匹配的下界。
AI.conclusion: 本文结果表明，基于差距的分析能更精确刻画离线强化学习的样本复杂度，且所提界具有理论最优性。

search_text: On Gap-dependent Bounds for Offline Reinforcement Learning 离线强化学习的间隙相关界限 This paper presents a systematic study on gap-dependent sample complexity in offline reinforcement learning. Prior work showed when the density ratio between an optimal policy and the behavior policy is upper bounded (the optimal policy coverage assumption), then the agent can achieve an $O\left(\frac{1}{ε^2}\right)$ rate, which is also minimax optimal. We show under the optimal policy coverage assumption, the rate can be improved to $O\left(\frac{1}ε\right)$ when there is a positive sub-optimality gap in the optimal $Q$-function. Furthermore, we show when the visitation probabilities of the behavior policy are uniformly lower bounded for states where an optimal policy's visitation probabilities are positive (the uniform optimal policy coverage assumption), the sample complexity of identifying an optimal policy is independent of $\frac{1}ε$. Lastly, we present nearly-matching lower bounds to complement our gap-dependent upper bounds. 本文对离线强化学习中的间隙相关样本复杂性进行了系统研究。先前的工作表明，当最优策略和行为策略之间的密度比有上限（最优策略覆盖假设）时，代理可以实现 $O\left(\frac{1}{ε^2}\right)$ 速率，这也是极小极大最优。我们表明，在最优政策覆盖假设下，当最优 $Q$ 函数存在正次优差距时，利率可以提高到 $O\left(\frac{1}ε\right)$。此外，我们表明，当行为策略的访问概率对于最优策略的访问概率为正的状态一致下界（统一最优策略覆盖假设）时，识别最优策略的样本复杂度与 $\frac{1}ε$ 无关。最后，我们提出了几乎匹配的下限来补充我们的间隙相关上限。 本文系统研究了离线强化学习中基于差距的样本复杂度，分析了在不同策略覆盖假设下样本复杂度的改进。 Xinqi Wang,Qiwen Cui,Simon S. Du cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Learning Sequential Contexts using Transformer for 3D Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 学习顺序上下文进行 3D 手势估计
abstract: 3D hand pose estimation (HPE) is the process of locating the joints of the hand in 3D from any visual input. HPE has recently received an increased amount of attention due to its key role in a variety of human-computer interaction applications. Recent HPE methods have demonstrated the advantages of employing videos or multi-view images, allowing for more robust HPE systems. Accordingly, in this study, we propose a new method to perform Sequential learning with Transformer for Hand Pose (SeTHPose) estimation. Our SeTHPose pipeline begins by extracting visual embeddings from individual hand images. We then use a transformer encoder to learn the sequential context along time or viewing angles and generate accurate 2D hand joint locations. Then, a graph convolutional neural network with a U-Net configuration is used to convert the 2D hand joint locations to 3D poses. Our experiments show that SeTHPose performs well on both hand sequence varieties, temporal and angular. Also, SeTHPose outperforms other methods in the field to achieve new state-of-the-art results on two public available sequential datasets, STB and MuViHand.
summary: 3D hand pose estimation (HPE) is the process of locating the joints of the hand in 3D from any visual input. HPE has recently received an increased amount of attention due to its key role in a variety of human-computer interaction applications. Recent HPE methods have demonstrated the advantages of employing videos or multi-view images, allowing for more robust HPE systems. Accordingly, in this study, we propose a new method to perform Sequential learning with Transformer for Hand Pose (SeTHPose) estimation. Our SeTHPose pipeline begins by extracting visual embeddings from individual hand images. We then use a transformer encoder to learn the sequential context along time or viewing angles and generate accurate 2D hand joint locations. Then, a graph convolutional neural network with a U-Net configuration is used to convert the 2D hand joint locations to 3D poses. Our experiments show that SeTHPose performs well on both hand sequence varieties, temporal and angular. Also, SeTHPose outperforms other methods in the field to achieve new state-of-the-art results on two public available sequential datasets, STB and MuViHand.
abstract_zh: 3D 手部姿势估计 (HPE) 是根据任何视觉输入以 3D 形式定位手部关节的过程。 HPE 最近因其在各种人机交互应用中的关键作用而受到越来越多的关注。最近的 HPE 方法已经证明了使用视频或多视图图像的优势，可以实现更强大的 HPE 系统。因此，在本研究中，我们提出了一种使用 Transformer 进行顺序学习以进行手部姿势（SeTHPose）估计的新方法。我们的 SeTHPose 管道首先从单个手部图像中提取视觉嵌入。然后，我们使用 Transformer 编码器来学习随时间或视角的顺序上下文，并生成准确的 2D 手关节位置。然后，使用具有 U-Net 配置的图卷积神经网络将 2D 手部关节位置转换为 3D 姿势。我们的实验表明，SeTHPose 在手序列品种（时间序列和角度序列）上都表现良好。此外，SeTHPose 的性能优于该领域的其他方法，在两个公共可用的序列数据集 STB 和 MuViHand 上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的3D手部姿态估计方法，称为SeTHPose，通过利用序列上下文信息来提升估计精度。
AI.motivation: 3D手部姿态估计在人机交互中具有重要应用，但现有方法在处理序列数据（如时间或视角变化）时存在局限性，因此需要一种更有效的方法来学习序列上下文信息。
AI.method: 该方法首先从单个手部图像中提取视觉嵌入，然后使用Transformer编码器学习时间或视角序列的上下文，生成准确的2D手部关节位置。接着，采用U-Net配置的图卷积网络将2D关节位置转换为3D姿态。
AI.result: 实验表明，SeTHPose在时间序列和视角序列数据集上均表现良好，并在STB和MuViHand两个公开数据集上取得了优于其他方法的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: SeTHPose通过引入Transformer学习序列上下文，有效提升了3D手部姿态估计的性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

title: Discovering the Hidden Vocabulary of DALLE-2
title_zh: 发现 DALLE-2 的隐藏词汇
abstract: We discover that DALLE-2 seems to have a hidden vocabulary that can be used to generate images with absurd prompts. For example, it seems that \texttt{Apoploe vesrreaitais} means birds and \texttt{Contarra ccetnxniams luryca tanniounons} (sometimes) means bugs or pests. We find that these prompts are often consistent in isolation but also sometimes in combinations. We present our black-box method to discover words that seem random but have some correspondence to visual concepts. This creates important security and interpretability challenges.
summary: We discover that DALLE-2 seems to have a hidden vocabulary that can be used to generate images with absurd prompts. For example, it seems that \texttt{Apoploe vesrreaitais} means birds and \texttt{Contarra ccetnxniams luryca tanniounons} (sometimes) means bugs or pests. We find that these prompts are often consistent in isolation but also sometimes in combinations. We present our black-box method to discover words that seem random but have some correspondence to visual concepts. This creates important security and interpretability challenges.
abstract_zh: 我们发现DALLE-2似乎有一个隐藏的词汇，可以用来生成带有荒谬提示的图像。例如，似乎 \texttt{Apoploe vesrreaitais} 表示鸟类，而 \texttt{Contarra ccetnxniams luryca tanniounons} （有时）表示虫子或害虫。我们发现这些提示在单独的情况下通常是一致的，但有时组合起来也是一致的。我们提出了黑盒方法来发现看似随机但与视觉概念有一定对应关系的单词。这带来了重要的安全性和可解释性挑战。

AI.tldr: 发现DALLE-2中可生成特定图像的隐藏词汇
AI.motivation: 揭示模型潜在的安全风险与可解释性问题，确保生成内容可控
AI.method: 采用黑盒方法分析模型输出，推断出看似随机但对应视觉概念的隐藏词汇
AI.result: 识别出多个随机字符串对应特定视觉概念，且在单独或组合使用时表现一致
AI.conclusion: 隐藏词汇的存在引发安全与可解释性问题，需进一步研究以确保模型可控性

title: A Theoretical Framework for Inference Learning
title_zh: 推理学习的理论框架
abstract: Backpropagation (BP) is the most successful and widely used algorithm in deep learning. However, the computations required by BP are challenging to reconcile with known neurobiology. This difficulty has stimulated interest in more biologically plausible alternatives to BP. One such algorithm is the inference learning algorithm (IL). IL has close connections to neurobiological models of cortical function and has achieved equal performance to BP on supervised learning and auto-associative tasks. In contrast to BP, however, the mathematical foundations of IL are not well-understood. Here, we develop a novel theoretical framework for IL. Our main result is that IL closely approximates an optimization method known as implicit stochastic gradient descent (implicit SGD), which is distinct from the explicit SGD implemented by BP. Our results further show how the standard implementation of IL can be altered to better approximate implicit SGD. Our novel implementation considerably improves the stability of IL across learning rates, which is consistent with our theory, as a key property of implicit SGD is its stability. We provide extensive simulation results that further support our theoretical interpretations and also demonstrate IL achieves quicker convergence when trained with small mini-batches while matching the performance of BP for large mini-batches.
summary: Backpropagation (BP) is the most successful and widely used algorithm in deep learning. However, the computations required by BP are challenging to reconcile with known neurobiology. This difficulty has stimulated interest in more biologically plausible alternatives to BP. One such algorithm is the inference learning algorithm (IL). IL has close connections to neurobiological models of cortical function and has achieved equal performance to BP on supervised learning and auto-associative tasks. In contrast to BP, however, the mathematical foundations of IL are not well-understood. Here, we develop a novel theoretical framework for IL. Our main result is that IL closely approximates an optimization method known as implicit stochastic gradient descent (implicit SGD), which is distinct from the explicit SGD implemented by BP. Our results further show how the standard implementation of IL can be altered to better approximate implicit SGD. Our novel implementation considerably improves the stability of IL across learning rates, which is consistent with our theory, as a key property of implicit SGD is its stability. We provide extensive simulation results that further support our theoretical interpretations and also demonstrate IL achieves quicker convergence when trained with small mini-batches while matching the performance of BP for large mini-batches.
abstract_zh: 反向传播（BP）是深度学习中最成功、应用最广泛的算法。然而，BP 所需的计算很难与已知的神经生物学相一致。这一困难激发了人们对生物学上更合理的 BP 替代方案的兴趣。其中一种算法是推理学习算法（IL）。 IL 与皮质功能的神经生物学模型有着密切的联系，并且在监督学习和自动联想任务上取得了与 BP 相同的性能。然而，与 BP 不同的是，IL 的数学基础还没有被很好地理解。在这里，我们开发了一种新颖的 IL 理论框架。我们的主要结果是 IL 非常接近一种称为隐式随机梯度下降（隐式 SGD）的优化方法，它与 BP 实现的显式 SGD 不同。我们的结果进一步展示了如何改变 IL 的标准实现以更好地近似隐式 SGD。我们的新颖实现极大地提高了 IL 在学习率上的稳定性，这与我们的理论是一致的，因为隐式 SGD 的一个关键属性是它的稳定性。我们提供了广泛的模拟结果，进一步支持我们的理论解释，并证明 IL 在使用小批量训练时实现了更快的收敛，同时与大批量的 BP 性能相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出推断学习算法（IL）的理论框架，证明其近似隐式随机梯度下降（implicit SGD），并通过改进实现提升稳定性与收敛效率。
AI.motivation: 反向传播（BP）虽有效但缺乏生物合理性，而IL虽性能优异但数学基础不明确，需建立理论框架以解释其机制并优化性能。
AI.method: 通过理论分析将IL与隐式SGD关联，提出改进的IL实现方式，结合仿真验证理论假设。
AI.result: 理论证明IL近似隐式SGD，改进后算法稳定性显著提升；实验显示小批量训练收敛更快，大批量性能与BP相当。
AI.conclusion: 建立了IL的理论基础，揭示其稳定性源于隐式SGD特性，改进方法验证了理论有效性并优化了实际应用表现。

search_text: A Theoretical Framework for Inference Learning 推理学习的理论框架 Backpropagation (BP) is the most successful and widely used algorithm in deep learning. However, the computations required by BP are challenging to reconcile with known neurobiology. This difficulty has stimulated interest in more biologically plausible alternatives to BP. One such algorithm is the inference learning algorithm (IL). IL has close connections to neurobiological models of cortical function and has achieved equal performance to BP on supervised learning and auto-associative tasks. In contrast to BP, however, the mathematical foundations of IL are not well-understood. Here, we develop a novel theoretical framework for IL. Our main result is that IL closely approximates an optimization method known as implicit stochastic gradient descent (implicit SGD), which is distinct from the explicit SGD implemented by BP. Our results further show how the standard implementation of IL can be altered to better approximate implicit SGD. Our novel implementation considerably improves the stability of IL across learning rates, which is consistent with our theory, as a key property of implicit SGD is its stability. We provide extensive simulation results that further support our theoretical interpretations and also demonstrate IL achieves quicker convergence when trained with small mini-batches while matching the performance of BP for large mini-batches. 反向传播（BP）是深度学习中最成功、应用最广泛的算法。然而，BP 所需的计算很难与已知的神经生物学相一致。这一困难激发了人们对生物学上更合理的 BP 替代方案的兴趣。其中一种算法是推理学习算法（IL）。 IL 与皮质功能的神经生物学模型有着密切的联系，并且在监督学习和自动联想任务上取得了与 BP 相同的性能。然而，与 BP 不同的是，IL 的数学基础还没有被很好地理解。在这里，我们开发了一种新颖的 IL 理论框架。我们的主要结果是 IL 非常接近一种称为隐式随机梯度下降（隐式 SGD）的优化方法，它与 BP 实现的显式 SGD 不同。我们的结果进一步展示了如何改变 IL 的标准实现以更好地近似隐式 SGD。我们的新颖实现极大地提高了 IL 在学习率上的稳定性，这与我们的理论是一致的，因为隐式 SGD 的一个关键属性是它的稳定性。我们提供了广泛的模拟结果，进一步支持我们的理论解释，并证明 IL 在使用小批量训练时实现了更快的收敛，同时与大批量的 BP 性能相匹配。 本文提出推断学习算法（IL）的理论框架，证明其近似隐式随机梯度下降（implicit SGD），并通过改进实现提升稳定性与收敛效率。 Nick Alonso,Beren Millidge,Jeff Krichmar,Emre Neftci cs.NE,cs.LG

title: PAGER: Progressive Attribute-Guided Extendable Robust Image Generation
title_zh: PAGER：渐进式属性引导的可扩展鲁棒图像生成
abstract: This work presents a generative modeling approach based on successive subspace learning (SSL). Unlike most generative models in the literature, our method does not utilize neural networks to analyze the underlying source distribution and synthesize images. The resulting method, called the progressive attribute-guided extendable robust image generative (PAGER) model, has advantages in mathematical transparency, progressive content generation, lower training time, robust performance with fewer training samples, and extendibility to conditional image generation. PAGER consists of three modules: core generator, resolution enhancer, and quality booster. The core generator learns the distribution of low-resolution images and performs unconditional image generation. The resolution enhancer increases image resolution via conditional generation. Finally, the quality booster adds finer details to generated images. Extensive experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CelebA datasets are conducted to demonstrate generative performance of PAGER.
summary: This work presents a generative modeling approach based on successive subspace learning (SSL). Unlike most generative models in the literature, our method does not utilize neural networks to analyze the underlying source distribution and synthesize images. The resulting method, called the progressive attribute-guided extendable robust image generative (PAGER) model, has advantages in mathematical transparency, progressive content generation, lower training time, robust performance with fewer training samples, and extendibility to conditional image generation. PAGER consists of three modules: core generator, resolution enhancer, and quality booster. The core generator learns the distribution of low-resolution images and performs unconditional image generation. The resolution enhancer increases image resolution via conditional generation. Finally, the quality booster adds finer details to generated images. Extensive experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CelebA datasets are conducted to demonstrate generative performance of PAGER.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种基于连续子空间学习（SSL）的生成建模方法。与文献中的大多数生成模型不同，我们的方法不利用神经网络来分析底层源分布并合成图像。由此产生的方法称为渐进式属性引导的可扩展鲁棒图像生成（PAGER）模型，具有数学透明性、渐进式内容生成、训练时间较短、训练样本较少的鲁棒性能以及条件图像生成的可扩展性等优点。 PAGER 由三个模块组成：核心生成器、分辨率增强器和质量增强器。核心生成器学习低分辨率图像的分布并执行无条件图像生成。分辨率增强器通过条件生成提高图像分辨率。最后，质量增强器为生成的图像添加了更精细的细节。在 MNIST、Fashion-MNIST 和 CelebA 数据集上进行了大量实验，以证明 PAGER 的生成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续子空间学习的生成模型PAGER，用于实现具有数学透明性、渐进内容生成和鲁棒性的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型依赖神经网络分析分布，存在训练时间长、数据需求大且缺乏数学透明性等问题，亟需更高效且鲁棒的生成方法。
AI.method: PAGER包含三个模块：核心生成器（低分辨率图像分布学习）、分辨率增强器（条件生成提升分辨率）和质量增强器（添加细节），通过连续子空间学习替代传统神经网络分析。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CelebA数据集上的实验表明，PAGER在训练时间、小样本鲁棒性和条件生成扩展性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PAGER通过数学驱动的渐进式架构，在图像生成效率、透明性和扩展性上优于传统神经网络生成模型。

title: Provably Efficient Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning via Strategy-wise Bonus
title_zh: 通过策略奖励可证明高效的离线多智能体强化学习
abstract: This paper considers offline multi-agent reinforcement learning. We propose the strategy-wise concentration principle which directly builds a confidence interval for the joint strategy, in contrast to the point-wise concentration principle that builds a confidence interval for each point in the joint action space. For two-player zero-sum Markov games, by exploiting the convexity of the strategy-wise bonus, we propose a computationally efficient algorithm whose sample complexity enjoys a better dependency on the number of actions than the prior methods based on the point-wise bonus. Furthermore, for offline multi-agent general-sum Markov games, based on the strategy-wise bonus and a novel surrogate function, we give the first algorithm whose sample complexity only scales $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$ where $A_i$ is the action size of the $i$-th player and $m$ is the number of players. In sharp contrast, the sample complexity of methods based on the point-wise bonus would scale with the size of the joint action space $Π_{i=1}^m A_i$ due to the curse of multiagents. Lastly, all of our algorithms can naturally take a pre-specified strategy class $Π$ as input and output a strategy that is close to the best strategy in $Π$. In this setting, the sample complexity only scales with $\log |Π|$ instead of $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$.
summary: This paper considers offline multi-agent reinforcement learning. We propose the strategy-wise concentration principle which directly builds a confidence interval for the joint strategy, in contrast to the point-wise concentration principle that builds a confidence interval for each point in the joint action space. For two-player zero-sum Markov games, by exploiting the convexity of the strategy-wise bonus, we propose a computationally efficient algorithm whose sample complexity enjoys a better dependency on the number of actions than the prior methods based on the point-wise bonus. Furthermore, for offline multi-agent general-sum Markov games, based on the strategy-wise bonus and a novel surrogate function, we give the first algorithm whose sample complexity only scales $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$ where $A_i$ is the action size of the $i$-th player and $m$ is the number of players. In sharp contrast, the sample complexity of methods based on the point-wise bonus would scale with the size of the joint action space $Π_{i=1}^m A_i$ due to the curse of multiagents. Lastly, all of our algorithms can naturally take a pre-specified strategy class $Π$ as input and output a strategy that is close to the best strategy in $Π$. In this setting, the sample complexity only scales with $\log |Π|$ instead of $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑离线多智能体强化学习。我们提出了直接为联合策略建立置信区间的策略集中原则，与为联合行动空间中的每个点建立置信区间的点集中原则相反。对于两人零和马尔可夫游戏，通过利用策略奖励的凸性，我们提出了一种计算高效的算法，其样本复杂度比基于点奖励的现有方法更好地依赖于动作数量。此外，对于离线多智能体一般和马尔可夫博弈，基于策略奖励和新颖的代理函数，我们给出了第一个算法，其样本复杂度仅缩放$\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$，其中$A_i$是第$i$个玩家的动作大小，$m$是玩家数量。与此形成鲜明对比的是，由于多智能体的诅咒，基于逐点奖励的方法的样本复杂度将随着联合动作空间 $Π_{i=1}^m A_i$ 的大小而缩放。最后，我们所有的算法自然可以采用预先指定的策略类 $Π$ 作为输入，并输出接近 $Π$ 中最佳策略的策略。在此设置中，样本复杂度仅随 $\log |Π|$ 而不是 $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$ 缩放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于策略级奖励的高效离线多智能体强化学习算法，解决了传统方法在样本复杂度上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有离线多智能体强化学习方法因依赖逐点集中性原理，导致样本复杂度随联合动作空间指数增长，难以应对大规模动作空间问题。
AI.method: 提出策略级集中性原理，构建联合策略的置信区间；针对零和博弈利用策略级奖励的凸性设计高效算法，针对一般和博弈引入代理函数，样本复杂度仅与各玩家动作数之和相关。
AI.result: 算法样本复杂度从传统方法的联合动作空间规模ΠA_i降至∑A_i，并支持预设策略类Π输入，复杂度进一步优化为log|Π|。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破多智能体环境的样本复杂度瓶颈，为大规模动作空间的离线多智能体学习提供了理论保证和计算效率保障。

search_text: Provably Efficient Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning via Strategy-wise Bonus 通过策略奖励可证明高效的离线多智能体强化学习 This paper considers offline multi-agent reinforcement learning. We propose the strategy-wise concentration principle which directly builds a confidence interval for the joint strategy, in contrast to the point-wise concentration principle that builds a confidence interval for each point in the joint action space. For two-player zero-sum Markov games, by exploiting the convexity of the strategy-wise bonus, we propose a computationally efficient algorithm whose sample complexity enjoys a better dependency on the number of actions than the prior methods based on the point-wise bonus. Furthermore, for offline multi-agent general-sum Markov games, based on the strategy-wise bonus and a novel surrogate function, we give the first algorithm whose sample complexity only scales $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$ where $A_i$ is the action size of the $i$-th player and $m$ is the number of players. In sharp contrast, the sample complexity of methods based on the point-wise bonus would scale with the size of the joint action space $Π_{i=1}^m A_i$ due to the curse of multiagents. Lastly, all of our algorithms can naturally take a pre-specified strategy class $Π$ as input and output a strategy that is close to the best strategy in $Π$. In this setting, the sample complexity only scales with $\log |Π|$ instead of $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$. 本文考虑离线多智能体强化学习。我们提出了直接为联合策略建立置信区间的策略集中原则，与为联合行动空间中的每个点建立置信区间的点集中原则相反。对于两人零和马尔可夫游戏，通过利用策略奖励的凸性，我们提出了一种计算高效的算法，其样本复杂度比基于点奖励的现有方法更好地依赖于动作数量。此外，对于离线多智能体一般和马尔可夫博弈，基于策略奖励和新颖的代理函数，我们给出了第一个算法，其样本复杂度仅缩放$\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$，其中$A_i$是第$i$个玩家的动作大小，$m$是玩家数量。与此形成鲜明对比的是，由于多智能体的诅咒，基于逐点奖励的方法的样本复杂度将随着联合动作空间 $Π_{i=1}^m A_i$ 的大小而缩放。最后，我们所有的算法自然可以采用预先指定的策略类 $Π$ 作为输入，并输出接近 $Π$ 中最佳策略的策略。在此设置中，样本复杂度仅随 $\log |Π|$ 而不是 $\sum_{i=1}^mA_i$ 缩放。 本文提出了一种基于策略级奖励的高效离线多智能体强化学习算法，解决了传统方法在样本复杂度上的不足。 Qiwen Cui,Simon S. Du cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.MA

title: Design and Simulation of an Autonomous Quantum Flying Robot Vehicle: An IBM Quantum Experience
title_zh: 自主量子飞行机器人飞行器的设计和仿真：IBM 量子体验
abstract: The application of quantum computation and information in robotics has caught the attention of researchers off late. The field of robotics has always put its effort on the minimization of the space occupied by the robot, and on making the robot `smarter. `The smartness of a robot is its sensitivity to its surroundings and the user input and its ability to react upon them desirably. Quantum phenomena in robotics make sure that the robots occupy less space and the ability of quantum computation to process the huge amount of information effectively, consequently making the robot smarter. Braitenberg vehicle is a simple circuited robot that moves according to the input that its sensors receive. Building upon that, we propose a quantum robot vehicle that is `smart' enough to understand the complex situations more than that of a simple Braitenberg vehicle and navigate itself as per the obstacles present. It can detect an obstacle-free path and can navigate itself accordingly. It also takes input from the user when there is more than one free path available. When left with no option on the ground, it can airlift itself off the ground. As these vehicles sort of `react to the surrounding conditions, this idea can be used to build artificial life and genetic algorithms, space exploration and deep-earth exploration probes, and a handy tool in defense and intelligence services.
summary: The application of quantum computation and information in robotics has caught the attention of researchers off late. The field of robotics has always put its effort on the minimization of the space occupied by the robot, and on making the robot `smarter. `The smartness of a robot is its sensitivity to its surroundings and the user input and its ability to react upon them desirably. Braitenberg vehicle is a simple circuited robot that moves according to the input that its sensors receive. Building upon that, we propose a quantum robot vehicle that is `smart' enough to understand the complex situations more than that of a simple Braitenberg vehicle and navigate itself as per the obstacles present. It can detect an obstacle-free path and can navigate itself accordingly. It also takes input from the user when there is more than one free path available. When left with no option on the ground, it can airlift itself off the ground. As these vehicles sort of `react to the surrounding conditions, this idea can be used to build artificial life and genetic algorithms, space exploration and deep-earth exploration probes, and a handy tool in defense and intelligence services.
abstract_zh: 量子计算和信息在机器人技术中的应用最近引起了研究人员的关注。机器人领域一直致力于最大限度地减少机器人所占用的空间，并使机器人变得“更聪明”。 “机器人的聪明之处在于它对周围环境和用户输入的敏感性以及对它们做出期望反应的能力。机器人技术中的量子现象确保了机器人占用更少的空间以及量子计算有效处理大量信息的能力，从而使机器人变得更加聪明。布雷滕伯格车辆是一种简单的电路机器人，它根据传感器接收到的输入进行移动。在此基础上，我们提出了一种量子机器人车辆，它比简单的布雷滕伯格车辆更“聪明”，能够理解复杂的情况，并根据存在的障碍自行导航。它可以检测无障碍路径并可以相应地自行导航。当有多个可用路径时，它还会接受用户的输入。当地面上别无选择时，它可以将自己从地面升空。由于这些飞行器对周围条件做出反应，这一想法可用于构建人工生命和遗传算法、太空探索和深地探索探测器，以及国防和情报服务中的便捷工具。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并模拟了一种基于量子计算的自主飞行机器人车辆，结合量子信息处理与Braitenberg车辆概念，实现复杂环境下的智能导航与避障。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人受限于空间占用与信息处理能力，而量子计算能显著提升机器人智能性与环境适应性，需探索其在机器人领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 基于Braitenberg车辆架构，引入量子计算与IBM量子体验技术，设计量子机器人车辆的感知-决策-执行系统，通过量子算法实现路径规划与多路径选择，并模拟其飞行避障能力。
AI.result: 成功构建可自主检测障碍物、选择最优路径并实现空中悬浮的量子机器人模型，验证了量子计算在提升机器人智能性与环境适应性方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算为机器人技术提供新范式，未来可应用于深空探测、人工智能及国防领域，需进一步优化量子算法与硬件集成。

authors_text: Quanyi Li,Zhenghao Peng,Haibin Wu,Lan Feng,Bolei Zhou
title: Human-AI Shared Control via Policy Dissection
title_zh: 通过策略剖析实现人机共享控制
abstract: Human-AI shared control allows human to interact and collaborate with AI to accomplish control tasks in complex environments. Previous Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods attempt the goal-conditioned design to achieve human-controllable policies at the cost of redesigning the reward function and training paradigm. Inspired by the neuroscience approach to investigate the motor cortex in primates, we develop a simple yet effective frequency-based approach called \textit{Policy Dissection} to align the intermediate representation of the learned neural controller with the kinematic attributes of the agent behavior. Without modifying the neural controller or retraining the model, the proposed approach can convert a given RL-trained policy into a human-interactive policy. We evaluate the proposed approach on the RL tasks of autonomous driving and locomotion. The experiments show that human-AI shared control achieved by Policy Dissection in driving task can substantially improve the performance and safety in unseen traffic scenes. With human in the loop, the locomotion robots also exhibit versatile controllable motion skills even though they are only trained to move forward. Our results suggest the promising direction of implementing human-AI shared autonomy through interpreting the learned representation of the autonomous agents. Demo video and code will be made available at https://metadriverse.github.io/policydissect.
summary: Human-AI shared control allows human to interact and collaborate with AI to accomplish control tasks in complex environments. Previous Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods attempt the goal-conditioned design to achieve human-controllable policies at the cost of redesigning the reward function and training paradigm. Inspired by the neuroscience approach to investigate the motor cortex in primates, we develop a simple yet effective frequency-based approach called \textit{Policy Dissection} to align the intermediate representation of the learned neural controller with the kinematic attributes of the agent behavior. Without modifying the neural controller or retraining the model, the proposed approach can convert a given RL-trained policy into a human-interactive policy. We evaluate the proposed approach on the RL tasks of autonomous driving and locomotion. The experiments show that human-AI shared control achieved by Policy Dissection in driving task can substantially improve the performance and safety in unseen traffic scenes. With human in the loop, the locomotion robots also exhibit versatile controllable motion skills even though they are only trained to move forward. Our results suggest the promising direction of implementing human-AI shared autonomy through interpreting the learned representation of the autonomous agents. Demo video and code will be made available at https://metadriverse.github.io/policydissect.
abstract_zh: 人机共享控制允许人类与人工智能交互和协作，以完成复杂环境中的控制任务。以前的强化学习（RL）方法尝试以目标条件设计来实现人类可控的策略，但代价是重新设计奖励函数和训练范式。受到研究灵长类动物运动皮层的神经科学方法的启发，我们开发了一种简单而有效的基于频率的方法，称为 \textit{Policy Dissection}，将学习的神经控制器的中间表示与代理行为的运动学属性对齐。无需修改神经控制器或重新训练模型，所提出的方法可以将给定的强化学习训练策略转换为人类交互策略。我们评估了所提出的自动驾驶和运动 RL 任务的方法。实验表明，在驾驶任务中通过策略剖析实现的人机共享控制可以显着提高未见交通场景中的性能和安全性。在人类参与的情况下，运动机器人还表现出多功能的可控运动技能，尽管它们只接受过向前移动的训练。我们的结果表明，通过解释自主代理的学习表示来实现人类与人工智能共享自主的有前途的方向。演示视频和代码将在 https://metadriverse.github.io/policydissect 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Policy Dissection的方法，通过频率分析对齐神经控制器的中间表示与智能体运动学属性，实现无需修改模型即可将预训练策略转化为可交互的人机协同控制策略。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法需重设计奖励函数和训练范式才能实现人类可控性，而本文受神经科学启发，旨在开发无需重新训练模型即可实现人机协同控制的通用方法。
AI.method: 基于频率分析的Policy Dissection方法，通过解析神经控制器中间表示与运动学属性的关联，将预训练策略转化为支持人类干预的共享控制策略。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和运动控制任务中，该方法显著提升了复杂交通场景下的安全性和性能，且使仅训练前进的机器人展现出多样化的可控运动能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过解析自主智能体的表征学习，为实现人机共享自主控制提供了可行方向，展示了无需模型重训练的策略解耦潜力。
