search_text: Human-AI Shared Control via Policy Dissection 通过策略剖析实现人机共享控制 Human-AI shared control allows human to interact and collaborate with AI to accomplish control tasks in complex environments. Previous Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods attempt the goal-conditioned design to achieve human-controllable policies at the cost of redesigning the reward function and training paradigm. Inspired by the neuroscience approach to investigate the motor cortex in primates, we develop a simple yet effective frequency-based approach called \textit{Policy Dissection} to align the intermediate representation of the learned neural controller with the kinematic attributes of the agent behavior. Without modifying the neural controller or retraining the model, the proposed approach can convert a given RL-trained policy into a human-interactive policy. We evaluate the proposed approach on the RL tasks of autonomous driving and locomotion. The experiments show that human-AI shared control achieved by Policy Dissection in driving task can substantially improve the performance and safety in unseen traffic scenes. With human in the loop, the locomotion robots also exhibit versatile controllable motion skills even though they are only trained to move forward. Our results suggest the promising direction of implementing human-AI shared autonomy through interpreting the learned representation of the autonomous agents. Demo video and code will be made available at https://metadriverse.github.io/policydissect. 人机共享控制允许人类与人工智能交互和协作，以完成复杂环境中的控制任务。以前的强化学习（RL）方法尝试以目标条件设计来实现人类可控的策略，但代价是重新设计奖励函数和训练范式。受到研究灵长类动物运动皮层的神经科学方法的启发，我们开发了一种简单而有效的基于频率的方法，称为 \textit{Policy Dissection}，将学习的神经控制器的中间表示与代理行为的运动学属性对齐。无需修改神经控制器或重新训练模型，所提出的方法可以将给定的强化学习训练策略转换为人类交互策略。我们评估了所提出的自动驾驶和运动 RL 任务的方法。实验表明，在驾驶任务中通过策略剖析实现的人机共享控制可以显着提高未见交通场景中的性能和安全性。在人类参与的情况下，运动机器人还表现出多功能的可控运动技能，尽管它们只接受过向前移动的训练。我们的结果表明，通过解释自主代理的学习表示来实现人类与人工智能共享自主的有前途的方向。演示视频和代码将在 https://metadriverse.github.io/policydissect 上提供。 本文提出一种名为Policy Dissection的方法，通过频率分析对齐神经控制器的中间表示与智能体运动学属性，实现无需修改模型即可将预训练策略转化为可交互的人机协同控制策略。 Quanyi Li,Zhenghao Peng,Haibin Wu,Lan Feng,Bolei Zhou cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Hands-Up: Leveraging Synthetic Data for Hands-On-Wheel Detection
title_zh: 举起手来：利用综合数据进行手轮检测
abstract: Over the past few years there has been major progress in the field of synthetic data generation using simulation based techniques. These methods use high-end graphics engines and physics-based ray-tracing rendering in order to represent the world in 3D and create highly realistic images. Datagen has specialized in the generation of high-quality 3D humans, realistic 3D environments and generation of realistic human motion. This technology has been developed into a data generation platform which we used for these experiments. This work demonstrates the use of synthetic photo-realistic in-cabin data to train a Driver Monitoring System that uses a lightweight neural network to detect whether the driver's hands are on the wheel. We demonstrate that when only a small amount of real data is available, synthetic data can be a simple way to boost performance. Moreover, we adopt the data-centric approach and show how performing error analysis and generating the missing edge-cases in our platform boosts performance. This showcases the ability of human-centric synthetic data to generalize well to the real world, and help train algorithms in computer vision settings where data from the target domain is scarce or hard to collect.
summary: Over the past few years there has been major progress in the field of synthetic data generation using simulation based techniques. These methods use high-end graphics engines and physics-based ray-tracing rendering in order to represent the world in 3D and create highly realistic images. Datagen has specialized in the generation of high-quality 3D humans, realistic 3D environments and generation of realistic human motion. This technology has been developed into a data generation platform which we used for these experiments. This work demonstrates the use of synthetic photo-realistic in-cabin data to train a Driver Monitoring System that uses a lightweight neural network to detect whether the driver's hands are on the wheel. We demonstrate that when only a small amount of real data is available, synthetic data can be a simple way to boost performance. Moreover, we adopt the data-centric approach and show how performing error analysis and generating the missing edge-cases in our platform boosts performance. This showcases the ability of human-centric synthetic data to generalize well to the real world, and help train algorithms in computer vision settings where data from the target domain is scarce or hard to collect.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，使用基于模拟的技术生成合成数据领域取得了重大进展。这些方法使用高端图形引擎和基于物理的光线追踪渲染，以便以 3D 形式表示世界并创建高度逼真的图像。 Datagen 专注于生成高质量的 3D 人体、逼真的 3D 环境以及逼真的人体运动。该技术已开发成我们用于这些实验的数据生成平台。这项工作演示了如何使用合成的逼真车内数据来训练驾驶员监控系统，该系统使用轻量级神经网络来检测驾驶员的手是否放在方向盘上。我们证明，当只有少量真实数据可用时，合成数据可以成为提高性能的简单方法。此外，我们采用以数据为中心的方法，并展示了如何在我们的平台中执行错误分析和生成缺失的边缘情况来提高性能。这展示了以人为中心的合成数据能够很好地推广到现实世界的能力，并有助于在目标域数据稀缺或难以收集的计算机视觉环境中训练算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用合成数据训练轻量级神经网络，以检测驾驶员双手是否放在方向盘上。
AI.motivation: 真实驾驶场景数据获取困难且成本高昂，而合成数据能生成高质量、多样化的训练样本，提升驾驶员监控系统的性能。
AI.method: 基于Datagen平台生成逼真车内场景的合成数据，结合数据为中心的方法进行错误分析并补充缺失的边缘案例，训练轻量级神经网络模型。
AI.result: 在真实数据有限的情况下，合成数据显著提升模型性能，且通过补充边缘案例进一步优化检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 以人类为中心的合成数据能有效泛化到真实场景，为数据稀缺领域的计算机视觉任务提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Artem Zholus,Alexey Skrynnik,Shrestha Mohanty,Zoya Volovikova,Julia Kiseleva,Artur Szlam,Marc-Alexandre Coté,Aleksandr I. Panov
title: IGLU Gridworld: Simple and Fast Environment for Embodied Dialog Agents
title_zh: IGLU Gridworld：嵌入式对话代理的简单快速环境
abstract: We present the IGLU Gridworld: a reinforcement learning environment for building and evaluating language conditioned embodied agents in a scalable way. The environment features visual agent embodiment, interactive learning through collaboration, language conditioned RL, and combinatorically hard task (3d blocks building) space.
summary: We present the IGLU Gridworld: a reinforcement learning environment for building and evaluating language conditioned embodied agents in a scalable way. The environment features visual agent embodiment, interactive learning through collaboration, language conditioned RL, and combinatorically hard task (3d blocks building) space.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 IGLU Gridworld：一个强化学习环境，用于以可扩展的方式构建和评估语言条件的体现代理。该环境具有视觉代理体现、通过协作进行交互式学习、语言条件强化学习以及组合困难任务（3D 块构建）空间。

AI.tldr: 提出一个名为IGLU Gridworld的强化学习环境，用于构建和评估语言条件化的具身对话代理。
AI.motivation: 现有具身代理研究缺乏可扩展的环境支持复杂任务和语言条件化交互，需设计简单高效的实验平台推动领域发展。
AI.method: 通过视觉具身性、协作交互学习、语言条件化的强化学习以及组合复杂任务空间（如3D积木构建）来实现。
AI.result: 验证了环境在支持复杂任务和语言条件化学习方面的有效性，为具身代理研究提供新工具。
AI.conclusion: IGLU Gridworld通过可扩展性与任务复杂度设计，为语言驱动的具身智能体研究提供了高效实验平台。

authors_text: Kathryn Dover,Zixuan Cang,Anna Ma,Qing Nie,Roman Vershynin
title: AVIDA: Alternating method for Visualizing and Integrating Data
title_zh: AVIDA：可视化和集成数据的替代方法
comment: To appear in Journal of Computational Science (Accepted, 2023)
comments: To appear in Journal of Computational Science (Accepted, 2023)
abstract: High-dimensional multimodal data arises in many scientific fields. The integration of multimodal data becomes challenging when there is no known correspondence between the samples and the features of different datasets. To tackle this challenge, we introduce AVIDA, a framework for simultaneously performing data alignment and dimension reduction. In the numerical experiments, Gromov-Wasserstein optimal transport and t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding are used as the alignment and dimension reduction modules respectively. We show that AVIDA correctly aligns high-dimensional datasets without common features with four synthesized datasets and two real multimodal single-cell datasets. Compared to several existing methods, we demonstrate that AVIDA better preserves structures of individual datasets, especially distinct local structures in the joint low-dimensional visualization, while achieving comparable alignment performance. Such a property is important in multimodal single-cell data analysis as some biological processes are uniquely captured by one of the datasets. In general applications, other methods can be used for the alignment and dimension reduction modules.
summary: High-dimensional multimodal data arises in many scientific fields. The integration of multimodal data becomes challenging when there is no known correspondence between the samples and the features of different datasets. To tackle this challenge, we introduce AVIDA, a framework for simultaneously performing data alignment and dimension reduction. In the numerical experiments, Gromov-Wasserstein optimal transport and t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding are used as the alignment and dimension reduction modules respectively. We show that AVIDA correctly aligns high-dimensional datasets without common features with four synthesized datasets and two real multimodal single-cell datasets. Compared to several existing methods, we demonstrate that AVIDA better preserves structures of individual datasets, especially distinct local structures in the joint low-dimensional visualization, while achieving comparable alignment performance. Such a property is important in multimodal single-cell data analysis as some biological processes are uniquely captured by one of the datasets. In general applications, other methods can be used for the alignment and dimension reduction modules.
abstract_zh: 高维多模态数据出现在许多科学领域。当样本与不同数据集的特征之间没有已知的对应关系时，多模态数据的集成变得具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 AVIDA，一个同时执行数据对齐和降维的框架。在数值实验中，Gromov-Wasserstein 最优传输和 t 分布随机邻域嵌入分别用作对齐和降维模块。我们证明 AVIDA 可以将没有共同特征的高维数据集与四个合成数据集和两个真实的多模态单细胞数据集正确对齐。与几种现有方法相比，我们证明 AVIDA 更好地保留了单个数据集的结构，特别是联合低维可视化中不同的局部结构，同时实现了可比较的对齐性能。这种特性在多模式单细胞数据分析中非常重要，因为某些生物过程是由其中一个数据集唯一捕获的。在一般应用中，可以使用其他方法来进行对准和降维模块。

AI.tldr: 提出AVIDA框架，用于在无共同特征的高维多模态数据中同时进行数据对齐与降维。
AI.motivation: 解决多模态数据整合中样本与特征无对应关系时的对齐难题，并保留各数据集的局部结构。
AI.method: 结合Gromov-Wasserstein最优传输与t-SNE，通过交替优化实现数据对齐与降维。
AI.result: 在合成与真实多模态单细胞数据集上验证，AVIDA能有效对齐数据并保留局部结构，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AVIDA在保留局部结构方面表现优异，适用于多模态数据分析，且模块化设计支持灵活替换。

search_text: AVIDA: Alternating method for Visualizing and Integrating Data AVIDA：可视化和集成数据的替代方法 High-dimensional multimodal data arises in many scientific fields. The integration of multimodal data becomes challenging when there is no known correspondence between the samples and the features of different datasets. To tackle this challenge, we introduce AVIDA, a framework for simultaneously performing data alignment and dimension reduction. In the numerical experiments, Gromov-Wasserstein optimal transport and t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding are used as the alignment and dimension reduction modules respectively. We show that AVIDA correctly aligns high-dimensional datasets without common features with four synthesized datasets and two real multimodal single-cell datasets. Compared to several existing methods, we demonstrate that AVIDA better preserves structures of individual datasets, especially distinct local structures in the joint low-dimensional visualization, while achieving comparable alignment performance. Such a property is important in multimodal single-cell data analysis as some biological processes are uniquely captured by one of the datasets. In general applications, other methods can be used for the alignment and dimension reduction modules. 高维多模态数据出现在许多科学领域。当样本与不同数据集的特征之间没有已知的对应关系时，多模态数据的集成变得具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 AVIDA，一个同时执行数据对齐和降维的框架。在数值实验中，Gromov-Wasserstein 最优传输和 t 分布随机邻域嵌入分别用作对齐和降维模块。我们证明 AVIDA 可以将没有共同特征的高维数据集与四个合成数据集和两个真实的多模态单细胞数据集正确对齐。与几种现有方法相比，我们证明 AVIDA 更好地保留了单个数据集的结构，特别是联合低维可视化中不同的局部结构，同时实现了可比较的对齐性能。这种特性在多模式单细胞数据分析中非常重要，因为某些生物过程是由其中一个数据集唯一捕获的。在一般应用中，可以使用其他方法来进行对准和降维模块。 提出AVIDA框架，用于在无共同特征的高维多模态数据中同时进行数据对齐与降维。 Kathryn Dover,Zixuan Cang,Anna Ma,Qing Nie,Roman Vershynin q-bio.QM,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: CBS-Budget (CBSB): A Complete and Bounded Suboptimal Search for Multi-Agent Path Finding
title_zh: CBS-Budget (CBSB)：多智能体路径查找的完整有界次优搜索
abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is the problem of finding a collection of collision-free paths for a team of multiple agents while minimizing some global cost, such as the sum of the time travelled by all agents, or the time travelled by the last agent. Conflict Based Search (CBS) is a leading complete and optimal MAPF solver which lazily explores the joint agent state space, using an admissible heuristic joint plan. Such an admissible heuristic joint plan is computed by combining individual shortest paths found without considering inter-agent conflicts, and which becomes gradually more informed as constraints are added to individual agents' path planning problems to avoid discovered conflicts. In this paper, we seek to speedup CBS by finding a more informed heuristic joint plan which is bounded from above. We first propose the budgeted Class-Ordered A* (bCOA*), a novel algorithm that finds the shortest path with minimal number of conflicts that is upper bounded in terms of length. Then, we propose a novel bounded-cost variant of CBS, called CBS-Budget (CBSB) by using a bCOA* search at the low-level search of the CBS and by using a modified focal search at the high-level search of the CBS. We prove that CBSB is complete and bounded-suboptimal. In our numerical experiments, CBSB finds a near optimal solution for hundreds of agents within a fraction of a second. CBSB shows state-of-the-art performance, comparable to Explicit Estimation CBS (EECBS), an enhanced recent version of CBS. On the other hand, CBSB is easier to implement than EECBS, since only two priority queues at the high-level search are needed as in Enhanced CBS (ECBS).
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is the problem of finding a collection of collision-free paths for a team of multiple agents while minimizing some global cost, such as the sum of the time travelled by all agents, or the time travelled by the last agent. Conflict Based Search (CBS) is a leading complete and optimal MAPF solver which lazily explores the joint agent state space, using an admissible heuristic joint plan. Such an admissible heuristic joint plan is computed by combining individual shortest paths found without considering inter-agent conflicts, and which becomes gradually more informed as constraints are added to individual agents' path planning problems to avoid discovered conflicts. In this paper, we seek to speedup CBS by finding a more informed heuristic joint plan which is bounded from above. We first propose the budgeted Class-Ordered A* (bCOA*), a novel algorithm that finds the shortest path with minimal number of conflicts that is upper bounded in terms of length. Then, we propose a novel bounded-cost variant of CBS, called CBS-Budget (CBSB) by using a bCOA* search at the low-level search of the CBS and by using a modified focal search at the high-level search of the CBS. We prove that CBSB is complete and bounded-suboptimal. In our numerical experiments, CBSB finds a near optimal solution for hundreds of agents within a fraction of a second. CBSB shows state-of-the-art performance, comparable to Explicit Estimation CBS (EECBS), an enhanced recent version of CBS. On the other hand, CBSB is easier to implement than EECBS, since only two priority queues at the high-level search are needed as in Enhanced CBS (ECBS).
abstract_zh: 多智能体路径查找（MAPF）是为多个智能体团队找到一组无碰撞路径的问题，同时最小化一些全局成本，例如所有智能体行驶的时间总和，或最后一个智能体行驶的时间。基于冲突的搜索 (CBS) 是一种领先的完整且最优的 MAPF 求解器，它使用可接受的启发式联合计划来延迟探索联合代理状态空间。这种可接受的启发式联合计划是通过组合在不考虑代理间冲突的情况下找到的各个最短路径来计算的，并且随着将约束添加到各个代理的路径规划问题以避免发现的冲突，该计划逐渐变得更加明智。在本文中，我们寻求通过找到一个受上述限制的更明智的启发式联合计划来加速 CBS。我们首先提出了预算类排序 A* (bCOA*)，这是一种新颖的算法，可以找到冲突数量最少且长度上限的最短路径。然后，我们提出了一种新的 CBS 有界成本变体，称为 CBS-Budget (CBSB)，通过在 CBS 的低级搜索中使用 bCOA* 搜索，并在 CBS 的高级搜索中使用改进的焦点搜索。我们证明 CBSB 是完备的且有界次优的。在我们的数值实验中，CBSB 在不到一秒的时间内为数百个智能体找到了近乎最优的解决方案。 CBSB 显示了最先进的性能，可与显式估计 CBS (EECBS)（CBS 的最新增强版本）相媲美。另一方面，CBSB 比 EECBS 更容易实现，因为与增强型 CBS (ECBS) 一样，高级搜索时只需要两个优先级队列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CBS-Budget (CBSB)的多智能体路径规划算法，通过改进启发式搜索策略实现快速且有界次优解的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统冲突基于搜索(CBS)算法在处理大规模多智能体路径规划时效率较低，且难以平衡求解速度与解的质量，亟需更高效的启发式方法。
AI.method: 提出预算类有序A*算法(bCOA*)作为低层搜索方法，并结合改进的焦点搜索策略构建CBSB框架，通过上界约束优化启发式规划过程。
AI.result: 实验表明CBSB在数百智能体场景下可在秒级找到近最优解，性能优于EECBS且实现复杂度更低，仅需两个优先队列即可完成高层搜索。
AI.conclusion: CBSB通过创新的启发式搜索机制，在保证算法完备性的前提下实现了高效次优解求解，为大规模多智能体路径规划提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: V. A. Coutinho,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra
title: Low-complexity Three-dimensional Discrete Hartley Transform Approximations for Medical Image Compression
title_zh: 用于医学图像压缩的低复杂度三维离散 Hartley 变换近似
abstract: The discrete Hartley transform (DHT) is a useful tool for medical image coding. The three-dimensional DHT (3D DHT) can be employed to compress medical image data, such as magnetic resonance and X-ray angiography. However, the computation of the 3D DHT involves several multiplications by irrational quantities, which require floating-point arithmetic and inherent truncation errors. In recent years, a significant progress in wireless and implantable biomedical devices has been achieved. Such devices present critical power and hardware limitations. The multiplication operation demands higher hardware, power, and time consumption than other arithmetic operations, such as addition and bit-shifts. In this work, we present a set of multiplierless DHT approximations, which can be implemented with fixed-point arithmetic. We derive 3D DHT approximations by employing tensor formalism. Such proposed methods present prominent computational savings compared to the usual 3D DHT approach, being appropriate for devices with limited resources. The proposed transforms are applied in a lossy 3D DHT-based medical image compression algorithm, presenting practically the same level of visual quality ($>98\%$ in terms of SSIM) at a considerable reduction in computational effort ($100 \%$ multiplicative complexity reduction). Furthermore, we implemented the proposed 3D transforms in an ARM Cortex-M0+ processor employing the low-cost Raspberry Pi Pico board. The execution time was reduced by $\sim$70% compared to the usual 3D DHT and $\sim$90% compared to 3D DCT.
summary: The discrete Hartley transform (DHT) is a useful tool for medical image coding. The three-dimensional DHT (3D DHT) can be employed to compress medical image data, such as magnetic resonance and X-ray angiography. However, the computation of the 3D DHT involves several multiplications by irrational quantities, which require floating-point arithmetic and inherent truncation errors. In recent years, a significant progress in wireless and implantable biomedical devices has been achieved. Such devices present critical power and hardware limitations. The multiplication operation demands higher hardware, power, and time consumption than other arithmetic operations, such as addition and bit-shifts. In this work, we present a set of multiplierless DHT approximations, which can be implemented with fixed-point arithmetic. We derive 3D DHT approximations by employing tensor formalism. Such proposed methods present prominent computational savings compared to the usual 3D DHT approach, being appropriate for devices with limited resources. The proposed transforms are applied in a lossy 3D DHT-based medical image compression algorithm, presenting practically the same level of visual quality ($>98\%$ in terms of SSIM) at a considerable reduction in computational effort ($100 \%$ multiplicative complexity reduction). Furthermore, we implemented the proposed 3D transforms in an ARM Cortex-M0+ processor employing the low-cost Raspberry Pi Pico board. The execution time was reduced by $\sim$70% compared to the usual 3D DHT and $\sim$90% compared to 3D DCT.
abstract_zh: 离散哈特利变换 (DHT) 是医学图像编码的有用工具。三维DHT（3D DHT）可用于压缩医学图像数据，例如磁共振和X射线血管造影。然而，3D DHT 的计算涉及多次无理数乘法，这需要浮点运算和固有的截断误差。近年来，无线和植入式生物医学设备取得了重大进展。此类设备存在严重的功率和硬件限制。与其他算术运算（例如加法和位移位）相比，乘法运算需要更高的硬件、功耗和时间消耗。在这项工作中，我们提出了一组无乘数 DHT 近似，可以用定点算法实现。我们通过采用张量形式导出 3D DHT 近似。与通常的 3D DHT 方法相比，此类提出的方法具有显着的计算节省，适用于资源有限的设备。所提出的变换应用于基于有损 3D DHT 的医学图像压缩算法，呈现几乎相同水平的视觉质量（就 SSIM 而言，$>98\%$），同时显着减少计算量（乘法复杂度降低 $100 \%$）。此外，我们使用低成本 Raspberry Pi Pico 板在 ARM Cortex-M0+ 处理器中实现了所提出的 3D 转换。与通常的 3D DHT 相比，执行时间减少了 $\sim$70%，与 3D DCT 相比，执行时间减少了 $\sim$90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低复杂度的三维离散哈特利变换（3D DHT）近似方法，用于医疗图像压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统3D DHT计算需大量乘法操作，导致硬件资源消耗大，难以满足植入式医疗设备的低功耗需求。
AI.method: 基于张量形式主义推导无乘法器的3D DHT近似算法，采用定点算术实现。
AI.result: 在Raspberry Pi Pico板上实现后，计算时间较传统3D DHT减少70%，且保持98%以上视觉质量（SSIM）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证压缩质量的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于资源受限的医疗设备。

search_text: Low-complexity Three-dimensional Discrete Hartley Transform Approximations for Medical Image Compression 用于医学图像压缩的低复杂度三维离散 Hartley 变换近似 The discrete Hartley transform (DHT) is a useful tool for medical image coding. The three-dimensional DHT (3D DHT) can be employed to compress medical image data, such as magnetic resonance and X-ray angiography. However, the computation of the 3D DHT involves several multiplications by irrational quantities, which require floating-point arithmetic and inherent truncation errors. In recent years, a significant progress in wireless and implantable biomedical devices has been achieved. Such devices present critical power and hardware limitations. The multiplication operation demands higher hardware, power, and time consumption than other arithmetic operations, such as addition and bit-shifts. In this work, we present a set of multiplierless DHT approximations, which can be implemented with fixed-point arithmetic. We derive 3D DHT approximations by employing tensor formalism. Such proposed methods present prominent computational savings compared to the usual 3D DHT approach, being appropriate for devices with limited resources. The proposed transforms are applied in a lossy 3D DHT-based medical image compression algorithm, presenting practically the same level of visual quality ($>98\%$ in terms of SSIM) at a considerable reduction in computational effort ($100 \%$ multiplicative complexity reduction). Furthermore, we implemented the proposed 3D transforms in an ARM Cortex-M0+ processor employing the low-cost Raspberry Pi Pico board. The execution time was reduced by $\sim$70% compared to the usual 3D DHT and $\sim$90% compared to 3D DCT. 离散哈特利变换 (DHT) 是医学图像编码的有用工具。三维DHT（3D DHT）可用于压缩医学图像数据，例如磁共振和X射线血管造影。然而，3D DHT 的计算涉及多次无理数乘法，这需要浮点运算和固有的截断误差。近年来，无线和植入式生物医学设备取得了重大进展。此类设备存在严重的功率和硬件限制。与其他算术运算（例如加法和位移位）相比，乘法运算需要更高的硬件、功耗和时间消耗。在这项工作中，我们提出了一组无乘数 DHT 近似，可以用定点算法实现。我们通过采用张量形式导出 3D DHT 近似。与通常的 3D DHT 方法相比，此类提出的方法具有显着的计算节省，适用于资源有限的设备。所提出的变换应用于基于有损 3D DHT 的医学图像压缩算法，呈现几乎相同水平的视觉质量（就 SSIM 而言，$>98\%$），同时显着减少计算量（乘法复杂度降低 $100 \%$）。此外，我们使用低成本 Raspberry Pi Pico 板在 ARM Cortex-M0+ 处理器中实现了所提出的 3D 转换。与通常的 3D DHT 相比，执行时间减少了 $\sim$70%，与 3D DCT 相比，执行时间减少了 $\sim$90%。 本文提出一种低复杂度的三维离散哈特利变换（3D DHT）近似方法，用于医疗图像压缩。 V. A. Coutinho,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra eess.SP,cs.MM,eess.IV,math.NA,stat.ME

authors_text: Tianyuan Yao,Yuzhe Lu,Jun Long,Aadarsh Jha,Zheyu Zhu,Zuhayr Asad,Haichun Yang,Agnes B. Fogo,Yuankai Huo
title: Glo-In-One: Holistic Glomerular Detection, Segmentation, and Lesion Characterization with Large-scale Web Image Mining
title_zh: Glo-In-One：通过大规模网络图像挖掘进行整体肾小球检测、分割和病变表征
abstract: The quantitative detection, segmentation, and characterization of glomeruli from high-resolution whole slide imaging (WSI) play essential roles in the computer-assisted diagnosis and scientific research in digital renal pathology. Historically, such comprehensive quantification requires extensive programming skills in order to be able to handle heterogeneous and customized computational tools. To bridge the gap of performing glomerular quantification for non-technical users, we develop the Glo-In-One toolkit to achieve holistic glomerular detection, segmentation, and characterization via a single line of command. Additionally, we release a large-scale collection of 30,000 unlabeled glomerular images to further facilitate the algorithmic development of self-supervised deep learning. The inputs of the Glo-In-One toolkit are WSIs, while the outputs are (1) WSI-level multi-class circle glomerular detection results (which can be directly manipulated with ImageScope), (2) glomerular image patches with segmentation masks, and (3) different lesion types. To leverage the performance of the Glo-In-One toolkit, we introduce self-supervised deep learning to glomerular quantification via large-scale web image mining. The GGS fine-grained classification model achieved a decent performance compared with baseline supervised methods while only using 10% of the annotated data. The glomerular detection achieved an average precision of 0.627 with circle representations, while the glomerular segmentation achieved a 0.955 patch-wise Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC).
summary: The quantitative detection, segmentation, and characterization of glomeruli from high-resolution whole slide imaging (WSI) play essential roles in the computer-assisted diagnosis and scientific research in digital renal pathology. Historically, such comprehensive quantification requires extensive programming skills in order to be able to handle heterogeneous and customized computational tools. To bridge the gap of performing glomerular quantification for non-technical users, we develop the Glo-In-One toolkit to achieve holistic glomerular detection, segmentation, and characterization via a single line of command. Additionally, we release a large-scale collection of 30,000 unlabeled glomerular images to further facilitate the algorithmic development of self-supervised deep learning. The inputs of the Glo-In-One toolkit are WSIs, while the outputs are (1) WSI-level multi-class circle glomerular detection results (which can be directly manipulated with ImageScope), (2) glomerular image patches with segmentation masks, and (3) different lesion types. To leverage the performance of the Glo-In-One toolkit, we introduce self-supervised deep learning to glomerular quantification via large-scale web image mining. The GGS fine-grained classification model achieved a decent performance compared with baseline supervised methods while only using 10% of the annotated data. The glomerular detection achieved an average precision of 0.627 with circle representations, while the glomerular segmentation achieved a 0.955 patch-wise Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC).
abstract_zh: 高分辨率全玻片成像（WSI）对肾小球的定量检测、分割和表征在数字肾脏病理学的计算机辅助诊断和科学研究中发挥着重要作用。从历史上看，这种全面的量化需要广泛的编程技能，以便能够处理异构和定制的计算工具。为了弥补非技术用户执行肾小球定量的差距，我们开发了 Glo-In-One 工具包，通过单行命令实现整体肾小球检测、分割和表征。此外，我们还发布了 30,000 张未标记肾小球图像的大规模集合，以进一步促进自监督深度学习的算法开发。 Glo-In-One 工具包的输入是 WSI，而输出是 (1) WSI 级多类圆肾小球检测结果（可以使用 ImageScope 直接操作）、(2) 带有分割掩模的肾小球图像块，以及 (3) 不同的病变类型。为了利用 Glo-In-One 工具包的性能，我们通过大规模网络图像挖掘将自监督深度学习引入肾小球量化。与基线监督方法相比，GGS 细粒度分类模型在仅使用 10% 的注释数据的情况下取得了不错的性能。肾小球检测以圆形表示实现了 0.627 的平均精度，而肾小球分割实现了 0.955 的补丁式 Dice 相似系数 (DSC)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Glo-In-One工具包，实现肾小球的检测、分割和病变特征分析，并通过大规模网络图像挖掘提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: 传统肾小球量化分析需要复杂编程技能，缺乏面向非技术人员的便捷工具，且标注数据不足限制了深度学习发展。
AI.method: 开发单命令操作的Glo-In-One工具包，结合自监督深度学习与大规模未标注网络图像，实现WSI输入到检测结果、分割掩膜和病变分类的端到端处理。
AI.result: 肾小球检测平均精度0.627，分割Dice系数0.955；GGS模型仅用10%标注数据即达到与监督方法相当的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: Glo-In-One为非技术用户提供了一体化肾小球分析方案，大规模未标注数据结合自监督学习有效缓解了标注数据稀缺问题。

authors_text: T. L. T. da Silveira,D. R. Canterle,D. F. G. Coelho,V. A. Coutinho,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra
title: A Class of Low-complexity DCT-like Transforms for Image and Video Coding
title_zh: 一类用于图像和视频编码的低复杂度类 DCT 变换
comment: Corrected a typo in the general expression for the diagonal matrix S(a) (Equation 11, Section 3.1). Manuscript has 20 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables
comments: Corrected a typo in the general expression for the diagonal matrix S(a) (Equation 11, Section 3.1). Manuscript has 20 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables
abstract: The discrete cosine transform (DCT) is a relevant tool in signal processing applications, mainly known for its good decorrelation properties. Current image and video coding standards -- such as JPEG and HEVC -- adopt the DCT as a fundamental building block for compression. Recent works have introduced low-complexity approximations for the DCT, which become paramount in applications demanding real-time computation and low-power consumption. The design of DCT approximations involves a trade-off between computational complexity and performance. This paper introduces a new multiparametric transform class encompassing the round-off DCT (RDCT) and the modified RDCT (MRDCT), two relevant multiplierless 8-point approximate DCTs. The associated fast algorithm is provided. Four novel orthogonal low-complexity 8-point DCT approximations are obtained by solving a multicriteria optimization problem. The optimal 8-point transforms are scaled to lengths 16 and 32 while keeping the arithmetic complexity low. The proposed methods are assessed by proximity and coding measures with respect to the exact DCT. Image and video coding experiments hardware realization are performed. The novel transforms perform close to or outperform the current state-of-the-art DCT approximations.
summary: The discrete cosine transform (DCT) is a relevant tool in signal processing applications, mainly known for its good decorrelation properties. Current image and video coding standards -- such as JPEG and HEVC -- adopt the DCT as a fundamental building block for compression. Recent works have introduced low-complexity approximations for the DCT, which become paramount in applications demanding real-time computation and low-power consumption. The design of DCT approximations involves a trade-off between computational complexity and performance. This paper introduces a new multiparametric transform class encompassing the round-off DCT (RDCT) and the modified RDCT (MRDCT), two relevant multiplierless 8-point approximate DCTs. The associated fast algorithm is provided. Four novel orthogonal low-complexity 8-point DCT approximations are obtained by solving a multicriteria optimization problem. The optimal 8-point transforms are scaled to lengths 16 and 32 while keeping the arithmetic complexity low. The proposed methods are assessed by proximity and coding measures with respect to the exact DCT. Image and video coding experiments hardware realization are performed. The novel transforms perform close to or outperform the current state-of-the-art DCT approximations.
abstract_zh: 离散余弦变换 (DCT) 是信号处理应用中的相关工具，主要以其良好的去相关特性而闻名。当前的图像和视频编码标准（例如 JPEG 和 HEVC）采用 DCT 作为压缩的基本构建块。最近的工作引入了 DCT 的低复杂度近似，这在需要实时计算和低功耗的应用中变得至关重要。 DCT 近似的设计涉及计算复杂度和性能之间的权衡。本文介绍了一种新的多参数变换类，包括舍入 DCT (RDCT) 和改进的 RDCT (MRDCT)，这两种相关的无乘数 8 点近似 DCT。提供了相关的快速算法。通过求解多标准优化问题获得了四种新颖的正交低复杂度 8 点 DCT 近似。最佳 8 点变换缩放至长度 16 和 32，同时保持较低的算术复杂度。所提出的方法通过与精确 DCT 相关的接近度和编码测量来评估。进行了图像和视频编码实验的硬件实现。这种新颖的变换性能接近或优于当前最先进的 DCT 近似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低复杂度的DCT近似变换类，用于图像和视频编码，以降低计算复杂度并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 传统DCT在压缩标准中广泛应用，但其计算复杂度高，难以满足实时性和低功耗需求，需设计更高效的近似变换。
AI.method: 通过构建多参数变换类，结合快速算法和多准则优化问题，推导出四种新型正交低复杂度8点DCT近似，并扩展至16点和32点。
AI.result: 新变换在计算复杂度和编码性能上优于现有近似DCT，且在硬件实现中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的变换在保持低复杂度的同时接近或超越现有DCT近似方法，适合实时图像视频编码应用。

search_text: A Class of Low-complexity DCT-like Transforms for Image and Video Coding 一类用于图像和视频编码的低复杂度类 DCT 变换 The discrete cosine transform (DCT) is a relevant tool in signal processing applications, mainly known for its good decorrelation properties. Current image and video coding standards -- such as JPEG and HEVC -- adopt the DCT as a fundamental building block for compression. Recent works have introduced low-complexity approximations for the DCT, which become paramount in applications demanding real-time computation and low-power consumption. The design of DCT approximations involves a trade-off between computational complexity and performance. This paper introduces a new multiparametric transform class encompassing the round-off DCT (RDCT) and the modified RDCT (MRDCT), two relevant multiplierless 8-point approximate DCTs. The associated fast algorithm is provided. Four novel orthogonal low-complexity 8-point DCT approximations are obtained by solving a multicriteria optimization problem. The optimal 8-point transforms are scaled to lengths 16 and 32 while keeping the arithmetic complexity low. The proposed methods are assessed by proximity and coding measures with respect to the exact DCT. Image and video coding experiments hardware realization are performed. The novel transforms perform close to or outperform the current state-of-the-art DCT approximations. 离散余弦变换 (DCT) 是信号处理应用中的相关工具，主要以其良好的去相关特性而闻名。当前的图像和视频编码标准（例如 JPEG 和 HEVC）采用 DCT 作为压缩的基本构建块。最近的工作引入了 DCT 的低复杂度近似，这在需要实时计算和低功耗的应用中变得至关重要。 DCT 近似的设计涉及计算复杂度和性能之间的权衡。本文介绍了一种新的多参数变换类，包括舍入 DCT (RDCT) 和改进的 RDCT (MRDCT)，这两种相关的无乘数 8 点近似 DCT。提供了相关的快速算法。通过求解多标准优化问题获得了四种新颖的正交低复杂度 8 点 DCT 近似。最佳 8 点变换缩放至长度 16 和 32，同时保持较低的算术复杂度。所提出的方法通过与精确 DCT 相关的接近度和编码测量来评估。进行了图像和视频编码实验的硬件实现。这种新颖的变换性能接近或优于当前最先进的 DCT 近似。 本文提出一种低复杂度的DCT近似变换类，用于图像和视频编码，以降低计算复杂度并保持性能。 T. L. T. da Silveira,D. R. Canterle,D. F. G. Coelho,V. A. Coutinho,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra eess.IV,cs.MM,eess.SP,math.NA,stat.ME

title: BRExIt: On Opponent Modelling in Expert Iteration
title_zh: BRExIt：专家迭代中的对手建模
abstract: Finding a best response policy is a central objective in game theory and multi-agent learning, with modern population-based training approaches employing reinforcement learning algorithms as best-response oracles to improve play against candidate opponents (typically previously learnt policies). We propose Best Response Expert Iteration (BRExIt), which accelerates learning in games by incorporating opponent models into the state-of-the-art learning algorithm Expert Iteration (ExIt). BRExIt aims to (1) improve feature shaping in the apprentice, with a policy head predicting opponent policies as an auxiliary task, and (2) bias opponent moves in planning towards the given or learnt opponent model, to generate apprentice targets that better approximate a best response. In an empirical ablation on BRExIt's algorithmic variants against a set of fixed test agents, we provide statistical evidence that BRExIt learns better performing policies than ExIt.
summary: Finding a best response policy is a central objective in game theory and multi-agent learning, with modern population-based training approaches employing reinforcement learning algorithms as best-response oracles to improve play against candidate opponents (typically previously learnt policies). We propose Best Response Expert Iteration (BRExIt), which accelerates learning in games by incorporating opponent models into the state-of-the-art learning algorithm Expert Iteration (ExIt). BRExIt aims to (1) improve feature shaping in the apprentice, with a policy head predicting opponent policies as an auxiliary task, and (2) bias opponent moves in planning towards the given or learnt opponent model, to generate apprentice targets that better approximate a best response. In an empirical ablation on BRExIt's algorithmic variants against a set of fixed test agents, we provide statistical evidence that BRExIt learns better performing policies than ExIt.
abstract_zh: 寻找最佳响应策略是博弈论和多智能体学习的核心目标，现代基于群体的训练方法采用强化学习算法作为最佳响应预言，以改善与候选对手（通常是先前学习的策略）的对抗。我们提出了最佳响应专家迭代（BRExIt），它通过将对手模型纳入最先进的学习算法专家迭代（ExIt）来加速游戏中的学习。 BRExIt 的目标是 (1) 改善学徒的特征塑造，以策略负责人预测对手政策作为辅助任务，以及 (2) 使对手在规划中偏向于给定或学习的对手模型，以生成更接近最佳响应的学徒目标。在针对一组固定测试代理的 BRExIt 算法变体的实证消融中，我们提供了统计证据，表明 BRExIt 比 ExIt 学习到更好的执行策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BRExIt算法，通过整合对手模型到专家迭代方法中，以加速博弈中的学习并提升策略表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在对抗候选对手时效率不足，尤其在处理对手策略不确定性方面存在局限，需通过对手建模优化策略学习。
AI.method: BRExIt包含两项改进：1) 通过策略头预测对手策略作为辅助任务，优化学徒特征塑造；2) 在规划中偏向给定或学习的对手模型，生成更贴近最佳响应的目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，BRExIt在固定测试代理上的算法变体表现优于ExIt，具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: BRExIt通过对手建模有效提升策略学习效果，验证了其在博弈场景中的优越性。

title: Deep learning pipeline for image classification on mobile phones
title_zh: 用于手机图像分类的深度学习管道
abstract: This article proposes and documents a machine-learning framework and tutorial for classifying images using mobile phones. Compared to computers, the performance of deep learning model performance degrades when deployed on a mobile phone and requires a systematic approach to find a model that performs optimally on both computers and mobile phones. By following the proposed pipeline, which consists of various computational tools, simple procedural recipes, and technical considerations, one can bring the power of deep learning medical image classification to mobile devices, potentially unlocking new domains of applications. The pipeline is demonstrated on four different publicly available datasets: COVID X-rays, COVID CT scans, leaves, and colorectal cancer. We used two application development frameworks: TensorFlow Lite (real-time testing) and Flutter (digital image testing) to test the proposed pipeline. We found that transferring deep learning models to a mobile phone is limited by hardware and classification accuracy drops. To address this issue, we proposed this pipeline to find an optimized model for mobile phones. Finally, we discuss additional applications and computational concerns related to deploying deep-learning models on phones, including real-time analysis and image preprocessing. We believe the associated documentation and code can help physicians and medical experts develop medical image classification applications for distribution.
summary: This article proposes and documents a machine-learning framework and tutorial for classifying images using mobile phones. Compared to computers, the performance of deep learning model performance degrades when deployed on a mobile phone and requires a systematic approach to find a model that performs optimally on both computers and mobile phones. By following the proposed pipeline, which consists of various computational tools, simple procedural recipes, and technical considerations, one can bring the power of deep learning medical image classification to mobile devices, potentially unlocking new domains of applications. The pipeline is demonstrated on four different publicly available datasets: COVID X-rays, COVID CT scans, leaves, and colorectal cancer. We used two application development frameworks: TensorFlow Lite (real-time testing) and Flutter (digital image testing) to test the proposed pipeline. We found that transferring deep learning models to a mobile phone is limited by hardware and classification accuracy drops. To address this issue, we proposed this pipeline to find an optimized model for mobile phones. Finally, we discuss additional applications and computational concerns related to deploying deep-learning models on phones, including real-time analysis and image preprocessing. We believe the associated documentation and code can help physicians and medical experts develop medical image classification applications for distribution.
abstract_zh: 本文提出并记录了使用手机对图像进行分类的机器学习框架和教程。与计算机相比，深度学习模型部署在手机上时性能会下降，需要采用系统方法来找到在计算机和手机上都表现最佳的模型。通过遵循由各种计算工具、简单的程序配方和技术考虑组成的拟议管道，人们可以将深度学习医学图像分类的力量引入移动设备，从而有可能解锁新的应用领域。该流程在四个不同的公开数据集上进行了演示：新冠肺炎 X 射线、新冠肺炎 CT 扫描、树叶和结直肠癌。我们使用了两个应用程序开发框架：TensorFlow Lite（实时测试）和 Flutter（数字图像测试）来测试所提出的管道。我们发现将深度学习模型转移到手机上会受到硬件的限制，并且分类精度会下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了这个管道来寻找手机的优化模型。最后，我们讨论与在手机上部署深度学习模型相关的其他应用程序和计算问题，包括实时分析和图像预处理。我们相信相关的文档和代码可以帮助医生和医学专家开发用于分发的医学图像分类应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于在手机上进行图像分类的深度学习框架和教程，通过优化模型以适应移动设备的硬件限制。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在移动设备上的性能通常低于计算机，需系统性解决模型优化问题以实现医疗图像分类等移动应用。
AI.method: 采用TensorFlow Lite和Flutter框架，结合计算工具与技术考量，设计优化流水线以提升移动设备上的分类准确率。
AI.result: 发现模型移植受限于硬件导致准确率下降，但通过该流水线可找到适用于手机的优化模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架与代码可助力医疗专家开发移动图像分类应用，同时需关注实时分析与图像预处理等计算问题。

title: Smart operators in industry 4.0: A human-centered approach to enhance operators' capabilities and competencies within the new smart factory context
title_zh: 工业 4.0 中的智能操作员：在新的智能工厂环境中采用以人为本的方法来增强操作员的能力和竞争力
abstract: As the Industry 4.0 takes shape, human operators experience an increased complexity of their daily tasks: they are required to be highly flexible and to demonstrate adaptive capabilities in a very dynamic working environment. It calls for tools and approaches that could be easily embedded into everyday practices and able to combine complex methodologies with high usability requirements. In this perspective, the proposed research work is focused on the design and development of a practical solution, called Sophos-MS, able to integrate augmented reality contents and intelligent tutoring systems with cutting-edge fruition technologies for operators' support in complex man-machine interactions. After establishing a reference methodological framework for the smart operator concept within the Industry 4.0 paradigm, the proposed solution is presented, along with its functional and non-function requirements. Such requirements are fulfilled through a structured design strategy whose main outcomes include a multi-layered modular solution, Sophos-MS, that relies on Augmented Reality contents and on an intelligent personal digital assistant with vocal interaction capabilities. The proposed approach has been deployed and its training potentials have been investigated with field experiments. The experimental campaign results have been firstly checked to ensure their statistical relevance and then analytically assessed in order to show that the proposed solution has a real impact on operators' learning curves and can make the difference between who uses it and who does not.
summary: As the Industry 4.0 takes shape, human operators experience an increased complexity of their daily tasks: they are required to be highly flexible and to demonstrate adaptive capabilities in a very dynamic working environment. It calls for tools and approaches that could be easily embedded into everyday practices and able to combine complex methodologies with high usability requirements. In this perspective, the proposed research work is focused on the design and development of a practical solution, called Sophos-MS, able to integrate augmented reality contents and intelligent tutoring systems with cutting-edge fruition technologies for operators' support in complex man-machine interactions. After establishing a reference methodological framework for the smart operator concept within the Industry 4.0 paradigm, the proposed solution is presented, along with its functional and non-function requirements. Such requirements are fulfilled through a structured design strategy whose main outcomes include a multi-layered modular solution, Sophos-MS, that relies on Augmented Reality contents and on an intelligent personal digital assistant with vocal interaction capabilities. The proposed approach has been deployed and its training potentials have been investigated with field experiments. The experimental campaign results have been firstly checked to ensure their statistical relevance and then analytically assessed in order to show that the proposed solution has a real impact on operators' learning curves and can make the difference between who uses it and who does not.
abstract_zh: 随着工业 4.0 的形成，人类操作员的日常任务变得越来越复杂：他们需要高度灵活，并在非常动态的工作环境中展示适应能力。它需要能够轻松嵌入到日常实践中并能够将复杂的方法与高可用性要求相结合的工具和方法。从这个角度来看，拟议的研究工作重点是设计和开发名为 Sophos-MS 的实用解决方案，该解决方案能够将增强现实内容和智能辅导系统与尖端成果技术相结合，为操作员提供复杂人机交互的支持。在为工业 4.0 范式内的智能操作员概念建立参考方法框架后，提出了所提出的解决方案及其功能和非功能要求。这些要求是通过结构化设计策略来满足的，其主要成果包括多层模块化解决方案 Sophos-MS，该解决方案依赖于增强现实内容和具有语音交互功能的智能个人数字助理。所提出的方法已得到部署，并通过现场实验研究了其训练潜力。首先检查实验活动结果以确保其统计相关性，然后进行分析评估，以表明所提出的解决方案对操作员的学习曲线具有真正的影响，并且可以区分谁使用它，谁不使用它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Sophos-MS的解决方案，通过整合增强现实和智能辅导系统，提升工业4.0背景下操作员的能力与适应性。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0环境下操作员面临任务复杂化和动态工作环境的挑战，现有工具难以兼顾复杂性与易用性，需开发实用且高效的支持系统。
AI.method: 建立智能操作员方法论框架，设计多层模块化Sophos-MS系统，结合增强现实内容与语音交互的智能数字助手，并通过实地实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验结果经统计验证显示，Sophos-MS显著提升操作员学习效率，使用该系统的操作员表现明显优于未使用者。
AI.conclusion: Sophos-MS有效增强操作员能力，验证了人机协作方法在工业4.0中的可行性，为智能制造提供实用解决方案。

title: An Empirical Study on How Well Do COVID-19 Information Dashboards Service Users' Information Needs
title_zh: 关于 COVID-19 信息仪表板如何满足用户信息需求的实证研究
abstract: The ongoing COVID-19 pandemic highlights the importance of dashboards for providing critical real-time information. In order to enable people to obtain information in time and to understand complex statistical data, many developers have designed and implemented public-oriented COVID-19 "information dashboards" during the pandemic. However, development often takes a long time and developers are not clear about many people's information needs, resulting in gaps between information needs and supplies. According to our empirical study and observations with popular developed COVID-19 dashboards, this seriously impedes information acquirement. Our study compares people's needs on Twitter with existing information suppliers. We determine that despite the COVID-19 information that is currently on existing dashboards, people are also interested in the relationship between COVID-19 and other viruses, the origin of COVID-19, vaccine development, fake new about COVID-19, impact on women, impact on school/university, and impact on business. Most of these have not yet been well addressed. We also summarise the visualization and interaction patterns commonly applied in dashboards, finding key patterns between data and visualization as well as visualization and interaction. Our findings can help developers to better optimize their dashboard to meet people's needs and make improvements to future crisis management dashboard development.
summary: The ongoing COVID-19 pandemic highlights the importance of dashboards for providing critical real-time information. In order to enable people to obtain information in time and to understand complex statistical data, many developers have designed and implemented public-oriented COVID-19 "information dashboards" during the pandemic. However, development often takes a long time and developers are not clear about many people's information needs, resulting in gaps between information needs and supplies. According to our empirical study and observations with popular developed COVID-19 dashboards, this seriously impedes information acquirement. Our study compares people's needs on Twitter with existing information suppliers. We determine that despite the COVID-19 information that is currently on existing dashboards, people are also interested in the relationship between COVID-19 and other viruses, the origin of COVID-19, vaccine development, fake new about COVID-19, impact on women, impact on school/university, and impact on business. Most of these have not yet been well addressed. We also summarise the visualization and interaction patterns commonly applied in dashboards, finding key patterns between data and visualization as well as visualization and interaction. Our findings can help developers to better optimize their dashboard to meet people's needs and make improvements to future crisis management dashboard development.
abstract_zh: 持续的 COVID-19 大流行凸显了仪表板在提供关键实时信息方面的重要性。为了使人们能够及时获取信息并了解复杂的统计数据，许多开发人员在大流行期间设计并实现了面向公众的COVID-19“信息仪表板”。然而，开发往往需要很长的时间，开发人员并不清楚很多人的信息需求，导致信息需求和供应之间的差距。根据我们的实证研究和对流行开发的 COVID-19 仪表板的观察，这严重阻碍了信息获取。我们的研究将人们对 Twitter 的需求与现有的信息供应商进行了比较。我们确定，尽管现有仪表板上目前有 COVID-19 信息，但人们也对 COVID-19 与其他病毒之间的关系、COVID-19 的起源、疫苗开发、有关 COVID-19 的假新闻、对女性的影响、对学校/大学的影响以及对商业的影响感兴趣。其中大部分尚未得到很好的解决。我们还总结了仪表板中常用的可视化和交互模式，找到数据和可视化以及可视化和交互之间的关键模式。我们的研究结果可以帮助开发人员更好地优化他们的仪表板以满足人们的需求，并对未来危机管理仪表板的开发做出改进。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析COVID-19信息仪表板在满足用户信息需求方面的效果，并提出优化建议。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间信息仪表板存在供需脱节问题，开发者难以准确把握用户需求，导致关键信息未被覆盖。
AI.method: 比较Twitter用户需求与现有仪表板内容，分析可视化与交互模式的关联性。
AI.result: 发现用户关注疫苗研发、病毒起源、假新闻等未被充分覆盖的领域，总结出数据可视化与交互的关键模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可指导开发者优化仪表板设计，提升未来危机管理信息系统的用户需求匹配度。

authors_text: Yi Li,Rameswar Panda,Yoon Kim,Chun-Fu Chen,Rogerio Feris,David Cox,Nuno Vasconcelos
title: VALHALLA: Visual Hallucination for Machine Translation
title_zh: VALHALLA：机器翻译的视觉幻觉
abstract: Designing better machine translation systems by considering auxiliary inputs such as images has attracted much attention in recent years. While existing methods show promising performance over the conventional text-only translation systems, they typically require paired text and image as input during inference, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a visual hallucination framework, called VALHALLA, which requires only source sentences at inference time and instead uses hallucinated visual representations for multimodal machine translation. In particular, given a source sentence an autoregressive hallucination transformer is used to predict a discrete visual representation from the input text, and the combined text and hallucinated representations are utilized to obtain the target translation. We train the hallucination transformer jointly with the translation transformer using standard backpropagation with cross-entropy losses while being guided by an additional loss that encourages consistency between predictions using either ground-truth or hallucinated visual representations. Extensive experiments on three standard translation datasets with a diverse set of language pairs demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over both text-only baselines and state-of-the-art methods. Project page: http://www.svcl.ucsd.edu/projects/valhalla.
summary: Designing better machine translation systems by considering auxiliary inputs such as images has attracted much attention in recent years. While existing methods show promising performance over the conventional text-only translation systems, they typically require paired text and image as input during inference, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a visual hallucination framework, called VALHALLA, which requires only source sentences at inference time and instead uses hallucinated visual representations for multimodal machine translation. In particular, given a source sentence an autoregressive hallucination transformer is used to predict a discrete visual representation from the input text, and the combined text and hallucinated representations are utilized to obtain the target translation. We train the hallucination transformer jointly with the translation transformer using standard backpropagation with cross-entropy losses while being guided by an additional loss that encourages consistency between predictions using either ground-truth or hallucinated visual representations. Extensive experiments on three standard translation datasets with a diverse set of language pairs demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over both text-only baselines and state-of-the-art methods. Project page: http://www.svcl.ucsd.edu/projects/valhalla.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通过考虑图像等辅助输入来设计更好的机器翻译系统引起了广泛关注。虽然现有方法比传统的纯文本翻译系统表现出良好的性能，但它们在推理过程中通常需要配对的文本和图像作为输入，这限制了它们在现实场景中的适用性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 VALHALLA 的视觉幻觉框架，该框架在推理时仅需要源句子，而是使用幻觉视觉表示进行多模态机器翻译。特别是，给定源句子，使用自回归幻觉变换器从输入文本预测离散视觉表示，并利用组合的文本和幻觉表示来获得目标翻译。我们使用具有交叉熵损失的标准反向传播与平移变压器联合训练幻觉变压器，同时受到额外损失的指导，该额外损失鼓励使用地面实况或幻觉视觉表示的预测之间的一致性。对具有不同语言对的三个标准翻译数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于纯文本基线和最先进方法的有效性。项目页面：http://www.svcl.ucsd.edu/projects/valhalla。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VALHALLA框架，通过在推理时仅使用源语言句子并生成幻觉视觉表示，实现无需配对图像的多模态机器翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉辅助翻译方法依赖真实图像输入，限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过生成幻觉视觉表示，解决真实图像获取困难的问题。
AI.method: 使用自回归幻觉变换器从源文本生成离散视觉表示，结合文本与幻觉视觉表示进行翻译。通过联合训练幻觉变换器与翻译模型，并引入一致性损失确保预测稳定性。
AI.result: 在三个标准翻译数据集上实验表明，VALHALLA优于纯文本基线和现有最先进方法，验证了幻觉视觉表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VALHALLA通过生成幻觉视觉表示，实现了无需真实图像的多模态翻译，为实际应用提供了新思路。

search_text: VALHALLA: Visual Hallucination for Machine Translation VALHALLA：机器翻译的视觉幻觉 Designing better machine translation systems by considering auxiliary inputs such as images has attracted much attention in recent years. While existing methods show promising performance over the conventional text-only translation systems, they typically require paired text and image as input during inference, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a visual hallucination framework, called VALHALLA, which requires only source sentences at inference time and instead uses hallucinated visual representations for multimodal machine translation. In particular, given a source sentence an autoregressive hallucination transformer is used to predict a discrete visual representation from the input text, and the combined text and hallucinated representations are utilized to obtain the target translation. We train the hallucination transformer jointly with the translation transformer using standard backpropagation with cross-entropy losses while being guided by an additional loss that encourages consistency between predictions using either ground-truth or hallucinated visual representations. Extensive experiments on three standard translation datasets with a diverse set of language pairs demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over both text-only baselines and state-of-the-art methods. Project page: http://www.svcl.ucsd.edu/projects/valhalla. 近年来，通过考虑图像等辅助输入来设计更好的机器翻译系统引起了广泛关注。虽然现有方法比传统的纯文本翻译系统表现出良好的性能，但它们在推理过程中通常需要配对的文本和图像作为输入，这限制了它们在现实场景中的适用性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 VALHALLA 的视觉幻觉框架，该框架在推理时仅需要源句子，而是使用幻觉视觉表示进行多模态机器翻译。特别是，给定源句子，使用自回归幻觉变换器从输入文本预测离散视觉表示，并利用组合的文本和幻觉表示来获得目标翻译。我们使用具有交叉熵损失的标准反向传播与平移变压器联合训练幻觉变压器，同时受到额外损失的指导，该额外损失鼓励使用地面实况或幻觉视觉表示的预测之间的一致性。对具有不同语言对的三个标准翻译数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于纯文本基线和最先进方法的有效性。项目页面：http://www.svcl.ucsd.edu/projects/valhalla。 本文提出VALHALLA框架，通过在推理时仅使用源语言句子并生成幻觉视觉表示，实现无需配对图像的多模态机器翻译。 Yi Li,Rameswar Panda,Yoon Kim,Chun-Fu Chen,Rogerio Feris,David Cox,Nuno Vasconcelos cs.CV,cs.CL

authors: Marcos Ricardo Omena de Albuquerque Maximo

authors_text: Angelo Caregnato-Neto,Marcos Ricardo Omena de Albuquerque Maximo,Rubens Junqueira Magalhães Afonso
title: Real-time motion planning and decision-making for a group of differential drive robots under connectivity constraints using robust MPC and mixed-integer programming
title_zh: 使用稳健的 MPC 和混合整数编程在连接约束下对一组差动驱动机器人进行实时运动规划和决策
comment: Submitted to Advanced Robotics special issue on Online Motion Planning and Model Predictive Control
comments: Submitted to Advanced Robotics special issue on Online Motion Planning and Model Predictive Control
abstract: This work is concerned with the problem of planning trajectories and assigning tasks for a Multi-Agent System (MAS) comprised of differential drive robots. We propose a multirate hierarchical control structure that employs a planner based on robust Model Predictive Control (MPC) with mixed-integer programming (MIP) encoding. The planner computes trajectories and assigns tasks for each element of the group in real-time, while also guaranteeing the communication network of the MAS to be robustly connected at all times. Additionally, we provide a data-based methodology to estimate the disturbances sets required by the robust MPC formulation. The results are demonstrated with experiments in two obstacle-filled scenarios
summary: This work is concerned with the problem of planning trajectories and assigning tasks for a Multi-Agent System (MAS) comprised of differential drive robots. We propose a multirate hierarchical control structure that employs a planner based on robust Model Predictive Control (MPC) with mixed-integer programming (MIP) encoding. The planner computes trajectories and assigns tasks for each element of the group in real-time, while also guaranteeing the communication network of the MAS to be robustly connected at all times. Additionally, we provide a data-based methodology to estimate the disturbances sets required by the robust MPC formulation. The results are demonstrated with experiments in two obstacle-filled scenarios
abstract_zh: 这项工作涉及由差动驱动机器人组成的多智能体系统（MAS）的规划轨迹和分配任务的问题。我们提出了一种多速率分层控制结构，该结构采用基于具有混合整数编程（MIP）编码的鲁棒模型预测控制（MPC）的规划器。规划器实时计算轨迹并为组中的每个元素分配任务，同时还保证 MAS 的通信网络始终保持稳健连接。此外，我们还提供基于数据的方法来估计稳健 MPC 公式所需的扰动集。结果通过两个充满障碍物的场景中的实验得到证明

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于鲁棒MPC和混合整数规划的多速率分层控制方法，用于在通信约束下实现差速驱动机器人集群的实时运动规划与任务分配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时满足多机器人系统在动态环境中的实时轨迹规划、任务分配及通信网络鲁棒性保障需求。
AI.method: 设计多速率分层控制架构，结合鲁棒MPC与混合整数规划实现轨迹规划与任务分配，并采用数据驱动方法估计干扰集以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 通过两个障碍物场景的实验验证，证明方法能在保证通信连通性的同时实现有效实时规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多机器人系统在复杂动态环境下的协同控制提供了兼顾实时性与通信可靠性的解决方案。

authors_text: Fereshteh Shakeri,Malik Boudiaf,Sina Mohammadi,Ivaxi Sheth,Mohammad Havaei,Ismail Ben Ayed,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou
title: FHIST: A Benchmark for Few-shot Classification of Histological Images
title_zh: FHIST：组织学图像少样本分类的基准
abstract: Few-shot learning has recently attracted wide interest in image classification, but almost all the current public benchmarks are focused on natural images. The few-shot paradigm is highly relevant in medical-imaging applications due to the scarcity of labeled data, as annotations are expensive and require specialized expertise. However, in medical imaging, few-shot learning research is sparse, limited to private data sets and is at its early stage. In particular, the few-shot setting is of high interest in histology due to the diversity and fine granularity of cancer related tissue classification tasks, and the variety of data-preparation techniques. This paper introduces a highly diversified public benchmark, gathered from various public datasets, for few-shot histology data classification. We build few-shot tasks and base-training data with various tissue types, different levels of domain shifts stemming from various cancer sites, and different class-granularity levels, thereby reflecting realistic scenarios. We evaluate the performances of state-of-the-art few-shot learning methods on our benchmark, and observe that simple fine-tuning and regularization methods achieve better results than the popular meta-learning and episodic-training paradigm. Furthermore, we introduce three scenarios based on the domain shifts between the source and target histology data: near-domain, middle-domain and out-domain. Our experiments display the potential of few-shot learning in histology classification, with state-of-art few shot learning methods approaching the supervised-learning baselines in the near-domain setting. In our out-domain setting, for 5-way 5-shot, the best performing method reaches 60% accuracy. We believe that our work could help in building realistic evaluations and fair comparisons of few-shot learning methods and will further encourage research in the few-shot paradigm.
summary: Few-shot learning has recently attracted wide interest in image classification, but almost all the current public benchmarks are focused on natural images. The few-shot paradigm is highly relevant in medical-imaging applications due to the scarcity of labeled data, as annotations are expensive and require specialized expertise. However, in medical imaging, few-shot learning research is sparse, limited to private data sets and is at its early stage. In particular, the few-shot setting is of high interest in histology due to the diversity and fine granularity of cancer related tissue classification tasks, and the variety of data-preparation techniques. This paper introduces a highly diversified public benchmark, gathered from various public datasets, for few-shot histology data classification. We build few-shot tasks and base-training data with various tissue types, different levels of domain shifts stemming from various cancer sites, and different class-granularity levels, thereby reflecting realistic scenarios. We evaluate the performances of state-of-the-art few-shot learning methods on our benchmark, and observe that simple fine-tuning and regularization methods achieve better results than the popular meta-learning and episodic-training paradigm. Furthermore, we introduce three scenarios based on the domain shifts between the source and target histology data: near-domain, middle-domain and out-domain. Our experiments display the potential of few-shot learning in histology classification, with state-of-art few shot learning methods approaching the supervised-learning baselines in the near-domain setting. In our out-domain setting, for 5-way 5-shot, the best performing method reaches 60% accuracy. We believe that our work could help in building realistic evaluations and fair comparisons of few-shot learning methods and will further encourage research in the few-shot paradigm.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习最近引起了图像分类的广泛兴趣，但几乎所有当前的公共基准都集中在自然图像上。由于标记数据的稀缺性，少镜头范式在医学成像应用中高度相关，因为注释成本昂贵并且需要专门的专业知识。然而，在医学成像领域，少样本学习研究很少，仅限于私人数据集，并且还处于早期阶段。特别是，由于癌症相关组织分类任务的多样性和细粒度以及数据准备技术的多样性，少样本设置在组织学中引起了高度关注。本文介绍了从各种公共数据集中收集的高度多样化的公共基准，用于少样本组织学数据分类。我们使用各种组织类型、不同癌症部位产生的不同级别的域转移以及不同的类粒度级别构建少样本任务和基础训练数据，从而反映现实场景。我们在基准测试中评估了最先进的少样本学习方法的性能，并观察到简单的微调和正则化方法比流行的元学习和情景训练范例取得了更好的结果。此外，我们根据源组织学数据和目标组织学数据之间的域转移引入了三种场景：近域、中域和外域。我们的实验展示了少样本学习在组织学分类中的潜力，最先进的少样本学习方法接近近域设置中的监督学习基线。在我们的外域设置中，对于 5 路 5 次射击，性能最佳的方法达到 60% 的准确率。我们相信，我们的工作可以帮助建立对少样本学习方法的现实评估和公平比较，并将进一步鼓励对少样本范式的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FHIST基准，用于少量样本下的组织学图像分类，以解决医学影像中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少量样本学习基准主要针对自然图像，而医学影像尤其是组织学图像因标注成本高且分类任务复杂，缺乏公开的基准测试集。
AI.method: 从多个公开数据集中收集多样化组织学图像，构建包含不同组织类型、领域偏移和分类粒度的任务，并评估主流少量样本学习方法的性能。
AI.result: 简单微调和正则化方法优于元学习和情景训练范式；在近领域设置下，少量样本方法接近监督学习基线；远领域设置下5-way 5-shot最高准确率达60%。
AI.conclusion: FHIST基准为少量样本学习在组织学分类中的研究提供了现实评估框架，推动该领域方法的公平比较与进一步探索。

tldr: 本文提出FHIST基准，用于少量样本下的组织学图像分类，以解决医学影像中数据稀缺的问题。
motivation: 现有少量样本学习基准主要针对自然图像，而医学影像尤其是组织学图像因标注成本高且分类任务复杂，缺乏公开的基准测试集。
method: 从多个公开数据集中收集多样化组织学图像，构建包含不同组织类型、领域偏移和分类粒度的任务，并评估主流少量样本学习方法的性能。
result: 简单微调和正则化方法优于元学习和情景训练范式；在近领域设置下，少量样本方法接近监督学习基线；远领域设置下5-way 5-shot最高准确率达60%。
conclusion: FHIST基准为少量样本学习在组织学分类中的研究提供了现实评估框架，推动该领域方法的公平比较与进一步探索。
search_text: FHIST: A Benchmark for Few-shot Classification of Histological Images FHIST：组织学图像少样本分类的基准 Few-shot learning has recently attracted wide interest in image classification, but almost all the current public benchmarks are focused on natural images. The few-shot paradigm is highly relevant in medical-imaging applications due to the scarcity of labeled data, as annotations are expensive and require specialized expertise. However, in medical imaging, few-shot learning research is sparse, limited to private data sets and is at its early stage. In particular, the few-shot setting is of high interest in histology due to the diversity and fine granularity of cancer related tissue classification tasks, and the variety of data-preparation techniques. This paper introduces a highly diversified public benchmark, gathered from various public datasets, for few-shot histology data classification. We build few-shot tasks and base-training data with various tissue types, different levels of domain shifts stemming from various cancer sites, and different class-granularity levels, thereby reflecting realistic scenarios. We evaluate the performances of state-of-the-art few-shot learning methods on our benchmark, and observe that simple fine-tuning and regularization methods achieve better results than the popular meta-learning and episodic-training paradigm. Furthermore, we introduce three scenarios based on the domain shifts between the source and target histology data: near-domain, middle-domain and out-domain. Our experiments display the potential of few-shot learning in histology classification, with state-of-art few shot learning methods approaching the supervised-learning baselines in the near-domain setting. In our out-domain setting, for 5-way 5-shot, the best performing method reaches 60% accuracy. We believe that our work could help in building realistic evaluations and fair comparisons of few-shot learning methods and will further encourage research in the few-shot paradigm. 少样本学习最近引起了图像分类的广泛兴趣，但几乎所有当前的公共基准都集中在自然图像上。由于标记数据的稀缺性，少镜头范式在医学成像应用中高度相关，因为注释成本昂贵并且需要专门的专业知识。然而，在医学成像领域，少样本学习研究很少，仅限于私人数据集，并且还处于早期阶段。特别是，由于癌症相关组织分类任务的多样性和细粒度以及数据准备技术的多样性，少样本设置在组织学中引起了高度关注。本文介绍了从各种公共数据集中收集的高度多样化的公共基准，用于少样本组织学数据分类。我们使用各种组织类型、不同癌症部位产生的不同级别的域转移以及不同的类粒度级别构建少样本任务和基础训练数据，从而反映现实场景。我们在基准测试中评估了最先进的少样本学习方法的性能，并观察到简单的微调和正则化方法比流行的元学习和情景训练范例取得了更好的结果。此外，我们根据源组织学数据和目标组织学数据之间的域转移引入了三种场景：近域、中域和外域。我们的实验展示了少样本学习在组织学分类中的潜力，最先进的少样本学习方法接近近域设置中的监督学习基线。在我们的外域设置中，对于 5 路 5 次射击，性能最佳的方法达到 60% 的准确率。我们相信，我们的工作可以帮助建立对少样本学习方法的现实评估和公平比较，并将进一步鼓励对少样本范式的研究。 本文提出FHIST基准，用于少量样本下的组织学图像分类，以解决医学影像中数据稀缺的问题。 Fereshteh Shakeri,Malik Boudiaf,Sina Mohammadi,Ivaxi Sheth,Mohammad Havaei,Ismail Ben Ayed,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou cs.CV

authors_text: Laura Piispanen,Marcel Pfaffhauser,James Wootton,Julian Togelius,Annakaisa Kultima
title: Defining Quantum Games
title_zh: 定义量子游戏
comment: 24 pages (38 with references), 24 pictures in 6 figures, 4 tables
comments: 24 pages (38 with references), 24 pictures in 6 figures, 4 tables
abstract: In this research article, we survey existing quantum physics-related games and, based on this survey, propose a definition for the concept of quantum games. We define a quantum game as any type of rule-based game that either employs the principles of quantum physics or references quantum phenomena or the theory of quantum physics through any of three proposed dimensions: the perceivable dimension of quantum physics, the dimension of quantum technologies, and the dimension of scientific purposes, such as citizen science or education. We also discuss the concept of quantum computer games, which are games on quantum computers, as well as definitions for the concept of science games. Various games explore quantum physics and quantum computing through digital, analogue, and hybrid means, with various incentives driving their development. As interest in games as educational tools for supporting quantum literacy grows, understanding the diverse landscape of quantum games becomes increasingly important. We propose that the three dimensions of quantum games identified in this article be used for designing, analysing, and defining the phenomenon of quantum games.
summary: In this research article, we survey existing quantum physics-related games and, based on this survey, propose a definition for the concept of quantum games. We define a quantum game as any type of rule-based game that either employs the principles of quantum physics or references quantum phenomena or the theory of quantum physics through any of three proposed dimensions: the perceivable dimension of quantum physics, the dimension of quantum technologies, and the dimension of scientific purposes, such as citizen science or education. We also discuss the concept of quantum computer games, which are games on quantum computers, as well as definitions for the concept of science games. Various games explore quantum physics and quantum computing through digital, analogue, and hybrid means, with various incentives driving their development. As interest in games as educational tools for supporting quantum literacy grows, understanding the diverse landscape of quantum games becomes increasingly important. We propose that the three dimensions of quantum games identified in this article be used for designing, analysing, and defining the phenomenon of quantum games.
abstract_zh: 在这篇研究文章中，我们调查了现有的量子物理相关游戏，并基于此调查提出了量子游戏概念的定义。我们将量子游戏定义为任何类型的基于规则的游戏，它要么采用量子物理原理，要么通过三个提出的维度中的任何一个引用量子现象或量子物理理论：量子物理的可感知维度、量子技术的维度以及科学目的的维度，例如公民科学或教育。我们还讨论了量子计算机游戏的概念，即量子计算机上的游戏，以及科学游戏概念的定义。各种游戏通过数字、模拟和混合方式探索量子物理和量子计算，并通过各种激励措施推动其发展。随着人们对游戏作为支持量子素养的教育工具的兴趣不断增长，了解量子游戏的多样化景观变得越来越重要。我们建议将本文中确定的量子博弈的三个维度用于设计、分析和定义量子博弈的现象。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查现有量子物理相关游戏，提出量子游戏的定义及三个分析维度。
AI.motivation: 随着游戏作为量子教育工具的重要性提升，亟需明确量子游戏的范畴与分类标准。
AI.method: 系统梳理量子游戏案例，基于可感知维度、技术维度和科学目标维度构建定义框架。
AI.result: 提出量子游戏的三维定义模型，区分量子计算机游戏与科学游戏概念，揭示其发展驱动力。
AI.conclusion: 三维框架可有效指导量子游戏的设计与研究，助力量子素养教育发展。

authors_text: Elias Villalvazo-Avila,Francisco Lopez-Tiro,Daniel Flores-Araiza,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Jonathan El-Beze,Jacques Hubert,Christian Daul
title: Comparing feature fusion strategies for Deep Learning-based kidney stone identification
title_zh: 比较基于深度学习的肾结石识别的特征融合策略
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, XXVIIIème Colloque Francophone de Traitement du Signal et des Images
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures, XXVIIIème Colloque Francophone de Traitement du Signal et des Images
abstract: This contribution presents a deep-learning method for extracting and fusing image information acquired from different viewpoints with the aim to produce more discriminant object features. Our approach was specifically designed to mimic the morpho-constitutional analysis used by urologists to visually classify kidney stones by inspecting the sections and surfaces of their fragments. Deep feature fusion strategies improved the results of single view extraction backbone models by more than 10\% in terms of precision of the kidney stones classification.
summary: This contribution presents a deep-learning method for extracting and fusing image information acquired from different viewpoints with the aim to produce more discriminant object features. Our approach was specifically designed to mimic the morpho-constitutional analysis used by urologists to visually classify kidney stones by inspecting the sections and surfaces of their fragments. Deep feature fusion strategies improved the results of single view extraction backbone models by more than 10\% in terms of precision of the kidney stones classification.
abstract_zh: 这项贡献提出了一种深度学习方法，用于提取和融合从不同视点获取的图像信息，旨在产生更具辨别力的对象特征。我们的方法专门设计用于模仿泌尿科医生使用的形态构成分析，通过检查肾结石碎片的切片和表面来对肾结石进行视觉分类。深度特征融合策略将单视图提取骨干模型的结果在肾结石分类精度方面提高了 10% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习方法，通过融合多视角图像特征提升肾结石分类的精确度。
AI.motivation: 现有单视角模型在肾结石分类中存在判别性不足的问题，而泌尿科医生通过多视角形态分析实现更准确分类。
AI.method: 设计深度特征融合策略，模仿医生对肾结石碎片截面与表面的多视角形态分析，整合多视角图像特征。
AI.result: 特征融合策略使单视角模型的分类精确度提升超过10%。
AI.conclusion: 多视角特征融合有效增强肾结石分类性能，验证了医学图像分析中多视角信息融合的价值。

authors_text: Yinlam Chow,Aza Tulepbergenov,Ofir Nachum,MoonKyung Ryu,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier
title: A Mixture-of-Expert Approach to RL-based Dialogue Management
title_zh: 基于强化学习的对话管理的专家混合方法
abstract: Despite recent advancements in language models (LMs), their application to dialogue management (DM) problems and ability to carry on rich conversations remain a challenge. We use reinforcement learning (RL) to develop a dialogue agent that avoids being short-sighted (outputting generic utterances) and maximizes overall user satisfaction. Most existing RL approaches to DM train the agent at the word-level, and thus, have to deal with a combinatorially complex action space even for a medium-size vocabulary. As a result, they struggle to produce a successful and engaging dialogue even if they are warm-started with a pre-trained LM. To address this issue, we develop a RL-based DM using a novel mixture of expert language model (MoE-LM) that consists of (i) a LM capable of learning diverse semantics for conversation histories, (ii) a number of {\em specialized} LMs (or experts) capable of generating utterances corresponding to a particular attribute or personality, and (iii) a RL-based DM that performs dialogue planning with the utterances generated by the experts. Our MoE approach provides greater flexibility to generate sensible utterances with different intents and allows RL to focus on conversational-level DM. We compare it with SOTA baselines on open-domain dialogues and demonstrate its effectiveness both in terms of the diversity and sensibility of the generated utterances and the overall DM performance.
summary: Despite recent advancements in language models (LMs), their application to dialogue management (DM) problems and ability to carry on rich conversations remain a challenge. We use reinforcement learning (RL) to develop a dialogue agent that avoids being short-sighted (outputting generic utterances) and maximizes overall user satisfaction. Most existing RL approaches to DM train the agent at the word-level, and thus, have to deal with a combinatorially complex action space even for a medium-size vocabulary. As a result, they struggle to produce a successful and engaging dialogue even if they are warm-started with a pre-trained LM. To address this issue, we develop a RL-based DM using a novel mixture of expert language model (MoE-LM) that consists of (i) a LM capable of learning diverse semantics for conversation histories, (ii) a number of {\em specialized} LMs (or experts) capable of generating utterances corresponding to a particular attribute or personality, and (iii) a RL-based DM that performs dialogue planning with the utterances generated by the experts. Our MoE approach provides greater flexibility to generate sensible utterances with different intents and allows RL to focus on conversational-level DM. We compare it with SOTA baselines on open-domain dialogues and demonstrate its effectiveness both in terms of the diversity and sensibility of the generated utterances and the overall DM performance.
abstract_zh: 尽管语言模型 (LM) 最近取得了进展，但它们在对话管理 (DM) 问题中的应用以及进行丰富对话的能力仍然是一个挑战。我们使用强化学习（RL）来开发对话代理，避免目光短浅（输出通用话语）并最大限度地提高总体用户满意度。大多数现有的 DM 强化学习方法都是在单词级别训练智能体，因此，即使对于中等大小的词汇量，也必须处理组合复杂的动作空间。因此，即使他们是通过预先训练的 LM 进行热启动的，他们也很难产生成功且引人入胜的对话。为了解决这个问题，我们使用专家语言模型（MoE-LM）的新颖组合开发了一种基于强化学习的DM，该模型由（i）能够学习对话历史不同语义的LM，（ii）许多能够生成与特定属性或个性相对应的话语的{\em专门}LM（或专家），以及（iii）一个基于RL的DM，利用专家生成的话语执行对话规划。我们的 MoE 方法提供了更大的灵活性，可以生成具有不同意图的合理话语，并允许 RL 专注于会话级 DM。我们将其与开放域对话的 SOTA 基线进行比较，并证明其在生成话语的多样性和敏感性以及整体 DM 性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合专家（MoE）的强化学习（RL）对话管理方法，通过结合通用语言模型和专用专家模型，提升对话系统的多样性和合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于RL的对话管理方法在词级训练导致动作空间复杂，难以生成连贯且符合用户意图的对话，需更灵活的框架来平衡多样性与任务目标。
AI.method: 构建包含通用语言模型（学习对话语义）、多个专用专家模型（生成特定属性回应）及RL对话规划器的MoE-LM框架，通过RL优化整体对话策略。
AI.result: 在开放领域对话任务中，生成的回复在多样性和合理性指标上优于现有SOTA方法，且对话管理整体性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MoE-LM框架有效解决了传统RL方法的局限性，为复杂对话管理提供了新思路，未来可探索更动态的专家组合机制。

search_text: A Mixture-of-Expert Approach to RL-based Dialogue Management 基于强化学习的对话管理的专家混合方法 Despite recent advancements in language models (LMs), their application to dialogue management (DM) problems and ability to carry on rich conversations remain a challenge. We use reinforcement learning (RL) to develop a dialogue agent that avoids being short-sighted (outputting generic utterances) and maximizes overall user satisfaction. Most existing RL approaches to DM train the agent at the word-level, and thus, have to deal with a combinatorially complex action space even for a medium-size vocabulary. As a result, they struggle to produce a successful and engaging dialogue even if they are warm-started with a pre-trained LM. To address this issue, we develop a RL-based DM using a novel mixture of expert language model (MoE-LM) that consists of (i) a LM capable of learning diverse semantics for conversation histories, (ii) a number of {\em specialized} LMs (or experts) capable of generating utterances corresponding to a particular attribute or personality, and (iii) a RL-based DM that performs dialogue planning with the utterances generated by the experts. Our MoE approach provides greater flexibility to generate sensible utterances with different intents and allows RL to focus on conversational-level DM. We compare it with SOTA baselines on open-domain dialogues and demonstrate its effectiveness both in terms of the diversity and sensibility of the generated utterances and the overall DM performance. 尽管语言模型 (LM) 最近取得了进展，但它们在对话管理 (DM) 问题中的应用以及进行丰富对话的能力仍然是一个挑战。我们使用强化学习（RL）来开发对话代理，避免目光短浅（输出通用话语）并最大限度地提高总体用户满意度。大多数现有的 DM 强化学习方法都是在单词级别训练智能体，因此，即使对于中等大小的词汇量，也必须处理组合复杂的动作空间。因此，即使他们是通过预先训练的 LM 进行热启动的，他们也很难产生成功且引人入胜的对话。为了解决这个问题，我们使用专家语言模型（MoE-LM）的新颖组合开发了一种基于强化学习的DM，该模型由（i）能够学习对话历史不同语义的LM，（ii）许多能够生成与特定属性或个性相对应的话语的{\em专门}LM（或专家），以及（iii）一个基于RL的DM，利用专家生成的话语执行对话规划。我们的 MoE 方法提供了更大的灵活性，可以生成具有不同意图的合理话语，并允许 RL 专注于会话级 DM。我们将其与开放域对话的 SOTA 基线进行比较，并证明其在生成话语的多样性和敏感性以及整体 DM 性能方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于混合专家（MoE）的强化学习（RL）对话管理方法，通过结合通用语言模型和专用专家模型，提升对话系统的多样性和合理性。 Yinlam Chow,Aza Tulepbergenov,Ofir Nachum,MoonKyung Ryu,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Craig Boutilier cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: James Oldfield,Christos Tzelepis,Yannis Panagakis,Mihalis A. Nicolaou,Ioannis Patras
title: PandA: Unsupervised Learning of Parts and Appearances in the Feature Maps of GANs
title_zh: PandA：GAN 特征图中零件和外观的无监督学习
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/james-oldfield/PandA
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/james-oldfield/PandA
abstract: Recent advances in the understanding of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have led to remarkable progress in visual editing and synthesis tasks, capitalizing on the rich semantics that are embedded in the latent spaces of pre-trained GANs. However, existing methods are often tailored to specific GAN architectures and are limited to either discovering global semantic directions that do not facilitate localized control, or require some form of supervision through manually provided regions or segmentation masks. In this light, we present an architecture-agnostic approach that jointly discovers factors representing spatial parts and their appearances in an entirely unsupervised fashion. These factors are obtained by applying a semi-nonnegative tensor factorization on the feature maps, which in turn enables context-aware local image editing with pixel-level control. In addition, we show that the discovered appearance factors correspond to saliency maps that localize concepts of interest, without using any labels. Experiments on a wide range of GAN architectures and datasets show that, in comparison to the state of the art, our method is far more efficient in terms of training time and, most importantly, provides much more accurate localized control. Our code is available at: https://github.com/james-oldfield/PandA.
summary: Recent advances in the understanding of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have led to remarkable progress in visual editing and synthesis tasks, capitalizing on the rich semantics that are embedded in the latent spaces of pre-trained GANs. However, existing methods are often tailored to specific GAN architectures and are limited to either discovering global semantic directions that do not facilitate localized control, or require some form of supervision through manually provided regions or segmentation masks. In this light, we present an architecture-agnostic approach that jointly discovers factors representing spatial parts and their appearances in an entirely unsupervised fashion. These factors are obtained by applying a semi-nonnegative tensor factorization on the feature maps, which in turn enables context-aware local image editing with pixel-level control. In addition, we show that the discovered appearance factors correspond to saliency maps that localize concepts of interest, without using any labels. Experiments on a wide range of GAN architectures and datasets show that, in comparison to the state of the art, our method is far more efficient in terms of training time and, most importantly, provides much more accurate localized control. Our code is available at: https://github.com/james-oldfield/PandA.
abstract_zh: 最近对生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的理解取得了进展，利用预训练 GAN 潜在空间中嵌入的丰富语义，在视觉编辑和合成任务方面取得了显着进展。然而，现有的方法通常是针对特定的 GAN 架构定制的，并且仅限于发现不利于局部控制的全局语义方向，或者需要通过手动提供的区域或分割掩模进行某种形式的监督。有鉴于此，我们提出了一种与架构无关的方法，以完全无人监督的方式共同发现代表空间部分及其外观的因素。这些因子是通过在特征图上应用半非负张量分解来获得的，这反过来又可以通过像素级控制进行上下文感知的本地图像编辑。此外，我们还表明，发现的外观因素对应于定位感兴趣概念的显着图，而不使用任何标签。对各种 GAN 架构和数据集的实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，我们的方法在训练时间方面要高效得多，最重要的是，提供了更准确的局部控制。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/james-oldfield/PandA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的通用方法，用于在生成对抗网络（GAN）的特征图中同时学习局部部件和外观因素，实现像素级图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN编辑方法依赖特定架构或人工标注的监督信息，难以实现灵活的局部控制，且效率较低。
AI.method: 通过半非负张量分解对GAN特征图进行无监督分解，提取空间部件和外观因素，无需人工标注即可实现上下文感知的局部编辑。
AI.result: 在多种GAN架构和数据集上实验表明，该方法训练效率更高，且能提供更精确的局部控制能力，外观因子可对应无监督的显著性图。
AI.conclusion: PandA方法为跨架构的GAN局部编辑提供了高效且通用的解决方案，代码已开源。
